jobs.title: Everything in its proper place
jobs.prompt: A slender girl, around 10 years old, with kind bright eyes and a gentle face. Her blonde hair is disheveled, escaping from under a simple kerchief. She wears a homespun dress of sturdy linen in muted earth tones, smudged with mud. Clutching a broken willow branch, she's being pulled from a muddy ditch by the strong hand of a middle-aged peddler. He has a weathered face, brown hair, and wears practical traveling clothes. The moment captures her relief and his determination. Setting: a dilapidated stone bridge over a reed-filled ditch near a grand, old mansion by a lake. Overcast daylight. Key light from above, soft fill light casting long shadows. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. Accents of green from the willow and marsh grass.

jobs.title: Five peas from a pod
jobs.prompt:
A frail, pale girl, around 12, sits in bed, her thin face alight with wonder. Large, hopeful blue eyes, light blonde hair, delicate skin recovering from illness. She wears a simple white cotton nightgown. The iconic moment: She gently touches a single, vibrant pink pea blossom.

Setting: a humble, sun-drenched garret room. A window is open to reveal the tiny pea plant clinging to life outside on an old, weathered board. Moss and soil are visible in the crack where the pea sprouted.

Lighting: Golden hour sunlight streams through the window, casting a warm glow on the girl and illuminating the blossom. Soft backlighting emphasizes the delicate details of the scene.

Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. Warm earth tones with pink and green accents.

jobs.title: Godfather's picture book
jobs.prompt:
A curious young boy, around 7 years old with a slightly upturned nose, stands mesmerized by his Godfather, a kindly, elderly man with a neatly trimmed white beard, rosy cheeks, and twinkling blue eyes. They are leaning over a large, handmade scrapbook filled with colorful cut-out pictures and hand-drawn illustrations.

Godfather wears a warm, brown tweed jacket and a patterned burgundy vest, holding a pair of half-moon spectacles in his hand. The boy is dressed in a blue woolen tunic and tan leggings.

The key scene is when Godfather is showing the boy the page depicting the Copenhagen harbor with old oil lamps being replaced by gaslights. The boy's face is illuminated with wonder and imagination as Godfather gestures towards the page.

The setting is Godfather’s cozy, book-lined study, filled with the warm glow of a crackling fireplace. The time is late afternoon, casting long shadows and creating an intimate atmosphere.

Warm, golden light emanates from the fireplace, with soft, diffused fill light from a nearby window. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor style, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Golden treasure
jobs.prompt: A young boy, Peter "Golden Treasure," age 10, slender build with bright, fiery red hair, freckled face. Round, innocent face, wide, hopeful blue eyes, fair skin. Wears a slightly oversized drummer boy uniform: blue wool coat, brass buttons, red trim, white cross-strap, carries drumsticks tucked into his belt. In the midst of a chaotic battlefield, Peter stands firm, beating his drum with unwavering focus. Bombs burst around him, smoke fills the air. Grey, overcast sky, muddy ground. Key light from an unseen source, highlighting the red hair. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition, warm earth tones with splashes of red and gold.

jobs.title: Grandmother
jobs.prompt: A kind, elderly woman, Grandmother, with a wrinkled face, luminous eyes, and white hair, sits in her armchair, looking peacefully at a withered rose inside an antique hymn book with silver clasps. She wears a heavy silk dress with large floral patterns in muted greens, browns, and a hint of rose. A single tear falls from her eye onto the rose, causing a faint ethereal glow. The setting is her cozy, sunlit parlor, filled with antique furniture. Faint, translucent figures of a young woman and man are visible within the rose's glow, holding hands in a forest clearing. Key light streams in from a window, casting a warm, nostalgic golden hour tone. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Great-Grandfather
jobs.prompt: A kind, elderly Great-Grandfather, age 80, thin but spry, sits in a high-backed chair, looking fondly at his grandson Frederick, age 25, tall and strong. Great-Grandfather has a wrinkled face, warm brown eyes, a gentle smile, and wispy white hair. Frederick has a square jaw, intelligent blue eyes, neatly combed brown hair, and fair skin. Great-Grandfather wears a brown wool coat, spectacles perched on his nose, and a gold pocket watch. Frederick is dressed in a blue tweed suit and holds a recently arrived letter from America. The scene captures the moment Great-Grandfather examines a photograph of Frederick's fiancée with a magnifying glass, bathed in the warm glow of late afternoon sunlight streaming through a window of the cozy library, illuminating dust motes in the air. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Heartache
jobs.prompt: A ragged but beautiful little girl, about 6, with bright, tear-filled blue eyes, watching sadly from outside a wooden fence. Her face is heart-shaped, her skin is fair, and her blonde hair is a mass of tangled curls. She wears a patched brown dress of roughspun fabric, too big for her, and no shoes. She stands near the tannery yard entrance, gazing intently, her expression a mix of longing and disappointment. Inside the yard, a decorated dog's grave is visible: flowerpots, sand, and a beer bottle stuck upside down. Other children are vaguely visible, walking away. It is late afternoon, with soft, diffused sunlight filtering through the tannery buildings casting long shadows. The overall mood is melancholic. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Holger Danske
jobs.prompt: Aged but powerful Holger Danske, the legendary Danish hero, muscular physique apparent beneath his weathered steel armor. Long, flowing white beard, partially embedded into a marble round table. Stern face, deep-set blue eyes gazing vigilantly. He is seated in Kronenburg's deep cellar. Christmas Eve. An angel in white robes whispers in his ear, assuring him Denmark is safe. The cellar is dimly lit by a single candle, casting long shadows. Faint moonlight filters in from a high window. The air is thick with anticipation and ancient magic. A studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor illustration, soft bokeh background, suitable for a classic storybook cover. Warm earth tones, accented with crimson and steel.

jobs.title: Ib and little Christina
jobs.prompt:
Seven-year-old Ib, small and sturdy, red-cheeked, leads six-year-old Christina, delicate and fair, through a dense forest. Christina has a round face, wide blue eyes filled with tears, and tangled blonde hair. She wears a simple cotton dress, smudged with dirt. Ib sports wooden shoes and a patched woolen tunic. They grasp hands tightly, their expressions a mix of fear and determination.

Lost in the woods after the pig incident, they stumble upon a blackberry thicket, their faces stained purple. Sunlight filters through the canopy, dappling the forest floor. The background showcases towering trees of Gudenau forest.

Golden hour lighting casts long shadows. The key light illuminates the children's anxious faces, highlighting their shared distress. A Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor style, soft bokeh background, evokes a sense of storybook nostalgia. Earth tones dominate the color scheme, with accents of deep purple from the blackberries and the emerald green of the forest foliage.

jobs.title: In a thousand years
jobs.prompt:
A group of bright-eyed, curious young American tourists, around 18-22 years old, diverse ethnicities, lean athletic builds, dressed in futuristic lightweight travel clothes. The woman has a slender face, hazel eyes, warm tan skin, and braided auburn hair. The man has a strong jaw, brown eyes, fair skin, and neatly cropped black hair.

She’s wearing a slate blue travel suit with a silver scarf; he's in a khaki jacket with a high tech backpack. They stand on the observation deck of a sleek, glass-domed airship marked "New World Tours".

They gaze with wonder at the snow-dusted ruins of Mont Blanc in the distance as the airship floats above a lush green alpine valley. Gentle sunlight filters through the clouds, casting a soft, warm glow on the scene. Golden hour lighting evokes both nostalgia and hope.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: In the children's room
jobs.prompt:
A wide-eyed, freckled little ANNA, age 6, with a mischievous grin. Round face, bright blue eyes, messy blonde pigtails, fair skin. She wears a blue and white gingham dress, frilly white apron, and red Mary Janes, clutching her beloved, tattered DOLL. Key scene: Anna gasping with delight as her GRANDFATHER, a kindly old man with twinkling eyes, stages a play with her toys on the floor.

Grandfather has a long white beard, rosy cheeks, and a bald head fringed with white hair. He wears a tweed jacket, spectacles perched on his nose, gesturing dramatically with a PIPE HEAD toy representing a father. Other toy actors - a WAISTCOAT lover, a GLOVE daughter, a BOOT suitor - are arranged around.

Setting: A cozy, cluttered children's room, late afternoon sunlight filtering through the window, casting playful shadows on haphazardly arranged books acting as theater walls. Toys scattered everywhere — wooden blocks, stuffed animals. Golden hour lighting, warm and inviting, accentuating the magical atmosphere of childlike imagination.

Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background emphasizing the toys, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: In the duck yard
jobs.prompt: A small, injured songbird, ruffled brown feathers, one wing drooping, sits beside a large, white Portuguese duck with an elegant bearing, mid-shower, water droplets flying. The duck's face is kind but slightly pompous, one eye blinking, light pink beak parted as if speaking. She wears a proud expression, plumage slightly dishevelled. The duckyard setting includes straw, green grass and scattered feed. Sunlight streams in, creating patches of golden light, illuminating the scene with a warm glow. Other ducks look on with curiosity. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Kept secret but not forgotten
jobs.prompt:
A kind, young Lady Mette Mogens, around 20, with a slender physique and determined expression. Her face is oval-shaped, with bright, compassionate blue eyes and rosy cheeks; light brown hair pulled back in a practical braid, fair skin tone. She wears a simple but elegant wool dress, dark green with subtle gold embroidery, cinched at the waist with a leather belt, indicating her noble status but also readiness for action.

The scene: Lady Mette, recently freed from the kennel, fleeing on horseback through a dark, windswept night, together with the young servant boy guiding her; his face is anxious but determined. Torches flicker dimly in the background, casting long shadows from the manor house.

Setting: Grimsly manor.
Lighting: Moonlight breaking through heavy clouds, casting an eerie glow on the landscape, emphasizing the urgency and danger of their escape.

Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Little Claus and big Claus
jobs.prompt:
Little Claus, age 12, thin and wiry, stands triumphant yet anxious, clutching a bulging sack made of horse hide. Round-faced farmer, eyes wide with mingled fear and curiosity. The farmer's wife, stout and flustered, looks on.

Little Claus has a dirt-streaked face, wide blue eyes, and messy blond hair. He wears patched brown breeches and a homespun shirt.

The farmer is dressed in a brown wool waistcoat and has a ruddy complexion .The farmer's wife wears a blue dress and a white apron, her face expressing worry.

The key scene: Little Claus directs the farmer to a large wooden chest, claiming his "conjurer" has trapped the devil inside, while secretly, the sexton is hiding in the chest. The farmer nervously approaches.

Inside the dimly lit farmhouse, a table laden with half-eaten food—roast meat, fish—implies a recent feast. A crackling fire warms the scene.

Warm light from the hearth casts long shadows, highlighting the deception. Candlelight flickers, enhancing the suspense.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Little Ida's Flowers
jobs.prompt: A young girl, Little Ida, around 6 years old, with a curious expression, delicate features, rosy cheeks. Round face, bright blue eyes, light blonde hair in braids, fair skin. She wears a white cotton nightgown with lace trim and a blue ribbon sash, holding a small china teapot. She's gently pouring tea into a small cup for withered flowers arranged in her doll's bed. The flowers are various types, mostly drooping with fatigue. The scene takes place in Ida's cozy bedroom at night. The room is softly lit by a warm, inviting night-lamp on a bedside table, casting gentle shadows. Doll's bed has patterned blue and white fabric. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Little Tuk
jobs.prompt:
A boy named Little Tuk, around 8 years old, with a slightly chubby physique and tousled hair, sits cross-legged on a large, open geography book. His face is round, with wide, curious brown eyes and a dusting of freckles, a thoughtful expression. He wears a simple linen tunic in faded blue, patched brown shorts, and no shoes.

He is surrounded by whimsical representations of Zealand towns: a miniature hen clucking beside him (Kjoge), a wooden parrot perched precariously on the book's edge (Prastoe), and tiny ships sailing on a drawn lake within the book itself (Corsor). Behind him, a king's castle rises in the background, with towers illuminated by a warm, inviting light.

The setting is his humble attic bedroom late at night. Soft moonlight streams through a small window, casting long shadows and illuminating dust motes hanging in the air. The main light comes from a magical glow emanating from the geography book.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Luck may lie in a pin
jobs.prompt: A humble, middle-aged turner with a kind, slightly weary face and hands calloused from work. Thinning brown hair, gentle blue eyes filled with surprise and dawning realization, fair skin weathered by the sun. He wears a simple, patched linen shirt in muted earth tones, and a brown leather apron. He's in his cluttered workshop, illuminated by soft afternoon light, holding a newly-crafted tiny wooden pear, examining it closely. Scattered around his feet are wood shavings and tools. Through the window, a gnarled pear tree nearly bare in the late autumn. The most prominent branch is snapped off. The background depicts the quaint village. A strong beam of sunlight highlights the wooden pear in his hand. Hand-painted watercolor in a Studio Ghibli style, soft bokeh background, cover art composition.

jobs.title: Moving day
jobs.prompt:
A wizened old watchman named Ole, 70s, slight hunch, stands smiling gently, eyes twinkling with wisdom, thin white hair neatly combed, fair skin showing age spots. He wears a dark blue woolen watchman's coat with brass buttons. In his weathered hands, he holds an antique hourglass filled with shimmering golden sand.

The key scene captures Ole standing atop his weathered gray tower during "moving day." Below him, a miniature, bustling cityscape sprawls, filled with tiny figures hauling furniture and carts overflowing with belongings. A discarded, vibrant green Christmas tree decorated with tarnished tinsel lies forlornly in the street.

The setting is a whimsical, slightly overcast day; the lighting is soft and diffused, mimicking a golden hour glow. A single ray of light illuminates the hourglass in Ole's hands, emphasizing the passage of time.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, book cover composition, warm earth tones with accents of blue and green, detailed yet dreamlike.

jobs.title: Ole-Luk-Oie, the Dream-God
jobs.prompt: A young boy, Hjalmar, around 7 years old, with a slender physique and curious expression. Face round, eyes wide and blue, blonde hair neatly combed, fair skin. He wears a blue velvet jacket, white lace collar, and brown breeches. He stands inside a gilt picture frame, positioned in lush green grass, bathed in sunlight filtering through tree branches. A red-and-white boat with silver sails floats on a stream. Six swans with golden circlets and blue stars pull the boat. Butterflies flutter near vibrant, colorful flowers. Background shows castles and forests. Key moment: Hjalmar reaches for half of a sugar heart offered by a princess on a balcony. Warm, inviting light. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Ole the tower-keeper
jobs.prompt:
A kindly, older tower-keeper named Ole, perhaps 60s, with a slight build, stands watch. His face is round and weathered, with gentle crinkles around warm, intelligent blue eyes expressing amusement. He has a neatly trimmed grey mustache and a few wisps of white hair escaping from under a dark watchman's cap. Ole wears a practical, dark woolen coat, a simple dark scarf, and carries a worn leather-bound book.

He stands atop the old church tower, gazing out over the city rooftops at dusk. Below, swirling mists hint at the magical "wild hunt to Amack"—silhouettes of figures on broomsticks fly amidst playful sparks of light. Warm light spills from within the tower through an arched window nearby, casting his shadow. Gnarled stonework is lit by golden hour light.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: On judgment day
jobs.prompt:
An ethereal, middle-aged male soul, newly freed from earthly body. His face is gaunt, but was once handsome; hazel eyes wide with dawning, horrified recognition. His hair is receding, streaked with gray. He wears a fine but tattered linen shroud, falling open to reveal feet bloodied by sharp stones. The soul stumbles, recoiling from the blinding light emanating from open gates of Heaven. He wrings his hands, a desperate plea forming on his lips.

The celestial gates gleam, framed by swirling clouds. Golden light pours out, revealing a chorus of radiant angels. The ground is littered with sharp, withered leaves that transform into flint shards under the soul's feet.

Heavenly light is the key light, harsh and revealing. A gentle, warm fill light from the angels offers a hint of divine mercy.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Peiter, Peter, and Peer
jobs.prompt:
Three young boys, approximately 6-8 years old, with mischief in their eyes—Peiter with lanky frame, Peter with buttery complexion, Peer round and rosy-cheeked.
Peiter: scruffy hair, rebellious smirk; Peter: wide, innocent eyes; Peer: gentle, slightly anxious expression.
Peiter wears a ripped pirate shirt; Peter dons miniature trash collector overalls with a toy trumpet poking out; Peer sports a clean, neatly buttoned vest with pockets bulging with shells and trinkets.
The boys stand at the edge of a shimmering millpond, gazing wide-eyed at a stork descending from the starry night sky with a bundle in its beak.
A giant water lily pad floats nearby, glowing softly, with a partially submerged cradle beneath the flower.
Dusk lighting, the last rays of sun painting the landscape in gold, fireflies twinkle around the stork, reflecting in the water.
Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.
Warm earth tones with accents of buttercup yellow and rosy pink.

jobs.title: Pen and inkstand
jobs.prompt: A young poet with tousled brown hair and a thoughtful expression, sits at his wooden desk in a cozy study. Gentle face, deep-set eyes reflecting candlelight, fair skin. He wears a simple, earth-toned woolen robe, sleeves pushed up, revealing ink-stained wrists. In the key scene, he pauses, pen hovering over parchment, a look of profound understanding dawning on his face. The desk is cluttered with books, scrolls, and an ornate ceramic inkstand. A shaft of moonlight streams through the window, illuminating dust motes dancing in the air. Warm, golden candlelight spills across the scene, casting long shadows. Storybook cover composition, Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, predominantly warm browns and creams with accents of deep sapphire blue from the ink.

jobs.title: She was good for nothing
jobs.prompt:
A pale, slender boy, around 8 years old, with wind-blown yellow hair, stands forlornly by a rushing river. His face, though dirty, is handsome, with large, expressive blue eyes filled with worry. He wears patched but clean, dark-colored trousers and a light-colored, mended shirt, with ill-fitting wooden shoes. In his hand, he clutches a misshapen cap.

His mother, a gaunt washerwoman with a tired face and streaks of grey in her brown hair, lies collapsed on cobblestones near the Mayor's grand house. She wears a wet straw mat tied around her waist, a simple, dark, water-stained petticoat and blouse. Her expression is weak, distraught.

Limping Maren with the false curl, poorly dressed is rushing towards the mayor's house.

The Mayor peers down from his window, a smug expression on his clean-shaven face, wearing a frilly shirt.

Setting sun, casting long shadows; a golden-hour light illuminates the scene, highlighting the boy's face and the river's turbulent flow. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, traditional storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Something
jobs.prompt: A young brickmaker, earnest face, smudged with clay, early 20s, strong hands, stands proudly beside a small kiln. Square jaw, brown eyes reflecting the kiln's fire, short dark hair, tanned skin. He wears simple linen work clothes, brick-red and brown hues, a leather apron stained with earth. He offers a newly-made brick to a grateful, elderly woman, MARGARET, her face etched with hardship. A small, crooked cottage stands behind her, pieced together with mismatched bricks. Setting: A windswept, grassy dyke on a rugged coastline at sunset. The sea churns in the background, white foam crashing against the wall. Golden light illuminates the scene, casting long shadows and highlighting the warmth of the brickmaker's gesture. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Soup From a Sausage Skewer
jobs.prompt:
A petite mouse with wide, curious eyes and a long, twitching nose, perhaps six months old, clad in tattered grey. Her face is round, framed by whiskers, with a gentle smile. She clutches a worn sausage skewer, taller than herself. Her fur is soft grey, her eyes dark and observant.

In a sun-dappled birch forest at twilight, the little mouse presents her skewer to a band of miniature elves. They're no taller than her knee, dressed in flower-petal gowns and dragonfly wings. Overjoyed, they reach for the skewer. Silken spiderwebs and gossamer veils are draped over the skewer, transforming it into an elven maypole.

Filtered golden sunlight pierces through the leaves, illuminating the mossy forest floor. The air glows with otherworldly magic.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Sunshine stories
jobs.prompt: A radiant young woman, about 20, with a kind face and gentle smile. Almond-shaped blue eyes, long wavy golden hair cascading down her shoulders, fair skin with a rosy hue. She wears a simple, homespun dress of cream-colored linen, adorned with delicate embroidery of golden swans. Around her neck, she wears a single gold ring on a delicate chain. She stands in a sunlit meadow, cradling a newly hatched golden swan chick in her hands, gazing at it with maternal love. The chick has four miniature gold rings around its neck. Lush green meadow scattered with wildflowers, a clear blue sky above. Golden sunlight dappling through the leaves of ancient oak trees at the edge of the fields. Key light from the sun, casting warm shadows. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The A-B-C book
jobs.prompt:
A proud rooster, about 2 years old, with vibrant red, blue, and green feathers, puffed chest, and a confident gaze. Round, intelligent yellow eyes, a bright red comb, and sharp beak. Feathers are intricately detailed, suggesting hand-painted textures. Wearing no clothes, just his glorious plumage.

The rooster stands atop an open, antique A-B-C book, its pages filled with colorful, hand-drawn letters. He is mid-crow, head tilted back, beak open in full song, expressing defiance and loyalty. Scattered around the book are loose, handwritten pages of a newer A-B-C book.

A grand, dark wood bookcase filled with leather-bound books looms in the background. The scene is set at dawn, with soft sunlight filtering through a nearby window, casting long shadows. Warm, golden light highlights the rooster and the A-B-C book.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The angel
jobs.prompt: A young angel, appearing around 8 years old, slender build, with large, feathered white wings spread wide. Round face, light blue eyes filled with serene joy, golden hair flowing, fair skin with a gentle blush. Wearing a simple white linen gown, barefoot, carrying a small bundle of flowers, including a withered field-flower. The angel hovers over a dark, narrow street, bathed in soft moonlight, pointing down to a heap of straw and rubbish where the discarded flower lies. Light emanates from the angel, casting a gentle glow on the scene below. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition, warm earth tones with accents of soft blue and gold.

jobs.title: The beetle
jobs.prompt:
A stout, pompous beetle, middle-aged with an air of self-importance, stands rigidly. His face is round, with wide, beady eyes conveying arrogance, his black shell gleaming. He sports a tiny, ill-fitting golden shoe crudely attached to one leg. He wears an expression of haughty disdain.

The iconic scene: The beetle stands before the Emperor's magnificent horse, its golden shoes glinting, in the stable. The horse is enormous, muscular, and regal, with a flowing mane. The beetle angrily gestures toward a pile of dung.

Setting: An imperial stable, bathed in warm sunlight streaming through high windows. Flecks of dust dance in the air. The stable is filled with the comforting smell of hay and horse.

Lighting: Golden-hour sunlight, casting long shadows. Warm, inviting fill light, highlighting the horse's sheen and the beetle's polished shell.

Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. Warm earth tones with accents of gold and deep green.

jobs.title: The bell
jobs.prompt: A young prince, perhaps 16, with a determined gaze and tousled blond hair, clad in forest-green tunic of fine wool, wanders deeper into an ancient wood. His face is scratched, but his blue eyes are fixed on a distant point ahead. A poor barefoot boy, about the same age, wearing tattered brown homespun and a patched jacket too small for him, parts ways, heading deeper into the shadowed thicket. Sunlight filters through the dense canopy, illuminating fantastical flowers: star lilies and luminous anemones. Ancient moss-covered rocks pepper the scene. The air is thick with mist and the scent of damp earth. Key light streams in from the upper right, casting long shadows, creating a magical, dreamlike quality. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft focus background, book cover illustration.

jobs.title: The bell deep
jobs.prompt:
A very old, odd-looking merman with a wrinkled face, deep-set eyes, and a long, flowing beard of duckweed, gazes upwards in wonder. He has pants of eelskin, a scaly coat adorned with yellow water lilies, and bulrushes in his hair.

Kneeling in the murky depths of the Odense River, he listens intently as a massive, antique church bell rests before him, its aged bronze surface covered in river silt and algae. The bell appears to be speaking, resonating with unseen vibrations.

Sunlight pierces through the water's surface, creating shimmering rays that illuminate the scene. Around them, yellow water lilies and brown reeds sway gently in the current, adding to the mystical ambiance.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition, warm earth tones with accents of yellow and deep green.

jobs.title: The bird of folklore
jobs.prompt:
A young boy, around 8 years old, with rosy cheeks and bright, curious eyes, gazes up in wonder. His face is round and innocent, framed by tousled light brown hair. He wears a peasant's tunic, made of coarse, warm-toned wool, with simple wooden buttons and a knitted scarf. He clutches a worn, leather-bound book in his small hands.

He's sitting beside a crackling fireplace in a rustic cottage, captivated by a tiny songbird perched on the book. The fire casts warm, dancing shadows across the room. Outside, a blizzard rages. Snowflakes swirl past the window. The bird is a vibrant mix of blues and golds.

Winter twilight filters through the window. Key light comes from the fireplace. The fill light from the snowy landscape creates a cozy yet magical ambiance.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Bishop of Börglum and his Men
jobs.prompt: A stern, middle-aged Bishop Oluf Glob, broad-shouldered and imposing, stands next to an altar. His face is a study in cold calculation, with piercing grey eyes and a hooked nose, framed by thinning brown hair. He is clad in ornate bishop robes of crimson velvet trimmed with gold, holding a papal bull with a large wax seal. The scene depicts the interior of Hvidberg Church during Christmas Eve Mass, lit by flickering candlelight from heavy brass candlesticks. The storm rages outside; wind howls through cracks in the ancient stone walls. Golden light illuminates the Bishop and altar, while shadows deepen in the corners of the church. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The bond of friendship
jobs.prompt: A shepherd boy, age 8, sturdy build, dark curly hair, stands protectively. Beside him, a rescued girl, Anastasia, age 5, delicate features, wide trusting eyes, dark hair adorned with two silver coins. The boy, face smudged with dirt, looks determined. He carries Anastasia in a woven goatskin sling on his back. They stand before a towering rock formation in Delphi. Stark background, snow-capped Parnassus mountain gleams in the red sunset. Key scene: The boy shields Anastasia with his small body as distant gunshots echo. Wardrobe: Simple homespun tunics, earth tones. Lighting: Golden hour, warm light on faces, long dramatic shadows. Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The bottle neck
jobs.prompt: A slender, fair-skinned young woman, maybe 19, with laughing brown eyes and a gentle smile, stands in dappled sunlight. Her hair is also brown, styled in soft waves. She wears a simple, white linen dress with delicate lace trim and a light blue sash. In her hands, she holds a picnic basket overflowing with bread, cheese, and a bottle of wine, its neck peeking out from a white napkin. Setting: A lush, green forest clearing. The sun filters through the leaves, creating a warm, inviting atmosphere. In the background, a young sailor gazes at her with affection. He is dressed in a navy blue jacket and cream-colored trousers. A broken wine bottle lies discarded in the reeds along the edge of a small pond. Golden hour lighting. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Brave Tin Soldier
jobs.prompt: A brave, one-legged tin soldier, age 8, stands stoically amidst swirling, brackish water, rifle held high. His face, though partially submerged, reveals determined blue eyes and a faint smile. He has a round face, and short, neatly combed blonde hair. Donning a vibrant red and blue military uniform, complete with brass buttons. He wears a tall bearskin hat slightly askew. The pivotal moment: being swallowed whole by a gigantic, realistically-scaled fish in a dark, churning sewer drain. The setting: Inside the fish's cavernous, dimly lit belly, water swirling. Key light emanates from an unseen source above, casting eerie shadows. Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. Warm earth tones dominate, punctuated by the soldier's bright uniform and the fish's bioluminescent glow. The image is framed with a medium shot, creating a captivating book cover.

jobs.title: The Buckwheat
jobs.prompt:
Proud, tall buckwheat stalks with white blossoms, singed black and lying flat in a field after a storm -- stalks stiff, broken. Weathered old willow tree nearby, gnarled trunk, drooping branches with green leaves. Dark storm clouds overhead parting to reveal a sliver of blue sky.

Young sparrow perched on a willow branch, head cocked, listening intently. Small, brown feathers, bright black eyes.

Golden light shining on the undamaged wheat and wildflowers in the background, heads bowed. Raindrops on leaves.

The key scene: the moment after the lightning strike, devastation amidst beauty. Focus on the stark contrast between the ruined buckwheat and the serene, sunlit field.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor style, soft focus background. Storybook cover composition, warm earth tones with accents of gold and black.

jobs.title: The butterfly
jobs.prompt: A dainty butterfly with golden wings, mid-life, and iridescent scales, hovers near a vibrant mint plant, its leaves textured and fragrant. The butterfly's proboscis extends tentatively; its expression is hopeful yet hesitant. He wears faint spectacles perched on his antennae. Key scene: The butterfly proposes to the mint, seeking companionship in his older age. The mint plant stands tall and composed, its tiny purple flowers a subtle contrast to its green foliage. Setting: A cozy indoor room, late autumn. Soft light streams through a window, illuminating dust motes dancing in the air. A warm stove glows in the background. The room reflects the colors of fall, with muted oranges and browns dominating the palette. Lighting: Soft, diffused light with a touch of golden warmth emanating from the stove, creating a welcoming atmosphere. Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Candles
jobs.prompt:
A small, thin girl, around 5 years old, with wide, innocent eyes, stands in a humble, low-ceilinged room. Her round face, framed by wispy blonde hair in pigtails, radiates pure joy. Her pale skin glows softly in the warm light. Dressed in a simple, patched cotton dress in faded earth tones, she clasps her hands together. With a beaming expression, she shares a whispered secret with her older siblings.

It's the key moment when she exclaims they will have warm potatoes for supper. The candle, flickering brightly, illuminates their faces. The setting is a modest, cozy room, across the way from a grand house. The time is evening, with soft shadows playing on the walls.

Warm, golden light emanates from a half-burnt tallow candle on a wooden table, creating a sense of intimacy and hope. 

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor illustration, soft bokeh background. A heartwarming storybook cover composition with deep reds/yellows/oranges. Strive for clear contrast between light/dark and simplicity versus detail.

jobs.title: The child in the grave
jobs.prompt: A grief-stricken mother, mid-30s, slender, with long dark hair. Oval face, dark eyes filled with tears, pale skin. She wears a dark woolen shawl over a simple muslin nightgown, bare feet. Kneeling beside her young son's grave in a starlit churchyard, arms outstretched in anguish. The child's grave is covered in colorful flowers. A tall, cloaked figure stands behind her, face partially hidden by a hood, eyes gleaming with ethereal light. Setting: A tranquil yet melancholic moonlit churchyard at night. Soft, diffused light from stars and a faint moon, grave casting long shadows. Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition, with warm earth tones contrasted by the cool blues of the night and the spectral greens/whites of the figure.

jobs.title: The comet
jobs.prompt:
A frail, elderly schoolmaster with white hair and a kind face, age 70s, sits at his clavichord in a cozy, cluttered room. His face, etched with wrinkles, is illuminated by the soft glow of candlelight and the ethereal light of a comet visible through the window. He has warm, expressive eyes, reflecting a lifetime of memories. He wears a simple, rustic wool coat in muted brown tones. His wrinkled hands gently touch the keys of the old clavichord.

The most iconic moment: he looks dreamily out of the window at the comet, which has a shining nucleus and a misty tail. Soap bubbles, glimmering with iridescent colors, float around him.

The room features an old Bornholm clock in the corner and a garden map of Denmark visible outside the window.

Warm, golden light spills from the candle, mingling with the cool, blue light of the comet creating a nostalgic atmosphere.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The cripple
jobs.prompt:
A slender, bright-eyed boy, around 12, bedridden but alert, named Hans, the Cripple. Oval face, light brown hair neatly combed, fair skin, peacefully reading. Wearing a simple knitted blue sweater, his nimble fingers work on colorful woolen stocking. He is lying in a wooden bed in a humble cottage room, bathed in warm light.

Sunlight streams through a small window, illuminating dust motes dancing in the air. The key scene is him absorbed in his book of fairy tales, a hopeful expression on his face. Old wooden table with a simple ceramic water pitcher is next to his bed.

Soft, golden light from the setting sun fills the room, creating a cozy, intimate atmosphere. The cottage garden in the background is lush green and overflowing with summer flowers.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. Warm earth tones dominate, accented by blue of the sweater and the green of garden.

jobs.title: The daisy
jobs.prompt: A tiny, fragile daisy with snow-white petals surrounding a golden heart, no taller than a child's thumb. Face tilted upwards, filled with empathetic concern, tear-shaped dewdrop clinging to a petal. Hair-like stamen, almost translucent. The daisy stands rooted within a square of freshly cut turf, blades of grass slightly wilted. This is inside a wire birdcage beside a parched, dying lark, feathers ruffled, beak reaching for the flower. The bird shows exhaustion, thirst, desperation for a last taste of nature. Cage sits on a windowsill overlooking a farmhouse garden at dusk. Sunlight filters through the window, casting long shadows creating a somber, melancholic mood. Ghibli-inspired watercolor, soft background bokeh. The composition focuses on the daisy and the lark's interaction. Warm, muted earth tones with accents of faded gold and sky blue.

jobs.title: The darning-needle
jobs.prompt: A slender, self-important darning needle, appearing as a young lady of sixteen with no mouth. Face long and sharp, bright blue eyes wide with haughty disdain, shiny black hair like thread pulled back severely. Wardrobe: black sealing-wax bodice, white eggshell skirt, steel petticoat. The Needle sits upright in a shattered eggshell, surrounded by swirling, muddy gutter water. She maintains a regal pose despite the chaos, clutching a shard of eggshell like a parasol. Setting: a cobbled city street, overflowing gutter, discarded bits of newspaper and debris floating past, time is midday, overcast sky, gritty realism. Lighting: single light ray piercing the murky water, accentuating the Needle and creating a dramatic contrast between her perceived elegance and the grim surroundings. Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The days of the week
jobs.prompt:
A jovial Freia, appearing as a young girl of 18, with rosy cheeks and an expectant smile. Her flaxen hair is adorned with spring blossoms. She wears a flowing gown of emerald green silk, cinched with a silver belt. In her hand, she holds a delicately crafted, heart-shaped box of chocolates.

The scene: The intercalary day party; all seven days of the week are gathered in a warmly lit, intimate hall. Herr Mittwoch (Wednesday) stands center, beaming amidst the merriment. Sunday, in his black cloak, raises a glass of wine. Tyr's day (Tuesday) as a police officer has a smile. Thursday beats his kettle. Old housekeeper Saturday enjoys her beer soup.

Freia, emboldened, is sweetly proposing to Monday. The room's filled with laughter. Golden light streams through stained-glass windows, illuminating swirling dust motes.

A Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover. Warm earth tones with accents of emerald, ruby, and gold.

jobs.title: The drop of water
jobs.prompt: Old Kribble-Krabble, a wizened man of 70 with a long, hooked nose and mischievous glint in his blue eyes. Round face, thin white hair, rosy cheeks. He wears a velvet midnight-blue robe, gold-rimmed spectacles perched on his nose, clutching an ornate magnifying glass. He peers intently at a giant, shimmering drop of water, face reflecting wonder and horror. The drop swirls with tiny, pink, humanoid figures tearing at each other. Setting: Kribble-Krabble's cluttered workshop, shelves filled with bubbling potions and dusty tomes. Golden light streams from a window behind him, illuminating the magical scene. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. Accent color: Crimson.

jobs.title: The dryad
jobs.prompt: A young, hopeful dryad, appearing as a girl of 12 with a slender build and leafy green hair, peeks from within her young chestnut tree. Her face is round and expressive, with wide, curious green eyes and a dusting of freckles, her skin the color of warm, pale bark. She wears a simple dress of woven green leaves, accented with blooming chestnut blossoms and delicate vines. The dryad gazes longingly toward a distant Paris, a faint, glittering haze on the horizon. It is twilight, with the last rays of golden sunlight filtering through the branches, casting long shadows. The surrounding countryside glows in warm earthy tones, with wildflowers dotting the grass. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The elderbush
jobs.prompt: A rosy-cheeked old sailor and his wife, both around 70, wrinkled but kind-faced, sit side-by-side, holding hands. The old woman has a round face, gentle blue eyes, and soft, white hair pulled back in a bun, her skin is fair with age spots. She wears a simple, earth-toned dress of linen, adorned with a small, hand-stitched floral pattern. The old sailor, with a weathered face, twinkling blue eyes, and a short white beard, wears a worn wool jacket and a contented smile. Between them, leaning in conspiratorially, is Old Granny, youthful again, with a mischievous grin and vibrant green eyes set in an elfin face. She wears a dress made of elder leaves and blossoms. They're seated beneath a massive, blooming elder tree, its branches overflowing with white flowers, the blossoms catching the warm light of the setting sun. The tree grows from a tea pot. Warm golden light filtering through the leaves. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The elf of the rose
jobs.prompt: A tiny rose elf, no taller than a thumb, with iridescent wings, childlike face and golden hair. Big, tear-filled blue eyes gaze sadly. He wears a petal tunic of the palest pink. Key scene: The elf whispers into the ear of the sleeping girl, the jasmine blossoms scenting the air. She rests her head against a large terracotta flowerpot where her murdered love's head is buried, jasmine sprigs sprouting. Her face is pale, ethereal, framed by flowing auburn hair. Setting: Her simple, dimly lit bedroom, moonlit through the window. Indirect, warm light source, soft focus. Hand-painted watercolor illustration in a Studio Ghibli style, storybook cover composition, muted earth tones with accents of pale pink and pure white.

jobs.title: The elfin hill
jobs.prompt:
Inside the grand hall of the Elfin Hill: a youthful, fair-haired elfin maiden with a curious expression, mid-dance in a moonlit-mist shawl. Her delicate face, framed by braided blonde hair, shows a mix of apprehension and excitement. She wears a gossamer gown in pale greens, adorned with glow-worm beads.

The old goblin from Norway stands nearby in a bear-skin cloak and ice crown, observing his two boisterous sons - thickset lads with bare chests, one resting his boot on the banquet table as he reaches for a plate of roasted frogs.

The hall is aglow with tulip-like walls, illuminated by polished silver and golden artifacts. Sea-folk sit in water tubs, watching with mild interest. Candle-lit, warm lighting with a soft bokeh background, Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, storybook cover.

jobs.title: The Emperor's New Suit
jobs.prompt:
A stout, middle-aged Emperor with a concerned expression, rosy cheeks, and a neatly trimmed brown beard, stands nearly nude, save for his crown. His face is round, and his eyes are wide with apprehension. He sports a comical comb-over. Two gaunt swindlers in exaggerated tailcoats gesture grandly, pretending to present him with nonexistent garments. The imagined clothes are gold and shimmering.

The setting is a lavish dressing room filled with mirrors and ornate furniture. The key moment: the emperor, under the illusion of finery, nervously admires his reflection. Courtiers in the background feign admiration.

Warm, golden light streams in from a nearby window, illuminating the scene with a sense of false grandeur. Soft fill light bounces off the mirrors.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, focused composition, storybook cover illustration.

jobs.title: The farm-yard cock and the weather-cock
jobs.prompt:
A proud, brightly colored yard cock, about 2 years old, puffed chest, strutting confidently. Sharp face, intelligent amber eyes, magnificent red comb. Feathers of gold, emerald, and sapphire silk, gleaming in the sun. A single, large cucumber lays behind him, partially eaten.
Iconic moment: The cock, mid-crow, beak open, wings outstretched proclaiming "A cock can lay an egg!"

Setting: A messy farmyard, post-storm; broken fence planks divide it from another yard. Overturned flower pots and scattered straw around the dung-hill. The tiles of the roof can be seen on the cracked ground.
Lighting: Golden hour, late afternoon. Warm sunlight streaming across the yard, highlighting the cock's plumage. Soft, diffused glow on the cucumber.

Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. Background colors of soft violet and greens.

jobs.title: The Farmyard Cock and the Weathercock
jobs.prompt:
A proud, portly farmyard cock, about 2 years old, puffed up with self-importance. Round face, beady black eyes gleaming. Fiery red comb and wattles, glossy black and emerald feathers. He wears a lordly air, chest puffed, wings slightly outstretched. He stands atop what remains of a plank fence in disrepair, having blown down in the storm. He's looking down at the last remnants of a large, ravaged cucumber.

The remains of the broken fence, the battered cucumber, and scattered straw fill the foreground. In the distance, a freshly cast copper weathercock, youthful but already jaded, is breaking free from a rooftop perch, the sky behind him swirling with storm clouds.

Overcast daylight, with a shaft of sunlight breaking through the clouds and highlighting the farmyard cock. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. Warm earth tones with red and green accents.

jobs.title: The Fir Tree
jobs.prompt:
A young, slender fir tree, maybe ten years old, stands upright, its face filled with yearning. Wide, curious green eyes gaze upwards, its soft, light-green needles catching the light. Its bark is smooth and new, a sign of its youth. 

The tree is adorned with Christmas ornaments—gilded apples and walnuts hanging delicately from its branches, small paper bags filled with colorful candies, and tiny lit wax candles casting a warm glow. The top is crowned with a glittering tinsel star.

The interior of a grand, warm room forms the backdrop. The scene captures the moment just as the candles are lit, the fir tree trembling with anticipation and joy as it experiences Christmas for the very first time—hoping all its dreams are about to come true.

Soft, golden light from the candles illuminates the scene with a sense of wonder. The style is Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Flax
jobs.prompt:
A slender flax plant, about 10 years old, with a thoughtful face and bright blue eyes, stands knee-deep in a field of blooming flax flowers. Her long, flaxen hair--the color of dried straw--cascades down her back, interwoven with delicate blue blossoms. She wears a simple dress of roughspun linen, the color of earth, accented with a single blue flax flower pinned at her chest. She gazes upwards with an expression of hopeful anticipation as golden sunlight bathes the field.

The scene captures the moment the flax realizes she will become something more. The field stretches into the distance, dotted with other flax plants. The sky overhead is a brilliant, cloudless blue. Warm, golden light streams across the field, highlighting the delicate texture of the flax flowers.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The flea and the professor
jobs.prompt:
A portly, middle-aged Professor with a walrus mustache and threadbare but once-fine coat, stands proudly beside an enormous flea, no bigger than his thumb. The flea, puffed with pride, has a tiny cannon strapped to its back.

The Professor's face is round and jovial, with twinkling blue eyes. He's balding, with wisps of brown hair combed over. His skin is ruddy from years of performing outdoors. He wears a patched velvet coat and a ruffled cravat.

The flea, meticulously detailed, wears a miniature military jacket.

They stand in a bustling savage village square as the Professor prepares to ascend in a hot air balloon made of colorful silk. Cannibalistic villagers with spears watch in awe, including a sulky, bejeweled child Princess, reaching for her beloved flea.

Bright, vibrant daylight, with dappled shadows cast by thatched roofs. The balloon glows with warm light.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, full-body shot, book cover composition, soft bokeh background.

jobs.title: The flying trunk
jobs.prompt: A youthful Middle-Eastern merchant's son, perhaps 19, handsome with a slim build, sits cross-legged inside an ornate, oversized wooden trunk. His face is hopeful, eyes sparkling with mischief and delight. He has thick, wavy black hair and tanned skin. He wears a vibrant, though slightly worn, scarlet dressing gown made of silk brocade, adorned with golden tassels. The trunk is mid-air, soaring past the high window of a castle where a beautiful princess with fair skin and long, golden hair peers out, astonished. The setting sun casts long, warm shadows on the stone walls of the castle. Golden light streams through the window, illuminating the princess and the flying trunk. This creates a magical and slightly surreal atmosphere, hinting at the enchantment within. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The garden of paradise
jobs.prompt:
A handsome, youthful prince, no older than seventeen, with a slender build and curious, hopeful eyes. Oval face, light brown hair neatly styled, fair skin with a hint of sun. He's clad in travel-worn velvet tunic of forest green, accented with gold embroidery, and sturdy leather boots. He holds a small, leather-bound book close to his chest.

The scene shows him stepping cautiously into a vast cavern, illuminated by a roaring fire. An enormous spit holds a stag. He gazes in astonishment at the source of the light. His expression is a mix of trepidation and wonder.

The cavern walls are rugged stone, damp with moisture, with four bulging sacks hanging ominously from a high wall.

Key light from the warm fire, casting long shadows, with subtle cool light from the stormy outdoors highlighting the cave entrance.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor illustration, soft bokeh background.

jobs.title: The gardener and the noble family
jobs.prompt:
A middle-aged, stout but kindly gardener named Larsen, weathered face, gentle eyes, neatly trimmed grey hair with receding hairline, tan skin tone. He wears a simple but well-kept gardener's uniform of brown linen, earthy green vest, and a straw hat, carrying a woven basket overflowing with vibrant, oversized apples and pears of red and gold hues, some slips for grafting.

Larsen is presenting the overflowing basket of fruit to the noble family in the manor courtyard, his expression hopeful and a little nervous. The noble family, partly silhouetted, stand on an ornate stone balcony overlooking the yard, in rich velvet robes as their faces is highlighted by light falling from one point.

Setting: The lush garden is flourishing under a warm late-summer sun.

Warm, golden sunlight filters through the leaves, creating soft shadows and highlights, emphasizing the abundance of the harvest and the slight tension in the scene.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The gate key
jobs.prompt:
A portly, middle-aged Councilor with a kind, round face, receding hairline, and spectacles, stands outside the Westgate of Copenhagen with his wife and servant girl. Councilor's wife, a matronly woman with a stern expression, gestures impatiently at the towering gates as they clang shut.

Councilor has rosy cheeks, a small mouth, wears a brown wool overcoat, while gripping an oversized, ornate iron gate key. His wife is in a dark blue dress with a lace bonnet. The servant girl is behind them, carrying tea service.

The gates close at midnight, locking the Councilor and his party outside. He looks bewildered and slightly sheepish. The Westgate looms behind them, illuminated by flickering train-oil lamps. Cobblestone street, scattered straw, and the silhouettes of other stranded citizens complete the scene.

Moonlit night with dramatic shadows, Key light from a nearby street lamp creates a warm, inviting glow on the characters.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. Warm earth tones with blue and red accents.

jobs.title: The Girl Who Trod on the Loaf
jobs.prompt:
A slender young woman, about 16, named Inge, trapped waist-deep in mud. Angular face, wide blue eyes filled with anguish, pale skin. Long blonde hair, tangled and streaked with mud, a snake coiled within.

She wears fine but soiled clothes -- a once-elegant blue dress, now covered in mud. From its folds, toads peer out. Her bare foot is stuck atop a large, half-submerged wheaten loaf. A medium shot captures her desperate expression.

She is sinking slowly into the murky depths of the Marsh Woman's brewery, the single loaf of bread acting as her anchor. Focus on the iconic moment of sinking with its immediate repercussions.

Swampy marshland, diffused sunlight, ethereal mist rising.

Soft, diffused key light from above, warm candlelit fill light reflecting in the murky water.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Goblin and the Huckster
jobs.prompt: A young, slender student, 19, stands calmly by an open garret window; round face, dark curious eyes, messy dark hair, fair skin. He wears a simple linen shirt, unbuttoned at the collar, and woolen trousers. In his red cap, a goblin clutches a glowing book. Outside, a neighboring building is engulfed in flames, casting an orange glow. The student gazes serenely at the conflagration. The goblin, small and wiry, peeks from behind the book in alarm. The room is sparsely furnished, illuminated by the firelight and the book's soft radiance. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, centered storybook cover composition. Warm earth tones with fiery orange and book's radiant blue accents.

jobs.title: The goblin and the woman
jobs.prompt: A very animated, tiny goblin with a pointy nose, wide mischievous eyes, and a bright red cap, crouches low to the ground, leaning in, ears perked, listening intently. His wrinkled, greyish-green skin shows his age, and his small hands are clenched in anticipation. He wears a simple grey tunic. He's eavesdropping behind ajar door. Just inside the room a middle-aged woman with a kind, round face, light brown curly hair pulled back in a bun, rosy cheeks, and wearing a blue floral dress. She gestures with her hands as she speaks to a tall, thin assistant schoolmaster with spectacles and a receding hairline. They're illuminated by soft, warm light filtering through a window from the garden. In the kitchen, a black cat with wide eyes licks cream from its whiskers near an overflowing pot of porridge. Sunlight streams through the window, highlighting dust motes in the air. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The goloshes of fortune
jobs.prompt: A portly, bewildered Counsellor Knapp, around 50 years old, stands knee-deep in muddy street water, clutching his hat, looking utterly lost and disoriented. Round face, wide eyes conveying confusion, receding brown hair. He wears a dark, ill-fitting frock coat of coarse wool, a high white collar, and buckled shoes. Behind him, a medieval Copenhagen street scene unfolds: half-timbered houses with thatched roofs line the unpaved lane, lit by a flickering Madonna shrine. A torchlit procession of drummers and crossbowmen marches past, led by a stern-faced bishop. Misty, cold evening. Key light from the torches, warm fill light from the moon breaking through the clouds. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The great sea serpent
jobs.prompt:
A curious, minuscule, nameless fish with iridescent scales, wide, inquisitive eyes, and translucent fins. Playful expression, determined. Wardrobe: None (it’s a fish!). Primary color: shimmering silver.
Key scene: The tiny fish fearlessly approaches the colossal, dark form of the sunken telegraph cable lying ominously on the seabed. The fish looks up in amazement.
Setting: The deep ocean floor near a sunken ship, with swaying kelp forests, colorful coral, and scattered seashells. Sunlight filters weakly from above, creating dappled patterns. Time of day: Midday, deep in the ocean.
Lighting: Soft, diffused light from above, with bioluminescent accents from deep-sea creatures. A sense of wonder and mystery, cold light.
Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Happy Family
jobs.prompt: A plump, elderly snail with a wrinkled face and wise eyes, wearing a monocle affixed to his shell, gazes adoringly at a tiny snail protegé. Face is kind, with expressive eyes. The little snail has endearing, curious eyes, a small upturned mouth. The older snail wears a miniature smoking jacket of velvety green, with a tiny pipe. The scene depicts the father snail carefully feeling the shell of the smaller snail, with the mother snail looking on approvingly. They stand on a giant, vibrant green burdock leaf glistening with raindrops in their verdant burdock forest. Warm, dappled sunlight filters through the leaves, creating a cozy and inviting atmosphere. Soft bokeh background. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The ice maiden
jobs.prompt: A solemn, fair-skinned boy named Rudy, about 7 years old, lean but agile, with a smudge of dirt on his cheek. His face is heart-shaped, with wide, observant blue eyes and a worried expression; untamed, sandy blonde hair sticks out at odd angles. He wears a homespun woolen tunic in muted brown, patched at the elbows, and simple leather sandals. The iconic moment: Rudy peers down into a deep, icy crevasse in a glacier, his small hand outstretched as if reaching for something lost. The setting is the Grindelwald glacier in the Swiss Alps, with towering ice walls casting deep blue shadows; a bright, crisp morning after a fresh snowfall. Light catches the ice crystals, creating a dazzling, ethereal glow. Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Jewish girl
jobs.prompt: A young Sarah, age 12, a bright, observant Jewish girl with a slender build, stands just outside the open doorway of a Christian church. Her face is heart-shaped with high cheekbones, her dark, expressive eyes are wide with curiosity, and her black hair is pulled back in a simple braid. She wears a modest, dark blue woolen dress, slightly worn, with a simple white collar, clutching a worn geography book. The scene captures her secret longing as she listens to the distant sounds of the church service. Sunlight streams from within, illuminating Sarah's face with a golden glow. The background shows the warm, earthy tones of the village street. A Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor style with a soft bokeh background creates a storybook cover composition, enhanced by the golden hour light to evoke a mood of wistful yearning and quiet contemplation.

jobs.title: The Jumper
jobs.prompt:
A blonde, blue-eyed Princess, 17, sits on a low, ornate golden stool, looking surprised and amused. Her face is round, with a dusting of freckles. She wears a pale yellow silk gown with puffed sleeves, embroidered with tiny flowers, and holds a small bouquet of wildflowers in her lap. A tiny, unassuming Skipjack, made of bone, wax, and a wooden stick, has just leapt onto her lap, mid-jump, caught in a moment of unexpected triumph. The King's throne is visible in the background.

They are inside a grand hall. Light streams in through tall arched windows, casting a warm glow on the scene. Dust motes dance in the sunbeams. The overall atmosphere is lighthearted and whimsical.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Last Dream of the Old Oak
jobs.prompt: A majestic, ancient oak tree, its gnarled trunk and branches covered in textured bark, dreaming vividly of its life, three hundred years old. Face is suggested by the tree's expression, old and wise. Gnarled hair-like branches reach up. The wardrobe is the tree's coppery autumn foliage, tinged with gold. In the key scene, the tree's dream unfolds: knights and ladies on horseback, lovers carving initials, stars visible in daylight through the leaves, all bathed in golden light. Setting: a winter forest clearing, the oak tree as a focal point, snow-covered ground, distant church bells visible in the background. Lighting: warm sunlight piercing through the branches, casting soft shadows, Christmas time. Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor. Soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The last pearl
jobs.prompt: A luminous angel with flowing golden hair and warm, compassionate eyes gently taking a single, iridescent pearl from the lap of Sorrow, a woman draped in heavy, dark robes, her face etched with grief, a single tear tracing a path down her cheek. The pearl glows with a rainbow luminescence. Scene: a grand, silent room where a recently deceased mother once sat, surrounded by faint echoes of flowers and family portraits. Soft light from a single candle illuminates the angel and Sorrow, casting long shadows. Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition, warm earthy tones accented by the pearl's iridescence.

jobs.title: The little green ones
jobs.prompt:
A contemplative young boy, about 8, with wide, curious eyes, stands before a rose tree, gazing intently at the aphids. Round face, light freckles, tousled brown hair falling across his forehead, fair skin tone. Wearing a simple button-down shirt of woven linen and brown corduroy pants, barefoot. He holds a vial of soapy water in one hand, a look of dawning realization on his face.

Close-up on the rose branch, teeming with tiny green aphids, some with minuscule, comical uniforms. They gesture and gesticulate dramatically. Sunlight streams through the window, illuminating the dust motes dancing in the air. The boy, bathed in golden light, lowers the vial, a sympathetic smile forming.

Setting: A cozy, slightly cluttered attic room, late afternoon. Diffuse, warm sunlight from a window backlights the scene, creating long shadows and highlights on the rose leaves and the boy's face. Strong key light on the boy.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition illustrating the moment of connection between the boy and the aphids. Warm earth tones with vibrant green accents on the aphids.

jobs.title: The Little Match-Seller
jobs.prompt:
A frail, shivering little match girl, no older than 7, with rosy cheeks despite the cold, clutching a fistful of long matches. Round face, tear-filled blue eyes gazing upwards, tangled blonde hair escaping a tattered hood, pale skin reddened by the harsh winter. She wears a patched and thin brown woolen dress, several sizes too large, with bare, frostbitten feet.

In the corner between two tall, snow-covered buildings, she fearfully lights her matches to conjure an apparition of her beloved grandmother. Her grandmother appears as a luminous, ethereal figure, smiling gently and reaching out a hand.

Winter night, faint moonlight, falling snow, the warm yellow glow of the match illuminating the scene. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The little mermaid
jobs.prompt:
A young mermaid, no older than fifteen, slender and graceful, with delicate features. Face is heart-shaped, eyes wide and the color of deep-sea sapphires, long flowing auburn hair cascading around her shoulders, fair skin with a blush of rose. She wears a bodice crafted from iridescent seashells, a flowing skirt of seaweed silk in shades of green and turquoise, pearl bracelets around her wrists.

She gazes longingly towards the surface, hand outstretched, a mournful expression on her face as a massive ship passes overhead, its hull a dark shadow against the faint sunlight filtering through the water.

Underwater kingdom setting with coral castles, swaying kelp forests, and luminous jellyfish.

Soft, diffused light from above, creating a mystical, dreamlike ambiance, hints of golden light filtering through the water, accentuating her yearning expression.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor illustration, soft bokeh background, classic storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Loveliest Rose in the World
jobs.prompt:
A young, fair-skinned prince, about 7 years old with a slender physique and blonde curly hair, sits beside his mother's bed. His face is tear-streaked, with wide, compassionate blue eyes, reading aloud from a large, ornate book. He's dressed in a dark velvet royal blue tunic with gold trim. The queen lies pale on white embroidered pillows, her eyes closed but face peaceful.

In the dimly lit royal bedchamber, sunlight streams through a stained-glass window, illuminating dust motes. Rose vines, in various shades of pink and white, climb the stone walls. The most prominent feature is a radiant rose blooming on the pages of the book, bathed in divine light.

Soft, warm light emanates from the rose. The overall mood is hopeful and serene. The scene depicts the moment the prince reads of ultimate love, and a healing light fills the room.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The marsh king's daughter
jobs.prompt: A young, slender Egyptian princess, around 17, with long, black braided hair escaping from under a torn swan's feather headdress, stands waist-deep in murky water. Her almond-shaped eyes are wide with terror, tears streaming down her tan, delicate face. She wears remnants of a white swan's feather dress, tattered and clinging to her. Her hands reach out desperately. Behind her, the Marsh King, portrayed as a gnarled, animate elder tree stump with menacing, root-like arms, pulls her down into the swamp. The scene is a desolate marsh at twilight, with tall reeds silhouetted against the fading sky. Light filters through the dense mist, casting an eerie, diffused glow on the water and illuminating the princess's face. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The metal pig
jobs.prompt: A ragged but sweet-faced Italian boy, no older than seven, clings happily to aVerdigris-green metal pig, its snout polished bright from countless kisses. Soft, curly dark hair peeks out from beneath a tattered cap. His wide, brown eyes sparkle with wonder. The pig stands in the grand, moonlit Piazza della Signoria in Florence, bathed in silver light. Statues of Perseus and the Rape of the Sabines loom in the background, appearing to stir to life. In the distance, the warm glow of the Palazzo Vecchio. The scene captures a moment of joyous magic and adventure. Soft bokeh background. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The moneybox
jobs.prompt:
A rotund, smug money-pig, made of orange clay, sits atop a tall, dark-wooden wardrobe, looking down with a superior expression. Piggy has wide-set, beady black eyes and a comically upturned snout. A crudely cut slit in his back reveals glimpses of silver and copper coins within. Piggy wears an imaginary crown of gold coins, glinting in the moonlight.

Below, scattered toys – a mended porcelain doll with rosy cheeks and blue dress, a wooden rocking horse with a red saddle, toy soldiers, and a miniature theatre – are mid-performance, their painted faces illuminated by tiny footlights.

The toys are in a moment of dramatic action. Some are applauding, others are visibly shocked. The doll's mended neck has burst open again.

The scene is a moonlit nursery, late at night. Soft shadows and dust motes fill the air, creating a magical atmosphere.

Key light from the moon streams through the window, casting long shadows. Warm, soft fill light emanates from the toy theatre's miniature stage.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The most incredible thing
jobs.prompt: A young craftsman, about 25, beaming with pride, humbly dressed but kind-faced. Oval face, warm brown eyes glistening with satisfaction, neatly combed dark brown hair, fair skin. Wearing a simple, earth-toned tunic of woven linen, a leather belt with small tools, carrying a miniature, ornate cogwheel in his hand. Standing beside a princess in a candlelit church, looking lovingly at each other. The scene: the moment after the clock figures vanished, candles blazing brightly. Warm golden light from candles and starlight filtering through stained-glass windows, creating long shafts of light; soft, ethereal atmosphere. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. Warm earth tones with gold and rose accent colors.

jobs.title: The naughty boy
jobs.prompt: A golden-haired boy, appearing 6 years old, chubby cheeks, mischievous grin, holding a tiny bow and arrow. Face round, eyes bright blue, wet golden curls framing a pale face, rosy cheeks, innocent yet cunning expression. Wardrobe: completely nude, cherubic body, bow crafted from polished cherry wood, quiver with multicolored arrows (red, gold, blue). Key scene: Cupid mischievously shoots an arrow directly into the chest of an elderly poet, his face a mask of shock and betrayal. Setting: cozy, warm study with a blazing fireplace, apple roasting on the hearth, rain lashing against the windowpanes, moonlight streaming through. Lighting: warm light from the fireplace casting long shadows, accentuating the dramatic expressions on both characters, soft glow from the moon outside. Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, composition evokes a classic storybook cover.

jobs.title: The neighbouring families
jobs.prompt:
A young, fair-skinned peasant woman, around 25, with a kind, radiant face and bright blue eyes, smiles gently. Her flaxen hair is braided loosely, adorned with small wildflowers. She wears a simple, homespun dress of cream-colored linen, accented with a delicate blue floral pattern, her hands clasped with her husband's.

They sit at a wooden table in their cozy farmhouse kitchen by the window, hymn-books open before them. Sunlight streams through the window, illuminating a vase of vibrant pink roses on the cupboard. The roses glow with a soft, internal light, contrasting with the dim interior.

The humble interior is filled with warmth and contentment, with visible bird nest near the window, a silent observer.

Golden hour lighting, casting long shadows and highlighting the couple's peaceful expressions.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, book cover composition.

jobs.title: The new century's Goddess
jobs.prompt:
A spirited young girl, 8 years old, embodying "The Goddess of the New Century", stands mid-stride in a vast, treasure-filled nursery. Her face is bright and inquisitive, with wide, intelligent blue eyes and a dusting of freckles, framed by tangled auburn curls. She has fair skin with rosy cheeks.

She wears a crimson Garibaldi hat atop her curls and a child's version of swan-feathered tunic, woven with threads of silver and gold, shimmering with prismatic hues. Around her, open books overflow from shelves: Shakespeare, Molière are visible. In the background: marble statues of Greek and Roman figures mingle with rococo ornaments.

She pauses, considering a volume of Shakespeare in her hands, the chaos of the nursery swirling around her, yet focused on a grand destiny, with the faintest hint of a smile.

The nursery is bathed in golden sunlight, filtering through tall, arched windows that illuminate dust motes dancing in the air. A soft bokeh effect blurs the background details, emphasizing the girl.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Nightingale
jobs.prompt:
A slender kitchen maid, around 12, with rosy cheeks and kind, earnest eyes, stands in awe. Her brown hair is pulled back simply, a few strands escaping around her heart-shaped face and freckled nose. She wears a plain muslin frock in muted blues and browns, slightly patched but clean, clutching a small woven basket.

She gazes up in wonder at the tiny gray nightingale perched upon a blossoming cherry branch. The bird sings, its wings slightly spread, lost in song. Tears stream down the face of the ancient Chinese Emperor, seated on his ornate golden throne, draped in yellow silk robes embroidered with dragons. The vast porcelain palace shimmers behind him in soft focus.

Golden light from a thousand paper lanterns bathes the scene in a warm glow, accentuating the delicate porcelain walls and the intricate details of the imperial court assembled around the throne. Hand-painted watercolor illustration in the style of Studio Ghibli, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The old bachelor's nightcap
jobs.prompt:
A wizened old bachelor named Anthony, around 70, thin with bony fingers and bushy grey eyebrows, wearing a woollen shirt with a broad linen collar, close jacket, and simple trousers tucked into broad shoes. He's alone in his dimly lit wooden booth on Hysken Street in Copenhagen.

His face is deeply wrinkled, with a tuft of hair hanging over his left eye, his expression melancholic and tearful. He wears a familiar knitted nightcap.

He sits on the edge of his bed in the cramped space. The room is lit by a single flickering candle, casting long shadows.

KEY SCENE: Overcome with loneliness, seated in his nightcap. He is weeping silently, large tears falling like pearls onto his worn coverlet.

SETTING: Inside his cramped, dimly lit wooden booth in Hauschen Street, Copenhagen, late at night during a rainstorm, the faint glow of the Virgin's picture visible outside, casting long, soft shadows.

LIGHTING: Single candle key light, warm fill light, creating a somber, melancholy mood.

STYLE: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor illustration with a soft bokeh background and storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Old Church Bell
jobs.prompt: A slender 6-year-old Johann, with striking blue eyes and almost-red freckled hair, kneels in the autumn grass beside a large cracked church bell. His face, heart-shaped with a dusting of freckles, expresses both curiosity and reverence. He wears a simple brown woolen tunic, patched at the elbows, and worn leather shoes. The old bell, weathered and green with moss, lies tilted near a weathered churchyard wall. Overhanging apple trees laden with red and gold fruit cast dappled shadows. The sky is overcast, hinting at a coming storm. Wet leaves cling to the cobblestones. Golden hour light illuminates the boy's face, creating a tender, nostalgic mood.
