Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The old grave-stone
jobs.prompt:
A young boy, no older than 7, with wide, curious eyes and tousled brown hair, leaning against a window frame partially hidden by white lace curtains. His face is lit with awe and wonder. He wears simple cotton pajamas in a muted blue.

His gaze is fixed on an old, weathered gravestone in a moonlit courtyard below. Faint traces of an hourglass and angel wings are visible.

The courtyard is bathed in soft moonlight, casting long shadows. The gravestone is partially obscured by overgrown grass and wildflowers. The old stone seems to glow with spectral light.

Golden moonlight streams through the open window, illuminating dust motes dancing in the air.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. Warm whites and blues with touches of gold.

jobs.title: The Old House
jobs.prompt: A rosy-cheeked boy of 7, with bright, curious eyes and tousled brown hair, delivers a brightly wrapped tin soldier to the kind, wrinkled face of an elderly manservant. The old man wears a humble brown coat; his eyes crinkle with gratitude. The backdrop features the ancient, timeworn facade of the Old House: crumbling plaster, leaded windows with verses etched above, and a comical dragon-head gutter. It's a sun-drenched Sunday morning, casting long shadows that accentuate the building's age. Warm, soft light highlights the boy's hopeful expression. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition, warm earth tones with accents of bright red and gold.

jobs.title: The old street lamp
jobs.prompt: An elderly street lamp with a kind, worn face, its glass clouded with age. Face is metal, with expressive eyes of glowing light, surrounded by flaking green paint. The lamp wears a heavy, ornate iron frame, draped with cobwebs. Its light illuminates a cobblestone bridge over a dark canal at twilight, the scene tinged with blue. The lamp is the sole source of light, casting a warm glow on three peculiar figures gathered at its base: a glistening herring's head, a chunk of luminous rotten wood, and a tiny, hopeful glow-worm. The wind swirls around them, personified as a playful, unseen force nudging the lamp. Key moment: The instant before a falling star streaks across the sky, gifting the lamp with enhanced memory. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Phoenix bird
jobs.prompt: A luminous, newly-hatched Phoenix chick—gleaming eyes, downy fire-colored plumage—perches delicately within a vibrant, crimson rose. The rose, dewy and otherworldly, sits nestled among the gnarled roots of the Tree of Knowledge in the Garden of Paradise. Eve, youthful and innocent with long, flowing auburn hair and fair skin, reaches out with a gentle expression to touch the bird. Golden hour bathes the scene in warm, ethereal light, dappling through the leaves of the Tree of Knowledge, illuminating the tender moment with a soft, magical glow. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Porter's Son
jobs.prompt: A slender boy, around 10 years old and barefoot with dark hair, "Porter's George", brown eyes wide with concern. Delicate, pale little Emily, age 6, in a fancy white lace dress. Her face is streaked with soot, eyes frightened. George is pulling down a burning curtain pole engulfed in flames. Nursery of a grand apartment. Heavy, ornate furniture casts shadows in the smoky haze. Midday, harsh sunlight filtered through the smoke-filled room. Warm, flickering light from the fire contrasting with the cool daylight. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, centered composition ideal for a storybook cover. Warm earth tones dominate, accented by fiery orange and hints of royal blue from the undamaged wallpaper.

jobs.title: The Princess and the Pea
jobs.prompt: A young, slender princess, around 18, stands forlornly in a lavish bedroom. Her oval face shows exhaustion, accentuated by dark circles under her blue eyes. Her golden hair is disheveled, escaping from a simple braid. Pale skin is marked with faint bruises. She wears a simple, damp white linen nightgown. The key scene: the princess sits on a ridiculously high bed made of twenty floral mattresses and twenty down-filled quilts, back arched, wincing in discomfort. The opulent royal bedchamber features tall windows overlooking a stormy night, rain streaking the glass. Soft moonlight filters through the clouds, casting an ethereal glow on the absurd bedding. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, fairytale cover composition. Warm lamp light.

jobs.title: The psyche
jobs.prompt:
A young, slender sculptor in his early twenties, covered in marble dust, gazes adoringly at a marble statue of Psyche; his face is alight with joy and artistic passion. He has a chiseled face with dark, soulful eyes, tousled brown hair, and fair skin. He wears a simple linen tunic, spattered with white dust. The Psyche statue mirrors a noble Roman maiden: ethereal, with delicate features, flowing hair, and an innocent smile. The statue is partially completed, revealing the rough-hewn marble beneath.

The scene is the sculptor's humble studio in Rome; sunlight streams through a window, illuminating swirling dust motes in the air. Marble fragments litter the floor. Key light from the window, warm fill light emphasizes the love in the eyes.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, composition suitable for book cover. Warm earth tones with white and blue marble accents.

jobs.title: The puppet-show man
jobs.prompt:
A cheerful, elderly puppet show man with a round face, twinkling blue eyes, rosy cheeks and a neatly trimmed white mustache. Wisps of white hair escape from under his black cap. He wears a simple, faded blue wool coat, brown corduroy pants, and holds a weathered wooden puppet box adorned with colorful hand-painted characters.

Iconic scene: Inside a cozy, candlelit room, the puppet show man sits atop his puppet box, beaming with joy, while moonlight streams through the window. Scattered around him are the puppets, now lifeless dolls once more. The discarded puppets wear brightly colored costumes of primary colors red and yellow.

Lighting: Warm, golden candlelight illuminates the puppet show owner's face, contrasting with the cool, pale moonlight casting long shadows across the floor.

Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor illustration, soft bokeh background, evoking a whimsical and heartwarming storybook cover. Centered medium shot composition, clean and inviting.

jobs.title: The races
jobs.prompt: A smug, anthropomorphic hare, about 10 years old, beaming with pride — athletic build, prominent whiskers, wearing a tailored tweed suit. Round face, bright, intelligent green eyes, neatly combed brown hair, light tan skin. Dressed in a green tweed suit with a gold pocket watch, holding a golden cabbage. Standing triumphantly on a wooden award podium in a sunny forest clearing, accepting an oversized golden cabbage from a stoic, bespectacled snail who looks disgruntled. The setting is a whimsical forest clearing with towering trees and dappled sunlight, a finish line in the background. Golden hour lighting with a gentle, warm glow highlighting the winning hare, hints of cooler blues and greens in the shadows. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The rags
jobs.prompt:
A young, earnest Danish writer with a kind face, round cheeks, and intelligent blue eyes, pauses in his writing, a thoughtful expression on his face. He has short, neatly combed blonde hair and fair skin. He wears a simple, light-colored linen shirt, sleeves rolled up, and sits at a rustic wooden desk cluttered with ink bottles and quills.

The key scene depicts him mid-thought, inspired, holding a fresh sheet of paper, about to write a poem. The setting: his cozy, sunlit attic study in Copenhagen, overlooking a quaint street with colorful buildings. Light streams through the window, illuminating motes of dust dancing in the air.

Hand-painted Studio Ghibli-inspired watercolor illustration with a soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. Golden hour lighting, warm and inviting, casting long shadows and highlighting the textures of the paper and wood. Accent colors: muted blues and greens.

jobs.title: The Red Shoes
jobs.prompt: A young girl, Karen, around 12, slender build, terrified mid-dance. Round face, wide blue eyes filled with horror, long blonde hair wildly disheveled, pale skin streaked with dirt. Wearing a tattered blue dress of thin fabric, torn from frantic movement. The key scene shows her desperately trying to remove the red shoes, but they are fused to her feet. A dark, gnarled forest serves as the setting, moon barely visible through dense branches, a chilling mist swirling around her ankles. Cold, ethereal moonlight illuminating her face, creating long, eerie shadows. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, centered storybook cover composition. Color palette: Deep blues and greens of the forest, stark white of Karen's face, and the vibrant, cursed red of the shoes.

jobs.title: The shadow
jobs.prompt:
A gaunt, elegantly dressed man in his late 30s, with a sinister smirk, confronts a portly, middle-aged scholar. The shadow-man has deep-set eyes, lank dark hair, and skin stretched tight over sharp cheekbones, suggesting a life of ambition and intrigue. He wears a tailored black coat over a fine silk shirt. The scholar, looking concerned, is dressed in a simple velvet robe, holding spectacles in his trembling hand.

The key moment: The shadow's unexpected return to the scholar's study after many years. The study is cluttered with stacks of books and papers.

The setting is a cozy, book-lined study, late evening, lit by a flickering fireplace and a single oil lamp on the scholar's desk. The firelight casts long, dancing shadows.

Warm, golden light from the lamp illuminates the scholar's face, highlighting his shock and unease. A colder, harsher light from an unseen source accentuates the shadow-man's menacing presence.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The shepherdess and the sweep
jobs.prompt:
A petite china shepherdess, no older than 10, clings to a chimney sweep on a rooftop; gilt shoes, rose-adorned red and white dress, gilded hat askew. The chimney sweep, equally small and made of china, guides her; soot-smudged cherubic face, ladder slung across his back, hopeful blue eyes. They perch at the chimney's edge. The shepherdess is crying, gilt sash fading.

Below stretches a miniature townscape under a vast, starlit night. The air is crisp, carrying the scent of distant woodsmoke. A single, prominent star shines directly above them, acting as a beacon.

Rooftops are terracotta and slate, dimly lit windows glow warmly.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, book cover composition, with emphasis on the contrast between the vast night sky and the fragile figures. Warm earth tones, accented by the red rose and hints of gold.

jobs.title: The Shirt-collar
jobs.prompt: A starched white shirt collar, elderly and arrogant, with frayed edges — round face, dark beady eyes glaring with superiority, paper-white skin. He wears only himself, stiff and immaculate. Staring down into a wooden washing tub, face flushed, steam rising. In the bubbly water, a delicate pink garter recoils from his gaze and moves away quickly. Laundry hangs on a line in the background. Bright sunshine streams through a window, illuminating the scene with a warm, inviting glow except for the shirt collar who is harshly lit. Storybook illustration, Studio Ghibli style, hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, centered composition, warm earth tones with pink and blue accents.

jobs.title: The silent book
jobs.prompt:
A slender, pale, deceased 40-year-old student with gentle features resting in an open coffin. Gaunt face, closed eyelids, light brown disheveled hair. Wearing a simple linen shirt, faded from wear, partially open at the collar. The student lies peacefully, clutching a large, worn book filled with pressed flowers to his chest—oak leaf, water lily, lilies of the valley visible within its pages.

Iconic moment: the swallow swoops down above the coffin as the lilac flowers from the tree surrounding the coffin, in the courtyard of the farmhouse, gently brush the deceased's head. The setting is the sun-drenched courtyard of the old farmhouse, time of day is morning, lilac tree in full bloom.

Key light from the sun highlighting the student's face, soft fill light from the open windows of the house, creating a serene, melancholic mood.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. Primary colors of pale blues and greens.

jobs.title: The Silver Shilling
jobs.prompt: A tarnished silver shilling, appearing small and dejected, rests in the wrinkled palm of an elderly woman with kind eyes and a weary face. Her face is framed by wisps of gray hair escaping her kerchief. She wears a patched, earth-toned woolen shawl. The key scene is her contemplating the coin with a mixture of sadness and dawning hope. A loaf of bread sits forlornly on a rustic wooden table beside her. The setting is a humble, candlelit cottage interior, shadows dancing on the walls. The lighting is soft and warm, emanating from a single candle, casting long shadows. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition, focus on conveying quiet emotion and the shilling's tarnished appearance.

jobs.title: The snail and the rosebush
jobs.prompt:
A contemplative snail with a wise, old face, about to retreat into his swirled shell. Pale green, slimy skin, tired dark eyes. The rosebush towers over him, lush, blooming, vibrant. One perfect, dewy rose is in focus.

The critical moment when the snail declares "The world means nothing to me" while safely inside his shell.

A verdant garden beneath the rosebush on a dewy morning, soft sunlight filtering through hazelnut bushes. Overcast sky. The air is thick with moisture, glistening on petals and shell. Light is diffuse, but with a subtle golden hour warmth.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition, centered. Earthy greens and browns, accented by the vivid pink of the rose.

jobs.title: The snow queen
jobs.prompt:
A slender, fair-skinned boy named Kay, around 7 years old, with a pained expression. His face is heart-shaped, eyes are a deep blue, and his messy blond hair is almost white in the light. He wears a simple, blue linen tunic. He clutches his chest, a look of fear and confusion in his eyes, as a shard of mirror pierces his heart.

He sits next to Gerda, a similarly aged girl with concern etched on her round face, hazel eyes wide with worry, her auburn hair in braids. She wears a red woolen dress with rose embroidery.

They sit among vibrant, blooming pink rose bushes on a rooftop garden, 5 o'clock sunlight dappling through the leaves. In the background, the imposing figure of the Snow Queen looms, ethereal and chilling.

Key light from the setting sun, casting long shadows, with a cool, moonlit fill on the Snow Queen. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Snowdrop
jobs.prompt:
A young girl, around 8 years old, with rosy cheeks and a bright, curious expression. Her round face is framed by wavy blonde hair with a few stray strands escaping her braid. She has wide, innocent blue eyes and fair skin. She wears a simple, light-blue woolen dress with a white lace collar, a worn but cherished garment. She kneels in the snow, holding a delicate snowdrop flower between her mitten-clad hands, gazing at it with pure joy.

The setting is a snow-covered field, the first snowdrop bravely emerging from the white expanse. It's early morning, the soft light of dawn painting the snow in hues of pale pink and lavender. The air is crisp and cold, with a hint of frost on the ground. Bare, spindly tree branches reach towards a pastel sky.

Soft, diffused light illuminates the girl and the flower. A warm, golden light emphasizes the hope and resilience of the snowdrop.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The snowman
jobs.prompt: A stout, newly-made Snow Man, about 40 years of age, carrot nose, coal eyes, rake mouth, stands rigid in a winter garden. Round, childlike face, eager expression, fresh snow complexion. He wears a patchwork scarf of vibrant blue and red, tied jauntily. It is the twilight hour. The Snow Man is gazing intently through a frosty window at a pot-bellied black cast iron stove with a gleaming brass knob, its door slightly ajar, casting an orange glow. The yard-dog lies curled in his kennel nearby. The garden is covered in diamond-like frost, illuminated by the warm glow of the stove. A soft, ethereal light emanates from the stove. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The stone of the wise man
jobs.prompt: A wise, old man with a long, braided white beard, wearing a dark blue velvet robe embroidered with golden constellations, sits in a crystal castle atop an enormous, ancient tree. His face is kind but burdened with worry, his deep-set blue eyes searching. He holds a massive, ornate book open in his lap, its pages glowing faintly, one hand resting on it. Nearby stands his blind daughter, about 16, with flowing auburn hair and a serene expression, dressed in a cream-colored silk gown. The scene captures the moment the Wise Man tries, in vain, to show his daughter the Book of Truth. The Tree of the Sun setting: a lush, vibrant, multi-tiered garden filled with exotic flowers with a soft golden light filtering through the leaves. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The storks
jobs.prompt:
Four fluffy, clumsy young storks, newly fledged, teetering on orange tile rooftops, awkward wings outstretched. One recoils, afraid. Round-faced, kind-eyed six-year-old boy, Peter, rosy cheeks, brown bowl cut, stands in the cobblestone street below, looking up with concern. Mother stork, elegant, watchful, white plumage, black-tipped wings, stands behind her chicks, head cocked. Father stork perches on a chimney, one leg raised, beak slightly open.

Sunlit late afternoon in a quaint village with red-brick houses. Key action: The storks' first flying lesson, Peter's contrasting empathy. Golden light, warm shadows.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. Earthy browns, slate blue sky, with accents of bright orange tile roofs, punctuated by the stark white of the storks.

jobs.title: The storm shifts the signboards
jobs.prompt:
A wide-eyed, rosy-cheeked boy named Grandfather, maybe 7 years old, wearing a slightly oversized red jacket with gold sash and feathered cap, clutching a fallen schnapps glass. Round face, bright blue eyes, tousled blond hair peeking from under his cap, fair skin flushed with excitement. He gazes in wonder amid swirling chaos.

The height of the storm, signboards flying wildly through a cobbled town square. Heavy, dark grey clouds fill the sky, illuminated intermittently by flashes of lightning. A barber's brass dish spirals past, while a cooper's barrel swings precariously near the "Ladies' Apparel" sign. Wet cobblestones reflect the tumultuous scene.

Dramatic backlight from lightning strikes with warm, ambient light filtering through window panes. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The story of a mother
jobs.prompt:
A mother, early 30s, gaunt face etched with worry, clinging desperately to a tiny, pale child in her arms. The child, seemingly lifeless, has dark circles under closed eyes. She is wearing a peasant dress, mended but clean, in muted browns and blues. A crimson woolen shawl is wrapped tightly around the baby.

The scene captures the moment Night leads the mother toward the dark fir forest. Towering, snow-laden fir trees encircle them, their branches heavy with ice. Night, a tall woman cloaked in flowing black fabric, points towards the shadowed depths of the woods, her face obscured by a deep cowl. A single, starkly white birch stands between them.

The scene is moonlit, casting long, dramatic shadows across the snow-covered ground. The light reflects off the icy branches, creating a cold, ethereal glow.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The story of the year
jobs.prompt:
Fair-skinned girl and boy children, around 7 years old, cherubic faces, rosy cheeks, blonde curly hair, blue eyes sparkling with joy, standing hand-in-hand amidst melting snow.

Girl: wears a light green linen dress, white flower-filled apron. Boy: wears a pale yellow tunic & brown breeches. Both barefoot.

The children embrace the hunched-over, white-haired, weathered old man Winter, dressed in a thick white homespun coat, set atop a snowy hill overlooking a thawing valley. Winter's expression is weary but peaceful.

The moment of transformation; as the children embrace Winter, a swirling, misty veil rises around them, revealing vibrant green grass and blossoming flowers beneath the receding snow.

A bucolic landscape with trees budding, early spring flowers blooming, bathed in warm sunlight.

Golden hour natural light, casting long shadows and creating a sense of magical realism.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The swan's nest
jobs.prompt: A ring of cygnets, downy and white, wings raised defensively, beaks open in hisses, resolute but afraid. Soft, fluffy feathers, bright curious eyes, orange beaks. They form a protective circle on the edge of their nest, woven from reeds and grass. Over them looms a dark storm cloud, pierced by flashes of lightning. The nest floats on turbulent water, reflecting the stormy sky. Baltic Sea location. Late afternoon, ominous sky. Key light from a gap in the clouds illuminates the cygnets. Additional fill light from the white feathers. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition, dramatic composition, warm earth tones with stormy greys and blues.

jobs.title: The sweathearts (Top and Ball)
jobs.prompt: A once-elegant ball, aged and sodden, sits forlornly beside a gleaming, newly-gilded top in a grimy dustbin -- the ball's morocco leather is faded, its form misshapen from years in the gutter, while the top's mahogany form shines, despite cabbage stalks and raindrops surrounding them. The ball's face is round, with barely visible, once-bright eyes conveying weary resignation; the top's brass nail gleams, reflecting arrogant pride. Key scene: realization and heartbreak as the top recognizes his lost love in her ruined state. Overcast daylight, dappled. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft focus background, centered composition focusing on their expressions, warm earth tones with accents of gold and faded red.

jobs.title: The swineherd
jobs.prompt:
A handsome, young Prince, mid-twenties, stands tall and regal, his face radiating disappointment and disillusionment. Face is clean-shaven with a strong jawline, piercing blue eyes conveying sadness, golden hair neatly styled, fair skin. He wears a lavish robe of deep blue velvet trimmed with gold, a jeweled crown gleaming atop his head, holding a wilted rose in one hand and a broken mechanical nightingale in the other.

He confronts the weeping Princess in a muddy field just outside the palace gates. Rain is pouring down, soaking them both. Her expression is one of utter despair.

The scene is set in twilight, the sky bruised with grey clouds. Key light comes from the palace windows, casting long shadows. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition, warm earth tones with blue & gold accents.

jobs.title: The Tallow Candle
jobs.prompt:
A pristine, slender tallow candle, no more than a few inches tall, its surface marred by smudges of dark grime. The candle appears almost childlike, innocent despite its soiled exterior. Its unlit wick leans slightly as if listening with concern.

The candle stands on a dusty, forgotten workbench amidst wood shavings and tarnished tools. Beside it flickers a small, bright flame emanating from a simple tinderbox. The flame reaches out tentatively, almost touching the candle's base with a warm, inviting glow. The candle's wax near the flame is just beginning to soften and melt.

Warm, inviting light from the tinderbox illuminates the scene, casting long, soft shadows and highlighting the contrast between the candle’s grimy surface and the hopeful light.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The teapot
jobs.prompt:
A proud, anthropomorphic porcelain teapot — cracked lid, stout body, short broken spout — transformed into a flowerpot, cradling a vibrant, blooming hyacinth. Earthy texture visible within.

Round, expressive eyes reflecting quiet joy. Porcelain complexion, subtle crazing patterns.

No garments; the teapot itself *is* the iconic object. Hyacinth displays shades of blue and purple.

The moment of quiet triumph: the discarded teapot, now nurturing life, sits serenely as the flower blooms, bathed in light, a poignant expression of renewal.

Overgrown cottage garden, dappled sunlight filtering through leaves, creating dancing shadows. Time of day: late afternoon, gentle breeze.

Warm golden hour lighting, soft focus on the background, illuminating the flower and the teapot's contented expression.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The thorny road of honor
jobs.prompt: An aged, blind Homer, frail but dignified, sits alone on a stone step in a bustling ancient Greek marketplace, around 70 years old with a wiry build. His face is gaunt, etched with deep wrinkles; milky, sightless eyes stare ahead with an expression of profound wisdom and sorrow. He has long, unkempt grey hair and a thin, straggly beard; his skin is weathered and tanned. He wears a tattered, earth-toned woolen cloak draped over his shoulders. He is reciting his verses, his hand outstretched, begging for meager coins. Overcast sky; the setting sun casts long shadows. Soft, diffused light illuminates Homer's face, highlighting his inner strength amidst hardship. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The tinder-box
jobs.prompt: A young soldier, early 20s, weary but handsome, stands triumphantly in a vast underground hall, lit by hundreds of flickering lamps. Square jaw, confident hazel eyes, short dark hair, tanned skin. He wears a tattered military uniform, red coat with gold trim over a simple linen shirt, brown leather boots. He holds the witch's blue checked apron overflowing with gold coins. Beside him sits a grotesque dog with eyes as big as mill-wheels, looking up at him with bewildered curiosity. In the background, the open doorway to a treasure-filled chamber glows invitingly, hinting at further riches. Soft, diffused light from the lamps creates long shadows and illuminates the soldier's face with a triumphant grin. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition, warm golden and brown tones.

jobs.title: The toad
jobs.prompt:
A small, homely toad, apparently young with mottled skin, sits among vibrant green nettles, her gaze wide and curious. Her face is round, eyes yellowish-brown and filled with wonder. Patches of dust on her back hint at a recent journey. Wardrobe: none. She has no jewel.

The dramatic moment: the toad has just escaped the well bucket and is seeing the world for the first time--nettles, sunlight, and open space.

Setting: beside a well overgrown with tall nettles, sunlit clearing at the edge of a farm. Time of day: mid-morning. Atmospheric details: dappled sunlight filtering through nettle leaves.

Lighting: strong key light from above casting shadows, warm fill light creating a hopeful mood.

Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition, centered.

jobs.title: The travelling companion
jobs.prompt:
Young John, age 17, lean but strong from farm work, kneels in a moonlit abandoned church. Gentle face, wide blue eyes filled with empathy, tousled brown hair, fair skin dusted with dirt. Wears a simple brown tunic of coarse linen, patched trousers, worn leather boots. He's intervening as two cloaked, menacing figures attempt to drag a corpse from an open wooden coffin. The air crackles with residual lightning; fear and determination mix on John's face.

The desolate church interior features crumbling stone walls, arched windows revealing a stormy night sky. Key light from the moon casts long shadows; warm candlelight flickers from a single candle on the coffin, illuminating the scene. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition, warm earth tones with cool blues from the moonlight.

jobs.title: The Ugly Duckling
jobs.prompt: A solitary, young, and awkward duckling with disproportionately large feet waddles away, his head hung low, shoulders slumped in despair. Face is hidden in shadow, tufts of downy, grayish-brown feathers stick out at odd angles. Wearing no clothes or accessories, focus is solely on his dejected posture. He flees the bustling farmyard, his expression a mix of fear and heartbreak as he glances back at jeering, cruel poultry. The farmyard is filled with vivid, warm colors of golden haystacks and green grass, but the duckling is heading towards a dark, looming moor. Key light falls from above, casting long shadows and emphasizing his isolation, a sliver of light highlights a tear in his eye. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor illustration, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Wicked Prince
jobs.prompt:
A young, muscular prince, early 20s, contorted with rage. Face round, wide-set dark eyes filled with fury, wild black hair, flushed skin. Fine crimson tunic, gold trim, torn to shreds. Stands on a warship, peacock-feather pattern, cannons firing bullets, now splintered by a divine spark.

He clutches a useless sword against a swarm of gnats attacking him. Setting: Warship lodged in the massive branches of an ancient forest tree after falling from the sky, dusk sky swirling with smoke and fire.

Golden light from the setting sun casts long shadows, highlighting the absurdity of the prince's rage, divine retribution apparent, Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. Warm color palette with crimson and gold accents.

jobs.title: The Wild Swans
jobs.prompt:
Fifteen-year-old Eliza, gentle and determined, with dirt smudged on her cheek, stands at the edge of a forest lake, gazing at her reflection. Her face is oval-shaped, with wide, hopeful blue eyes. Matted, tangled brown hair obscures part of her face, but the rest is pale and radiant. She wears a coarse, simple brown peasant dress of roughspun fabric. In her hands, she holds three vibrant red poppies.

Eliza has just washed the walnut stain from her face after fleeing the castle, and sees her true self again. The still, mirrored surface of the lake reflects the towering trees, golden sunlight dappling through the leaves.

Soft, diffused light filters through the canopy, illuminated by the golden hour. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. Warm earth tones with vibrant red accents from the poppies.

jobs.title: The Will-o'-the-Wisps are in town, says the Moor-woman
jobs.prompt: A middle-aged man with a kind, weary face and thinning brown hair, dressed in a homespun tunic and worn leather boots, kneels in an overgrown garden. His eyes are wide with surprise and hope. Angular face, hazel eyes, and a dusting of freckles. He wears a simple linen tunic in muted greens and browns. Around him, vibrant red tulips with golden edges burst from the earth. Overgrown foliage and tangled vines suggesting years of neglect. The most dramatic moment is finding a patch of four-leaf clovers almost hidden under tulip leaves. Setting is the old manor house's neglected garden, bathed in the golden light of late afternoon, dappled with shadows. Overgrown with flowers that hint at hidden magic. Lighting is warm and inviting, filtered through the leaves, casting a soft glow. Studio Ghibli-inspired watercolor with a soft bokeh background, classic storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The wind tells about Valdemar Daae and his daughters
jobs.prompt:
A slender, sad-eyed Anna Dorothea, age 10, with long flaxen hair and fair skin. Her face is oval, her expression compassionate. She wears a simple linen dress in muted greens and browns, smudged with dirt; a single wildflower is tucked into her hair.

The key scene: Anna Dorothea stands before a towering oak tree in a sun-dappled forest, pleading with her father, Valdemar Daae, a stern nobleman in a dark velvet coat. He gestures dismissively towards lumberjacks felling trees in the background. A black stork's nest teeters precariously atop the last remaining branch, tiny chicks visible.

Setting: A lush Danish forest near Borreby Mansion, late spring, midday. Sunlight filters through the leaves, creating dappled shadows. The air is filled with sawdust and the cries of distressed birds.

Lighting: Soft, diffused sunlight from above, creating a warm, ethereal glow. Accents of golden light highlight Anna Dorothea's face and the stork's nest.

Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor illustration, soft bokeh background, a classic storybook cover composition, warm earth tones with accents of green and gold.

jobs.title: The windmill
jobs.prompt:
A weathered, anthropomorphic windmill with a cheerful, grandfatherly face peers out from its gallery. Kind blue eyes, a bushy white mustache of straw, and a tall, tilted cap. The windmill's wooden planks are worn and painted in faded earth tones. The four sails are tattered but turning slowly in the wind, like outstretched arms.

The scene captures the moment of the fire: orange flames lick at the base of the windmill, casting a warm, dramatic glow on its face. Yet the windmill is smiling serenely, accepting its fate with gentle wisdom. Wisps of smoke curl around it.

The setting is atop a grassy hill overlooking a patchwork of golden fields bathed in the fiery light of sunset. A few distant farmhouses dot the landscape.

Golden hour lighting casting long shadows. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: There is a difference
jobs.prompt: A young countess, 19, with a slender build, stands in a sunlit castle hall, her face radiant. Almond-shaped hazel eyes convey serenity. Her auburn hair, styled in loose waves, frames a delicate, heart-shaped face. Fair skin glows softly. She wears a cream-colored silk gown with a high waist and subtle floral embroidery, complemented by a pale rose ribbon sash. In her hands, she gently presents a perfect dandelion seed head, its delicate white plumes catching the light. The castle hall features tall, arched windows overlooking lush meadows. Light streams in, illuminating dust motes dancing in the air. Vases of fresh-cut flowers add pops of color. Golden hour lighting warms the scene, casting long, soft shadows. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: There Is No Doubt About It
jobs.prompt: A plump, white hen, middle-aged with a concerned expression, stands ruffled in a straw-filled roosting box. Her round face features bright orange eyes and a small, pointed beak. Fluffy white feathers, slightly disarrayed, cover her body, with one tiny feather floating away from her chest. She wears a simple brown woven shawl. The scene depicts the moment she notices the single feather falling after preening. The setting is a dimly lit wooden henhouse at dusk, with roosting hens blurred in the background. Soft, diffused light filters through cracks in the wood, creating long shadows and highlighting the dust motes in the air. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. Warm golden and brown hues dominate, with a splash of pale orange from the setting sun.

jobs.title: Thumbelina
jobs.prompt: Thumbelina, a petite girl no bigger than a thumb, around 16, graceful and fragile. Her face is delicate with wide, innocent blue eyes and a hopeful expression; golden blonde hair styled in a braid adorned with tiny flowers, light skin tone. She wears a dress fashioned from a tulip petal, deep red and gold hues, cinched at the waist with a silken thread. The iconic scene: Tiny, alone and weeping, adrift on a lily pad in a sunlit stream, fishes nibbling at the stem. Setting: A wide, verdant stream with lush green lily pads, tall grasses lining the banks, a distant meadow in the background, mid-morning. Lighting: Soft, diffused sunlight from above, creating a gentle, dreamy atmosphere. Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Twelve by the mail
jobs.prompt: A rosy-cheeked, stout Mother December, age 70, stands smiling warmly, her kind eyes crinkled at the corners. Her face is round and apple-like, framed by wisps of snow-white hair escaping her knitted cap. She has fair skin with a network of fine wrinkles, reflecting years of gentle smiles. She wears a thick, homespun wool shawl in muted earthy tones, over a simple brown dress. In her arms, she cradles a terracotta pot containing a small, vibrant fir tree adorned with miniature candles and paper ornaments. The scene is the town square on a snowy New Year's Eve. In the soft glow of the streetlamps, a horse-drawn mail coach waits, its door open, emitting a warm, inviting light. Snowflakes fall gently, illuminated by the warm, candle-like glow emanating from Mother December's firepot. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition, centered.

jobs.title: Two brothers
jobs.prompt:
Young Hans Christian, age 8, lies in bed, fair-skinned with a round face, blue eyes wide with wonder, and tousled blonde hair. Dressed in a simple white cotton nightshirt. He clutches a book of Solon.

In the climactic scene, the Genius of the Human Race, radiant and ethereal, bends down to kiss the boy’s forehead. The kiss glows with golden light.

The humble, lamp-lit bedroom has an open window revealing the night sky, and the bed transforms into a ship sailing across an ocean of time symbolized as gently rolling waves.

Warm light emanates from the Genius and the nearby lamp. Cool moonlight streams through the window.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. Earth tones with gold and cream accents.

jobs.title: Two maidens
jobs.prompt:
Two wooden road-paver maidens, one young and slender with smooth, light-colored wood, the other older and stout with darker, weathered wood, stand side-by-side, resembling girls about 16 and 40 years old.

Younger maiden: oval face, hopeful blue eyes, light golden "hair" (wood grain) tied with a faded blue ribbon. Wears iron hoops like a simple dress. Older maiden: round face, determined brown eyes, graying "hair" (wood grain) in a tight bun.

Key Scene: The two "maidens" being wheeled in a battered wheelbarrow—treated with respect but clearly being used for labor. They wear expressions of defiant dignity.

Setting: A sun-drenched cobblestone street under repair, amidst scattered paving stones, shovels, and a measuring tape. Time of day: Late afternoon.

Lighting: Strong directional sunlight creating long shadows, warm fill light bouncing off the cobblestones, creating a nostalgic, golden-hour atmosphere, emphasizing the contrast between the wood textures and the colorful tools.

Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition, accent colors blue and golden yellow.

jobs.title: Under the willow tree
jobs.prompt:
A fair-skinned, 8-year-old Johanne with a round face and bright blue eyes stands beside 9-year-old Knud, a slightly stocky boy with a mop of brown hair. Johanne wears a simple linen dress, pastel blue with a cream-colored apron and a single wildflower tucked into her braided hair. Knud is in earth-toned homespun breeches and a loosely fitted shirt.

They kneel in the shade beneath a sprawling willow tree, carefully arranging two gingerbread figures - a man with a hat, and a maiden - among vibrant green ivy leaves against an old stone church wall. Sunlight dapples through the willow's leaves. Their expressions are a mix of reverence and childlike wonder as they remember the gingerbread baker's tale of silent love.

Setting: KjÃ¶ge churchyard, bright sunny afternoon. Warm, golden light filters through willow leaves.

Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Vänö and Glänö
jobs.prompt:
A young girl, about 7, stands knee-deep in the ocean at low tide, fair skin dusted with freckles, wide blue eyes reflecting worry. Long, wavy blonde hair streams in the salty wind. She wears a simple homespun dress of coarse linen in faded blue, sleeves rolled up, clutching a worn wooden doll in a matching dress.

She gazes out at the misty horizon, the last rays of sunset painting the sky in hues of rose and lavender. In the distance, the faint outline of Vänö, a submerged island with a ghostly white church tower visible beneath the water's surface. Ominous dark storm clouds gather on the horizon, mirroring the girl's apprehension. The receding tide reveals glistening sand and scattered seashells.

Golden hour lighting casts long shadows, emphasizing the girl's solitude and vulnerability. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor style with a soft bokeh background gives the image a dreamy, ethereal quality. Storybook cover composition emphasizes the vastness of the sea and the fragility of the island.

jobs.title: What happened to the thistle
jobs.prompt: A towering thistle bush, nearly as tall as a house, bristles with late-blooming purple flowers and thorny leaves, centered outside a wrought-iron garden fence. An old, gray donkey with a worn harness strains its neck, tethered just out of reach, gazing longingly at the thistle. Inside the fence, a young, fair-skinned Scottish lady with auburn hair piled high, wearing a sage green wool dress, smiles warmly at a young man in a tweed suit; a fresh thistle bloom adorns his lapel. Golden hour light filters through autumn trees. Dewdrops cling to the thistle’s leaves and flowers. The scene is a manicured garden in the soft, hand-painted watercolor style of a Studio Ghibli film, book cover composition, soft bokeh background.

jobs.title: What old Johanne told
jobs.prompt: A young, barefoot, and ragged Johanne, around 8 years old, with a dusting of freckles, sits beside a fair-haired, equally young Rasmus near a moss-covered stone milepost. Johanne squints happily, her brown hair tangled but her eyes bright with wonder. Rasmus, small for his age, wears mended but clean homespun clothes: a simple blue shirt and brown pants. He gestures animatedly with a small twig, his expression hopeful. Key scene: They sit beneath a massive, ancient willow tree, its trunk gnarled and partially split, tiny serviceberry growing from its crevice. Setting: a desolate country path overtaken by buckbean flowers, with a neglected, duckweed-filled ditch running parallel in early spring. Lighting: Soft, diffused sunlight pierces through the newly budding willow branches, creating dappled shadows. Overall mood: whimsical yet melancholic. Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: What one can invent
jobs.prompt:
A pale young man, no older than 20, dressed in simple scholar’s attire, stands bewildered in a potato field. His face, thin and anxious, framed by light brown hair, shows a mix of confusion and reluctant wonder. He holds a large potato in his upturned hands, eyes wide, as if hearing a voice from within it. Dressed in earth-toned homespun fabric, his sleeves are slightly too long and his simple brown vest unbuttoned.

Beside him, a weathered wise woman with kind eyes and a knowing smile is giving instructions while gesturing towards a sloe bush laden with fruit, the colors a deep blue. The sun is setting, casting a warm golden light across the humble field, illuminating the potato plants that grow thick beneath their feet and the simple cottage close by.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: What the old man does is always right
jobs.prompt: A kind, elderly peasant, perhaps 70s, in worn but clean work clothes, a neckerchief, and a wide-brimmed hat, beams with unwavering optimism despite holding a sack of rotten apples. His face is round and weathered, with twinkling blue eyes and a wide, toothy grin. Wisps of white hair peek from under his hat. He stands inside a rustic, bustling inn, filled with farmers and merchants. The air is thick with pipe smoke. Golden light streams in from a window, illuminating the scene in a warm, inviting glow, highlighting the browns and reds of the wooden interior. The expressions of onlookers, two wealthy Englishmen in particular, hint at amusement or disbelief. A subtle haze of roasted apple scent fills the air. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: What the whole family said
jobs.prompt:
Centered full-body illustration of Godfather, an elderly man with a kind face, gentle smile, and twinkling blue eyes, surrounded by a warm halo of light; neatly combed white hair, fair skin with age spots. He wears a comfortable, tweed smoking jacket of muted earth tones over a cream-colored, high-collared shirt. He sits in a high-backed armchair positioned in front of a blazing fireplace.

He is reading aloud from a large, leather-bound Bible. Little Marie, a girl of 6 with a round face and wide, innocent eyes, sits at his feet, wearing a light blue dress with a white lace collar and short sleeves. Her blonde hair is pulled back with a matching blue ribbon. She gazes up at him, enraptured by the story.

Godfather's attic room, filled with bookshelves, international souvenirs, colorful glass window panes. Golden hour light streams through the windows, casting warm shadows and illuminating dust motes in the air. A fishbowl with golden fish resting on a table to the left side. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Which was the happiest?
jobs.prompt: A frail, smiling grandmother with wrinkled skin, seated in a worn armchair near a cracked window, holding a stemless, vibrant pink rose in a simple wine glass. Her faded yellow shawl drapes around her shoulders. Key scene: she gazes adoringly at the rose, sunlight catching the delicate petals. Setting: a humble cottage interior, soft morning light streaming through the cracked windowpane, casting gentle shadows. Lighting: warm, diffused light from the window acts as a key light, accentuating the old woman's serene expression and the rose's vibrant color. Fill light suggests a cozy, intimate atmosphere. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The history of Whittington
jobs.prompt: Young Dick Whittington, age 10, thin and hopeful, with dirt-smudged cheeks. Round, expressive face, wide blue eyes filled with wonder, tousled blonde hair, fair skin. Wearing patched brown breeches, an oversized burlap shirt, no shoes. He clutches a small, ginger tabby cat protectively. Iconic moment: Dick sits on a weathered stone milestone outside London, listening intently, jaw dropped in amazement. He gazes upwards, towards the sound of Bow Bells magically transforming into text in the sky. Weathered stone engraved with "Turn Again Whittington, Thrice Lord Mayor of London". Rolling green hills in the distance. Setting: just outside London, early morning. Golden sunrise light streaming from behind, casting long shadows, creating a warm, hopeful mood. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The sleeping beauty in the wood
jobs.prompt: A sixteen-year-old Princess, named Aurora, slender with a fair complexion, is collapsing in a swoon, her face pale with fright. Her golden hair is loose around her shoulders, blue eyes wide with shock. She wears a simple but elegant rose-colored gown of silk, sleeves puffed at the shoulders; a thin gold bracelet adorns her wrist. Aurora pricks her finger on a spindle in a dusty tower room, the old woman with wrinkled face stands behind her looking alarmed.. Sunlight streams through a grimy window, illuminating floating dust motes. Vines creep across the stone walls. Golden light filters into the tower, creating long shadows. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

He wears a simple tunic of woven linen, earthy brown, with a leather belt, and carries a wooden bow and quiver, a single golden feather tucked into his belt. He stands in the courtyard of the Sister of the Sun's palace, holding a golden hen with a missing tail feather, looking back at the open doorway. Glimpses of sunlit treasures spill out. The palace courtyard is adorned with flowering vines. Midday sun, soft shadows, warm light glinting off the golden hen. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Story of the Yara
jobs.prompt: A handsome young man, Alonzo, around 20, muscular build, stands knee-deep in a dark forest pool. He has a concerned expression. Alonzo's face is oval-shaped. He has dark eyes, neatly combed dark hair, and tanned skin. He wears simple linen trousers, rolled to the knees, and an unbuttoned white cotton shirt. Key scene: Alonzo is entranced, holding a colorful seashell to his ear, as a shimmering, ethereal Yara rises from the water behind him. The pool is at the edge of a lush, moonlit Brazilian forest with fireflies. Key light comes from the moon reflecting on the water, with a warm, diffused glow on Alonzo. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor with a soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. Dominant colors are blues and greens, with scarlet accents from the Yara's adornments, appropriate for a fairy tale cover.

jobs.title: The Turtle and his Bride
jobs.prompt: Centered, full-body illustration of the Turtle, a short, stout creature with a wise, weathered face, small gleaming eyes, and a determined expression. He holds the beaded slipper in his tiny claw. He is face-to-face with the young woman; she has tear-streaked cheeks but stands defiant. She wears a woven grass skirt dyed in earth tones, adorned with intricate beadwork, including an unfinished partially beaded slipper held in her hands. The war camp setting, a series of thatched huts along the riverbank at sunset. The warm golden sunlight casts long shadows, with a large cooking pot bubbling over a fire in the background. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Wicked Wolverine
jobs.prompt:
A small, scruffy wolverine, about 8 years old, stands on its hind legs, gazing upward with a mix of worry and exhaustion. Round face, wide golden eyes filled with fear, tattered brown fur, small claws. The wolverine wears a patchwork coat of mismatched brown fabrics, bulging oddly at the back and tight across the chest. It's tripped and fallen onto its side, one arm pinned beneath an enormous, mossy boulder that has stopped rolling directly on top of its legs.

The dramatic, desperate moment as the wolverine cries out in pain and frustration after being chased down the mountain.

A steep, grassy hillside dotted with wildflowers, leading down to a dark forest in the distance. Mid-afternoon sun, scattered clouds, a sense of impending doom. Dramatic directional lighting from the left, casting long shadows and highlighting the wolverine's panicked expression, with a warm fill light.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: What the Rose did to the Cypress
jobs.prompt:
A striking, handsome Prince Tahmasp, appearing about 18, lean and athletic, with a determined gaze. Oval face, dark expressive eyes, dark wavy hair styled neatly, and warm tan skin. He wears traveling clothes of fine linen and silk in muted earth tones—brown tunic, ochre sash, leather boots. He carries a hunting bow and a quiver of feathered arrows.

The key scene depicts him standing before the imposing citadel of King Quimus. His expression shows a mixture of determination and trepidation as he considers approaching the gate lined with severed heads.

The citadel looms large in the background. The setting is a stark, windswept plateau at sunset, casting long shadows and highlighting the grim architecture.

Golden light bathes Tahmasp, with cooler blue fill light emphasizing the fortress.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor render, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Which was the Foolishest?
jobs.prompt:
A slender, middle-aged peasant man, utterly bewildered, peeks out of a dark wooden coffin. His eyes are wide with disbelief, eyebrows raised in confusion. Bald head with a fringe of grey hair, ruddy complexion. He wears a long, simple white flannel burial shroud.

The man's wife, a stout, cunning-looking woman in a brown wool dress and blue apron, glowers at him, hands on her hips. Around them, villagers in earth-toned clothing are roaring with laughter, pointing towards a second, equally bewildered man standing nearby.

The second man is lean and embarrassed, his face flushed. He believes he is wearing an invisible suit. Golden sunlight streams across the village graveyard scene. Light is soft and diffused, casting long shadows from the gravestones.

Late morning. The setting is a rural village graveyard with simple stone markers, a wooden coffin, and laughing villagers. Light filters through the trees and casts soft shadows. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Clever Maria
jobs.prompt:
A slender, youthful Maria, appearing about 16, with a mischievous glint in her bright, almond-shaped hazel eyes. Her heart-shaped face is framed by cascading waves of dark chestnut hair, interwoven with wildflowers. She has fair skin with rosy cheeks. Maria wears a peasant dress of sturdy linen in earth tones, accented with a robin's egg blue sash. In her arms, she cradles a brightly-colored flower basket containing two chubby infants.

The iconic moment: Maria, disguised as a young boy, boldly presents the flower basket to the king who lies sick in bed.
The setting is the king's opulent bedchamber, sunlight streaming through a stained-glass window.
Golden hour lighting streams from the window, casting long shadows and highlighting the dust motes dancing in the air, illuminating Maria and the king's bed. A soft, focused, Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor with a shallow depth of field provides a sense of storybook charm.

jobs.title: Eisenkopf
jobs.prompt:
A handsome young man named Peter around 20, muscular build, with kind eyes and a worried expression. Face is round. Brown hair slightly windswept, fair skin, and a clean-shaven face. He wears a peasant's tunic of thick homespun fabric, primarily in brown and tan, with simple leather leggings. He's astride a gray horse, galloping desperately through a fiery portal.

Peter clutches three magical white napkins. Behind him, monstrous dogs named World’s-weight, Ironstrong, and Quick-ear are leaping joyously.

The fiery portal splits a vast wall of flames in two, in a desolate, rocky landscape. Black smoke and embers swirl in the air.

Key light comes from the fire itself, casting long, dramatic shadows. Warm, golden fill light illuminates Peter's face, highlighting his fear and determination.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: How the Beggar Boy turned into Count Piro
jobs.prompt:
A handsome, naive beggar boy, about seventeen, stands bewildered in an ornate white and silver coat several sizes too large. His face is round, with wide, nervous blue eyes and a smattering of freckles. His messy brown hair peeks out from beneath a ridiculously large, plumed hat. He clutches the reins of an equally oversized, gleaming white horse.

The key moment: he nervously addresses a cunning red fox sitting on its haunches, mid-conversation, as they approach a magnificent palace. The fox has a sly grin and intelligent golden eyes.

The setting: the golden gates of the king's palace, bathed in the warm, late afternoon sun. Lush green gardens and ornate fountains sit on either side of the path.

Golden hour lighting casts long shadows, highlighting the textures of the horse's coat and the palace's marble facade.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: How the wicked Tanuki was punished

Cherry blossom petals drift in the air. The mood is bittersweet, a victory tinged with loss. Key light comes from behind the king's procession, casting long shadows. A Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: How to find out a True Friend

Inside a humble roadside inn with timber beams; warm afternoon light streaming through the windows. Golden hour lighting, casting long shadows and highlighting the dust motes dancing in the air.

jobs.title: Little Wildrose

jobs.title: Motikatika
jobs.prompt:
Young Niels, maybe 14, wiry build, stands defiant before a towering giant. Round face, determined blue eyes, sandy blonde hair slightly tousled, fair skin. Wears simple homespun clothes, brown tunic and trousers, leather boots; clutching his prized, antique flintlock rifle.

jobs.title: Niels and the Giants
jobs.prompt: A youthful Niels, perhaps 16, wiry build, stands concealed behind a massive oak tree, his dark hair tousled, eyes wide with mischievous determination, aiming an antique flintlock rifle. jobs.title: Paperarello
jobs.prompt:
A young man, Paperarello, about 20, slender build, stands in a grand hall, astonished, yet hopeful. He has a kind, honest face with curious, wide blue eyes and light brown hair, neatly combed. jobs.title: Shepherd Paul
jobs.prompt:
A youthful Shepherd Paul, age 14, strong but still boyish, battles a six-headed dragon in an underground valley. Paul has a determined face, hazel eyes, and messy brown hair. Behind them stands a beautiful maiden with long, flowing blonde hair, wearing a pale blue gown. The valley is lush, with vivid green meadows and clear, winding streams, under the soft glow of an unseen light source. A magnificent castle stands nearby, its architecture fantastical and imposing.

jobs.title: The Boy who could keep a Secret
jobs.prompt: A handsome youth, age 17, with an earnest expression, stands defiant. His face shape is square, with kind, hazel eyes and tousled auburn hair. He has a fair complexion. jobs.title: The Colony of Cats
jobs.prompt:
A youthful, radiant Lizina, around 16, with a slender build and graceful posture, stands bathed in golden light. Her oval face features wide, expressive black eyes filled with wonder and humility. Long, raven hair cascades down her shoulders, framing her delicate features. Her skin glows with a subtle, sun-kissed radiance.

The setting is the inner cellar of the cats' deserted house, with vaulted stone ceilings and dimly lit corners. The heavy, ancient jars stand as silent witnesses to the magical event. Golden light spills from the jar, illuminating the cellar with a warm, otherworldly glow.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Cottager and his Cat
jobs.prompt:

The scene is bathed in warm, golden light streaming through high windows. Dust motes dance in the sunbeams, highlighting the rich tapestries and polished stone floors of the palace interior. Accent colors in the king's robes: deep ruby and sapphire.

jobs.title: The Crab and the Monkey
jobs.prompt:
A furious, injured crab, about 40 years old, female, with one claw raised defensively, stands at the entrance to her hole. Her face is determined, but her carapace shows cracks from a beating. Piercing black eyes, wrinkled face, light brown shell with subtle red highlights. She wears a tiny woven grass apron, stained with mud.

The key scene: the monkey lies dead, crushed by the mortar, just inside the crab's doorway. The broken eggshell glitters on the hearth and the wasp hovers, stinger bared, near the water bucket.

Setting: The neat, earthen entrance to the crab's hole is beneath the shade of a vibrant kaki tree laden with ripe, orange fruit. Late afternoon sun filters creating long shadows.

Lighting: Golden hour, sun streams warmly from the left, casting the crab in a heroic light, while the interior remains shadowy. Soft fill light bounces from the surrounding foliage.

Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Death of Abu Nowas and of his Wife

His cloak is patched and faded. The scene takes place in their humble dwelling: a single room with colorful cushions and worn carpets. A latticed window casts patterned shadows. Hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, suitable for a storybook cover. Earthy tones dominate, accented by gold from scattered coins and the distant coach.

jobs.title: The Gifts of the Magician

jobs.title: The Gold-bearded Man

jobs.title: The Hairy Man

Lighting: Soft, directional light from above casts long shadows, emphasizing the somber mood. Gentle rim light around the Hairy Man adds to his mystique. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Horse Gullfaxi and the Sword Gunnfoder

jobs.title: The Prince and the Dragon

A youthful Prince Bertram, around 19, with a determined gaze, clad in forest-green путешественник cloak of heavy wool over a chainmail tunic. His face is framed by auburn hair, wind-swept. In his hand, he holds a jeweled sword (the sword is optional)

jobs.title: The Six Hungry Beasts
jobs.prompt:
A cunning fox, mid-size, male, with a sly grin, poised beneath a tall, slender birch tree, gazing upward with feigned interest at a magpie's nest nestled high in the branches. jobs.title: The Stone-cutter
jobs.prompt:
A wizened stonecutter, about 60 years old, lean but strong, weathered face, intently chiseling at a massive rock face. Deep-set, thoughtful brown eyes, graying, close-cropped hair, sun-baked skin. jobs.title: The Story of the Seven Simons
jobs.prompt:
Seven young peasant men, identical but for subtle variations in expression, stand shoulder-to-shoulder in a golden maize field, around age 20, strong builds, each with a distinctive tool or gesture hinting at his unique skill. Faces are earnest, hazel eyes, sun-kissed skin, and short, neatly-cut auburn hair. They wear matching peasant garb: simple red linen shirts with gold braid trim. The eldest Simon steps forward slightly, gesturing reassuringly.

The key scene: The moment King Archidej, astride a white stallion, interviews the seven Simons amidst the rippling field of golden maize. The king is smiling, intrigued.

Setting: A vast, idyllic field of maize under a bright afternoon sun, bordering King Archidej's well-kept kingdom. Atmospheric details include a distant, shining white pillar already reaching into the clouds.

Lighting: Warm, golden light bathing the field, with a soft, diffused fill illuminating the faces of the Simons and the King.

Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, centered storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Story of the Sham Prince, or the Ambitious Tailor
jobs.prompt: A handsome young man, Labakan, early 20s, average build, dressed in an opulent golden robe far too grand for his simple origins. He has a slightly crooked nose, dark cunning eyes, and a neatly trimmed black beard. His tailored robe is richly embroidered with peacock feathers. He stands atop a small, barren hill, clutching a jeweled dagger in his right hand. Labakan gazes down with a mixture of triumph and anxiety at a grand procession of riders and camels gathered below near a collection of pitched white tents. In the distance is a weathered stone pillar. The setting is a desolate desert landscape during the early morning, with long shadows stretching across the sand. Golden sunlight bathes the scene, highlighting the deception and ambition in Labakan's expression. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Strong Prince
jobs.prompt:
A young prince, about 17, muscular build, stands defiant, clutching two bloody eyeballs in his left palm. His face is tear-streaked, handsome features contorted by anguish, sightless eyes staring blankly. Brown, tousled hair frames his face, fair skin dusted with dirt. He wears torn tan breeches and a once-fine linen shirt, now ripped.

In the background, a sneering robber captain, middle-aged with a scarred face, brandishes a golden sword. He wears a dark leather jerkin over a crimson tunic. The setting is the interior courtyard of a rough stone castle, dominated by a tall wooden door that leads into the keep. Harsh midday sun spotlights the prince, casting long, ominous shadows.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Three Robes
jobs.prompt:
A strikingly beautiful young woman, Lineik, around 17, with long flowing golden hair, stands protectively in front of her younger brother Sigurd, age 16, slender build, light brown hair. They are dressed in simple, practical tunics in shades of forest green and brown, Lineik clutching a worn map. She has a determined expression with bright blue eyes.

Iconic moment: They are escaping from their stepmother's castle at night, running through a shadowy stone archway leading into dark woods.

Setting: A medieval castle courtyard, bathed in moonlight. Cobblestones are slick with dew, casting eerie reflections. Twisted branches of bare trees loom overhead. Hints of fog cling to the ground.

Lighting: Pale, cold moonlight is the dominant key light, creating long, dramatic shadows. A single, flickering torch casts a warm, orange glow from within the castle, illuminating part of the archway.

Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor illustration, soft bokeh background, cinematic storybook cover composition. Accents of deep purple in the shadows.

jobs.title: The Treasure Seeker
jobs.prompt: A slender young shepherd boy, around 16, kneels in a moonlit forest clearing, his faithful sheepdog whimpering beside him. The boy has a worried expression, hazel eyes, and choppy brown hair; his skin is fair and freckled. He wears a patched woolen tunic in earth tones and simple leather sandals. Before him stands the Treasure Seeker: a towering, spectral figure with shaggy grey hair and a long beard, garlanded with oak leaves, holding an uprooted fir tree. The Treasure Seeker gestures with a bony hand, his face caught in an eerie grin. The forest is dense, with ancient trees silhouetted against the bright full moon. Cool blue moonlight filters through the leaves, casting long shadows. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Tiidu the Piper
jobs.prompt: A youthful, determined Tiidu the Piper, around 16, lean but strong, stands on the deck of a merchant ship, mid-rescue– face upturned, dark hair plastered to his forehead, wide blue eyes reflecting desperate hope. His skin is pale from the cold sea. He wears a soaked, tattered peasant shirt and breeches, clinging to his form. He clutches a rope thrown from the ship, teeth clenched, while secretly untying another rope around his waist. The ship's rail is crowded with concerned sailors, lit by lantern light, expressions of shock and pity on their faces. The dark, stormy sea roils around him, illuminated by flashes of lightning. Dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, key light from the ship's lanterns, cold fill light from the stormy sky. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: To your Good Health!
jobs.prompt: A young shepherd, about 18, lanky build, with wide, staring blue eyes, stands defiant. His face is oval-shaped, framed by messy brown hair; his skin is tanned from the sun, with a determined smirk. He wears a simple, homespun brown tunic over a linen shirt, patched trousers, his only accessory a small wooden flute tucked into his sleeve. The moment: the shepherd, surrounded by a circle of dancing, exhausted wild boars, eyes narrowed, playing, defying the enraged king. The scene takes place in a torchlit stone boar pit deep beneath the castle. Warm, flickering light accentuates the sweat on the shepherd’s brow and the exhausted boars. Shadows cling to the damp stone walls and floor. Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor with a soft bokeh background, suitable for a children's storybook cover.

jobs.title: Tritill, Litill, and the Birds
jobs.prompt: A young man, around 20, sturdy build, triumphant grin, stands beside a princess of similar age and beauty, wearing a simple but elegant gown. She beams back at him, hand resting gently on his arm. He wears homespun tunic and trousers. Together they pilot a magical ship upon a grassy field. The ship is laden with an overflowing treasure chest, gold coins and jewels glinting in the sun. In the background, the mouth of a dark, foreboding cave looms with the silhouette of a defeated, furious ogress visible within. Bright sunlight bathes the field, gentle breeze tousling the princess’s hair. Inspired by Studio Ghibli, hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, classic storybook cover composition. Warm earth tones with accents of royal blue and gold.

jobs.title: Allerleirauh; or, the many-furred creature
jobs.prompt: A soot-covered young woman, around 17, with dirt smudged on her round face and golden hair escaping from beneath a ragged fur cloak. Her blue eyes are downcast, but a single tear streaks through the grime. The patchwork cloak, made of countless animal hides, obscures a glimpse of a golden dress hem. She kneels in a dimly lit, stone-floored kitchen, scrubbing ashes with a worn-out brush. Light streams in from an unseen doorway, illuminating dust motes in the air. A massive hearth with simmering pots dominates the background. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition, warm earth tones with gold accents.

jobs.title: Fairy gifts
jobs.prompt:
Princess Sylvia, age 17, petite, stands in a sunlit butterfly-drawn chariot. Her face is oval with large, kind hazel eyes and a hopeful expression. Auburn hair is braided with wildflowers. She wears a flowing gown of pale green silk, accented by a sapphire pendant.

She clutches a letter, just delivered to the Flower Fairy, her face a mix of concern and eagerness to report what she has seen. Behind her, the Fairy's palace garden overflows with vibrant blossoms, lush trees, and sparkling fountains.

Golden hour light streams through the garden, casting long shadows; butterflies flutter around the chariot. Soft bokeh background of colorful petals.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Heart of ice
jobs.prompt:
Prince Mannikin, a youthful but resolute figure of diminutive stature, though handsome and well-formed, standing at the base of a colossal Ice Mountain. His face, determined with bright, intelligent eyes, framed by windswept auburn hair. Dressed in simple hunter's attire—a brown leather tunic, green leggings, and a quiver of arrows slung across his back. He clutches a light spear, gaze fixed on the daunting, icy peak above.

The Ice Mountain looms, bathed in the ethereal blue glow of twilight, swirling snow obscuring the summit. Jagged ice formations glitter. A lone, winding path suggests the treacherous ascent. 

Fairy Genesta watches from the sky, skating on what appears to be ice.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. A warm color palette offset by the cool blues of the Ice Mountain.

jobs.title: Jack my hedgehog
jobs.prompt: A boy, about eight years old, half human and half hedgehog, with visible spines but a kind face. Round face, bright, curious brown eyes wide with mischief, untidy brown hair peeking from under his spines. Wears a small green tunic made of rough homespun fabric, patched breeches. He sits confidently astride a large rooster with newly-shod feet. Key scene: Jack flies over the castle gate; guards below thrust spears upwards in dismay while an angry king watches from a window. Setting: The castle is made of grey stone, midday light, puffy white clouds. Golden sunlight catches off of the rooster's feathers giving it a magical glow. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Jorinde and Joringel
jobs.prompt:
Jorinde, age 17, mid-transformation: half-maiden with long auburn hair, half-nightingale with soft, brown feathers sprouting from her arms and shoulders. Her face is oval, with wide hazel eyes filled with terror, fair skin flushed with panic. She wears a forest-green linen dress, torn at the sleeves, accentuating her transformation. She sings, mouth open in a distressed "jug, jug" sound.

Joringel, age 18, handsome, stands frozen in horror, unable to move.

Setting: Deep forest, twilight. Ancient stone walls of the witch’s castle loom behind, partially obscured by gnarled trees. Mist curls around the base of the walls.

Lighting: Harsh, unnatural green light emanates from the old witch, casting eerie shadows. Remaining sunlight filters weakly through the trees.

Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: King Kojata
jobs.prompt: A young Prince Milan, no older than 17, with a determined expression, clad in a tunic of forest green linen and leather riding boots, offers a white swan garment back to a maiden shimmering with ethereal beauty. She has flowing auburn hair cascading down her shoulders, a kind oval face, and eyes of softest sapphire. They stand on the shore of a secluded, mist-covered lake. Twenty-nine other maidens in white dresses fade into the background. Reeds and bulrushes line the bank. Soft, diffused sunlight filters through the leaves of ancient trees. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. Accents of gold gleam from the swan garment and the Prince's sword hilt.

jobs.title: Little One-eye, Little Two-Eyes, and Little Three-Eyes
jobs.prompt: A young girl, Little Two-Eyes, around 10 years old, with a slender build and kind demeanor. Her face is round with rosy cheeks, and her wide, expressive blue eyes are filled with sorrow. She has long, wavy auburn hair, a fair skin tone, and wears a simple homespun dress of faded green linen, accented with a patched brown shawl. She sits weeping in a lush, sun-dappled meadow, her arms wrapped around a small, white goat. Before her, a miniature table laden with steaming dishes of food mysteriously appears. Sunlight streams through the leaves, creating a magical atmosphere. Golden hour lighting casts long, soft shadows. In a Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor style, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. Emphasis on the contrast between her sadness and the magical abundance before her.

jobs.title: Prince Featherhead and the Princess Celandine
jobs.prompt:
A slender, forlorn PRINCESS CELANDINE, perhaps 17, with tousled, auburn hair, sits, lost and alone. Her face is oval-shaped, tear-streaked, but resolute. Her luminous emerald eyes reflect a mix of vulnerability and inner strength. She wears a tattered, once-fine gown of celadon green silk, ripped and stained by her desert ordeal, with faded floral embroidery. The silhouette is elegant but distressed. A single, tarnished silver bracelet adorns her wrist. She clutches a torn piece of the fabric.

Lost in the desolate heart of a sun-baked desert, endless undulating dunes stretch toward the horizon. A lone, gnarled acacia tree offers scant shade. Midday sun beats down, casting harsh shadows. The air shimmers with heat haze. Celandine's body language expresses weariness but not defeat.

Golden hour lighting from the low sun to the left. Soft fill light from the right, highlights the Princess. The background is sun drenched, with warm earth tones offset by the princess's faded green.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor rendering with a soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Prince Fickle and Fair Helena
jobs.prompt:
Fair Helena, 18, slender but strong from work, disguised as a humble herd-girl. Round face, tear-stained cheeks, large expressive brown eyes filled with sorrow, long tangled brown hair escaping her simple headscarf, sun-kissed skin. Wears a patched, earth-toned woolen dress, a worn leather belt, and simple wooden clogs. She lovingly strokes the head of a small calf.

Key scene: Helena whispers sadly to the calf in a meadow, reciting her rhyme. "Kneel, little calf, kneel; Be faithful and leal, Not like Prince Fickle..."

Setting: Rolling green hills of the kingdom. A dirt road winds in the distance. The prince on horseback is starting to turn around.
Late afternoon, soft sunlight filtering through the trees; A gentle breeze rustles the grass.

Lighting: Warm, diffused sunlight from the side, casting long shadows. Soft, golden hour glow.

Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Prince Narcissus and the Princess Potentilla
