jobs.prompt: Fifteen-year-old Princess Potentilla, slender and lovely, sits beside a brook, her face an open, innocent oval with large, hopeful blue eyes. Her wavy, golden hair is adorned with the garland of blue forget-me-nots she is weaving. She wears a simple dress made of linen, primarily earth tones, accented with light blue embroidery along the neckline, with a modest silhouette. The magical Prince Narcissus, still invisible via his enchanted ring, watches her adoringly, hovering nearby amongst the flowers. The scene captures the moment before Grumedan's unfortunate arrival. Setting: the secluded lush garden, sunlight dappling through overhanging branches, creating an ethereal glow. Key light comes softly from above, fill light warm and diffused, giving a dreamy, storybook feel. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Prince Vivien and the Princess Placida
jobs.prompt: Young Prince Vivien, age 16, athletic build, stands frustrated outside a decrepit cottage. Angular face, wide-set hazel eyes showing impatience, tousled auburn hair, fair skin flushed with exertion. Wears a travel-worn, forest-green tunic of coarse linen, brown leather riding boots, and a silver signet ring. He pounds on the rough wooden door, demanding entry with a raised fist. Dim light spills from a crack beneath the door. Setting: Deep, shadowy forest at late twilight. Twisted trees loom around the small, ramshackle cottage; overgrown with moss. Key light from the cottage window casts long, eerie shadows. Fill light is cool and diffused, creating a sense of mystery. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition, warm earth tones with accents of emerald green and flickering candlelight.

jobs.title: Puddocky
jobs.prompt: A youthful Prince, no older than 18, with golden hair and sincere blue eyes, kneels beside a murky riverbank, gazing with hopeful curiosity at Puddocky, the toad. Puddocky has warty green skin and bulges slightly from a golden crown atop her head. She sits regally on a mossy stone near the water's edge. The Prince wears traveling clothes of forest green wool, accented with a simple leather belt and silver buckle; his expression is open and earnest. The key moment is their first conversation - the moment of unlikely alliance. The setting is a misty, overgrown riverbank at twilight, the air thick with humidity, and the silhouette of a stone bridge looming behind them. Light filters softly through the canopy, casting dappled shadows and catching the glimmer of dew on the reeds. Studio Ghibli–inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition with warm earth tones and hints of gold.

jobs.title: Rosanella
jobs.prompt: A slender, heartbroken Prince Mirliflor, age 18, kneels in a star-shaped garden. His face is angular, with tear-filled blue eyes and tousled chestnut hair. He wears a sapphire velvet doublet trimmed with gold, and his expression is one of profound despair. Around him, giant, angry bees carry away twelve young women, each with a delicate pink rose on her throat. They wear pastel-colored gowns of silk and lace. A manicured lawn gives way to avenues of trees in the background. Midday sun, filtered through the leaves, casts dappled light. Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition, warm golds and greens with sapphire and rose accents.

jobs.title: Spindle, shuttle, and needle
jobs.prompt: A slender, fair-skinned maiden of 15 with rosy cheeks, standing in a humble cottage. Her blue eyes are wide with surprise, with a slightly parted mouth. Her long, wavy blonde hair cascades down her shoulders. She's wearing a simple, homespun dress of brown linen, with an off-white apron. In the iconic moment, the spindle leaps from her outstretched hand, a golden thread trailing behind it. The interior of the cottage is sunlit and cozy, with a spinning wheel visible in the background. Warm, golden light floods the room from a window to the right, dust motes dancing in the beams. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Sylvain and Jocosa
jobs.prompt:
Full-body shot of young Sylvain, 16, and Jocosa, 15, slender and fair, reaching for each other across a wide, rushing river. Sylvain has a determined expression, short wavy brown hair, blue eyes, and sun-kissed skin. Jocosa, equally determined, has long braided blonde hair, green eyes, and rosy cheeks. Sylvain wears a simple brown tunic and leather sandals; Jocosa a light green dress with a woven flower crown.

The river, once a small spring, now churns violently, separating them after they failed their promise.. Both youth clasp bouquets of colorful wildflowers. Setting: A meadow transformed into a raging river under the first rays of sunrise. Mist hangs in the air, illuminated by the golden light.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. Warm earth tones with accents of green, blue, yellow and red.

jobs.title: The biter bit
jobs.prompt: A shrewd, elderly Simon, looking no older than 65 with a sly grin, thin lips, and a twinkle in his brown eyes, stands in his sunny courtyard. His weathered face is framed by thinning grey hair. He wears a brown woolen tunic, slightly rumpled. In the background, Nina, a stout, middle-aged woman with a kind face and neatly tied auburn hair, peeks out from the open door of the rustic stone house. In the immediate foreground, a goat with comical eyes is laden with a basket overflowing with colorful produce: bright red tomatoes, plump yellow chickens, and freshly baked bread. Simon, with a theatrical flourish, gestures towards the goat, as if giving it instructions. Golden sunlight bathes the scene, casting long shadows and highlighting the textures of the stone and wool. A hand-painted watercolor illustration in a Studio Ghibli style with soft bokeh background evokes a classic storybook cover.

jobs.title: The blue bird
jobs.prompt: Fifteen-year-old Princess Fiordelisa, slender and graceful, with large, expressive eyes. Heart-shaped face, warm ivory skin, long wavy auburn hair cascading down her shoulders. Wearing a simple, slightly rumpled white frock of thin cotton, sleeves slightly too short. She stands in the dimly lit, circular stone room at the top of the tower, light filtering through a narrow window. Her hands are clasped, a look of dejection on her face, tears welling in her eyes. Tall, cold tower room of grey stone blocks. Moonlight streams in from a high, narrow window, casting long shadows. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. Warm greys, soft blues, and a touch of rose in her cheeks.

jobs.title: The crystal coffin
jobs.prompt: A young tailor, no older than 18 with a curious expression, stands mesmerized before a crystal coffin. The maiden within, fair-skinned with long blonde hair, opens her eyes in joyful surprise. She wears a forest-green velvet gown. Her rosy cheeks suggest vibrant life, while one hand gently touches the coffin's inner wall. They are in a vast hall with walls of polished stone tiles carved with strange symbols. Light emanates softly from glass vessels filled with swirling, bright-colored smoke, casting dancing shadows. A miniature castle in a glass box stands nearby. Key light from an unseen source highlights the maiden's face. The tailor is lit by a soft fill light, accentuating his awe. Warm earth tones with forest green and crystal blue accents. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The dirty shepherdess
jobs.prompt: The young princess, about 17, disguised as a "dirty shepherdess" with mud-streaked face and tangled hair. Round face, hazel eyes downcast. Wearing tattered beggar's rags in drab browns and greys. She is kneeling beside a clear stream, carefully washing mud from her hands, revealing delicate skin and fine rings on her fingers. Beside her lies a bundle containing fine dresses. Sunlight filters through the leaves of the surrounding trees, illuminating her temporary beauty. A nearby flock of sheep graze peacefully. Soft, bokeh background. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, storybook cover composition. Warm earth tones with emerald green and sapphire blue accents from the dress fabrics peeking out of the bundle.

jobs.title: The enchanted ring
jobs.prompt:
A youthful, handsome Rosimond, appearing about 18, with a slender build and kind eyes. His face is oval-shaped, with warm brown eyes expressing both surprise and gratitude. He has wavy, auburn hair and fair skin. He wears a simple tunic of forest green linen, with leather sandals. In his hand, he holds a golden ring with a sparkling diamond.

The key scene shows Rosimond encountering the Fairy in a sun-dappled forest clearing. He kneels respectfully before her, gazing upwards with wonder. The Fairy sits regally upon a grey horse with golden trappings, extending the ring towards him.

The setting is a lush forest glade at dawn, with mist rising from a clear brook. Towering trees surround them, illuminated by soft rays of sunlight filtering through the leaves.

Warm, golden light bathes the scene from the rising sun, with a soft, ambient fill.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The enchanted snake
jobs.prompt: A golden-haired youth, no older than 18, stands smiling, resplendent after a magic transformation. His face is fair, with kind, intelligent eyes. His royal blue tunic is embroidered with gold thread, his expression warm and loving as he embraces Princess Grannonia. She is fair-skinned with long, flowing auburn hair and hazel eyes, wearing a simple white gown. They stand in a lavishly decorated room—ivory walls inlaid with gold, reflecting the sunset light. The discarded snakeskin lies shimmering on the floor nearby, hinting at the recent enchantment. Warm light streams through a window, as the King and Queen peek through the doorway, their faces a mix of shock and joy. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor style. Soft bokeh background. Storybook cover composition, full-body shot.

jobs.title: The enchanted watch
jobs.prompt:
A youthful, naive-looking Jenik, perhaps 18, gap-toothed and smudged with soot, gazes in astonishment at a lavish banquet appearing mid-air. Round face, wide blue eyes, and messy straw-colored hair. He is wearing his old, patched peasant clothes, with ashes still clinging to the fabric. In his outstretched hand, he holds the small, ornate enchanted watch. Around him float steaming plates of roast beef, jeweled goblets overflowing with wine, and golden platters piled high with fruit.

The scene takes place in a simple, grassy meadow outside Jenik's village, bathed in the warm glow of late afternoon sunlight. Long shadows stretch across the field.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. Focus on expressions of wonder and magic.

jobs.title: The golden blackbird
jobs.prompt: A kind, handsome young man, about 17, with a slender build and determined expression—hero of the story. Oval face, warm brown eyes full of hope, tousled light-brown hair, fair skin. He wears a simple linen tunic, forest-green, with brown leggings and worn leather boots, a satchel slung across his shoulder. Dramatic moment: He presents the radiant Porcelain Maiden to the castle servants, clutching the wooden birdcage containing the Golden Blackbird safely in his other hand. The castle looms imposingly in the background, its stone walls softened by climbing ivy. It's late afternoon, shadows lengthening, creating an atmosphere of suspense. Golden light streams through the gates, illuminating the characters. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The golden lads
jobs.prompt:
A golden-skinned boy, age 16, handsome and strong, with kind eyes. Face is oval, eyes are warm brown, hair golden and flowing, skin has a subtle metallic sheen. He wears tattered bearskins, strategically placed to conceal his golden nature, but a glimmer of gold peeks through at the wrists and neck. He kneels, offering his heart to a maiden in a village. The girl, equally 16, with a heart-shaped face, bright blue eyes, and long auburn hair, wears a simple gown of woven linen, dyed a deep forest green. Setting: A bustling village square, midday. Wooden houses line the square. Key light from the sun, casting warm shadows. Accent colors: gold and green.
Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, centered fairytale book cover composition.

jobs.title: The golden mermaid
jobs.prompt: A youthful prince, maybe 17, thin build, tousled brown hair, tear-streaked face with wide blue eyes, wearing a mud-stained tunic of faded blue linen. He stands dejected in a dimly lit dungeon. Heavy iron chains bind his wrists. The golden horse, just captured, stands beside him, its tail inadvertently touching the stone wall. Sleeping guards in crimson uniforms sprawl nearby, their faces serene under the wolf's spell. The dungeon walls are rough-hewn stone, damp and mossy. Light filters weakly from a high window, casting long shadows. A single gadfly hovers near the horse's flank. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition, light from above, warm earth tones with accents of gold and crimson.

jobs.title: The half-chick
jobs.prompt:
A small, burnt, black half-chick, named Medio Pollito, with one leg, one wing, and half a beak, perched atop the highest church steeple in Madrid. His face shows distress with one large, dark eye. A few singed feathers stick out.

The steeple is made of weathered stone, Spanish architecture. The wind violently whips around him, indicated by swirling fabric remnants and blurred motion.

Madrid sits below, a maze of terracotta rooftops fading into a soft-focus background. Setting sun, casting long, warm shadows.

Golden hour lighting with a touch of dramatic rim light defining his silhouette against the sky .

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, storybook cover composition, soft bokeh background.

jobs.title: The little soldier
jobs.prompt: A youthful, determined John the Kinglet, small but well-built soldier, early 20s, stands in a cavernous hall, fireplace to his right. Round, boyish face, hazel eyes wide with resolve, short cropped brown hair, fair skin. He wears a slightly oversized, faded red military jacket with brass buttons over a simple tunic, brown trousers tucked into sturdy boots, sword at his hip. Tongs in hand, he confronts Ludovine — waist-up woman with flowing golden hair and almond-shaped emerald eyes emerging from an enormous serpent body engulfed in flames. Determined expression; not fearful. Dark stone walls, vaulted ceiling. Fiery, ominous lighting from the fireplace casts long shadows, warm fill light on John's face, Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The magic swan
jobs.prompt: A youthful, kind-faced Peter, around 17, fair skin, tousled brown hair, and gentle blue eyes, gazes toward a princess in a gilded carriage. He wears simple homespun clothes in muted earth tones. The magic swan, brilliantly white with iridescent feathers, is the focal point. It's tethered to a comical procession: a clay-covered youth, a washer girl with rolled-up sleeves, a soot-stained chimney sweep, a brightly dressed clown, a pompous mayor in formal attire, and his thin, sour-faced wife. They're all stuck to the swan, mid-struggle, expressions of comical frustration and surprise. The princess, radiant in a golden gown, is bent over in laughter, tears streaming down her face. Setting: the edge of a grand medieval town at sunset, warm golden light bathing the scene. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The riddle
jobs.prompt: A handsome, fair-skinned Prince, early 20s, with determined green eyes and a strong jaw, confronts a beautiful but haughty Princess. She has an oval face, long auburn hair styled in intricate braids, and wears a shimmering emerald green velvet gown. In her fury, she's trying to pull away, but the Prince firmly grasps the edge of her misty grey cloak: proof of her deceit. The scene is set in the Princess's opulent throne room, filled with ornate gold detailing and shadowed corners. Faint moonlight streams through a tall arched window, illuminating the tense exchange. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition, warm earth tones with emerald and silver accents.

jobs.title: The snuff-box
jobs.prompt: A young man, no older than 20, weary but resolute, travels on horseback. Lean physique, weathered face, determined. Brown, slightly unkempt hair frames a face with bright, hopeful blue eyes. Wears a simple, earth-toned tunic and trousers of linen, travel-worn leather boots. A small pouch of remaining gold coins hangs visibly at his belt. Key scene: encountering the home of the West Wind – a rickety, towering windmill perched precariously on a craggy cliffside. Windmills arms are spinning wildly with frantic energy against a turbulent sky. Setting: desolate, rocky landscape in twilight. Dark storm clouds rolling in. Key light from the setting sun breaking through the clouds, casting long shadows. Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft focus, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The story of a clever tailor
jobs.prompt: A youthful, wiry tailor, perhaps 18, with a mischievous glint in his eyes. Narrow face, dark curly hair escaping from under a slightly too-big cap askew on his head, tanned skin, and a confident smirk. He wears practical brown trousers and a forest green vest, both slightly worn but neat, with a bright yellow measuring tape draped jauntily around his neck. Inside the stable, the tailor casually cracks walnuts beside a massive brown bear whose paws are stuck in wooden stocks. The tailor holds up another walnut, a teasing expression on his face. Dim stable interior, straw-covered floor. Light from a single lantern casts long shadows, warm and inviting, despite the bear's predicament. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The story of Caliph stork
jobs.prompt:
A slender, youthful Princess transformed into a white stork, around 16, stands gracefully on one leg in a marshy meadow. Her face retains a hint of her former beauty, with large, expressive blue eyes and soft, downy feathers fringing her face like bangs. She wears a delicate, torn silk gown, pale blue, remnants clinging to her stork form. She practices a dance, one feathered wing extended.

Caliph Chasid, also as a stork, observes with wide, surprised eyes; Grand Vizier Mansor stands next to him.

Setting: a reedy pond surrounded by palm trees at dawn, mist hangs low over the water. Golden light streams through the trees, casting long shadows. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. Warm earth tones, blues, and gold.

jobs.title: The story of Hok Lee and the dwarfs
jobs.prompt: A youthful Hok Lee, around 25, slender build, stands nervously before a circle of gleeful, mischievous dwarfs. His face is comical, both cheeks swollen to enormous size. Almond-shaped eyes dart around in fright; short black hair, pale yellow skin. He wears a simple, patched brown tunic of rough cotton, tied with a hemp belt, tan leggings. He attempts a clumsy, desperate dance. The scene is a forest clearing at full moon, casting an ethereal glow. The dwarfs, each unique with pointy hats, colorful tunics of green, red, and blue. Light filters through leaves, creating dappled shadows. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The story of the fisherman and his wife
jobs.prompt:
A wizened fisherman, about 60, with a kind face but worried eyes, stands knee-deep in a stormy, violet sea. His gray, close-cropped hair is windswept, and his tanned skin shows years of weather. He wears simple, patched brown fishing clothes. With pleading eyes, he gestures towards a massive, dark stone castle looming on the distant shore. Waves crash around him. 

The sky is heavy with dark grey clouds, mirroring the turbulent ocean. A single shaft of light breaks through, illuminating the fisherman's face and hand.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. The overall mood is ominous and foreboding, with warm earth tones dominating the color palette, accented by the deep violet of the sea and gold from the distant castle windows.

jobs.title: The story of the three bears
jobs.prompt:
A very small, wrinkled old woman with a mischievous grin— hunched posture, beady eyes, frizzy white hair escaping her cap, sallow skin. Wearing a patched brown dress of rough wool fabric, oversized wooden clogs. She's seated in a miniature wooden chair, mid-collapse, splinters flying. The seat has broken beneath her. A partially eaten bowl of porridge sits on a nearby table.

The bears' woodland cottage interior; warm sunlight streaming through a window, illuminating dust motes; simple wooden furniture.

Little Bear stands beside the broken chair, pointing an accusatory finger, his expression a mix of shock and indignation. Medium-sized Bear and Great, Huge Bear looming protectively behind him, casting long shadows.

Warm, golden key light from the window, casting soft shadows and highlighting dust motes. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The three dogs
jobs.prompt:
A shepherd boy, around 17, with a lean physique, stands triumphant with a courageous expression. His face is oval, with kind brown eyes and a smattering of freckles. He has tousled auburn hair and fair skin. He wears a simple tunic of roughspun brown fabric, with a leather belt and weathered boots. His loyal black dog, Pepper, stands beside him, teeth bared.

The dramatic scene captures Pepper defeating the fearsome dragon on a steep mountain path. The dragon, a serpentine monster with vast, leathery wings and fiery breath, lies defeated at the dog’s feet. The princess watches in the background, draped in black.

The setting is a craggy mountainside at late afternoon, bathed in a golden, ethereal light. The sky is a blend of warm oranges and dusky purples. Mist clings to the lower slopes, adding to the mystical atmosphere.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor with soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The three little pigs
jobs.prompt:
A clever, youthful pig named Blacky, around 8 years old, stands triumphantly atop his sturdy brick house. His face is round and beaming, dark eyes sparkling with intelligence and defiance. Glossy black hair is neatly combed. He wears a blue gingham shirt, brown overalls, and a red bandana tied jauntily around his neck. In his left hand, he brandishes a wooden spoon like a sword.

The iconic moment shows the frustrated fox, mid-leap, paws scrabbling uselessly against the brick wall. His expression is one of comical outrage. The brick house, bathed in warm afternoon sunlight, appears impregnable. Golden light glints off Blacky's polished kettle sitting nearby.

Whimsical details: a vegetable garden surrounds the house with plump pumpkins and ripe tomatoes. Birds chirp merrily in the trees. Gentle rolling hills fade into a soft-focus background.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The three musicians
jobs.prompt: A fair-skinned, courageous flute player named Hans, around 22, with tousled auburn hair and bright blue eyes, cautiously extends a hand to help the fallen dwarf. The dwarf, a wrinkled creature no taller than three feet, clad in a faded burgundy dressing gown, clutches his face, tears streaming, his silver shoe buckles glinting in the dim light. Hans holds the dwarf's torn grey beard aloft in his other hand. They are in a subterranean vault, grey rocks surrounding them. A wand lies abandoned near the stream. The air shimmers with unveiled magic. Soft golden light emanates from beyond the parted stream, illuminating the path to a flowered field. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. Warm earth tones with accents of emerald green and ruby red.

jobs.title: The three snake-leaves
jobs.prompt:
A young king, early 20s, lean but strong, with a determined expression. Sharp cheekbones, brown eyes filled with hope, dark wavy hair, fair skin. He wears a royal blue velvet tunic trimmed with gold braid, and leather boots. He kneels beside the queen's coffin in a stone crypt, holding three vibrant green snake-leaves. The Queen, ethereal and pale, lies still. He gently places a leaf on her lips. The crypt is lit by four flickering candles, casting long shadows. Focus on the magic of the leaves reviving her.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, book cover composition, dramatic lighting. Warm earth tones with green and blue accents.

jobs.title: The twelve huntsmen
jobs.prompt:
The King's true bride, disguised as a young huntsman, about 19, slender build, androgynous, stands supported by the King. Her face is delicate, with wide, tearful blue eyes, long eyelashes, and a slightly parted mouth, revealing shock and heartbreak. Her auburn hair is tucked under a huntsman's cap, with a few strands escaping. She wears a dark green huntsman's tunic of fine wool, brown leather breeches, and high boots, but her feminine hand is exposed, revealing the King's ring.

The King kneels beside her, concern etched on his face. A hunting party is loosely arranged in the background. They are standing in a sun-dappled clearing in a dense forest on a bright afternoon, with golden sunlight filtering through the leaves. The light catches the ring as the King removes the huntsman's glove. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The war of the wolf and the fox
jobs.prompt:
A scruffy ginger cat, elderly but wily, mid-pounce—one paw outstretched, tail high—eyes wide with comical terror. Beside her, a bristly wild boar explodes from a straw pile in a frenzy. A huge brown bear plummets from an oak tree: claws extended, mouth agape in a roar. Below, a gray wolf lies crushed, eyes closed, tongue lolling. Surrounding them, scattered golden straw.

Deep within a sun-dappled forest clearing, late afternoon. The light filters through the oak leaves creating soft bokeh. Warm, earthy tones dominate – browns, greens, golds – with the boar's pink skin and the cat's ginger fur providing pops of color. The scene captures sheer pandemonium and slapstick humor.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor illustration, centered composition, perfect for a book cover, vibrant and charming.

jobs.title: The white snake
jobs.prompt: A kind young man, no older than 19, lean but strong from his travels, striking blue eyes filled with wonder, messy brown hair, stands knee-deep in a clear lake. He wears simple brown traveler's clothes, patched but clean, his sleeves rolled up. In his outstretched hands, he presents a luminous, oversized golden ring to a haughty princess. She's beautiful but cruel, draped in emerald green velvet, her face scornful. Reflected in the water are three shimmering fish, their eyes bright with gratitude. The scene is set at dusk, soft golden light filtering through ancient trees surrounding the lake, creating long shadows. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition, warm earth tones, emerald accents.

jobs.title: A Fairy's Blunder
jobs.prompt:
A beautiful, naive fairy named Dindonette, early 20s, slender build, stands near a bubbling spring. Her face is heart-shaped with wide, innocent green eyes expressing dawning horror. Long, flowing golden hair is adorned with wildflowers. She wears a gossamer gown of pale green silk, cinched with a woven vine belt, and holds a glistening, useless wand.

The scene captures the moment she realizes her blunder: children who drank from the enchanted spring have aged rapidly into the elderly, while the old have regressed into helpless infants. The elderly look terrified, the babies cry.

The setting is an overgrown orchard on a remote island at dawn. Mist hangs heavy in the air, illuminated by shafts of golden sunlight slicing through the trees.

Key light comes from the sun, casting long shadows. Use warm fill light to highlight the fairy's dismay.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: An Impossible Enchantment
jobs.prompt:
Princess Mutinosa, early 20s, beautiful but haughty, with a slender build and piercing blue eyes. Her face is heart-shaped, framed by long, black curly hair. She wears a rich purple velvet riding habit, embellished with gold trim, and tall black riding boots. A toy trumpet hangs from her belt. She rides a magnificent tiger through a dense forest, her expression one of fierce determination as she leads a bizarre hunting party.

A horde of frantic, oversized Spanish cats flees before her, pursued by two apes in purple suits riding mastiffs. A troop of purple-clad dwarfs on wolves bring up the rear. Sunlight filters through the trees, dappling the scene with light and shadow.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor with a soft, dreamy bokeh background, ideal for a fairytale book cover. The color palette emphasizes warm earth tones, punctuated by the vibrant purple of the hunting party's attire.

jobs.title: Bobino
jobs.prompt: A youthful Bobino, around 16, slender build, stands near a cluster of enormous, glistening green frogs. His fair skin contrasts with his dark, tousled hair. He possesses an intelligent, kind face, with wide, curious brown eyes focused intently on the frogs. He wears a simple linen tunic of earthy brown, cinched at the waist with a leather belt. A small, clear glass bottle, glowing faintly, is being tossed between the frogs. Bobino listens intently, a gentle smile gracing his lips. The scene is a moonlit, overgrown ditch near a rustic peasant's house. The air is thick with mist, lending an ethereal quality to the scene. The moon casts long shadows, highlighting the textures of the rough stone house. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. Accent color: emerald.

jobs.title: Cannetella
jobs.prompt:
A slender, frightened Cannetella, barely eighteen, in stable stall with straw floor. Her face is oval, with wide, tearful brown eyes, long dark hair disheveled, fair skin smudged with dirt. She wears a tattered silk gown, once a vibrant blue, now faded and stained, exposing bare feet. Golden bracelets adorn her wrists.

She peeks through a crack in the stable wall at a sunlit garden filled with ripe oranges and grapes, her hand reaching out longingly. Scioravonte's shadow looms large and menacingly behind her, a glint of gold teeth visible in his sneer.

The stable is dark and cramped. Light streams through the crack in the wall, illuminating the colorful garden just beyond, highlighting Cannetella's desperate yearning.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. Warm earth tones of browns and grays contrasted with the vibrant oranges, greens, and purples of the forbidden garden, a touch of menacing gold.

jobs.title: Donkey Skin
jobs.prompt:
A slender young princess, around 17, with delicate features, hides within a coarse, ill-fitting donkey skin. Her oval face, smudged with dirt, reveals large, fearful blue eyes. Long, tangled blonde hair escapes the edges of the skin. Beneath the disguise, she wears a shimmering dress of woven moonlight, barely visible. 

The key moment: fleeing the opulent palace, she pauses at the moonlit crossroads. One hand clutches the rough donkey skin at her throat, the other extends as if to summon help. Her tear-streaked face shows a mix of fear and determination.

The crossroads is dusty and overgrown; in the distance, the palace glows, a beacon of gilded imprisonment. Wisps of magical light swirl around her, remnants of fairy protection. 

Soft moonlight bathes the scene, casting long shadows. The warm glow from the palace contrasts with the cool blue of the moon. 

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. Warm earthy browns and grays dominate, with accents of shimmering silver and pale blue from the moonlight dress.

jobs.title: Fortunatus and his Purse
jobs.prompt:
A slender, youthful (16) Fortunatus stands awestruck in a shadowy forest clearing. His face is fair with wide, hopeful blue eyes, framed by light brown, tousled hair. He wears tattered but once-fine page's attire: green and gold fabric, remnants of courtly elegance. Before him, Dame Fortune, blindfolded and ethereally beautiful, offers a gleaming, overflowing purse.

The key scene: Fortunatus, after slaying a bear, chooses riches over wisdom from Dame Fortune in a dense, primeval forest.

The setting is a sun-dappled clearing, ancient trees tower, leaves of emerald and gold filter the light. A spring bubbles nearby, moss-covered rocks scattered around. The mood is balanced between peril (dark woods) and promise (Dame Fortune's arrival).

Golden hour lighting, a beam spotlighting Fortune, with warm fill highlighting Fortunatus. Soft bokeh background, detailed character focus, in a Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, evoking a classic storybook cover.

jobs.title: Herr Lazarus and the Draken
jobs.prompt: A stout, middle-aged Herr Lazarus, the boastful cobbler, stands triumphantly with a loaded hunting rifle. Round face, twinkling hazel eyes, a neatly trimmed grey mustache, and a ruddy complexion speak to his love of good living. He wears a practical brown leather jerkin over a homespun shirt, knee breeches, and sturdy boots, gold coins overflowing from a pouch at his belt. In the background, a terrified, scaled Draken is dragged along by its tail, tied to a cunning red fox. Lazarus's newly built, half-timbered house is visible in the distance. Late afternoon sun casts long shadows, the warm light catching the gold coins and the Draken's shimmering scales. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition, warm earth tones with gold and green accents.

jobs.title: Janni and the Draken
jobs.prompt:
A youth named Janni, appearing about 16, lean but strong, stands blinded at the edge of a well. His face—angular, dirty, streaked with tears—is tilted upward, sightless eyes turned towards the faint light. Dark, matted hair frames a face etched with pain and betrayal.

A simple, torn tunic of rough wool, dyed a faded brown, hangs on his frame. His hands, bound together with a thin red thread, are outstretched as if begging for help. Three loyal dogs, covered in old blood, look up at him with concern.

The scene captures the moment travelers discover Janni at the well—hope amidst despair. Light filters down into the well's dark opening. The overall lighting suggests pre-dawn, with cool blues mixing with warm candle-light.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. Warm earth tones with an accent of red on the thread.

jobs.title: Laughing Eye and Weeping Eye, or the Limping Fox
jobs.prompt:
A naive young man, no older than 17, wide-eyed and earnest, with a mop of straw-blonde hair and a smudge of dirt on his cheek. His face is oval-shaped, with kind blue eyes and a hopeful expression. He wears simple peasant garb, brown homespun tunic and trousers, a patched leather belt. In his hands, he awkwardly carries a large, ornate golden bridle.

He stands at the entrance to a dark, mysterious grotto, holding the reins of a magnificent golden horse. Seated sidesaddle behind him is a radiant maiden, crafted entirely of gold, yet possessing a gentle, melancholic gaze. Their intertwined figures are bathed in a soft, ethereal light emanating from within the grotto.

The scene is set deep within an ancient, moss-covered forest with dappled sunlight filtering through the canopy. The overall mood is one of quiet determination mixed with otherworldly beauty. Golden hour lighting, Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Long, Broad, and Quickeye
jobs.prompt:
A handsome young prince, about twenty, with a determined expression, astride a white steed. His face is fair with blue eyes, framed by wavy, light-brown hair. He wears a royal-blue tunic of velvet, adorned with gold embroidery, silver chainmail, and carries a sheathed sword.
The key scene shows him glancing upwards, surprised, at Long, a hyper-elongated man with a friendly face and simple peasant clothing, who is plucking a bird's nest from the very top of an impossibly tall pine tree.

Setting: A dense, primeval forest with towering trees and dappled sunlight. The time of day is midday, bathed in warm, golden light filtering through the leaves.

Lighting: A strong key light from above highlights the prince, while the forest floor is dappled with shadows. The overall mood is whimsical and adventurous, with a soft, magical glow.

Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Mohammed with the Magic Finger
jobs.prompt:
A young boy, "Mohammed with the magic finger," age 7, Middle-Eastern features, stands protectively in front of his uncle, a weary traveler in his early 30s, with sun-darkened skin, a short beard and kind eyes.

The boy has black curly hair and bright, intelligent eyes. He wears a simple, earth-toned tunic. His tiny finger is outstretched, glowing faintly.

His uncle is clad in travel-worn robes of dusty brown and carries a leather satchel. They are standing near a large clay date cask. Fronds of date palm adorn the cask.

Key scene: The boy reaches into the date cask, his face a mixture of determination and love, protecting his uncle from the snake hidden within.

Setting: Courtyard of a desert dwelling, stone walls, distant sand dunes, late afternoon.

Lighting: Warm, golden sunlight bathes the scene, casting long shadows. The boy's magic finger emits a soft, ethereal glow, illuminating the immediate area.

Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Prunella
jobs.prompt:
A beautiful young woman, Prunella, around 16, slender build with fair skin, stands frozen in fear. Her face is heart-shaped, with wide, innocent blue eyes and long, flowing auburn hair. She wears a simple peasant dress of coarse brown fabric, cinched at the waist with a woven belt.

In her arms, she clutches a small ornate casket, glinting gold. Behind her, the menacing silhouette of a tall, gaunt witch with a hooked nose and ragged gray hair fills the doorway of a crooked cottage. The witch's eyes gleam with cruel intent, her bony fingers outstretched as if to snatch Prunella.

The scene is set in the witch's dimly lit cottage clearing in the woods at twilight. The lighting is dramatic, with the setting sun casting long shadows and illuminating the witch's sinister face.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. Accents of gold from the casket and fiery sunset highlight the danger.

jobs.title: The Dog and the Sparrow
jobs.prompt: A stout, middle-aged carter with a ruddy face and frantic eyes stands frozen, axe raised high above his head. His wife, equally stout and disheveled, looks on in horror, her hands covering her mouth. Fabric is roughspun, earthy browns and grays, the carter in a tunic and the wife in a simple dress. The key moment: the carter, mouth agape, a tiny sparrow perched inside his mouth, its head poking out defiantly. The interior of a humble cottage, fire crackling in the hearth, broken furniture scattered around. Light from the fire casts long, dramatic shadows, highlighting the chaos and despair. Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, book cover composition.

jobs.title: The Goat-faced Girl
jobs.prompt:
A young woman, Renzolla, around 18, with a goat's face—a long snout, sunken cheeks, and small horns poking through her golden hair, stares forlornly out a tall turret window. Her tear-filled green eyes reflect deep sadness. She wears a fine, ivory satin gown, its sleeves puffed at the shoulders, and a simple gold necklace. Bundles of flax lie scattered on the floor around her.

Inside a circular stone tower room, late afternoon sun filters through the window, casting long shadows and highlighting dust motes in the air. The light catches the subtle texture of the stone walls.

Hand-painted watercolor illustration, soft bokeh background, reminiscent of a Studio Ghibli film, storybook cover composition, centered. Warm earth tones dominate, with pale gold and cool ivory accents.

jobs.title: The Goblin Pony
jobs.prompt: A cluster of young children, ranging in age from 6 to 16, are huddled together on the back of a small, stout black pony with mischievous glinting eyes. The children have varied builds, with rosy cheeks and wind-tousled brown, blonde, and red hair. They wear simple homespun tunics and trousers in muted earth tones. The oldest brother, clutching the pony's mane, has a worried frown. The youngest, Richard, looks back with wide, tearful eyes. The goblin pony gleefully gallops into a stormy sea, waves crashing high around its legs. Saturated moonlight illuminates frothy whitecaps and dark, swirling clouds overhead. Sharp key light from the moon casts long shadows, heightening the drama. A Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor illustration with a soft bokeh background, designed as a classic storybook cover.

jobs.title: The Jackal and the Spring The Bear
jobs.prompt:
A young princess, appearing about 17, slender build, disguised in a shaggy brown bear's skin, stands on her hind legs in a grand ballroom. Her face, framed by the bear's open hood, reveals delicate features, wide, expressive blue eyes, and a hopeful smile. Wisps of golden hair escape the bear's fur. She wears a magnificent gown of shimmering starlight, intricate with embedded gems. In her right paw she holds a golden ring.

The key moment: despite her disguise, she cannot resist revealing the ring. Richly decorated ballroom of the neighboring prince, filled with elegantly dressed guests blurred in soft focus.

Warm candlelight bathes the scene, casting long shadows while highlighting the starlight gown. Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, studio lighting, soft bokeh background creating a magical, storybook cover composition. Primary colors: warm golds and browns, accent: starlight silver.

jobs.title: The Little Gray Man
jobs.prompt: A sturdy blacksmith, mid-30s, male, sweat-streaked face, stands triumphantly over a fallen, grotesque dwarf with one remaining head. The blacksmith's face is determined, mouth set in a grim line, eyes fierce. He has dark, tousled hair and a ruddy complexion. He is clad in a leather apron, smudged with soot, over a simple linen tunic, sleeves rolled up to reveal muscular arms. His hands are calloused, one gripping a massive iron hammer still raised mid-swing. The gray dwarf, in tattered, drab clothing, lies sprawled amidst scattered gold coins inside a stone cellar. The scene captures the moment the blacksmith strikes the final blow. The cellar, damp and dimly lit, is stacked high with treasure chests overflowing with jewels. Light streams from the doorway behind the blacksmith. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Magician's Horse
jobs.prompt: A young prince, no older than 17, lean but strong, astride a magnificent ebony horse with a flowing mane. Face is determined, blue eyes wide with urgency, golden hair streaming behind him, skin tanned from his days wandering in the forest. He wears simple brown leather tunic, travel-worn green cloak, and carries a riding whip. The key action is the prince glancing back, a mix of fear and resolve on his face, as a raging wall of magical fire erupts behind them. Setting is a vast, open field under a twilight sky; the dark forest looms in the distance. Fiery light from the pursuing magician illuminates the scene, casting long shadows. Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, vibrant storybook cover.

jobs.title: The Ogre
jobs.prompt: A plump, naive Antonio, about 18, with rosy cheeks and simpleton eyes. Round face, light brown tousled hair, fair skin. Wearing a rustic tunic of roughspun brown fabric, slightly too small, and patched trousers. He carries a bulging sack slung over his shoulder. In the inn's stable, Antonio stares in disbelief at a donkey whose mouth is erupting with cascading rubies, emeralds, and diamonds. The innkeeper, a sly, middle-aged man with a scheming grin, peeks from around a corner, eyes wide with greed. Stable setting with hay bales and wooden beams, warm afternoon sun streaming through cracks. Golden hour lighting, creating long shadows and highlighting the jewels' sparkle. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Partnership of the Thief and the Liar
jobs.prompt: A clever, sly-looking thief, around 30 years old, thin build, wearing a mischievous grin. Angular face, dark eyes sparkling with cunning, black hair slicked back, tanned skin. He wears patched brown breeches, a loose linen shirt, and a worn leather vest, with a money pouch prominently displayed. The iconic scene where he's receiving a large pouch of gold florins from a bewildered king. The king's opulent throne room in the neighboring country's palace, midday, sun streaming through arched windows, illuminating dust motes. Golden light highlighting the thief's triumph. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor illustration, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. Earthy browns, rich golds, and accents of royal blue in the king's robes.

jobs.title: The Simpleton
jobs.prompt:
A youthful, naive-looking Moscione, no older than seventeen, round-faced, stands proudly beside Quick-as-Thought, an athletic young man with wind-swept brown hair and determined blue eyes. Moscione wears a slightly oversized, mustard-yellow tunic of roughspun wool over brown leggings, a leather purse prominently displayed at his hip. Quick-as-Thought is mid-stride, lean and focused, wearing a simple rust-colored tunic. They are celebrating Quick-as-Thought's victory, the princess Canetella, mortified, in the background near the finish line. Hit-the-Point's arrow flies through the air, about to shatter the magic ring around Quick-as-Thought's ankle. The race takes place on a golden field outside the Flower Vale city walls. The scene is bathed in the warm, late-afternoon light.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. Accent colors: blue and red throughout the scene.

jobs.title: The Story of Bensurdatu
jobs.prompt: A youthful, determined Bensurdatu, early 20s, slender but wiry, stands sword in hand in a cavernous hall. His face, lean and earnest with dark brown eyes, shows a mix of apprehension and courage. Dark, neatly cropped hair frames his face. He wears practical leather jerkin, dark brown breeches, and sturdy boots, rope tied around his waist. He's poised to strike at a slumbering giant, whose enormous, grotesque form lies sprawled before the eldest princess. Her delicate features, long flowing dark hair frame her face and wide, pleading eyes silently warn him. She sits regally upon a simple throne, adorned in a simple, elegant silver gown. The scene takes place at the bottom of a deep river, inside a grotto lit by magical crystals. Shafts of light filter from above. Emphasize the contrast of Bensurdatu’s bravery against the giant's menacing bulk. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Story of Dschemil and Dachemila
jobs.prompt: A sorrowful Sumi, a beautiful young Jewess with fair skin and flowing auburn hair, stands distraught in a dimly lit room, her blue eyes wide with conflicted emotion. She wears a dark green velvet dress, its fabric heavy and ornate, with gold filigree trim. In her hands, she cradles a large, leather-bound book — the Book of Spells — open to a glowing page. Before her kneel two distraught sisters, Aurora in gold and Argentine in silver, weeping at her feet. The setting is Sumi's sparsely furnished chamber, lit by a single flickering candle, casting long shadows. The emotion is one of desperate hope mixed with regret. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Story of the Fair Circassians
jobs.prompt: Dely, a fair Circassian maiden of 17, petite but strong, with an oval face, bright hazel eyes sparkling with mischief, and long, dark, braided hair, stands beside her sister Tezila inside a camel-mounted box. Her skin is sun-kissed olive. She wears a teal silk dress trimmed with gold embroidery, her sleeves diaphanous, wrists adorned. She peeks through the box's window, a mischievous grin playing on her lips as Prince Delicate, disguised as a beautiful girl in a pink gown, leaps into the open space beside their camel. The prince's wig is slightly askew. Dusty caravan road stretches behind them. Sunset casts long shadows, creating a sense of warmth and adventure. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Story of the Queen of the Flowery Isles
jobs.prompt: A radiant princess, sixteen, graceful, emerges from the earth, bewildered. Oval face, wide trusting blue eyes, long wavy golden hair cascading down her shoulders, fair skin with a hint of rose. She wears a shimmering silk gown, celadon green with floral embroidery, full sleeves, cinched waist, holding a small, fluffy white dog with soulful eyes. The earth has just opened and closed around her, leaving a gaping hole behind her. Surround her a barren landscape transitions into a lush valley with flowering fruit trees and a sparkling fountain in the distance. Midday sun filters through the scene, casting dappled shadows and illuminating her with ethereal light. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover art.

jobs.title: The Story of the Three Sons of Hali
jobs.prompt: A handsome young man, Neangir, around 18, with a puzzled but earnest expression, clutching a small, ornate watch in one hand and a letter in the other. His face is framed by dark, slightly tousled hair, his eyes wide with surprise and dawning understanding; light-tan skin. He wears simple but well-kept village clothes: a linen tunic and a light wool turban, dyed in muted earth tones with a hint of blue. The key scene: Neangir, alone in a sparsely furnished room in a bustling bazaar, discovers a hidden letter revealing his true parentage, a mix of shock and determination on his face. The room is lit by the warm glow of a late afternoon sun filtering through a window, casting long shadows, dusty atmosphere. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Street Musicians
jobs.prompt:
A scruffy donkey, maybe 8 years old, with kind eyes and long floppy ears, stands patiently at a brightly lit window. A loyal greyhound balances on the donkey’s back, a ginger cat with wide, gleaming eyes perches atop the dog, and a proud rooster with vibrant red comb stands tall on the cat's head. The cat looks especially determined; the old dog seems eager to please.

Warm brown fur, dappled gray coat, orange tabby stripes, and bright red feathers. The animals are stacked precariously, peering into the window with intense focus.

Inside the house, silhouetted robbers recoil in fear at the cacophony. The animals' faces are lit by the warm glow of candlelight from within the cozy house; the spooky forest casts dark shadows around them.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Sunchild The Daughter of Buk Ettemsuch
jobs.prompt:
A frightened young woman, no older than 15, slim build, with wide expressive eyes, stands frozen in terror. Her face is pale, framed by long, dark brown braided hair escaping from under a simple white headscarf. She’s wearing a tattered, earth-toned peasant dress clinging to her frame, a single tear streaks down her cheek. She cowers against a gigantic, dark wood cask in a cavernous stone hall.

The witch, grotesque and looming, is mid-stride toward her, green cloak billowing. The witch's gnarled hand reaches to grab the girl. In the background, a chaotic feast is in progress: half-eaten food litters a sturdy wooden table, and discarded clothing hints at the sisters' recent fate.

Dim, flickering candlelight casts long, dramatic shadows across the scene. Dust motes dance in the air, highlighting the girl's vulnerability. A partly open doorway reveals a hazy, dark street in the distance.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Twin Brothers
jobs.prompt:
A handsome young man, appearing around 20, with strong build and determined eyes, one of identical twins. Face is square, eyes bright blue and wide, hair thick and wavy, light brown, skin fair. He wears a tunic of woven linen, sky blue, over leather leggings, brown. He is victoriously dueling a towering, muscular negro. King's ring visible on his hand. They battle in a sandy arena at midday. Dust swirls around the fray. The princess watches from a balcony above, a conflicted expression on her face. Light is harsh overhead, casting strong shadows.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, book cover composition. Warm earth tones with accents of sky blue and gold.

jobs.title: The Unlooked for Prince
jobs.prompt: A slender young princess, appearing around 17, with a delicate physique, hides within a dirty, oversized donkey skin. Her face is partially obscured, but glimpses of a delicate, oval face, large, tearful blue eyes, and dirty-blonde hair escaping the edges are visible. She wears the tattered remains of what was once a fine linen dress beneath the skin. This story's pivotal scene shows her fleeing the opulent castle, looking back with a mix of sadness and resolve. The grand castle, with its golden towers and arched windows, stands silhouetted against a twilight sky, hinting at the dramatic escape. She is mid-stride on a cobbled road leading away, with sparse vegetation alongside it. The lighting is dim, mainly from the rising moon. The castle is lit by warm interior lights creating long shadows. Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background creating depth, a captivating storybook cover. Accent colors: gold, azure.

jobs.title: The White Wolf
jobs.prompt: A fair maiden, Princess, about 17, slender build, stands defiant yet melancholic. Her face is oval, with large, expressive blue eyes, long blonde hair cascading down her shoulders, and fair skin. She wears a simple, elegant gown of cream-colored linen, adorned with a delicate wreath of wildflowers, her only accessory. The white wolf, regal and imposing, towers beside her, its fur gleaming in the dim light. The key scene: the moment of decision, as the princess prepares to leave her home, accepting her fate. This takes place at the edge of a dark, looming forest, late afternoon, mist curling around ancient trees. Lighting: A single ray of golden sunlight pierces through the canopy, illuminating the princess's face, with shadows deepening the forest's mystery. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor with soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Udea and her Seven Brothers
jobs.prompt:
A fair-skinned girl named Udea, about 15 years old, with dirt-smudged cheeks and tear-filled eyes, stands barefoot, her feet bloodied and bandaged with rags. She wears tattered, pitch-stained tan robes. Her expression is one of weary relief as her eldest brother kneels, gently using a cloth to wipe away the pitch from her arm, revealing clean, pale skin underneath. Brunette hair peeks from beneath the smeared pigment. They are inside a stone castle hall with arched doorways, bathed in warm light from a nearby window. The scene evokes a sense of discovery and dawning hope.

Warm, golden light streams in from the window, illuminating Udea's face. A Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor style brings a soft, emotive quality with a blurred bokeh background, focusing attention on the brother-sister reunion. Storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: What came of picking Flowers
jobs.prompt:
A gaunt, raven-haired young woman, about 19, with tear-streaked porcelain skin, sits dejectedly in a cavern. Her face is a delicate oval, with wide, pleading emerald eyes. Long, tangled black hair spills over her thin shoulders. She wears a tattered, earth-toned dress of coarse fabric.

In the foreground, she glances hopefully up at her rescuer. Jagged iron steps lead up to the cave entrance behind her. The cavern is damp and dimly lit by a single shaft of light.

In the distance, the monstrous suitor is entering, a grotesque, shadowy figure.

Golden light illuminates the woman's face, casting long, dramatic shadows.
A Studio Ghibli-style hand-painted watercolor illustration for a storybook cover, soft bokeh background. The dominant colors are warm browns and greens, with accents of emerald green.

jobs.title: A Fish Story
jobs.prompt: A small, brave Guddhu the cod—a young fish, only four inches long—kneels beside a sputtering fire. His smooth face is determined, eyes gleaming with magical skill, skin tones of river stone and pearl. He wears a headdress made of woven reeds. The key scene: Guddhu fiercely blows on the embers, coaxing them to flame, bark shavings scattered around him. The desperate fish tribe huddles behind him, their forms vaguely fish-like but with human limbs and worried expressions, clad in simple woven garments of brown and ochre. The setting is the steep bank of an Australian river just as a sudden storm hits. The air is thick with rain and wind. Golden light from the rekindling fire casts dramatic shadows. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: A French Puck
jobs.prompt: A mischievous boyish Puck, appearing about 10 years old with a wide grin, freckled face, and bright green eyes, peeks mischievously from behind a large ball of multicolored thread. His messy brown hair sticks out at odd angles. He wears a simple, patched tunic of rough homespun fabric in earthy browns and greens, typical of a peasant boy. The iconic moment depicts Puck as the ball of thread is discovered on the roadside, overhearing the bride's joyful exclamation as the bridegroom reaches for it. The rural French countryside forms the backdrop, with a dirt road winding past fields of wheat under a bright daytime sky. Golden sunlight illuminates the scene, casting long shadows and adding a sense of warmth and wonder. Hand-painted watercolor illustration with a Studio Ghibli aesthetic, soft bokeh background, perfect for a storybook cover.

jobs.title: A Lost Paradise
jobs.prompt:
A plump, rosy-cheeked charcoal burner's wife, around 25, with fair skin, sits at a lavish dining table. Her face is round, eyes wide with curiosity, and her dark hair is styled in a simple braid. She wears a pale blue silk gown, adorned with delicate floral embroidery and a golden lace trim.

The key scene is set in an opulent dining hall, where she and her husband carefully lift the lid of a large, ornate soup tureen. Her eyes widen in shock as a tiny mouse leaps out towards her face. The husband looks on with a conflicted expression of guilt and concern. Vases are tumbling.

The setting is a grand palace dining room, filled with rich tapestries, gleaming silverware, and half eaten delicacies. Warm, golden sunlight streams through the windows, highlighting motes of dust dancing in the air.

The lighting emphasizes a warm, inviting atmosphere, reminiscent of a golden hour glow, but with a touch of foreboding shadow around the soup tureen.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: How Brave Walter Hunted Wolves
jobs.prompt:
A six-year-old Walter, small for his age but puffed with confidence, stands at the edge of a dark wood. He has a round face, wide blue eyes, and a smattering of freckles. His blond hair is tousled from play. He wears a simple brown linen shirt and patched trousers, one knee bearing a fresh tear. A red rooster feather is stuck jauntily in his cap. He clutches a toy tin sabre in one hand and a drum with a hole in it in the other.

He stares bravely into the shadowed trees, a determined frown on his face and a burnt-cork mustache smudged crookedly on his upper lip. Sunlight dapples through the leaves, highlighting the dust motes dancing in the air. The forest floor is a carpet of green moss and fallen leaves, with glimpses of lurking shadows.

Golden hour lighting, emphasizing the contrast between Walter's naive courage and the unknown dangers of the woods. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor illustration, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Little Lasse
jobs.prompt: A young boy, Little Lasse, around 5 years old, Scandinavian, small and brave, wearing a blue knit cap. Face is round, with wide, curious blue eyes and rosy cheeks, blonde tousled hair, fair skin. He wears a simple brown linen tunic. Lasse drifts in a white rowboat far out at sea, fast asleep, his hands clasped in prayer. A tiny dream-boy with blue eyes and a red cap accompanies him. Pea-shell boats bob alongside. Setting is a vast, open ocean under a twilight sky, stars beginning to appear. Light is soft and ethereal, pale blue moonlight mixing with the warm glow of Nukku Matti's magical fishing rod guiding the boat. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: 'Moti'
jobs.prompt: A young, muscular Moti, around 19, wide-eyed and determined, dressed in simple homespun tunic and trousers, cinched with a leather belt, holding a thick wooden staff. His face is round, with a slightly upturned nose, dark brown eyes shining with mischief, messy black hair escaping from under a turban, and tan skin. He stands triumphantly beside a tiger tied up with a broken rope, a warm smile on his face. The scene occurs at the serai (inn), under a full moon casting long dramatic shadows in the courtyard. Moti has clearly beaten the tiger. Warm golden light spills from the serai's open doorways. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition, warm earth tones with accents of red and gold.

jobs.title: The Battle of the Birds
jobs.prompt:
A slender, anxious Prince, age seven, stands before a hulking Giant with a knotted beard. The Prince has a worried, pale face, blue eyes, and tangled blonde hair. He wears a rich blue velvet tunic, embroidered with gold thread. The Giant looms, wearing bearskins and a menacing expression, holding a simple wooden stick out to the boy.

The scene takes place on a desolate road winding away from the misty background of the Prince's home Castle in the far distance, beside a gnarled ancient tree. It is dawn, with the first cold light breaking through sullen grey clouds. The lighting is dramatic: a stark key light from the east, with long ominous shadows.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, perfect storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Believing Husbands
jobs.prompt: A young, stocky Irish farmer in his late 20s, wearing a tweed vest and muddy trousers, stands bewildered in a graveyard. Round face, hazel eyes wide with confusion, auburn hair tousled. He's naked save for a long white sleeping shirt. Key scene: He gestures vaguely, utterly perplexed, as townsfolk flee in terror around him. Overturned coffin nearby. Gray cobblestone ground, rolling green hills in the distance. Overcast sky, threatening rain. Light filters weakly through the clouds, casting soft shadows. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. Dominant earth tones with white and pale blue accents.

jobs.title: The Bones of Djulung
jobs.prompt:
A slender girl, around 14, stands near a fantastical tree. Her face is heart-shaped, with wide, curious brown eyes and long, wavy black hair framing her face. Her skin is a warm tan. She wears a simple woven sarong in earthy browns and greens, with a single red hibiscus flower tucked behind her ear.

The girl carefully cradles the iron tree. The tree's trunk appears metallic--leaves of shimmering silk in sunset hues, flowers of pure gold, and fruit of dazzling diamonds.

Sunlight filters through the dense jungle foliage as the girl presents a golden flower to a king in jeweled robes. He gazes at her with kind eyes, attendants stand behind him in awe.

Warm sunlight bathes the scene in a golden glow, highlighting the magical silk and the gentle connection between the girl and the tree. Soft bokeh background, Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Brown Bear of Norway
jobs.prompt: Princess, 18, heartbroken, slender, with tear-streaked face and long, flowing auburn hair. Large, expressive blue eyes filled with regret, fair skin. Wearing a velvet nightgown, deep emerald green, gold trim, symbolic gold cup discarded nearby. Clasping her hands. She recoils in horror as her transformed husband, a majestic brown bear with sorrowful eyes, departs through an archway. Grand castle bedchamber, stone walls, tapestry, flickering candlelight, pre-dawn. Key light from the archway, casting long shadows. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Brownie of the Lake
jobs.prompt: A stout, plain-faced Jégu, around 20, kneels, offering wildflowers to a disdainful Barbaïk, 18, renowned for her beauty and elaborate dresses, head turned away in refusal. Her face is sharp featured with dark eyebrows and long black hair in intricate braids. She wears a white embroidered cap, five petticoats in graduated lengths of blue and red, and silver-buckled shoes. The scene unfolds beside a misty lake at twilight, with a tiny green brownie, the size of a frog, perched on a lily pad nearby, subtly influencing events with a mischievous expression. Golden hour lighting casts long shadows across the water, emphasizing the romantic tension and magical undertones. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Castle of Kerglas
jobs.prompt: A lithe Peronnik, age 15, barefoot, lean but strong from farm work, watches from forest edge; curious, hopeful expression. Round face, wide blue eyes, tousled brown hair, sun-kissed skin. Wears simple homespun tunic, patched brown breeches. Holds hazelwood staff. Key scene: Peronnik spies through trees as giant wizard Rogéar rides past on black mare, colt trotting behind, golden bowl around his neck, diamond lance gleaming. Setting: edge of ancient forest meets open pasture, late afternoon, dappled sunlight. Warm golden light filtering through leaves, casting long shadows; magical mist swirling. Soft, hand-painted watercolor, Studio Ghibli style, storybook cover composition, background with gentle bokeh. Dominant earthy browns and greens, with gold accent on bowl, diamond white on lance.

jobs.title: The Enchanted Deer
jobs.prompt:
Lithesome, raven-haired Princess, about 19, with a sorrowful expression, kneeling beside the sleeping form of Ian, a young man, about 20, with tousled dark hair. Her delicate face, with large, watery blue eyes, is framed by strands of loose black hair. She wears a shimmering seagreen silk gown, intricately embroidered with silver thread, and a delicate, filigreed headpiece, the 'daughter of the king of the town under the waves'. She gently combs his hair with an ornate golden comb.

Inside a timeworn stone church, shafts of light filtering through stained-glass windows illuminate the scene. The air is thick with incense and unspoken regret. Low, arched ceilings and faded tapestries adorn the walls.

Soft, diffused light from the stained glass casts multicolored patterns on the stone floor. The light highlights the sadness in the princess's eyes.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Escape of the Mouse
jobs.prompt: A sorrowful but determined Prince Manawyddan, mid-thirties, broad-shouldered with a warrior's build, stands beside the marble fountain, distraught. His face is weathered, with dark circles under his deep-blue eyes. His dark hair is pulled back, revealing a strong jawline and tanned skin. He wears rugged leather armor, adorned with subtle blue enamel details, and simple brown boots. In the bewitched castle courtyard, Rhiannon, with long auburn hair cascading down her back, elegant face now frozen in horror, her hand stuck fast to the golden bowl. Pryderi is similarly ensnared. The eerie castle dominates the background under a darkening sky, just before a magical storm. Soft golden light filters through the courtyard, highlighting the supernatural stillness. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Fairy Nurse
jobs.prompt: A young, distraught Molly, the farmer's wife, around 28, with a slender build and worried expression. Oval face, wide blue eyes filled with fear, long auburn hair escaping from under her white cap, fair skin. She wears a simple homespun dress of faded blue linen, a shawl of undyed wool fastened with a silver brooch, and carries a woven basket. Molly is being escorted away from her humble cottage by a tall, imposing Fairy King dressed in emerald green velvet, his face handsome but cold. The scene is moonlit, near the stone bridge of Thuar in Coolgarrow. Wisps of fairy dust swirl around them. Background: rolling green hills, softly blurred. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh, storybook cover composition. Primarily cool blues, greens, and grays with touches of silver and white.

jobs.title: The False Prince and the True
jobs.prompt:
A handsome young nobleman, barely twenty, with a strong build, stands defiant in a grand hall. His face, framed by short, dark, wavy hair and intense brown eyes reflecting bravery, is streaked with a single line of blood from his lip. He wears a finely woven white tunic, belted with a red sash, and carries a sheathed dagger.

He gestures boldly with a clenched fist mid-speech before the King. A king with a stern face and white clothing sits stone-faced on a throne, surrounded by skeptical nobles in rich attire.

The hall features soaring arches of stone, ornate tapestries, and sunlight pouring through stained-glass windows creating bright highlights and long dramatic shadows.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor artwork with a soft bokeh background, emphasizing the tension and drama of the moment. Golden hour lighting provides a warm contrast to the cool stone architecture. Storybook illustration.

jobs.title: The Four Gifts
jobs.prompt:
Téphany, a kind 17-year-old farm girl with rosy cheeks and tired eyes, pauses by the river, holding a bundle of laundry. Her dark hair is tied back with a simple blue ribbon. She wears a practical, earth-toned cotton dress, slightly faded.

A wrinkled, smiling fairy disguised as an elderly woman offers Téphany a long, ornate copper pin. Téphany looks at the fairy with wary gratitude, her hand outstretched.

The scene takes place on a grassy riverbank; smooth grey stones line the water's edge. Late afternoon sun filters through the leaves of the trees lining the riverbank, creating dappled light. The air is filled with the scent of wildflowers and damp earth. A faint mist hangs over the water.

Golden hour lighting, warm and inviting.

Studio Ghibli-inspired, hand-painted watercolor illustration, soft bokeh background, centered storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Groac'h of the Isle of Lok
jobs.prompt:
A youthful Houarn, appearing 19, strong build, determined, stands inside the Groac'h's underwater palace. His face, oval-shaped with bright, naive blue eyes, cropped dark hair, and fair skin, shows awe. He wears simple linen trousers and a tunic in earth tones, the knife given by Bellah visible at his belt.

The Groac'h, ethereally beautiful with a heart-shaped face, dark mesmerizing eyes, and long flowing black hair interwoven with coral, rises from her golden couch, extending a hand to Houarn. She is adorned in a shimmering green silk gown that mimics the sea.

Opulent sea-shell palace setting: Iridescent blue, green, pink walls, crystal staircases, and diamond flora. Key light from an unseen source above, creating dappled highlights on the Groac'h.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. Accent colors: Coral and pearl.

jobs.title: The Heart of a Monkey
jobs.prompt:
A clever, slender monkey, about 8 years old, with fur the color of warm sand, perches high in a lush, fruit-laden tree. The monkey has an intelligent face with bright, mischievous eyes and a wide grin, tufts of bright white fur framing its face. It wears a woven vest of green and brown leaves, adorned with small, polished river stones.

The key scene: The monkey craftily feeds juicy, orange kuyus to a large, grey shark with a gaping mouth, right below the tree. The shark is grinning, revealing rows of sharp teeth. The monkey is making direct eye-contact with the viewer.

Setting: A vibrant, tropical tree overhanging a turquoise sea at the foot of a towering, ochre cliff. Dawn light illuminates the valley, casting long shadows.

Lighting: The scene is bathed in the soft, warm glow of the rising sun, with dappled light filtering through the leaves. Golden hour, creating a sense of serenity and adventure.

Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, centered composition suitable for book cover.

jobs.title: The Hoodie-Crow
jobs.prompt:
A young, determined farm girl with braided blonde hair and kind blue eyes, early 20s, wearing a simple but elegant hand-stitched wedding dress of cream-colored wool, stands confidently facing a handsome man.

The man, formerly a hoodie-crow, has striking green eyes and raven hair, dressed in a nobleman's attire of dark green velvet. He looks lovingly at her, holding her hand.

They stand together in the hoodie-crow's grand hall, stone walls and a roaring fireplace, celebratory wedding feast laid out on a long wooden table.

The iconic moment of realization: the man has found the feather and ring in his soup.

Warm, golden light from candles and the hearth illuminates the scene, celebratory mood, faces flushed with love and surprise.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Jogi's Punishment
jobs.prompt: A beautiful princess, around 17, slender with graceful features, lies in a wooden chest, eyes closed but alive. Her face is oval, with long dark hair fanned around her head, pale skin, and delicate features. She wears a rich saffron silk gown, intricately embroidered with gold thread, and several jeweled bangles adorn her wrists. The chest is being opened by a handsome young prince, early 20s, regal bearing, dark hair and eyes, dressed in hunting attire of dark green velvet and gold trim. He looks down at her with concern and curiosity. Golden sunlight streams in as the chest floats down a river near the bank in the early dawn light. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Lady of the Fountain
jobs.prompt:
A youthful, athletic knight named Kynon, perhaps 22, stands disoriented in a forest clearing, his silver armor gleaming faintly. His face, framed by sweaty, tangled brown hair, shows surprise and slight fear. He wears a tunic of fine green wool under his polished armor.

Around him, fallen green leaves cover the ground, contrasting with a deep blue sky peeking through bare branches above. Perched on the branches are vibrantly colored exotic birds, singing. In the background, a furious knight clad in black velvet armor sits astride a black horse, lance lowered, approaching him fast.

A marble fountain bubbles nearby. The lighting is dappled sunlight filtering through thinning trees after a storm. Use warm earth tones, with accents of bright blue and emerald green. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor with soft bokeh, suitable for a storybook cover.

jobs.title: The One-Handed Girl
jobs.prompt:
A slender, young maiden named not given, appears around 17, with kind eyes and a resilient spirit. Her face is oval-shaped, framed by long, flowing dark brown hair, styled simply. Her skin tone is a warm, sun-kissed olive. She wears a tattered ochre peasant dress of woven flax, symbolic of her poverty but adorned with a small, hand-stitched sunflower at the waist, reflecting her inner strength.

In a heart-wrenching moment, with tears streaming down her face, she clings desperately to the vibrant green pumpkin vine, her right hand outstretched as her cruel brother brings down a sharp blade.

The scene occurs outside her modest thatched-roof hut at dawn, bathed in the cool light of morning. Wisps of mist rise from the dewy grass, surrounding her and the lush pumpkin patch.

Golden light filters through palm trees, casting long shadows.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Raspberry Worm
jobs.prompt:
Two young sisters, Aina and Lisa, around 7-8 years old, with fair skin, rosy cheeks, and matching blonde braids, wide-eyed with wonder and surprise. Aina has sky-blue eyes and Lisa has forest-green eyes. They wear simple pinafore dresses, one yellow, one green, stained with dark-red raspberry juice. They are kneeling among vibrant raspberry bushes laden with ripe fruit.

Both girls gaze up in awe at a kindly, elderly man — the Raspberry King — emerging from the bushes. The king has a crooked mouth, a white coat, and a jaunty red cap. He is slightly lame, leaning on a wooden cane.

The scene captures the moment of revelation. A silver tray with porcelain cups sits nearby, remnants of a magical forest breakfast.
