Golden sunlight filters through the leaves, creating dappled patterns on the ground. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Rich Brother and the Poor Brother
jobs.prompt: A weary, dark-haired man, about 30, dressed in tattered earth-toned peasant clothing, stands before a grand farmhouse. His face, gaunt and lined with worry, features pleading brown eyes and a stubbled chin. He gestures humbly with calloused hands. His wife, fair-skinned with long, braided blonde hair, stands behind him holding two small, thin children dressed in patched clothes. The younger, rich brother, stout with a ruddy face and beady eyes, stands in the doorway, adorned in opulent burgundy velvet trimmed with gold braid. He frowns, clutching a jeweled goblet. Golden sunlight bathes the idyllic farm contrasting with the shadows around the poor brother. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Ring of the Waterfalls
jobs.prompt:
A weathered man, perhaps 40s, gaunt but with kind eyes, stands at a humble doorway. He's clad in patched, earth-toned homespun clothes, holding a worn wooden toy horse. His face is a mix of hope and anxiety. A young girl with blonde braids and a hopeful expression peeks out from behind his leg.

Sunlight filters through the unfinished carved stone portico behind them, highlighting the rough, unfinished state of the house - beautiful pillars leading to nowhere. Water trickles down the walls, hinting at leaks. The overall color palette leans towards warm browns and grays, with a splash of hopeful color in the child's dress.

The key moment: Appealing to his brother, swallowing his pride, to ask for shelter.

Setting: one of the unfinished houses in the city.

Lighting: Soft, diffused natural light from a cloudy afternoon, creating shadows that highlight the family's poverty. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Sea King's Gift
jobs.prompt:
Sunken-eyed, weathered Maie, age 60, in layered woolens, stands knee-deep in the shimmering sea at twilight. Wisps of white hair escape her kerchief. She casts a hand-knitted herring net into the still water, muttering ancient rhymes. Her expression is a mix of longing and apprehension. Behind her, the red rock of Ahtola rises—tiny cottage, weathered flag, tufts of grass. In the distance, underwater, a colossal, luminous cow with opalescent scales rises dreamily toward the surface, drawn by the spell.
Warm light radiates from the cottage window, juxtaposed against the cool, blue-green of the ocean depths. Ghibli-inspired watercolor, soft focus, storybook illustration.

jobs.title: The Shifty Lad
jobs.prompt: A teenage boy "Shifty Lad" with a mischievous grin, around 15, lean build, stands in a rustic cowshed at night, flickering lantern light. His face is round with bright, playful green eyes and a smattering of freckles. Auburn hair is tousled. He wears simple peasant clothes, a brown tunic over a cream-colored undershirt, patched breeches. In his hands, he holds a large needle and thread, sewing the hem of a dark coat to a large, rough bullock hide. The hulking form of the Black Rogue sleeps soundly behind him, hay clinging to his worn leather garments. Hallowe'en night, a sliver of moon visible through cracks in the wooden walls. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, focused medium shot, soft bokeh, cover art composition.

jobs.title: The Stones of Plouhinec
jobs.prompt:
A wizened beggar in tattered brown robes and a patched hat, around 60 years old, thin face, graying stubble, piercing blue eyes gleaming with cunning, stands hunched inside a dimly lit stable filled with hay. His weathered hands clutch a small bouquet of crowsfoot and five-leaved trefoil, illuminated by a sliver of moonlight.

An old donkey and a thin ox, their eyes wide with surprise, flank him on either side. The stable is built of rough-hewn stone, bathed in cool moonlight filtering through cracks in the wooden walls.

The key moment: The beggar overhearing the animals talking about the stones of Plouhinec and their hidden treasure. His expression is a mix of glee and avarice.

Setting: Interior of a rustic Breton stable on Christmas Eve, Plouhinec.

Lighting: Predominantly cool moonlit blues and grays, with pockets of warmer light emanating from unseen lanterns.

Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition, warm earthy tones and cool blues.

jobs.title: The Story of a Very Bad Boy
jobs.prompt:
A mischievous boy named Antoine, around 15, thin build, stands triumphantly beside a panting wolf. Antoine has a wide, cheeky grin, brown eyes, freckled face, and tousled dark brown hair. He wears a simple peasant shirt, patched brown trousers, and no shoes. He clutches the wolf's tail in his left hand; the wolf is uncomfortably squeezed into a ram's fleece.

The key scene is the moment Antoine drags the disguised wolf into his mother's humble cottage, wood walls, dirt floor. His mother, a wrinkled old woman in a blue dress and white cap, stands near the fireplace. She has her hands on her hips, regarding the unlikely duo with a mixture of suspicion and amusement. 

Sunlight streams through the open doorway, casting long shadows and illuminating dust motes in the air. The overall style should be a Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, with a soft bokeh background effect, composed like a classic storybook cover. Warm earthy tones with accents of blue.

jobs.title: The Three Crowns
jobs.prompt:
A young prince, appearing 20, clad in forest green tunic of supple leather and earth-toned leggings, kneels beside the youngest princess, about 19, with auburn hair cascading down her shoulders and worried blue eyes. She wears a simple sky-blue dress of homespun linen, clutching his hand, her face reflecting hope and apprehension.

Before them looms Seven Inches, a miniature man with a wise, knowing smirk, impeccably dressed in a tailored suit of deep crimson velvet. He gestures towards a grand table laden with a feast in a vast stone hall. Two looming gray stone statues stand silently in the corners, frozen giants forever watching.

Warm candlelight bathes the scene, highlighting the rich textures of the room and the characters' expressions. Soft golden light streams through arched windows, illuminating motes of dust dancing in the air.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Winning of Olwen
jobs.prompt: A handsome young Kilwch, age 18, stands confidently before the imposing gates of Arthur's palace; dapple-grey horse with gold bridle and saddle, two silver spears, ivory war-horn, golden sword. He looks determined. Square jaw, light brown hair neatly combed, bright blue eyes, fair skin. Purple robe with golden apple details, each worth a hundred cows. The scene: Kilwch arriving, demanding entry. Palace gates of stone and iron, guarded by a stern porter. Mid-morning light, a slight breeze rustling the grass. Arthur's hall visible in the distance. Warm, inviting sunlight creates a hopeful atmosphere. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, with soft bokeh background, suitable for a storybook cover.

jobs.title: The Wonderful Tune
jobs.prompt: A young, blind Maurice Connor, ruddy-cheeked and a bit tipsy, mid-dance on the shore. Round face, dark curly hair escaping from under his cap, vibrant blue eyes gazing sightlessly ahead, light-skinned. He wears a homespun tweed waistcoat over a linen shirt, dark green breeches, and buckled shoes. In the foreground, a sea lady with long flowing green hair, pearl-like teeth, and coral lips, dances, offering him a proposal. She wears a cocked hat and a pale green gown adorned with seaweed. The strand of Trafraska in Ballinskellig Bay at twilight, with fish of every variety leaping and dancing in the surf. Golden light highlighting the figures, soft watercolor style with gentle ripples in the water and a storybook feel.

jobs.title: 'A long-bow story'
jobs.prompt: A stout, middle-aged bunniah, looking flustered, walks beside a younger, wiry farmer on a dusty country road in rural India. The bunniah has a round face, shrewd dark eyes, a trimmed moustache, and light brown skin. He wears a cream-colored dhoti and kurta, a gold ring on his finger, and carries a small حساب (ledger) under his arm. The farmer has a weathered, smiling face, dark hair, and wears a simple indigo kurta and white turban. Key scene: The bunniah is gesturing emphatically as he tells his ridiculous tale, while the farmer listens with a bemused expression, feigning earnest interest. Setting: Golden afternoon sunlight illuminates the scene, casting long shadows on the road. In the background, a distant village shimmers in the heat haze. Lighting: Warm, diffused key light from the setting sun, with soft fill light creating a cheerful but slightly surreal atmosphere. Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor illustration, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. Accent colors: Indigo and gold

jobs.title: Diamond cut diamond
jobs.prompt:
Agape-mouthed merchant, about 50, sits slumped against a sun-baked wall, defeated. His face is lined with worry, eyes bloodshot and wide with shock, dirty grey hair matted to his forehead. He wears simple, earth-toned cotton robes, torn at the shoulder, and a discarded turban lies nearby. He clutches his head in despair.

In the background, the vibrant chaos of a Hindustan bazaar is beginning to stir with dawn light. Beeka Mull, the portly shopkeeper, stands amidst luxurious carpets and silks, sneering triumphantly, silver pipe clenched in his fist.

Golden light from the rising sun casts long shadows, highlighting the dust motes dancing in the air. Hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition, Studio Ghibli style.

jobs.title: Dorani
jobs.prompt: A slender, veiled Dorani, around 17, with a mysterious aura. Her face is obscured, hinting at delicate features and a porcelain complexion. Her extraordinary hair, like spun gold, cascades down her silver robes. Poised dramatically on a four-legged, intricately carved wooden stool with silk curtains, suspended mid-air. Gripping one leg of the stool is the invisible prince, straining to hold on. The key moment: the stool launches skyward, carrying Dorani to Indra's palace. The scent-seller’s dwelling fades below, replaced by a star-dusted, moonlit sky. Light emanates from the stool, casting a soft glow on Dorani. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. Warm earth tones with silver and rose accents.

jobs.title: Geirlaug the king's daughter
jobs.prompt: A youthful, determined Geirlaug, around 12 years old, stands protectively in front of slightly older Grethari; both are transformed into sleek, midnight-black foals with intensely intelligent eyes. Geirlaug has a star-shaped marking on her forehead. They stand in a moonlit clearing encircled by ancient, gnarled trees in the royal gardens. The witch queen, a beautiful but cruel woman with a sinister sneer and eyes like chips of obsidian, peers from behind a tree trunk, clutching a gnarled staff. Her dark gown blends into the shadows. Moonlight streams through the canopy, casting eerie shadows and highlighting the foals' glistening coats. A hand-painted watercolor illustration with a soft bokeh background, in the style of Studio Ghibli. Warm earth tones with cool blue and black accents. Storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Grasp all, lose all
jobs.prompt: A gaunt, anxious Déna, looking about 40, clutches a luminous red ruby, about the size of a walnut. His face is deeply lined, with wide, fearful eyes, and a neatly trimmed grey mustache. Dark, receding hair, light-brown skin tone. Wears a tattered muslin dhoti, primarily earth-toned, secured with a simple cotton sash. The key moment: he's perched high in the giant peepul tree, gazing in astonishment at more sparkling rubies scattered on the deserted shore. The deserted, rocky shore stretches to a dark, moody sea under a pre-dawn sky. The gnarled roots of the peepul tree are visible. Overhead, the last stars twinkle. Key light comes from the rubies themselves, with a cool, moonlit fill. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. Warm sienna against cool blues.

jobs.title: He wins who waits
jobs.prompt: A fair-skinned, youthful princess with bright, intelligent eyes and a determined expression, around 18, dressed in flowing green robes of silk and velvet, a delicate golden veil trailing behind her, holding a gleaming golden apple. She locks eyes with a humble, dark-haired young man in simple, earth-toned linen clothing. His face is open and kind, a slight smile playing on his lips. The key moment: The princess, having surveyed the assembled suitors, offers him the golden apple, defying the expectations of the king and court. The grand palace courtyard is filled with richly dressed nobles, colorful banners, and intricate stonework. The time of day is late afternoon, casting long shadows. The lighting is soft and diffused, with a touch of golden hour warmth. Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, centered storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Jackal or tiger?
jobs.prompt: Ameer Ali, an 18-year-old youth with a sturdy build, stands remorseful in a sun-dappled forest clearing. His face, youthful and earnest, shows concern, with brown eyes wide with apology. He has dark, tousled hair and tanned skin, dressed in simple earth-toned fabrics, a leather belt with a sheathed sword, and carrying a two-stringed bow. The foreground features an overturned clay pitcher, water spilling across the mossy ground. Ameer Ali offers his large brass pot to a hunched, wrinkled old woman, her face etched with frustration and damp clothes clinging to her thin frame. She gestures towards a rustic hut barely visible through the trees. Golden hour lighting filters through the dense canopy, casting long shadows and highlighting the details of the forest floor. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Kupti and Imani
jobs.prompt: Eighteen-year-old Imani, lithe and graceful, with a determined set to her jaw, kneels beside a wizened, elderly fakir. Her black hair is pulled back loosely, revealing warm brown skin and intelligent, focused eyes; she wears a simple cream-colored cotton sari. Imani gently massages the fakir's gnarled, crippled leg with oil in the dim interior of their mud hut. Light from a small clay lamp illuminates her focused expression, highlighting scattered gold coins under the floorboards. The background features a partially woven silver cloth on a loom. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition, warm earth tones with silver and cream accents.

jobs.title: Madschen
jobs.prompt: Ameer Ali, young man in his early 20s, strong physique, stands tall and proud, distinctive tiger-striped sash across his chest. Face is determined, dark eyes shining with intelligence, dark hair neatly combed, bronze skin tone. He wears a gold-embroidered emerald green sherwani of fine silk, tiger-striped sash, jeweled turban. Ameer Ali kneels to offer his hand to Madschen; she accepts, smiling gently, as forest fairy magically appears beside them. Lush jungle clearing, sunset, soft mist, golden sunlight filtering through leaves. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Samba the coward
jobs.prompt:
Samba, a tall, muscular man of 20, is discovered cowering in a dark cellar. His face is round, eyes wide with terror, short dark hair, light brown skin, beads of sweat on his brow. He wears only a simple white tunic. His wife, the princess, stands before him, furious and resolute. She is slender but strong, around 18 years old, with a determined face, dark eyes, long black braided hair, and bronze skin. She's clad in Samba's ornate gold-inlaid mail, helmet, and is buckling the last strap. She holds a spear firmly.

The scene takes place in a dimly lit palace cellar, large clay pots filled with grain line the background.

A single shaft of light illuminates the princess, casting long shadows and highlighting the gold of the armor.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, a storybook cover composition. Warm earth tones juxtaposed with the shining gold to convey both fear and courage.

jobs.title: The billy goat and the king
jobs.prompt: A young, slender Hindu king with a neatly trimmed dark beard, sitting cross-legged on a mud-plastered platform. His face is kind and intelligent, dark eyes twinkling with mirth, a subtle smile playing on his lips. He wears a simple gold armlet. Across from him, his queen, adorned in a vibrant sari with intricate gold embroidery, looks at him with a mixture of suspicion and anger. Beside a stone well, a billy goat aggressively butts his nanny goat wife. Lush green leaves sprout enticingly from the well's interior. Sunlight filters through the leaves of large, leafy trees. A Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition, blending warm earth tones with accents of gold and sari jewel tones.

jobs.title: The blue parrot
jobs.prompt: A nineteen-year-old King Lino, stripped of his royal garments and dressed in a dirty dwarf's tunic, stands bewildered in Riquette's gaudy chamber. His face is youthful but smudged with dirt, dark eyes wide with confusion, short dark hair a mess. Riquette, a grotesque princess with bulbous features and greasy black hair, wears a jeweled gown of sickly green silk. She beams at Lino with unsettling adoration. The Isle of Lions chamber is visible behind them: garish tapestries, glinting gold idols. Harsh, unnatural light emanates from magical braziers, casting long, distorted shadows. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, fairytale cover composition. Warm browns and golds contrasted by sickly greens.

jobs.title: The boy who found fear at last
jobs.prompt: A fair-skinned, teenage boy, slender but wiry, with dirt smudged on his cheek, determined expression. Round, inquisitive hazel eyes, messy dark brown hair, slightly too-big peasant clothes. Worn linen shirt, patched brown trousers, no shoes. He's bravely tapping the skeletal hand reaching out of a mossy grave with a wooden spoon, cake in his other hand. Crumbling churchyard, crooked gravestones, gnarled ancient trees silhouetted against the night sky. Eerie moonlight shining through a break in the clouds. Cold blue key light from above, flickering orange fill light from a small campfire. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The clever weaver
jobs.prompt: A youthful, kind-eyed male weaver, no older than 20, stands confidently before the king. His face is intelligent, with a slightly amused expression, short dark hair, and tanned skin. He wears a simple, practical woven tunic of undyed wool, highlighting his skilled hands. The defining moment: the weaver presents a live hen devouring millet seeds scattered on the ornate throne room floor. The king looks on, intrigued, while a bewildered ambassador departs in the background. The throne room is grand, with tall columns and rich tapestries. Golden sunlight streams through arched windows, illuminating the scene with warm light, emphasizing the tension and resolution. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The comb and the collar
jobs.prompt: Princess, sixteen, fair-skinned, delicate, beautiful despite brown face paint, slender figure. Oval face, wide blue eyes filled with fear, long black hair escaping a brown cap. She wears shimmering, oversized sapphire silk gown stolen from the Queen. Kneeling, shielding face, clutching the steel collar. Terrified, in a dark, dense forest being approached by menacing wolves with sharp teeth bared. Tall, ancient trees surround her. Key light from the left, dappled moonlight filtering through the canopy, casting long shadows. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition, warm earth tones, sapphire and silver accents.

jobs.title: The fate of the turtle
jobs.prompt: A small, brown turtle with a determined expression, suspended in mid-air between two vibrant green-headed ducks with bright orange feet. The turtle's mouth is slightly open as if about to speak, eyes wide. They are flying over a small, quaint village with red-tiled roofs; villagers below point upwards in amazement, tiny figures with varied colorful clothing. Houses have stucco walls with wooden doors. Setting is a sun-drenched afternoon, casting warm shadows. Key light from the top right. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. Warm earth tones with green and orange accents.

jobs.title: The five wise words of the guru
jobs.prompt:
A handsome young man, Ram Singh, around 18 years old, strong build, determined expression. Face is oval-shaped, kind brown eyes with a hint of worry, neat dark hair, warm tan skin. Wardrobe consists of simple homespun cotton clothes, earthy brown and beige tones, a small travel wallet slung across his shoulder. He stands at an ancient well, two large brass vessels strapped to a mule beside him, two smaller ones on his shoulders. The well is stone, covered in moss, with worn steps leading down into darkness. Key scene depicts Ram Singh bravely facing the well, a mix of fear and resolve on his face, ready to descend despite the legends. Setting is a desolate landscape, a few gnarled trees dotting the area, sunset, dust swirling in the air. Lighting is dramatic – golden light from the setting sun contrasted with the deep shadows of the well.
Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The golden-headed fish
jobs.prompt: A handsome Egyptian prince, age 20, muscular build, kneels at the ocean's edge, holding a shimmering golden-headed fish in his hands. His face, oval-shaped with expressive dark brown eyes, shows a conflict between duty and compassion. Short, dark wavy hair frames his tanned skin. He wears simple linen trousers, rolled to the knee, and a blue cotton tunic. The fish looks at him with pleading eyes. This pivotal moment captures the prince's decision to release the magical fish. Setting sun casts long shadows on the sandy beach; rocky cliffs rise in the background. Waves gently lap at the shore. Warm, golden light illuminates the scene, with a touch of blues in the shadows, creating a Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The green knight
jobs.prompt: A beautiful, sad Princess, age 12, with long golden hair, stands on the balcony of her lakeside castle. Her face is heart-shaped, her large blue eyes filled with tears, skin pale. She wears a sapphire blue gown of velvet, with long flowing sleeves and intricate gold embroidery at the neckline. In her hands, she holds a single white water lily. The iconic castle, with many windows, rises from the center of a tranquil lake. Late afternoon sunlight streams from the west, casting long shadows and creating a warm, melancholic glow on the water. Distant, soft focus rolling hills surround the lake. A small rowboat is tied to a dock below her, almost invisible in the shadow. The overall mood is one of isolation and longing. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The prince and princess in the forest
jobs.prompt:
A handsome, brave Prince of Denmark, age 18, muscular build, stands protectively in front of his frail, blonde-haired mother, the Queen, protecting her from the Robber-Chief who has emerged from a hidden trap door, seizing her ankle. Prince has an oval face, bright blue eyes filled with determination, and short, neatly combed golden hair. He wears a fine linen tunic over chainmail, and a sheathed sword hangs at his hip. The Robber-Chief has a menacing hooked nose, dark eyes, and a scraggly beard.

The scene: Inside the robbers’ den, a cozy room with pale blue curtains and soft yellow cushions. The queen is terrified, screaming, on her knees, as the robber grabs her.

Warm, golden light streams in from a nearby window, highlighting the drama of the moment.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The punishment of the fairy Gangana
jobs.prompt: A kind-faced, middle-aged Queen Gillette, with warm, light skin and chestnut hair pulled back in a practical braid, stands in her stone kitchen. She wears a simple dress of blue linen and a cream-colored apron, her expression a mix of shock and wonder. Before her, a tiny one-foot-tall ragged old woman with an iron stick stands where moments ago there was a blue mouse. The old woman inscribed strange signs on the earthen floor. In the next room, cockchafers, redbreasts, singing children disappear from view outside the window. Warm, golden light streams through the window, illuminating dust motes dancing in the air. Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, centered storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The satin surgeon
jobs.prompt:
A young, fair princess with high cheekbones and worried blue eyes, around 18, leans out of a small stone window in a tall, desolate tower. Her golden-blonde hair cascades down her shoulder. She wears a simple white cotton dress, torn at the hem, with faded blue accents. In her delicate hands, she clutches a precious letter tied to a string. Below, partially obscured by thorny brambles, the Emperor's loyal equerry, cloaked and hooded, looks up at her with hopeful eyes.

The Desert Tower looms tall and gray against a stormy, twilight sky. Jagged rocks surround the tower's base, emphasizing its isolation.
Key light comes harshly from the setting sun, casting long shadows and highlighting the princess's fearful expression. Fill light is cold and diffuse, enhancing the gothic mood.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The silent princess
jobs.prompt: A handsome Turkish prince, about 20, stands determined yet nervous before a towering yellow marble palace, his fine tunic travel-stained. He has a kind, oval face, dark expressive eyes, raven hair slightly disheveled, and tanned skin. He wears a silk tunic in faded blues and golds, with a jeweled scimitar at his hip – his only defense. The ground before him is littered with bleached skulls, grim testament to failed suitors. The silent princess's palace looms behind him, an impassive challenge. The sky is a bruised twilight, casting long shadows. Warm firelight spills from the palace windows, offering a deceptive welcome. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The snake prince
jobs.prompt: Eighteen-year-old Princess, fair-skinned with auburn hair, sits astride a white horse, looking back at her prince with curiosity tinged with apprehension. Her face is heart-shaped, and her eyes are wide with a mix of excitement and fear. She wears a wedding dress of cream-colored silk, embroidered with gold thread. A delicate golden tiara adorns her head. Beside her, the Prince, cloaked in midnight blue velvet, leads her into a dark, moonlit forest. Ancient, gnarled trees surround them, their branches reaching like skeletal fingers. An owl watches from above. A faint mist curls around the horses' hooves. The light of a hidden moon casts long shadows, creating an atmosphere of mystery and foreboding. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The steel cane
jobs.prompt:
A frail old woman with kind eyes and wrinkled face, perhaps 70s, wielding a gleaming steel cane. Her grey hair is pulled back in a simple bun, her skin tanned from years in the garden. She wears a practical, patched dress of brown homespun fabric, apron tied at the waist. In a climactic moment, she's striking a young man's shoulder with the cane. The man, mid-twenties, burly build, contorts in pain and shock as his features begin to shift into that of a donkey.

The cottage interior: warm, rustic, with spinning wheel visible. Stone hearth with glowing embers. Evening light streaming through a window, casting long shadows. The scene is charged with magical energy.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. Warm earth tones dominate, with accents of steel grey and fiery orange.

jobs.title: The story of little King Loc
jobs.prompt: Abeille, a fair-skinned girl of six with golden curls and ice-blue eyes, stands ankle-deep in a shimmering lake. Her satin shoes and stockings lie discarded on the sandy shore. She wears a tattered rose-colored silk dress, its hemline torn from her adventure. Her expression is one of delighted awe. Beside her, faint footprints of tiny forked feet mark the sand, hinting at unseen water spirits. Behind her, the dark silhouette of distant mountains meets the twilight sky. The scene is set at dusk, with the last rays of the sun casting a warm, golden glow on the water, creating long, dancing reflections. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The story of Zoulvisia
jobs.prompt:
A handsome, determined young king, perhaps 20, with a strong build, climbs down into a dark pit; beside him, a very old man with a long white beard awakens with a startled expression. The cavern walls are damp and mossy.

The king has a square jaw, dark eyebrows, and light brown hair. He wears a travel-stained green tunic with leather armor and gold trim.

The key moment is the king seeking counsel from the old man in the pit, lit by the lantern that casts long shadows. The old man wears tattered brown robes. 

Setting: A moonlit pit just outside the high, windowless stone walls of Zoulvisia's palace. The overall mood is tense with anticipation.

Lighting: Cool moonlight from above contrasting with the warm, flickering light from the old man's lantern.

Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. The color palette includes warm earth tones (greens, browns, grays) with the accent color of moonlight blue.

jobs.title: The strange adventures of Little Maia
jobs.prompt: A one-inch-tall Little Maia, appearing 6 years old, sits forlorn on a lily pad adrift in a stream. Her face is round, with wide, tearful blue eyes and a worried expression. She has a cascade of golden blonde hair. Maia wears a periwinkle blue sash dress made of silk, accented with rose-petal quilting. The lily pad, partially submerged, is being nibbled at the stem by iridescent blue and silver fish. A looming, grotesque frog with bulging eyes watches from the muddy bank, rushes and cattails crowding the background. The light is dappled, early morning, with a cool, dewy atmosphere. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The thanksgiving of the Wazir
jobs.prompt:
A gray-bearded Wazir, age 60s, stands calmly in a prison cell; tall, wise eyes shining with inner peace, tan skin. His white cotton robes are slightly disheveled, but clean. The prison doorway behind him glows with soft, warm light from the king's palace. He raises his cuffed hands in a gesture of serene gratitude, a slight smile on his lips.

In the background, silhouetted against the light, are two guards with spears, looking puzzled by his reaction. The prison cell is bare stone, lit by a single shaft of light from a high window. Dust motes dance in the light beam.

Candlelit glow, dramatic chiaroscuro. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, warm earth tones with pale gold light, soft bokeh background, centered composition suitable for storybook cover.

jobs.title: Adventures of an Indian Brave
jobs.prompt: A muscular, 19-year-old Native American brave with bronze skin, high cheekbones, and a determined expression. Face is strong and stoic; eyes are dark brown and hawk-like. Long, braided black hair adorned with eagle feathers. He wears fringed buckskin leggings and a simple loincloth, showcasing tribal tattoos on his arms. Key scene: Standing on the bank of a rushing river, triumphantly holding aloft a massive, glistening silver salmon he has just caught. Behind him, two ancient, wrinkled women smile, weaving a fishing net from the brave's impossibly long hair. Setting: A sunlit valley in the land above the sky, cascading waterfall visible behind the women. Lighting: Golden sunlight streaming down from an unseen source, illuminating the brave and the fish. Studio Ghibli inspired hand-painted watercolor art, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Andras Baive
jobs.prompt:
A hardy, muscular Andras Baive, age 20s, with windswept dark hair, stands on a riverbank. His face, tanned and weathered, shows determination mixed with sorrow; bright blue eyes are focused. He wears traditional Sami clothing: a dark blue tunic belted with reindeer leather, sturdy boots. In the shallows of the broad river lies the defeated Stalo (bailiff). Andras has just fired the arrow, and it is still floating in the direction of the Stalo's body.

Setting: A wide Lapland river at twilight. The sky is a swirl of dusky blues and oranges reflecting in the water, long shadows stretch across the rocky terrain. A small hill rises in the background.

Lighting: The scene is lit by the setting sun, casting a warm glow on Andras and a cool, somber light on the fallen Stalo. Hand-painted watercolor, Studio Ghibli style, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: How Ian Direach Got the Blue Falcon
jobs.prompt:
A youthful Ian Direach, about 17, athletic build, slings his bow, quiver at his hip. Oval face, determined blue eyes, windswept auburn hair, fair skin, youthful freckles. He wears a homespun woolen tunic in earthy browns and greens, leather leggings, worn leather boots. Clutching a single vibrant blue falcon feather, he stands defiant.

Setting: Windswept grassy hillside in the Scottish Highlands, overlooking a gray, choppy sea. A storm gathers. Dark, ominous clouds swirl above as he is casting a counter-spell. His stepmother is distantly visible on the horizon.

Lighting: Harsh, diffuse light from the stormy sky, accentuating the drama. A touch of rim light outlining Ian.

Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: How Isuro the Rabbit Tricked Gudu
jobs.prompt: A slender, youthful Isuro rabbit, perhaps 10 years old in human terms, stands on his hind legs, a mischievous glint in his eyes. His face is round, with large, expressive brown eyes and a twitching nose, soft tan fur. Wearing a small, woven bag slung across his shoulder, filled with bright green leaves, and a tiny, patched waistcoat of earthy brown fabric. He's cleverly concealing a piece of cooked meat behind his back, a wide, triumphant grin on his face. The key scene: Isuro outwitting Gudu in the dark hut after Gudu extinguished the fire. The setting: inside a dimly lit, circular mud hut in an African village, firelight flickering, casting long shadows. Warm candle-like lighting emanates from the rekindled fire, highlighting Isuro's clever expression. In Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: How the Stalos were Tricked
jobs.prompt:
A young woman, Lyma, around 18, with a determined expression, stands by a snow-covered well beneath a full moon. Her face is round, with wide, anxious blue eyes and a smattering of freckles. Long, braided blonde hair hangs down her back. She wears a thick woolen dress in muted blues and greys, layered over a cream-colored tunic. She is lowering two wooden buckets into the well, but glancing nervously up into a large, snow-laden pine tree.

The scene captures the moment her brothers whisper instructions from the tree above. Leafless branches silhouette against the moonlit sky; the air is crisp and cold, suggested by frosty breath. Soft, diffused moonlight illuminates the clearing, casting long shadows and highlighting the delicate snow cover.

Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor with a soft bokeh background, suitable book cover composition.

jobs.title: Ian, the Soldier's Son
jobs.prompt:
Seventeen-year-old Ian, the soldier's son, lean but wiry, square-jawed, determined. Face weathered, intense blue eyes, sweaty brow, dark hair matted to his forehead. Wears a homespun tunic, stained brown, torn sleeves, simple leather belt.

Key scene: Ian, mid-wrestle with the monstrous giant, muscles straining, locked in a desperate grapple. Ian's expression is one of fierce resolve and exertion.

Setting: The flagstone floor of a cavernous, dimly lit hall within the giant's fortress. Shadows flicker from unseen torches. Weathered stone walls, massive wooden beams overhead.

Lighting: Muted, warm light from the side, casting long, dramatic shadows. Hints of a cold, blue light filtering through a distant doorway.

Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, dramatic storybook cover composition. Warm earth tones with accents of blue in Ian's eyes and the giant's shadowy form.

jobs.title: Pinkel the Thief
jobs.prompt:
A youthful, clever Pinkel, appearing 12 years old, slight build, mischievous yet innocent. Boyish face, bright blue eyes sparkling with cunning, tousled brown hair, fair skin with a smudge of dirt on his cheek. Wearing simple brown tunic and trousers of roughspun fabric, a small pouch at his belt, clutching a stolen golden lantern.

Key scene: Pinkel fleeing the witch's island by boat, clutching the lantern. He glances back with a mix of triumph and fear.

Setting: A dark, misty lake at night. The witch's island recedes in the background, defined by the silhouette of a crude hut barely visible in the distance behind him. Ominous shadows engulf the far shore.

Lighting: The golden lantern casts a brilliant, warm glow on Pinkel and the immediate surroundings. The rest of the scene is dominated by cool, moonlit blues and indigos. 

Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Story of the King Who Would See Paradise
jobs.prompt: A king, appearing 30s but regal, with a neatly trimmed dark beard and wearing ornate golden armor over a flowing crimson robe, kneels to touch a fresh grave in a desolate mountain pass. His face is a mask of fearful curiosity, eyes wide with a mix of hope and foreboding. The grave is simple, marked only by rough-hewn stones. Dawn breaks, casting long, dramatic shadows across the scene. Wisps of ethereal mist curl around the base of the grave, hinting at the supernatural. The king's signet ring, a symbol of his authority, glints in the pale light. The background features jagged, snow-capped peaks silhouetted against the brightening sky. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition, warm earth tones with crimson and gold accents.

jobs.title: The Adventures of a Jackal
jobs.prompt: A clever, slender jackal, about 10 years old, stands mischievously in a melon patch. Long snout, bright amber eyes sparkling with cunning, a sly grin. Soft, tawny fur. Dressed in a tiny blue waistcoat with stolen gold buttons, a knife glinting in his paw. He's snipping the tails of plump, striped melons, his own tail freshly missing. The key moment of his deception as he sabotages the melon patch. Lush green melon vines fill the frame, ripe fruit scattered about, sunlight dappling through the leaves. Golden hour lighting, casting long shadows and painting the scene in warm hues. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Adventures of Covan the Brown-haired
jobs.prompt: A slender, brown-haired child, Covan, around 12 years old, with wide, curious eyes. Her face is round with a dusting of freckles. Wet, tangled tresses frame her face. She's in the throes of transforming into a fish: her arms and legs are stiffening, her skin is becoming slick, and horror fills her expression as she glances sideways. She wears a simple homespun dress of faded blue linen. This dramatic moment occurs as she stands beside a dinner table, a half-eaten plate of fish before her. The dining room is humble, with whitewashed walls and a glimpse of a wide flowing river through an open window behind her. Golden hour light filters in, casting long shadows, with a soft, warm glow on the table. Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Adventures of the Jackal's Eldest Son
jobs.prompt:
A handsome, cunning young jackal, perhaps 16 years old, lean physique, with intelligent eyes and a sly grin. His face is triangular with a pointed snout. Bright amber eyes, sleek golden-brown fur, and a well-groomed tail. He wears a beautiful green cloak made of shimmering fabric, draped elegantly over his shoulders. The cloak appears slightly too large, hinting it was acquired recently.

The key moment: the jackal is darting away from a lion and a dead hyena, glancing back with a mixture of fear and triumphant laughter. He clutches the green cloak tightly around him as he flees.

The setting is a sun-drenched, rocky plain dotted with sparse vegetation. In the background, a valley with grazing sheep hints at the previous scene.

Golden hour lighting with warm highlights on the jackal's fur and long shadows stretching across the plain. The overall mood is suspenseful and mischievous.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition showcasing the youthful jackal's daring escape.

jobs.title: The Adventures of the Younger Son of the Jackal
jobs.prompt:
A cunning young jackal, lithe build, stands nervously before a large, woolly sheep. The greyhound is inside a sack on the ground and his eyes are peering out towards the jackal. The jackal has brown fur, pointed ears, and a slightly anxious expression. The sheep is plump, with thick white wool and gentle, wide eyes. She wears a simple, blue cloth tied around her neck.

The key moment: The sheep has tricked the jackal into thinking the date-filled sack on the ground contains a treat for him when actually the greyhound is hiding inside.

A golden field recently harvested with stacks of grain visible in the background, a bright afternoon. Warm sunlight bathes the scene, with long shadows stretching from the grain stacks.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Clever Cat
jobs.prompt: A handsome young man, no older than 20, clad in festal robes of a desert prince, sits atop a magnificent camel, his face radiating joy and confidence. He has a strong jawline, bright, intelligent brown eyes, dark curly hair, and tanned skin. The robes are made of rich, flowing fabrics, predominantly gold and deep red, adorned with intricate embroidery. A falcon rests proudly on his gloved wrist. The key moment is his triumphant return to his mother's humble hut. His mother, an elderly woman with a deeply lined face, stands at the door, her expression a mixture of shock and joy. The setting: a vast, sun-drenched plain with a small, thatched-roof hut in the foreground. Warm, golden hour lighting casts long shadows, emphasizing the contrast between the youth's newfound wealth and his humble origins. Rendered in a Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor style, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Enchanted Wreath
jobs.prompt: A young woman named Elara, around 17, slender physique, chopping wood in a sun-dappled forest clearing. Her face is oval-shaped, with kind, hazel eyes and a hopeful expression. Her long, wavy auburn hair is partially pulled back. She has fair skin with a light dusting of freckles. She wears a simple homespun dress of forest green and brown, torn slightly at the hem. A vibrant wreath of pink rosebuds rests upon her head, tiny, iridescent songbirds flitting among the petals. Sunlight streams through the leaves as she looks up, surprised, at the Prince who approaches through the trees. He is dressed in muted royal garb of cream and gold. The background features soft bokeh of the surrounding trees. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Foolish Weaver
jobs.prompt:
A young, thin weaver with a bewildered expression, mid-twenties, dressed in homespun cotton. His face is round, with wide, hazel eyes and a slightly open mouth. His brown hair is messy and sticks out in tufts. He wears a simple, light brown tunic.

He stands aghast, having just hurled a large stone, eyes widening as he realizes the implications. The stone is mid-air, blurred to indicate motion. Lying nearby: the farmer’s elderly mother, frail and pale.

Setting: A sun-drenched farmyard in the late afternoon, with golden light streaming across the scene. A simple country home forms the backdrop, chickens pecking in the dust nearby.

Warm, diffused lighting, creating a sense of foreboding.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. The color palette leans towards warm earth tones with accents of dusty rose and muted gold.

jobs.title: The Fox and the Wolf
jobs.prompt:
A slender fox, about three years old, with intelligent emerald eyes, stands cautiously beside a looming gray wolf with bared fangs. The fox has bright orange fur, a delicate face, and a sly, nervous expression. She wears a cunning smile and a bright scarf. The wolf, much larger, has a rough coat and a menacing posture, ready to pounce. This is the moment when the fox promises to lead the hungry wolf to a "cheese" in a well.

They stand near an old stone well with moss-covered walls, under a full moon that casts long shadows. The well's wooden buckets hang suspended. The scene is lit by a silvery moonlight, with soft shadows enhancing the suspense. The style is inspired by Studio Ghibli, with a hand-painted watercolor effect, a soft bokeh background, and a storybook cover composition. Warm earth tones are accented by the cool blues of the moonlit night and the verdant green of the moss.

jobs.title: The Frog and the Lion Fairy
jobs.prompt: A sixteen-year-old queen with tear-streaked face, porcelain skin, and long golden hair escaping her jeweled crown, wearing a delicate blue silk gown torn at the hem. Held captive in the Lion Fairy's subterranean realm, she rescues a small green frog from a black crow beneath twisted yew trees. The queen holds a delicate ivory fan, using it to swat at the crow. The frog looks up at her with wide, grateful eyes. In the background: a lake of quicksilver reflects eerie lamplight, overlooked by distant mountains shedding tears of water. Key light from the lamps casts long, dramatic shadows. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition; warm earth tones with cool blues and greens.

jobs.title: The Girl-Fish
jobs.prompt:
A petite, twelve-year-old girl, now a small shimmering fish with delicate fins, bewildered and tearful. Her face retains a hint of human features: a rounded face, wide blue eyes filled with confusion, and long, tangled auburn hair floating around her in the water, partially obscuring her face. She wears the tattered remains of a coral-colored dress, its fabric dissolving into scales where it meets her fish tail.

The girl-fish, transformed mid-meal, plummets dramatically through an open window of her cottage into a rushing river, spoon still clutched in one of her newly formed fins. The warm interior glows from the window, contrasting the cool river.

Riverbank cottage with open window—late afternoon, diffused sunlight, mist rising from the river. Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. Golden hour lighting spilling from window, cool blue river reflection.

jobs.title: The Goldsmith's Fortune
jobs.prompt: A stout, middle-aged goldsmith with a mischievous glint in his dark eyes, riding triumphantly on the back of a large, muddy water buffalo. Round, jovial face, thick black hair plastered to his forehead from the river, ruddy cheeks, and a scheming smirk. He wears a fine, but waterlogged, crimson brocade robe, clinging to his form. The key scene is his return to the village – a cunning expression on his face as he gestures grandly toward the river with a gold ringed hand. The village is visible in the background, a cluster of simple mud brick homes under a late afternoon sun. The riverbank is lush and overgrown. Golden sunlight filters through the trees, creating dappled shadows. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Magic Book
jobs.prompt:
A slender, mischievous Hans, age 16, dressed in stolen fine clothes, smirks slyly, holding open an ancient, glowing magic book. His face is angular with sharp features, bright green eyes sparkling with newfound power, and messy brown hair. He's wearing a velvet doublet, emerald green with gold trim, ill-fitting but opulent.

He stands within the underground den, surrounded by dusty shelves filled with arcane texts, holding the book open, revealing swirling text. The scene is lit by warm light emanating from the book.

The entrance to the vault and bones from trespassers is behind him. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition, centered, warm earthly tones with greens, golds, and touches of crimson.

jobs.title: The Magic Mirror From the Senna
jobs.prompt:
A young Gopani-Kufa, lithe and muscular with tribal scars, gazes in wonder at the transformed Insato — a handsome African king, draped in a python skin, adorned with gold, smiling warmly. He holds Gopani-Kufa's hand, leading him into the glittering subterranean city of Pita.

Gopani-Kufa has a round face, wide, inquisitive brown eyes, short, dark, wiry hair, and warm brown skin. He wears simple ochre-colored woven loincloth. Insato has sharp features, dark, knowing eyes, regal bearing, and chocolate skin.

Before them: towering golden buildings, bustling streets. The key moment is their connection: trust in the face of the unbelievable.

Setting: the sunlit, golden city of Pita, deep beneath the earth. A river teeming with life flows nearby.

Lighting: warm, golden light emanating from the city itself, casting long, soft shadows. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Mink and the Wolf
jobs.prompt: A lithe, cunning mink, mid-leap, balancing with balletic grace between two adjacent canoes. Small, nimble, dark fur glistening. Sharp, intelligent eyes with a sly, knowing expression. Dressed in a tiny vest woven from reeds. Setting: a moonlit beach in the North American wilderness at night, with a line of wolves howling in surprised delight on the shore. The canoes are traditional, carved from cedar. The wolves, rendered in warm brown and grey tones, are held in captivated amusement, momentarily forgetting their vengeful intentions. Key light from the full moon, casting long shadows and highlighting the mink's agile form. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Owl and the Eagle
jobs.prompt: A slender, fair-haired young woman, about 20, with determined eyes and a simple but graceful dress, stands at the edge of a precipice in a snowy, mountainous region. Her sister, slightly older with dark hair, stands behind her with a young frog boy clinging to her skirts. They are poised to slide down the steep slope. The woman wears a woolen dress of muted blues and greens, and holds a thin, magical line in her hand. The key action is the woman's brave expression as she prepares to descend, embodying both fear and resolve to rescue her husband. Around them, jagged grey peaks rise against a dusky sky, hinting at a hidden, menacing cavern below. The lighting is dramatic, with a cool, ethereal moonlight casting long shadows, juxtaposed against the warm, flickering glow emanating from the mouth of a dark cave above, where a sinister witch lurks. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Princess Bella-Flor-- The Bird of Truth
jobs.prompt:
Young Bella-Flor, appearing 8 years old, and her twin brother, fair skin, stand hand-in-hand outside a weathered, vine-covered cottage. Bella-Flor has a round face, wide blue eyes filled with curiosity, and long golden-blonde hair braided with wildflowers. She wears a simple, tan linen dress with a blue sash. Her brother mirrors her features in boyish form with a matching sash, but simple brown tunic.

Overhead, swallows perch beneath the eaves, mid-conversation, rendered in exquisite watercolor detail. The children look upwards, listening intently, their faces lit by the warm glow of the setting sun. The cottage is nestled beside a gently flowing river, reflecting the golden light. Tall grasses and reeds line the riverbank.

The scene evokes a sense of wonder and discovery, set against a soft bokeh background of lush greenery. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Rover of the Plain
jobs.prompt: A slender teenage girl, the Rover's wife, kneels in a moonlit field of maize. Her face is heart-shaped, with wide, expressive brown eyes and long, braided black hair adorned with simple beads. She has warm brown skin. She wears a homespun ochre dress of rough fabric, cinched at the waist, and carries a small clay pot and a horn. She looks up with concern at the massive water buffalo, the Rover of the Plain, who stands patiently behind her, his dark eyes reflecting the moonlight. He has a scattering of beans on his muzzle. In the background, the village huts glow with warm interior light under a starry sky. Soft, diffused lighting emphasizes the vulnerability of the buffalo and the girl's empathy. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Story of Manus
jobs.prompt: A young Manus, son of Oireal, around 16, athletic build, stands alone on a Bergen shore. His face is weathered, with determined blue eyes and windswept auburn hair. He wears a worn leather tunic and an ancient helmet. The key moment: Manus grips the hilt of a newly acquired, unbreakable sword, hope dawning in his expression. The Bergen shoreline extends behind him, a rugged landscape of dark, moss-covered rocks and windswept pines. A red-clad armourer figure fades into the background. The setting is twilight, with the last rays of a cold sun casting long shadows. Key light comes from the setting sun, creating a dramatic silhouette. The secondary light is reflected from the water. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. Warm earth tones with striking red accent.

jobs.title: The Story of the Hero Makoma
jobs.prompt: A plump, green-skinned fairy frog, no older than a child, with oversized golden eyes, bouncing playfully on the head of baby Princess Muffette. Muffette, six months old, lies giggling on a bed of fragrant wild thyme, her chubby hands reaching for the frog above. She has a round face, bright blue eyes, and wisps of golden hair. The frog wears a whimsical cap. The Queen, young and fair, with a concerned expression and auburn hair, kneels nearby in a simple homespun dress of blue linen, watching them in their small cypress cabin. Soft sunlight filtering through the cypress trees creates dappled shadows across the scene. Background Storybook cover art, soft-focused wildflowers, Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, warm earth tones.

jobs.title: The Three Treasures of the Giants
jobs.prompt:
A kindhearted, slightly naive, young Jack, 16, stands in a vast hall filled with golden coins. His face is round, with wide, innocent blue eyes and a smattering of freckles; messy light brown hair sticks out at odd angles. He wears a simple, patched tunic of brown linen, his sleeves tied together to create a makeshift bag. With a determined but slightly nervous expression, he scoops up gold coins. Two towering giants burst into the hall, casting long shadows; eyes wide with fear but clutching his makeshift sack, Jack is caught red-handed. The giants are burly with knotted hair.

Inside the Giants' castle, a cavernous hall overflowing with gold. Warm, diffused light from unseen windows creates a sense of wonder and peril.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. Gold and earth tones.

jobs.title: The Two Caskets
jobs.prompt: A kind, beautiful 17-year-old girl with long, wavy golden hair and gentle blue eyes, wearing a simple, patched blue dress. She stands in a vibrant, sunlit meadow filled with colorful wildflowers. In her hands, she carefully carries a wooden sieve overflowing with gray ashes, water droplets clinging to the edges. Behind her, a deep, dark well made of mossy stone is partially visible; sparrows flutter around her head. Golden sunlight filters through the trees at the forest's edge behind the well. The atmosphere is dreamlike and hopeful, with a hint of magic. Soft, diffused lighting evokes a sense of wonder and tranquility; bokeh background. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Ugly Duckling
jobs.prompt: A solitary, adolescent-looking duckling — gangly, awkward physique, distinctively large beak and feet. Face downcast, large eyes filled with sadness, scraggly brown down replacing feathers, pale skin tone. Wearing a few tattered feathers clinging to its back. The duckling is being viciously pecked at by a gaggle of disdainful, plump ducks in a farmyard. The main duck bullies have extravagant plumage in shades of emerald and gold. The scene occurs midday in a muddy farmyard, wooden fence in the background. The sunlight is harsh, casting long shadows, but a warm golden light highlights the duckling's downy feathers. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor illustration, soft bokeh background, centered composition suitable for a book cover.

jobs.title: The White Doe
jobs.prompt:
A tender, youthful Princess Desiree, appearing 14, with a slender build, stands in a high-ceilinged, windowless chamber. Her face is oval with wide, curious blue eyes, and flowing strawberry-blonde hair, adorned with jeweled flowers. She wears a dark rose velvet gown with long, flowing sleeves, the fabric richly embroidered with silver thread. In her hands, she holds a single white rose.

The key scene: Fairy Tulip frantically gestures towards Desiree, attempting to shield her from a beam of golden sunlight breaching through a crack in the subterranean palace’s doorway. The light illuminates Desiree’s fearful expression.

Setting: An opulent yet enclosed palace chamber, walls lined with hundreds of glowing tapers.

Lighting: Warm, diffused light from the tapers, contrasted by the sharp, dangerous beam of sunlight.

Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The White Slipper
jobs.prompt: Princess Diamantina, age 15, slender, graceful, with long flowing golden hair framing an oval face, bright blue eyes reflecting concern, fair skin. She wears a flowing gown of light blue silk, adorned with pearls around the neckline, holding the edges of her skirt. Iconic jeweled hairpins. King Balancin, middle-aged, regal, clutching his bare foot in agony, face contorted in pain, bewildered expression, short dark hair streaked with gray. He wears a rich purple robe trimmed with gold over a white tunic. Key scene: the moment the white slipper falls off into the river, visible as a small white object drifting away. Setting: riverbank with a decorated barge, late afternoon, sunny, festive atmosphere. Lighting: late afternoon sunlight casting long shadows, warm golden light bathing the scene. Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Catherine and her Destiny
jobs.prompt:
A beautiful young Catherine, age 17, slender and graceful, stands before two ethereal women; one veiled under seven shimmering coverlids, the other radiant and holding a small spinning wheel. Catherine's face is delicate with wide, hopeful hazel eyes, long auburn hair cascading down her shoulders, pale skin. She wears a simple but elegant linen gown in earth tones with subtle Sicilian folk embroidery, clutching a seemingly ordinary ball of silk.

The key moment: Catherine receives the silk ball from her Destiny beneath the veils, as the radiant Destiny watches, a faint smile on her lips.

The setting: A stark, rocky mountainside overlooking a sun-drenched Sicilian town, late afternoon.

Lighting: Golden sunlight streams from the right, illuminating Catherine's face, while the veiled Destiny remains in soft shadow, creating an otherworldly atmosphere.

Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Don Giovanni de la Fortuna
jobs.prompt: A youthful Don Giovanni, mid-twenties, emerges from a cleansing bath, handsome features now visible. Oval face, bright blue eyes sparkling with relief, freshly trimmed dark hair, fair skin regaining its tone. Fine linen shirt, sapphire blue velvet doublet, gold embroidery glinting. The moment he realizes his transformation is complete, casting off the last remnants of his ragged pilgrim clothes. Ornate marble bathhouse, warm water swirling, discarded rags in a pile. Golden light streaming through arched windows, illuminating the clean, fresh space, hints of steam rising. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft focus on the background, classic storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Esben and the Witch
jobs.prompt:
Esben, a youthful boy of twelve, small but clever, with rosy cheeks and a mischievous glint in his light blue eyes. Soft, unruly blonde hair, fair skin. He wears patched brown breeches, a simple linen shirt, and carries a roughly-hewn white wooden stick.

Esben, mid-stride, clutches a bag containing a glittering dove with alternating gold and silver feathers, glancing back mischievously over his shoulder at the pursuing Witch. Her face is crone-like.

Dark, gnarled forest path near the witch's cottage, twilight, gnarled trees, twisted roots, eerie glowing mushrooms at the base of the trees adding to the witch’s intimidating presence.

Golden hour light filters unevenly through the dense canopy, casting long shadows. Hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Hans, the Mermaid's Son
jobs.prompt: A burly youth, Hans, appearing 18 but actually 6, towering physique, flaxen hair, fair skin. Square face, determined blue eyes, hint of mischief. He wears a simple tunic of coarse, gray homespun fabric, cinched with a thick leather belt. Holds a massive iron staff thicker than his body, forged by his smith father. Key moment: Hans effortlessly lifts the entire thatched roof off the barn, golden straw swirling around him. Setting: a prosperous farm at midday, bright sun. Background: fields of mixed grain, village in the distance. Lighting: strong sunlight from above, casting long shadows, warm fill light. Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. Accent colors: shades of harvest gold and steely iron.

jobs.title: How the Dragon was Tricked
jobs.prompt: A young man, early 20s, disguised as a bearded beggar, stands triumphantly over a large wooden box. Wiry build, intelligent eyes peering from beneath a dirty brow. Face is shadowed, weathered. Coarse, earth-toned beggar's robes, patched and torn. The most iconic moment: he's just sealed the dragon inside the box using large iron nails. He raises a hammer high in the air, grin on his face. In the background, the dragon's house, small and humble. Time of day is midday; the sky is clear. Bright, diffused sunlight. Warm, golden light highlights the beggar's cunning expression. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition, with focus on the wooden box and the beggar's action. Earthy browns and greens with pops of metallic silver from the nails.

jobs.title: How the Hermit helped to win the King's Daughter
jobs.prompt:
A kind-faced young man, no older than 20, with a humble demeanor and neatly combed light-brown hair, stands proudly on the deck of an extraordinary ship. He has warm brown eyes and fair skin. He wears a simple yet elegant tunic of sky-blue linen, belted at the waist, and brown leather boots. The ship itself is half-sailing vessel, half-carriage, adorned with carved wooden details.

The key scene shows the young man presenting himself before the king. The king sits on his throne in the palace's grand hall, dubious and skeptical of the young man's claims, illuminated by stained-glass windows.

The warm glow of the afternoon sun streams into the hall.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: I know what I have learned
jobs.prompt: A kind-faced, elderly farmer with a worried expression, mid-70s, slight build, wearing simple homespun clothes. Face is wrinkled, with warm blue eyes, thin grey hair, and tanned skin. He wears a patched woolen tunic in muted browns and greens, and carries a wooden staff. The iconic moment: submerged neck-deep in a twilight lake, eyes wide with panic, clutching a wooden dough ladle, as a school of silvery fish swim past him. Setting: a tranquil, dark Scandinavian lake at late dusk, reflecting faint, orange sunset hues. The old man and his wife's wooden dough trough bobs nearby. Lighting: diffused, cool moonlight on the water surface, with subtle, reflected warmth from the unseen sunset. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: King Lindorm
jobs.prompt:
A courageous young maiden, around 18, with a slender build and determined expression. Her face is oval-shaped, with bright blue eyes and long, flowing golden hair, fair skin. She wears seven layered, pristine white linen shirts, sleeves slightly too long, bare feet peeking out from beneath.

The iconic moment: Inside her bridal chamber, the maiden stands defiant, holding a scrubbing brush, as a massive, molting lindorm writhes in pain, shedding its scaly skin on the floor. His shed skin lies discarded, still hinting at the horror it once contained.

Royal bedchamber with stone walls, a large stone hearth where a pot of lye bubbles over a roaring fire. Faint light of dawn streams through a small, barred window that casts long shadows across the room.

Key light comes from the hearth, casting a warm glow on the maiden, with cooler fill light from the window creating dramatic shadows. Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Maiden Bright-eye
jobs.prompt:
A radiant Maiden Bright-eye, age 12, slender and graceful, stands waist-deep in churning ocean water. Her face is heart-shaped with wide, hopeful blue eyes and delicate features. Her long golden hair streams around her, interwoven with seaweed. She wears a simple homespun dress of faded blue, now soaked, and a small, unassuming red cap sits atop her head, glowing faintly.

She gazes upwards, a mix of fear and determination on her face, as the ship carrying her brother and wicked stepsister sails away in the distance. A swarm of sea birds circles above. The scene is set at twilight, with a bruised purple and orange sky reflected on the turbulent water. Light emanates from the magical cap, casting a soft, protective glow.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Master and Pupil
jobs.prompt:
A teenage boy, lean and agile with a mischievous glint in his eyes, mid-transformation from a magnificent golden horse to a white dove. His face is half human, half equine, a swirling vortex of magic around him. Hazel eyes sparkle intelligently. Sandy blond hair is windblown. His clothing — a simple tunic — is disintegrating, feathers sprouting from where horsehair once flowed. This is the moment of desperate escape.

The bustling marketplace is rendered in soft focus, a chaotic swirl of shoppers, stalls overflowing with produce. Cobblestones underfoot. Overcast sky, implying impending doom.

Warm, diffused light highlights the boy's magical transformation. Accent color: gold from the horse. A Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor with soft bokeh background, perfect for a classic storybook cover.

jobs.title: Peter Bull
jobs.prompt:
A stout, elderly peasant, about 60, with a weathered face and a hopeful expression, stands in an opulent bedroom. His eyes are fixed on a younger man, "Peter Bull," around 25, broad forehead, thick neck, reddish hair, dressed in fine merchant's clothes: velvet coat, silk shirt, gold buttons. The peasant gestures grandly, a money bag slung over his shoulder. Peter Bull looks bewildered, caught between amusement and disbelief.

Setting: lavishly decorated bedroom, sunlit morning streaming through draped windows, indicating newfound wealth and status.

Lighting: soft, golden light illuminating the peasant's earnest face and the merchant's surprised expression, with gentle fill from the window.

Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, classic storybook cover composition, warm earth tones with accents of deep red and gold.

jobs.title: Princess Minon-Minette
jobs.prompt:
Aveline, disguised as an old woman with kind eyes and weathered skin, struggles under a massive bundle of firewood. King Souci, early 20s, with a bewildered expression and slightly unkempt brown hair, rushes to assist her, his fine linen shirt rumpled from sleeping outdoors. He has a handsome face but an air of awkwardness.

The scene is a sun-dappled forest path, shafts of warm sunlight filtering through the dense green canopy. Fallen leaves litter the ground. In the background, the faint outline of the fairy Aveline in her true form can be seen, watching them approvingly. 

Lighting is warm and golden, creating a soft, magical atmosphere.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition, warm earth tones with accents of forest green and gold, medium shot.

jobs.title: Snowflake
jobs.prompt: A slender, pale-skinned girl named Snowflake, appearing around 12 years old with long golden hair and forget-me-not blue eyes, stands hesitantly at the edge of a bonfire. She wears a simple white linen dress, adorned with a crown of interwoven wildflowers. Her expression is a mixture of fear and resignation. The other village girls, in brightly colored dresses and flower crowns, leap joyfully over the flames. It is the eve of St. John, Midsummer's Day. The fire casts a warm orange glow on their faces and illuminates the surrounding dark woods. Soft, hazy light emanating upwards from Snowflake's body hints at her impending transformation. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor style, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Bird 'Grip'
jobs.prompt: A young prince, around 18, with a determined look but weary from travel, stands in an opulent bedchamber, lit by a single flickering candle. He has a lean physique, with tousled auburn hair and kind blue eyes. He wears a forest green velvet tunic trimmed with gold thread over brown leather trousers. In his arms, he gently carries a sleeping princess with long, golden hair and a serene expression. She is draped in a white silk gown. The prince averts his gaze, resisting the urge to kiss her. Gold dust sparkles around them. The room is filled with rich tapestries and gilded furniture. Soft, Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor style, with a soft bokeh background creating a dreamy, romantic atmosphere. Warm earth tones and gold accents dominate the color palette. Storybook cover composition, medium shot.

jobs.title: The Cat's Elopement
jobs.prompt: A stately, muscular tabby cat named Gon, about one year old, mid-battle with a large, fierce dog in a park. Gon has emerald green eyes, a determined expression, and sleek, shining orange and black fur. Koma, a dainty calico cat with wide, frightened blue eyes, perches on a high cherry tree branch, her fur a mix of white, orange, and black. Gon wears a small, decorative red collar with a golden bell. Gon stands his ground, fur bristling, ready to defend himself and Koma. The dog, a menacing brown mastiff, lunges with bared teeth. They are in a lush green park with a canopy of cherry trees with pink blossoms. Late afternoon sunlight filters through the trees, creating deep shadows and dappled light. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Cunning Shoemaker
jobs.prompt: A spry, middle-aged Sicilian shoemaker named Joseph, lean but strong, with a mischievous twinkle in his dark eyes. Wiry black hair, tanned skin, a neatly trimmed mustache. Wearing a patched leather apron over a simple linen shirt and trousers, a money pouch hangs at his hip. He tightly grips the reins of a scruffy but sturdy donkey laden with ill-gotten gold. In the background, a band of burly robbers with angry faces advance menacingly, brandishing swords. Joseph, with a cunning smile, mischievously meets their gaze as he navigates the donkey through rugged terrain. Evening sun filters through the trees, casting long shadows, while scattered leaves whirl in a gentle breeze. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Fir-Tree
jobs.prompt: A slender young fir-tree, seven years of age, stands forlornly. Face is oval, eyes wide with longing, hair needle-like and green. Bark is smooth and new, skin a vibrant, hopeful green. It wears no clothes. The key moment: The fir-tree stands upright in a grand parlor, ablaze with dozens of lit candles clipped to its branches. Children reach for the presents hung precariously from its boughs. The setting is a lavish room with silk-covered sofas, Chinese vases, and a roaring Dutch stove, deep winter evening. Warm candlelight bathes the scene, casting long shadows and illuminating the children's joyous faces. A golden tinsel star sits atop the tree. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Flying Trunk
jobs.prompt: A youthful merchant's son, appearing about 20, slender build, with a mischievous glint in his eyes. His face is oval, fair skin, with kind brown eyes, and tousled chestnut hair. He wears a newly-bought, ornate silk dressing gown in deep blues and golds, clutching a princess's gold-handled sabre. The key scene depicts him mid-flight, seated inside an old, ornate wooden trunk bursting with colorful fireworks. The trunk is shooting upwards, propelled by the ignited explosives. Action reveals the moment of surprise and delight as the fireworks erupt. The setting is above a bustling Turkish town with minarets and domed roofs at twilight. The sky is filled with vibrant bursts of light. Key light comes from the fireworks creating dynamic highlights. Soft moonlight provides a gentle fill. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Goblin and the Grocer
jobs.prompt: A small, red-capped goblin, no older than ten, clutches a thick book to his chest with both hands. His face, round and earnest, is lit by the warm flickering glow of a distant fire reflecting in wide, tear-filled eyes. Wiry red hair peeks out from under the edges of his cap. He wears a simple brown tunic, slightly too large. He's perched atop a red brick chimney of an old building, gazing out at the fire in the neighboring building across the street. A chaotic scene unfolds in the background with smoke and embers filling the air. The overall atmosphere is tense yet hopeful. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor with a soft, storybook cover composition and warm earth tones highlighted by the orange and yellow of the firelight.

jobs.title: The Golden Lion
jobs.prompt: Young merchant, about 20, handsome with clear eyes and a determined stance. Heart-shaped face, wavy dark brown hair, fair skin. Wears a finely woven tunic of deep blue, belted with gold thread over brown trousers; carries a small golden lion figure. He stands in a grand hall, eyes locked on the princess who subtly ties a white sash around her waist. Eleven other maidens stand beside her, identically dressed. Setting: a hidden hall with seven locked doors, ornate golden trim, soft light filtering through unseen windows. Warm, diffused lighting, a Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor style with a soft bokeh background perfect for a storybook cover.

jobs.title: The House in the Wood
jobs.prompt:
A kind, adolescent girl, around 13, with braided hair stands in a grand room. Her face is oval-shaped, with warm brown eyes showing surprise and delight, fair skin, and rosy cheeks. Her long, golden-brown hair is intricately braided, with a few strands escaping around her face. The girl wears a simple, yet elegant, light blue dress made of soft linen, cinched at the waist with a brown leather belt.

The scene depicts the moment she awakens in the transformed castle. She's surrounded by luxurious details: golden flowers on green walls, an ivory bed with a velvet counterpane, pearl-studded slippers on a stool. Light streams through a large window, illuminating dust motes dancing in the air.

Warm, golden light from the rising morning sun floods the room, casting soft shadows and highlighting the textures of the opulent furnishings.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Jackal, the Dove, and the Panther
jobs.prompt: A cunning jackal, mid-leap, lithe and wiry, with a sly grin, perhaps 3 years old in human years. Sharp face, amber eyes gleaming with mischief, sandy-brown fur, wearing a tiny straw hat. Perched precariously on a rocky ledge, he's poking a long stick into a dark crevice, sending a swarm of angry bees directly toward a furious panther below.
