The panther, massive and sleek, with emerald eyes wide in shock, is covered in stinging bees, mid-leap to escape the swarm. Cleft in a sandstone cliff face overgrown with scrub brush. Late afternoon sunlight, hazy and warm. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover. Warm earth tones, honey yellows, and emerald green accents.

jobs.title: The King who would have a Beautiful Wife
jobs.prompt: Young Queen, no older than 18, radiant and graceful, with a kind but knowing smile. Her features are delicate and refined, framed by long, flowing auburn hair. She wears a magnificent royal gown of deep sapphire velvet with golden embroidery, cinched at the waist. The original old woman in disguise hangs suspended outside of the castle in her dark cloak. The queen, now transformed, is being rescued via ladder, as the King kneels below her begging for forgiveness. The setting is the castle courtyard at dawn. Soft, diffused light illuminates the scene, casting a warm glow on the queen and highlighting the gold accents of her dress. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background. Storybook cover.

jobs.title: The Little Hare
jobs.prompt:
A middle-aged African man, weary but triumphant, strong physique, returning to his village after a long journey. Round face, determined dark eyes, close-cropped black hair, warm brown skin. Wears simple, earthy-toned woven tunic and trousers, carrying a small leather bag over his shoulder. In his hand, he presents a raw liver to his wife, standing in the doorway of their mud hut, a mix of relief and exhaustion on his face.

The village is a scattering of small huts under a vast, cloudless sky. Setting sun, casting long shadows and warm golden light. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition, warm earth tones with a splash of reddish-purple from the setting sun and the raw liver.

jobs.title: The Man without a Heart
jobs.prompt: A handsome youth, no older than seventeen, with a slightly worried but determined expression. His face is oval with a light complexion, framed by wavy, light brown hair and soulful brown eyes. He wears a simple tunic of homespun brown fabric over a cream-colored shirt, with a sturdy leather belt and worn leather boots, carrying a knapsack. He is offering food from his open knapsack to a massive red ox. The scene is a sun-dappled forest clearing, shafts of sunlight illuminating the warm browns and greens of the leaves and undergrowth. Golden hour lighting casts long shadows and creates a mood of hopeful adventure. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Merry Wives
jobs.prompt:
Round-faced, rosy-cheeked carpenter lies peacefully in a wooden coffin, mid-40s, stout build. Face soft and serene, eyes closed, short brown hair, fair skin. Dressed in simple linen shirt, hands resting on chest clutching a pint bottle of brandy. Coffin interior lined with soft fabrics. The coffin lid has sprung open from the impact of being dropped.

Setting: Churchyard, funeral party fleeing in terror under a stormy sky. Dark clouds swirl, casting long shadows. Wind whips through the tall grass and bare trees. Key light from gap in the clouds illuminates the open coffin. Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. Lighting: Dramatic, with cool blues and purples in the sky contrasting warm light on coffin and nearby characters.
From behind the coffin, a disheveled, coal-blackened smith in his forties frantically reaches for the coffin, face panicked, eyes wide with alarm. People scream and scatter.

jobs.title: The Princess in the Chest
jobs.prompt: A brave, ruddy-cheeked young blacksmith, around 18, stands resolutely in a grand, gothic church. His face is determined but with a hint of nervous anticipation, blue eyes wide, short-cropped brown hair slightly tousled. He wears a leather apron over a simple tunic, sleeves rolled up to reveal strong forearms, holding a blacksmith's hammer loosely at his side. Before him rests a plain, unadorned wooden chest bathed in eerie moonlight filtering through a stained-glass window. The chest emanates a faint, otherworldly glow. The church is vast and shadowy, with tall, imposing pillars and ornate carvings. A chilling wind whispers through the arches. Key light from the moon, fill light from unseen candles, creating a suspenseful, unsettling mood. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Shirt-Collar
jobs.prompt: A vain, threadbare shirt-collar, appearing middle-aged and slightly frayed, boasts dramatically with wide-set eyes and a pompous expression. Crisp white fabric, though worn at the edges; a slightly askew button hints at his disheveled state. The iconic moment: mid-sentence, gesturing grandly with a loose thread as if it were a royal scepter. He stands amidst a chaotic rag-bag at the paper-mill, surrounded by colorful scraps of fabric, buttons, and other discarded textiles. Overcast daylight filters through a grimy window, casting long shadows and illuminating the textures of the rags. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition with warm earth tones and pale blue accents for the fabric scraps.

jobs.title: The Slaying of the Tanuki
jobs.prompt: A wizened Japanese peasant man, about 60, with a sorrowful face and wrinkled skin, wearing a straw hat and patched brown kimono, stands beside a shallow garden grave marked with rough stones. A distraught hare, nimble and bright-eyed, clad in a miniature blue robe, comforts him with a paw on his shoulder. The man gestures with his hand over the grave, a single tear rolling down his cheek. In the background, smoke rises from a distant forest, hinting at recent conflict. Evening, golden hour light streams through the trees, casting long shadows and highlighting the earthy tones of the scene. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Snow Man
jobs.prompt: A ruddy-faced peasant, about 60, with a weathered face and squinting blue eyes, gazes adoringly at a younger man, "Peter Bull," around 25 years old, broad-shouldered with thick-cut red hair now styled neatly. Peter wears a fine wool merchant's coat of deep brown with gold buttons, a crisp white linen shirt underneath. The peasant wears simple homespun clothes. The scene depicts the moment the peasant recognizes his transformed bull-calf son, reaching out to touch his arm with gnarled, calloused hands. Background: A well-appointed merchant's bedroom, bathed in the warm light of early morning. Gold coins spill across a heavy oak table. Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition, warm earth tones with gold and red accents.

jobs.title: The Snow-queen
jobs.prompt:
A pale, slender Kay, age 7, trapped inside the Snow Queen's speeding sledge. Face is gaunt, eyes wide with a dawning fear, and a faint blush of cold on his cheeks. His blonde hair is windswept beneath a woolen cap. Wearing blue winter coat with wooden toggle fastenings, and sturdy brown mittens.

The Snow Queen, tall and ethereally beautiful, with a heart-shaped face, piercing ice-blue eyes devoid of warmth, and long white-blonde hair flowing behind her. She wears a shimmering gown made of frost and snow crystals, and a majestic ice crown.

The Queen's kiss freezes Kay's forehead, his expression shifting from fear to vacant acceptance.

The sledge, crafted from solid ice, is pulled by massive white polar bears across a desolate, snow-covered plain at twilight. Swirling blizzard obscures distant mountains.

Key light from the Snow Queen's icy aura. Muted blue and white palette, with Kay's blue coat providing a contrasting color pop.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Sparrow with the Slit Tongue
jobs.prompt: A wizened old woman with a sharp, bony face and squinting eyes, clad in a faded blue kimono with a patched obi. Her gray hair is pulled back in a tight bun, revealing prominent cheekbones. She clutches a large, ornately carved wooden chest, struggling under its immense weight. The chest is overflowing with grotesque shapes: writhing snakes, spiders, and monstrous insects spilling out. She stands at dusk at the edge of a bamboo forest near a small path, looking exhausted and slightly terrified. Wisps of purple smoke curl around her feet. Dim, ominous moonlight filters through the bamboo. Hand-painted watercolor style, soft bokeh background, warm earth tones with venomous green accents. Studio Ghibli-inspired storybook cover composition, medium shot, centered.

jobs.title: The Sprig of Rosemary
jobs.prompt:
A young peasant woman, around 17, with a slender physique and determined expression, stands beside a rosemary bush. Her face is oval-shaped, with wide, earnest brown eyes; long, wavy brunette hair cascades down her shoulders, framing her fair skin. She wears a simple homespun dress of brown linen, accessorized with a sprig of rosemary tucked into her bodice. In her hand, she clutches a larger sprig of rosemary, freshly uprooted.

This is the pivotal moment when she first encounters the enchanted prince. 

Setting: A sun-dappled clearing deep within a lush forest, ancient trees reaching towards the sky. It's late morning, mist still clinging to the undergrowth, creating an ethereal atmosphere. 

Lighting: Soft, diffused sunlight filters through the leaves, casting dappled shadows and creating a golden-hour glow. Fill light is warm, emphasizing the magical ambiance of the encounter.

Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. Accent colors: forest green and lavender.

jobs.title: The Story of Ciccu
jobs.prompt:
A youthful, handsome Ciccu, appearing about 16, with a lean build and determined gaze. His face is oval, with light-olive skin, dark brown eyes, and tousled black hair. He wears simple peasant garb: a linen tunic in earth tones, patched brown breeches, and a worn leather belt. Over his shoulder is slung an old, patched coverlet.

The key scene: Ciccu stands on a dusty road outside the town, holding open a seemingly empty purse. His expression is one of dawning horror as he realizes the King's daughter has tricked him and the purse is no longer magical. 

Setting: A sun-baked, earthy road leading to a walled medieval town with terracotta roofs, midday sun, clear azure sky.

Lighting: Strong directional sunlight from above and behind him, highlighting the dust motes in the air, casting deep shadows on Ciccu's face, creating a somber, reflective mood.

Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Three Brothers
jobs.prompt: A youthful, athletic swordsman, about 20, confident stance, demonstrating his skill. Round face, dark brown eyes focused intently upwards, windswept dark brown hair, fair skin. Dressed in a simple brown tunic, leather breeches, and sturdy boots, wielding a gleaming steel sword. Key scene: the climax— swinging his sword with incredible speed to fend off a torrential downpour. The setting: a lush green field outside their childhood home, storm clouds gathering overhead, midday. Lighting: dramatic, diffused light piercing through the storm clouds, accentuating the rain and the sword's movement, creating a sense of awe. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. The rain droplets glisten, sword motion frozen, an intense expression on the young man's face as he protects himself from the storm.

jobs.title: The Troll's Daughter
jobs.prompt:
A handsome, young farmhand, about 18, stands inside an ethereal glass palace under the sea. His face is youthful, with kind, intelligent blue eyes and a hesitant smile. He has sun-kissed skin, and tousled blond hair. He wears simple homespun tunic of undyed wool, open at the neck, and rolled-up sleeves - a practical but endearing figure amidst the opulence.

He's gently reaching out to the beautiful troll daughter, who is about the same age. She looks forlorn despite her surroundings. Ivory gown, pearl accents.

The moment captures their first conversation, her surprised relief, his earnest hope. The palace shimmers with light filtering through the water, highlighting ornate ivory furniture inlaid with gold and pearl. Rainbow-colored moss carpets and bizarrely shaped coral trees add to the dreamlike atmosphere. Light rays stream down from above creating a hopeful mood.

Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft dreamy bokeh background, centered book cover composition.

jobs.title: The Two Brothers
jobs.prompt: A handsome young knight, appearing 20 years old, lean and muscular build, stands triumphant over a slain, seven-headed serpent. Square jaw, intense blue eyes, wavy dark brown hair, fair skin. He wears gleaming silver armor over a blue tunic, a sword at his hip, and carries a thick cloth bundle. His expression is resolute, powerful. The princess, beautiful with long golden hair and tearful blue eyes, fair skin, kneels at his feet by the riverbank, offering a grateful, loving gaze. She wears a pale pink gown. The serpent's severed heads lie scattered, tongues visible. Setting: rocky riverbank with the river flowing, kingdom in background. Midday, bright sun, slight mist rising off the river. Lighting: strong directional sunlight from the right, warm golden fill light, creating dramatic shadows. Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Water of Life
jobs.prompt: A determined young woman, barely twenty, with a strong build and resolute expression, stands at the foot of a steep, rocky mountain. Her face is square-jawed with wide, emerald green eyes; raven hair is pulled back in a practical braid, revealing high cheekbones, warm skin tone. She wears a simple but sturdy traveling dress of brown homespun, cinched at the waist with a leather belt and a silver knife hanging prominently. The scene captures her unwavering resolve, as she begins her ascent up a treacherous path covered in countless stone figures. The sun sets behind her, casting long shadows and a sense of foreboding, but she presses on towards the summit shrouded in mist. The lighting is dramatic with warm, golden light on the foreground and cool blues on the mountain peaks. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor with soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The White Dove
jobs.prompt:
A handsome prince, about 18, with a strong build and determined expression. Pale skin, blue eyes, windswept auburn hair. Wearing a simple tunic of roughspun linen, earth-toned leggings, and leather boots, a red silk thread tied around his finger. He kneels in a pile of twigs, cradling a pure white dove with bright red beak. The dove transforms into a beautiful princess with long blonde hair, clad in shimmering white silk. They gaze lovingly at each other.

The scene is set in the witch's dark, wood-paneled cottage, late afternoon, with a single window providing soft light. Golden hour lighting, casting long shadows. Soft bokeh background, Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Wounded Lion
jobs.prompt: A kind, youthful peasant girl, around 17, with rosy cheeks and a simple build, kneels beside a majestic, wounded lion. Her face is gentle and concerned, her light brown eyes filled with compassion. Her braided auburn hair is adorned with wildflowers; fair skin is smudged with dirt. She wears a homespun linen dress, earthy brown with a pale yellow apron, sleeves rolled up. The lion, with a deep gash across his face, rests his massive head in her lap. The scene captures the moment she washes his wound with a cloth and prepares to apply healing herbs. We are in a sun-dappled clearing in a dense Catalan forest at midday. Soft, golden light filters through the leaves, catching the dust motes dancing in the air. The warm light emphasizes the girl's act of selfless care. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Uraschimataro and the Turtle
jobs.prompt:
Uraschimataro, a handsome young fisherman of 19, with a muscular build and sun-kissed skin, stands on a golden beach, gazing in disbelief. His face, framed by choppy black hair, expresses shock and dawning horror, his dark eyes wide with disbelief. He wears a tattered navy blue fishing vest over simple linen trousers. In his trembling hands, he holds open a small, ornate golden box, from which a swirling purple mist emanates.

The beach setting shows twisted, ancient trees, their roots gnarled and exposed by time. In the middle distance, weathered gray tombstones stand silently in a neglected village graveyard. The sky is a bruised purple and orange, reflecting the setting sun on the horizon and casting long, ominous shadows.

Golden hour light illuminates Uraschimataro’s face, highlighting his youthful features against the backdrop of decay. The overall mood conveys loss and the cruel passage of time.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor art, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Brother and sister
jobs.prompt: A young girl, around 12, with a slender build and worried expression, kneels beside a small, white roe deer with large, gentle eyes. The roe deer has a golden garter tied around its neck. The girl has a round face, wide blue eyes filled with tears, and long, braided blonde hair. Her skin has a fair tone. She wears a simple homespun dress of brown linen, slightly torn, with a woven belt. The scene depicts the moment after the brother has been transformed; the girl is distraught, embracing the roe. They are next to a small, clear brook. The forest is dense with tall trees in the background. Overcast sky. Soft, diffused light filtering through the trees, creating a somber mood. Earthy tones of brown and green dominate, with the golden garter providing a warm accent. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Bushy bride
jobs.prompt: A radiant young woman, perhaps 17, with delicate features stands at a brook, gently washing a grotesque, moss-covered head. Her face is heart-shaped, with wide, compassionate hazel eyes and flowing, waist-length golden hair interwoven with wildflowers. She has fair skin with a dusting of freckles. She wears a simple homespun dress of light blue linen, cinched at the waist with a brown leather belt. The brook babbles as she kneels, a look of serene kindness on her face. Sunlight filters through the trees, dappling the water. The scene takes place in a secluded, overgrown part of the forest, near twilight. Key light from the setting sun, warm backlighting, creating a magical, ethereal mood. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Dapplegrim
jobs.prompt:
A young man, barely a man, perhaps seventeen, lithe but strong – the hero of the tale, wide-eyed and hesitant. Face is round, framed by a shock of wheat-blond hair, wind-tossed. Eyes are the clear blue of a summer sky, filled with trepidation. Wardrobe: Simple tunic of undyed wool, breeches, worn leather boots. He clings to the back of Dapplegrim, the horse. Dapplegrim is massive, a dapple-grey colossus with a coat like polished silver. Golden saddle and bridle. Key Scene: Dapplegrim rears, iron shoes striking sparks against a sheer cliff face.

Setting: Jagged, snow-capped mountains rise in the background. Misty, pre-dawn light. Key light from the right side. Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Drakestail
jobs.prompt:
A small, determined Drakestail, no older than 7, waddles up the palace steps, a determined glint in his golden duckling eyes. His face is round and downy, framed by a few stray tufts of yellow fuzz. He wears a miniature blue waistcoat over his fluffy white down, a tiny crown askew on his head, and clutches a small burlap sack. Drakestail, undeterred, continues toward the open doorway, singing his demanding refrain "Quack, quack, quack, when shall I get my money back?"

Inside the doorway, silhouetted against the brightly lit hall, stands the King, face red with fury, sword brandished high above wild hair, ministers frozen.

Sunlight streams through the arched palace windows, casting long shadows. A hand-painted watercolor in the style of Studio Ghibli, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition, warm golden light highlighting Drakestail's bravery against the impending threat, vibrant earth tones punctuated by regal blue and angry scarlet.

jobs.title: Farmer Weatherbeard
jobs.prompt:
A weary, middle-aged farmer with a worried expression, named Weatherbeard's father, mid-journey. Round face, brown eyes reflecting determination, short-cropped grey-brown hair, tanned skin. He wears a simple brown woolen tunic, patched leather trousers, and carries a worn satchel.

Dramatically perched high upon a massive golden eagle soaring through a dark, moonlit sky. Wisps of clouds swirl around them. The eagle's intense gaze forward, feathers ruffled by the wind.

Below, a vast forest stretches out, dotted with faint, eerie lights. Tall, ancient trees silhouetted against the night sky. The cold air bites at his face.

Moonlight is the primary light source, casting long shadows and highlighting the eagle's golden plumage and the farmer's determined expression.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Graciosa and Percinet
jobs.prompt:
A radiant, youthful Princess Graciosa, appearing 16, with a slender build and fair skin, is surprised in a sun-dappled wood. Her face is oval, with wide blue eyes conveying a mix of sorrow and hope. Long, flowing fair hair cascades around her shoulders, adorned with a crown of roses, jasmine and emerald leaves. She wears a pale green and gold brocade robe. Kneeling before her is Prince Percinet, disguised as a handsome page in a vivid green tunic and white-plumed cap. He gazes up at her with earnest eyes, his expression conveying devotion as he declares his love and offers his aid.

The scene unfolds in a secluded, mossy woodland glade, shafts of sunlight filtering through the leaves. The atmosphere is magical and filled with cautious optimism. Golden hour lighting casting long shadows and warm highlights on the characters, with a soft focus on the background foliage.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor style, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Jack and the beanstalk
jobs.prompt:
A slender, wide-eyed Jack, age 10, gazes upwards in astonishment. Freckles dust his cheeks. Face round, eyes hazel, messy brown hair, fair skin. He wears a patched brown woolen tunic, simple linen trousers, bare feet -- clutching a handful of ordinary-looking scarlet runner beans. The beans are his only treasure.

The key moment: Jack and his mother staring in disbelief at the impossibly tall beanstalk that has sprouted overnight, dwarfing their humble cottage. Jack's expression conveys awe and apprehension.

Setting sun casts long shadows across the overgrown garden, illuminating the base of the colossal beanstalk. Their small thatched-roof cottage sits nestled beside the base of the stalk.

Golden hour lighting: The warm setting sun highlights the texture of the beanstalk and casts a magical glow over the scene, illuminating the wonder in Jack's eyes. A Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Kari Woodengown
jobs.prompt: A teenage Kari Woodengown, around 16, slender but strong, with long golden hair escaping her simple braids, riding atop a massive, muscular BLUE BULL with intelligent eyes. Her face is heart-shaped, with wide, anxious blue eyes and a smattering of freckles, her expression a mix of fear and determination. She wears a homespun woolen dress in muted browns and greens, torn in places, with a simple leather belt. The Blue Bull carries her swiftly through a dense silver wood. Gleaming silver leaves catch the light. Kari accidentally brushes a branch, and a single silver leaf detaches, floating towards her hand. A looming, grotesque six-headed silver troll bursts from the trees, roaring. Moonlight filters through the silver canopy. Ghibli-inspired, with soft watercolor textures and gentle bokeh. The composition should feel like a classic storybook cover with warm earth tones.

jobs.title: Minnikin
jobs.prompt:
Minnikin, a scruffy, determined boy of small stature and twig-thin limbs, kneels on a rocky shore. His face, smudged with dirt, is upturned, wide-eyed with awe and hope. Tousled brown hair frames a face with sparkling green eyes. He wears mismatched, oversized rags of brown and faded blue, a patched tunic riding low on his shoulders. He holds a tiny, intricately detailed ship no bigger than his palm.

The moment: Minnikin has just shrunk his magical ship, and the royal entourage from the palace rushes toward him, intrigued.

Setting: A windswept, grey-sand beach at the foot of towering cliffs. The King's black-draped palace looms in the background under a bruised twilight sky hinting at both sorrow and adventure. Mist hangs low to the water.

Lighting: The scene is lit by the eerie, ethereal glow of the setting sun, casting long, dramatic shadows and highlighting the wonder in Minnikin's face.

Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Mother Holle
jobs.prompt:
A kind, pretty young woman, around 17, slender build, dipping a bloodied spindle into a stone well. Oval face, wide blue eyes filled with sorrow, long blonde hair partially pulled back with stray strands framing her face, fair skin. Wearing a simple homespun dress made of rough linen, faded blues and browns, practical apron, bare feet. The well is made of grey stone, moss-covered.

She gazes forlornly into the well, tears welling in her eyes, realizing she must jump in. Rural German countryside setting with rolling green hills, distant village. Late afternoon, overcast sky, looming storm. Soft, diffused light filtering through the clouds, creating a melancholic atmosphere.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. Touches of crimson (blood) create visual tension within the otherwise muted palette.

jobs.title: Princess Rosette
jobs.prompt: Fifteen-year-old Princess Rosette, radiant and joyful with long golden hair, bright blue eyes, and fair skin, emerges from a tall stone tower, wearing a simple but elegant rose-colored gown. Her small, emerald-green, one-eared dog, Frisk, tumbles playfully at her feet. In the background, her two brothers, the King and Prince, smile warmly, gesturing towards a vibrant garden. The garden bursts with colorful fruit trees, flowers, and a sparkling fountain. But Rosette's attention is captured by a magnificent peacock displaying its full plumage in the sunlight. Golden light bathes the scene, highlighting Rosette's delighted expression as she beholds the bird. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Rapunzel
jobs.prompt: A sorrowful Rapunzel, age 16, slender build, sits alone in a barren desert. Her face is oval with large emerald green eyes brimming with tears and a heartbroken expression. She has short, choppy brown hair, pale skin, and wears a tattered dress of faded green linen, accentuating her isolation. In her lap she cradles a baby, her only comfort. The sun sets behind her, dust devils swirl around her feet. The composition emphasizes her dejection and maternal love. Warm, muted earth tones dominate, with subtle greens and yellows in the sparse desert foliage. Soft, diffused light depicts the harshness of the desert juxtaposed with the tenderness of the moment. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Snowdrop
jobs.prompt: Snowdrop, age 7, delicate and frightened, flees through a dense forest after escaping the huntsman. Heart-shaped face, wide blue eyes filled with tears, tangled black hair, porcelain skin with a smudge of dirt on her cheek. She wears a tattered white dress, remnants of a royal gown, with a red cloak slipping from her shoulders, snagged on thorny branches. Desperate escape through a dark, forbidding wood. Ancient, gnarled trees twist around her. Overgrown brambles covered in melting snow catch at her dress. Patches of bright red berries punctuate the wintry scene. Overcast skies, late afternoon. Soft, diffused sunlight creates a sense of foreboding. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. Palette: Warm browns and greens, accented by the red of the berries and Snowdrop's cloak.

jobs.title: Soria Moria Castle
jobs.prompt: Halvor, a lanky youth of 17, sits upon a giant decapitated troll, three grotesque heads lying nearby leaking green blood. His face, smudged with ash, shows a mix of weariness and triumph; bright blue eyes sparkle mischievously. He has messy blonde hair and a ruddy skin tone. Clad in tattered brown homespun, he wields an enormous, gleaming sword, its size comical against his frame, with a captured princess. She is slender, mid-twenties, regal in a shimmering emerald silk gown. In the grand kitchen within Soria Moria Castle; golden platters and silver goblets are strewn on the floor. Light streams through an arched window that reveals distant mountains under a stormy sky. Soft, warm light catches the gold vessels; Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh.

jobs.title: The black thief and knight of the glen
jobs.prompt:
Three handsome princes, about 18-22, with matching royal blue tunics, leather leggings, and windswept brown hair, stand at a crossroads in a misty mountain pass. The eldest gestures confidently forward, the second looks determined, while the youngest gazes back towards a distant castle spire. Eldest and second princes are in the grasp of the Queen's deal.

The Queen, around 40 with a cruel, angular face framed by dark braids, turquoise dress, and icy blue eyes, peers from the highest tower window, clutching cursed playing cards. A single shaft of light illuminates her face, hinting at malicious intent.

Jagged peaks rise in the background, and gnarled trees cling to the slopes. The time is twilight, with long shadows stretching across the path. The lighting is dramatic, with a cool moonlight contrasting the warm, menacing glow emanating from the castle.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The death of Koschei the Deathless
jobs.prompt: A young Prince Ivan, no older than 20, with a determined gaze, clad in simple, travel-worn linen tunic of earthy brown and leather boots, holds a silver bridle. His face is oval-shaped, with kind, blue eyes and tousled brown hair. He stands before a towering, ornate iron door, its carvings depicting scenes of sorrow and imprisonment. Behind the bars, Princess Marya Morevna, with long dark hair cascading down her back, wears a tattered red dress of silk. Her face, though smudged with dirt, holds defiance. She reaches out to Ivan. The scene is within Koshchei's dark fortress. A beam of moonlight pierces through a high window, illuminating dust motes dancing in the air. The overall mood is tense and desperate. Dramatic golden-hour lighting with soft shadows. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor with a soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The enchanted canary
jobs.prompt:
Désiré, a slender young prince around 18, with a kind face and determined eyes. Fair skin, wavy auburn hair, dressed in a stylish travelling suit of emerald green velvet, gold trim, and soft leather boots. He stands in the witch's orange grove, clutching three glowing, fist-sized oranges, the setting sun casting long shadows.

The grove is filled with lush, dark green foliage and vibrant orange trees laden with fruit. In the background, the witch's ominous castle looms, silhouetted against a fiery sunset. The scene captures the moment of his triumph with a sense of foreboding.

Golden hour lighting, dappled sunlight filtering through the leaves. Hand-painted watercolor, soft focus, storybook illustration. Studio Ghibli style.

jobs.title: The enchanted pig
jobs.prompt: The youngest Princess, slight of frame, around 17, fair skin, stands trembling; large blue eyes wide with fear, framed by long, golden-blonde hair escaping from its braid. She wears a simple but elegant gown of pale blue linen, tears welling as she clutches the edge of an ancient, ornate book. Her sisters stand behind, one in a rose gown, the other in sunset orange, whispering support but with worried looks. The scene is the forbidden room: stone walls, high arched windows casting eerie shadows, the heavy wooden table center stage with a tapestry cloth. Light streams dramatically from the book, illuminating the princess's face while casting the pig-shaped shadow on the wall behind her. Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh, fairytale book cover.

jobs.title: The golden branch
jobs.prompt: A hunchbacked Prince Curlicue, age 16, stands in a cavernous, forgotten tower room, his crooked legs and squinting eyes softened by curiosity. His face, though unconventional, is kind and intelligent. Auburn, shoulder-length hair frames his face. He wears a simple brown tunic of roughspun fabric, cinched with a leather belt. In his right hand, he holds a gleaming golden key. He stares intently at a dusty, ornately carved wooden cabinet nestled in shadow. Sunlight streams through a stained-glass window, illuminating motes of dust and casting vibrant colors on the stone floor. The air is thick with the scent of old books and forgotten magic. Golden light emanates from the key, highlighting the Prince's determined yet hopeful expression. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The golden goose
jobs.prompt: A kind-faced, youthful Dullhead, around 17, slight build but strong, clutching a golden goose under his arm. His face is earnest, with wide brown eyes and a hopeful smile. Short, tousled light-brown hair, fair skin with a smudge of dirt on his cheek. He wears simple homespun clothes: a brown tunic, patched trousers, and worn leather boots. He leads a comical conga line of the innkeeper's three daughters in colorful dresses, a red-faced parson in black robes, a bewildered clerk, and two earthy peasants, all stuck to each other. They stumble through a vibrant green field, wildflowers blooming. Golden light streams down from the late afternoon sun, casting long shadows. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor style with a soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition accentuating the goose's golden shimmer.

jobs.title: The little good mouse
jobs.prompt:
A slender, raven-haired Queen in her early thirties, delicate features, sits distraught in a tall tower cell, gazing longingly from the window. Large, tearful blue eyes, fair skin, and a worried expression. She wears a faded blue linen gown, torn at the edges, a simple silver circlet askew in her long dark hair. In her lap, she holds a swaddled infant princess. The tower room is sparsely furnished.
The climactic moment: the queen offers her last pea to a tiny, animated mouse with oversized, grateful eyes. 
Setting: A tall, cold, stone tower room, late afternoon. A single ray of sunlight illuminates dust motes in the air. Atmospheric details include a rough-hewn spinning wheel and a simple wooden table.
Key light comes from the window, casting long shadows. Fill light is soft and warm.
Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. Focus on the emotional connection between the Queen and the mouse. Primary colors: blues, grays, and browns, with a pop of green from the pea.

jobs.title: The marvelous musician
jobs.prompt:
A youthful, sprightly musician with a fiddle, early 20s, light brown hair, stands confidently before a burly woodcutter with a gleaming axe. The musician has a kind face, blue eyes, and a hopeful expression. He wears a forest-green tunic of soft wool, brown leather boots, and a feathered cap, and carries a worn leather satchel.

The key moment: protecting the musician, the woodcutter raises his axe defensively against a menacing wolf and fox, with a small hare cowering behind them, all glaring at the pair.

Deep forest clearing at late afternoon, dappled sunlight filtering through golden leaves. Warm earth tones dominate, with flashes of the axe's silver and the fox's reddish fur. The background has a soft bokeh effect, obscuring details to emphasize the foreground action.

Golden hour lighting illuminates the musician and woodcutter, casting long shadows from the approaching animals.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The master thief
jobs.prompt: A lithe, cunning young man with a mischievous grin, appearing about 17, dressed as a humble farmhand despite his sharp eyes. Angular face, short-cropped dark brown hair, intelligent green eyes, fair skin. Donning a simple linen tunic and breeches of earth tones, cinched with a leather belt, and carrying a coil of rope. Key scene: the master thief dangling from a tree branch by his ankles over a dirt road, upside down, feigning suicide to trick the farmer. Gnarled, old tree with thick roots, casting eerie shadows. Setting: a dense, shadowy forest road at twilight, with the last rays of sun filtering through the leaves. Golden hour lighting, with a soft, diffused glow illuminating the young man's face. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. Accent color: forest green.

jobs.title: The nettle spinner
jobs.prompt: A young woman named Renelde, 18, fair skin, stands defiant. Her face is determined, hazel eyes sparkling with resilience. Long auburn hair is braided, adorned with wildflowers. She wears a simple homespun dress, nettle-fiber, pale green, with an apron. In her hands, she holds a distaff laden with nettle fibers, actively spinning thread. Key scene: despite being bound by thick ropes, the nettle fibers levitate and spin themselves, defying gravity. Setting: Inside a rustic, one-room cottage, shafts of sunlight streaming through a window illuminating floating dust motes. Time of day: late afternoon. Light: golden hour, warm light filtering through the window, casting long shadows. Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Norka
jobs.prompt:
Prince Ivan, appearing 18, lithe build, determined expression, stands sword in hand on a craggy rock in the middle of a stormy blue sea. Face is oval, with bright blue eyes; golden hair, drenched and windswept; fair skin touched by sea spray. He wears leather trousers, a chainmail shirt under a dark blue cloak fastened with a silver clasp shaped like a wolf's head.

The Norka, a colossal, dragon-like beast with mottled green scales and fiery red eyes, sleeps on the stone, its thunderous snores churning the water.

Lightning flashes illuminate the confrontation. Ominous grey clouds fill the sky. The overall mood is tense and perilous.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, creating a storybook cover illustration emphasizing the impending battle. Warm grays, stormy blues, steel silver, and accents of fiery red.

jobs.title: The princess Mayblossom
jobs.prompt:
Princess Mayblossom, almost 20, slender and radiant, with an air of wistful curiosity. Her face is oval, large expressive blue eyes gazing upward with longing, long flowing blonde hair cascading down her shoulders, pale skin. She wears a pristine white linen gown, subtly embroidered with mayblossoms, long sleeves, fitted bodice; a delicate silver necklace adorns her neck.

Captured in a moment of yearning, pressing her hands against the cold stone wall of her windowless tower, gazing up as if trying to pierce through. Behind her are her weeping attendants, the nurse prominent among them.

The setting is the dimly lit, circular chamber of her tower, lit only by wax candles. The lighting is soft and warm, creating a sense of confinement and melancholy.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor illustration, soft bokeh background, centered composition suitable for book cover.

jobs.title: The ratcatcher
jobs.prompt: A slender, vengeful ratcatcher, early 30s, leads children away with bagpipes. His face is stern, mischievous smile, with piercing green eyes, auburn braided hair. Fitted colorful patchwork jerkin, leggings, pointed shoes, feathered cap. The children, ages 5-12, diverse ethnicities, are entranced, skipping and dancing, clutching toys and dolls. They are guided out into sunset, heading towards Weserbergland hills. The dramatic moment: The hillside splits slightly, revealing a dark, beckoning entrance. Warm golden hour light filters through the gap, casting long shadows. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor illustration, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition, color palette of warm golds, reds, and greens.

jobs.title: The seven foals
jobs.prompt:
A youthful, wiry Cinderlad, no older than 16, with soot-smudged cheeks, trailing after seven magical foals. His face is thin, with wide, curious hazel eyes and a hopeful expression. Scruffy, light-brown hair sticks out at odd angles. He wears patched homespun trousers and a simple, earth-toned tunic—evidence of his humble origins.

The key scene: Cinderlad bravely racing through a sun-dappled forest, determined to keep the seven energetic foals in sight. The foals are radiant, each a unique color, kicking up golden leaves as they gallop.

Setting: A vibrant, overgrown woodland path near the King's palace, early morning. Mist clings to the base of ancient trees, creating a magical atmosphere. 

Lighting: Soft, diffused light filters through the dense canopy, casting playful shadows. Golden hour ambiance, with warm light highlighting Cinderlad's earnest face and the foals' spirited movement. 

Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, panoramic storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The six sillies
jobs.prompt: A lanky, naive thirty-something girl with a worried expression, sitting on a cellar staircase. Round face, wide blue eyes, light brown hair in disarray, fair skin. She wears a simple homespun dress of cream-colored linen, the sleeves slightly too long. A half-empty clay jug of beer sits beside her, ale spilling onto the stone steps. Her mother and father flank her—the mother, plump and flustered, the father, balding and perplexed. All three are frozen, lost in thought about baby names. They are interrupted by the suitor. Dark and damp stone cellar with barrels lining the walls. The beer tap gushes unattended. Soft, diffuse light from a single flickering candle at the top of the stairs. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. Warm earthy tones with amber accents from the beer.

jobs.title: The story of Sigurd
jobs.prompt:
Sigurd, a brave, youthful warrior of 16, lean but strong muscled. Square jaw, fierce blue eyes, flaxen hair in a thick braid, fair skin. Wearing a studded leather jerkin over chainmail, muted brown and green tones, his father's broken sword reforged, now the mighty Gram, at his hip.

Sigurd crouches low in a muddy trench, eyes wide with grim determination as the dragon Fafnir looms above, scales like obsidian catching the firelight. Fafnir roars, a plume of venomous breath hissing from its jaws, inches from Sigurd's face.

A desolate heath, deep ravine carved by the dragon's passage, twilight encroaching. The air thick with the stench of sulfur, dying trees silhouetted against the stormy sky.

Fiery light from the dragon's breath illuminates Sigurd's face, casting long shadows. Ominous, dramatic mood.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The three dwarfs
jobs.prompt:
A kind, fair-skinned girl of 16, named (implied) Snow White, with long wavy auburn hair, stands knee-deep at the edge of a frozen river. Her blue eyes are wide with surprise. She wears a tattered paper dress, mountain frost clinging to its edges, and a steaming skein of yarn hangs heavily from her shoulders.

A regal, golden carriage, pulled by white horses, has stopped on the snowy riverbank. Inside sits a handsome young King with a concerned expression. Sunlight glints off the carriage's polished surface.

The key scene captures the moment the King first sees Snow White, highlighting her beauty and vulnerability against the stark, wintry landscape.

Setting: A snow-covered riverbank with a dark, imposing forest in the background, midday, winter.
Lighting: Soft, diffused sunlight breaking through the clouds, with a warm glow emanating from the carriage.
Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The three princesses of Whiteland
jobs.prompt: A handsome young king, no older than 20, clad in beggar's clothes, kneels in supplication before a radiant princess. She stands waist-deep in the white sand of Whiteland, her face etched with gentle sorrow but resolute love. Her flaxen hair cascades down her shoulders, mingling with the soft glow emanating from her and the two sisters partially buried behind her. She gestures towards a distant, ominous castle silhouetted against the twilight sky behind him. He gazes up at her imploringly, clutching a tarnished silver ring in his outstretched hand. The stark white sand stretches to the horizon under a melancholic pastel sky. Soft, diffused light illuminates the princess, casting long somber shadows from the castle. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition, melancholic yet hopeful.

jobs.title: The true history of Little Golden-hood
jobs.prompt:
Young Minnikin, appearing 17, stands triumphant in the troll's cave, clutching a golden chest overflowing with treasure. He is clean-shaven with a determined expression, bright blue eyes, and messy brown hair. He wears practical leather breeches, a green tunic, and a simple brown cloak. Beside him, the rescued Princess, about 18, with long flowing blonde hair and a relieved smile, wears a tattered but elegant blue gown.

The scene is the heart of the troll's lair: a cavernous space dominated by a massive brewing vat, surrounded by the grotesque, lifeless bodies of trolls. Dim, eerie green light filters in from unseen crevices.

Minnikin, using a milk pan, is about to give the foul-smelling sweet-wort to the last living hag in the lair while grinning.

The overall lighting is dim and unsettling, with a sickly green glow emanating from the vat, highlighting the strange victory. Warm earth tones dominate. The ship should be in the far background in a small window.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The twelve brothers
jobs.prompt:
A kind-hearted princess, about 16, with a gold star on her forehead, wearing a simple but elegant forest-green dress of linen, carries twelve freshly-picked white lilies. She stands sweetly smiling in a clearing, about to enter the enchanted house, her expression hopeful.

The enchanted house is small, quaint, and overgrown with ivy. Golden hour sunlight streams through the ancient trees, dappling the forest floor with soft shadows. A faint magical mist swirls around the base of the trees.

In the background, twelve ravens take flight, silhouetted against the warm sunlight. The scene captures the moment before the brothers' transformation.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition, warm earth tones with green and gold accents.

jobs.title: The twelve dancing princesses
jobs.prompt: A slender Michael, age 17, fair skin, blue eyes, golden curly hair, dressed in a simple brown tunic and trousers, stands just inside the princesses' opulent bedchamber, holding a delicate white flower in his buttonhole. The twelve princesses, radiant in jewel-toned silk gowns, adorned with pearls and lace, prepare for a secret midnight adventure. Laughter dances on their lips as the eldest princess, regal in a deep blue gown, gestures toward an unseen exit. Moonlight streams through the tall arched windows illuminating the richly decorated room. Glimpses of ornate wardrobes, jewel boxes, and twelve plush beds can be seen. Soft, diffused lighting creates an air of mystery and anticipation, with a warm golden glow highlighting Michael's hopeful expression. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The voice of death
jobs.prompt:
A middle-aged man named Thomas, formerly wealthy, with a determined but anxious expression, stands at the edge of a precipice. His face is gaunt, with worried blue eyes and a neatly trimmed grey beard. He wears a rich, dark wool coat, partially unbuttoned, and a fine linen shirt. In his hand, he clutches a bloodied barber's razor. He is shouting defiantly towards an unseen entity.

The setting is a desolate, rocky landscape just outside a small, quaint village with terracotta rooftops. The time of day is late afternoon, with long shadows stretching across the barren ground. The sky is a muted orange and grey, hinting at an approaching storm. Jagged rocks frame the edge of the deep chasm.

Golden hour key light rakes across Thomas’s face, casting deep shadows and emphasizing his fear. A soft fill light comes from the village, providing a sense of warmth and safety in contrast to the looming darkness. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The wonderful birch
jobs.prompt: A slender young woman, around 16, with long braided hair, stands before a luminous birch tree. Her face is oval, eyes wide with wonder, skin fair. Auburn hair cascades down her shoulders, interwoven with golden threads. She wears a peasant dress, transformed into shimmering silk, adorned with delicate floral embroidery, primarily in warm earth tones with accents of deep greens and gold. The most iconic moment is when she touches the birch, mid-transformation, dress shimmering. The birch tree is in a moonlit clearing at the edge of a field. Fireflies dance around the trunk. Soft moonlight filters through the leaves, casting ethereal shadows, and a soft golden light emanates from the girl. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: A tale of the Tontlawald
jobs.prompt:
A rosy-cheeked Elsa, age 12, petite but sturdy from chores, stands entranced, basket of red strawberries at her feet. Her face is heart-shaped with wide, hopeful hazel eyes and freckled skin. Long, tangled blonde hair cascades down her homespun cotton dress in muted brown, ripped at the seams. A little black dog with a silver bell collar barks playfully at her, tail wagging.

Elsa's new friend, a noble maiden, approaches, clad in emerald silk brocade, hand outstretched in friendship. They stand at the sun-drenched edge of the Tontlawald, the magical forest looming behind them with giant, twisted trees bearing luminous fruit. Golden light filters through the dense canopy, illuminating a path into the unknown.

Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: How a fish swam in the air and a hare in the water
jobs.prompt:
A bewildered, wrinkled old peasant man in his 60s, with a kind but mischievous face. His wife, stout and loud, face reddened with frustration. The man is mid-climb, awkwardly descending a tall, spindly tree. He cradles a glistening pike in his arms, struggling to maintain his balance. The wife stands at the base of the tree, hands on her hips, scolding him.

The man has a weathered face, blue eyes wide with feigned surprise, and a thin grey beard. He wears a patched brown tunic and simple trousers. The woman has a round face, small beady eyes, and wears a bright red dress with a white apron.

Setting: A sun-dappled forest clearing next to a dirt road. A horse-drawn cart waits nearby.

Lighting: Golden hour, sunlight streaming through the leaves, dappling the scene in warm light and casting long shadows.

Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The child who came from an egg

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The fairy of the dawn

jobs.title: The finest liar in the world

jobs.title: The frog
jobs.prompt:

He wears simple peasant clothes of woven brown linen. In his hands, he presents a bolt of exquisitely spun white linen. Standing before him on the pond's bank is a green frog with intelligent golden eyes.

Golden hour lighting casts a warm, hopeful glow. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor style, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The girl who pretended to be a boy

jobs.title: The goat's ears of the Emperor Trojan

The warm earthy palette contrasts subtly with the cool blue sky. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

The moment emphasizes the shift from the normal world to the magical underworld. Uneven light filters from the mouth of the cave, casting eerie shadows. The scene is set deep within a dense, ancient forest. The time of day is twilight, with the last rays of sun dappling through the leaves. jobs.title: The history of Dwarf Long Nose
jobs.prompt:

Warm key light highlighting Jem’s face. Soft fill light creating depth. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. Accent color: emerald green cabbages will pop against the otherwise muted earthy tones.

jobs.title: The story of Hassebu

Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The story of three wonderful beggars

jobs.title: The three princes and their beasts

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition, warm earthy tones with copper/silver accents highlight the magical forest.

jobs.title: The two frogs
jobs.prompt: Two stout, adventurous frogs, one from Osaka and one from Kioto, meet atop a misty mountain pass. Round faces, wide expressive golden eyes, smooth olive skin. One wears a woven straw kasa hat, the other a tiny blue scarf. They stand upright, comically supporting each other, front paws clasped. The Osaka frog, on the right, strains to look left; the Kioto frog, on the left, strains to look right. Mountainous Japanese landscape fades into the background behind them. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The underground workers

His face is round, his eyes wide with wonder, and his hair is brown and neatly combed. He wears simple leather boots. Inside a vast cavern filled with glittering gold and silver bars piled high, dwarfing him. He futilely tries to lift a gold bar. The cavern master, now revealed as a regal being with flame-colored silk robes, a golden crown adorned with gemstones, and a knowing smile, watches Hans. The scene is lit by the warm glow of the gold and the twinkling of the gems, creating a sense of magical realism. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. Warm earth tones with gold and flame-colored accents.

jobs.title: The young man who would have his eyes opened
jobs.prompt:
A young man named... (He doesn't have a name!) with a determined face, mid-twenties, thin build, with wide, curious eyes. His face is pale and gaunt, framed by disheveled dark brown hair swept back from his brow; wearing a simple beige tunic of roughspun linen. He's wide-eyed, frozen in terror, clutching a piece of bread as he leaps away from a grotesque scene.

The serpent-king's feast: a moonlit moor dotted with writhing masses of snakes, their scales shimmering in the eerie glow emanating from a golden bowl of milk. The monstrous serpent-king towers over them, a thick, emerald green body coiled around a small hillock, a fiery golden crown atop his head.

Key light from the serpent-king’s crown casts dramatic shadows. The overall mood is fearful with a hint of wonder, enhanced by soft bokeh effects and textures imitating hand-painted watercolor. Studio Ghibli-inspired storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Two in a sack
jobs.prompt: A weary, middle-aged peasant, hunched and timid, with patched clothing. Round, kind face, hazel eyes wide with surprise, light brown hair receding. Wearing a simple tunic, brown trousers, and carrying a woven sack over his shoulder. He's cautiously opening the sack in his humble cottage, revealing two young lads dressed in vibrant tunics. They're setting up a feast of colorful fruits and delicacies on a small oak table covered with silk. The wife, a stout, mean-looking woman with a sour expression, red hair pulled back in a bun, and wearing a drab dress, stands behind him, broom in hand, eyes wide with greedy anticipation. The cottage is dimly lit by a warm hearth glow, casting long shadows. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. Golden hour lighting.

jobs.title: Virgililus the sorcerer
jobs.prompt:
An elderly woman with a round, bewildered face, watery blue eyes, and a slightly open mouth, her gray hair escaping her bonnet in wisps. She wears a simple, earth-toned dress of coarse linen with a patched apron. A comical, incredulous expression.

Key scene: The woman gesturing wildly with her hands as she recounts the absurd tale of finding a pike in a tree and a hare in a river. The village secretary and elders are doubled over with laughter.

Setting: A rustic, wood-paneled room in the man's house, sunlight streaming through a window, illuminating dust motes in the air. The room is sparsely furnished with a wooden table and stools.

Lighting: Warm, diffused light from the window creates a jovial, light-hearted mood, casting soft shadows on the characters' faces and highlighting the humor of the situation.

Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. Accent colors: deep red and golden yellow.

jobs.title: A story about a darning-needle
jobs.prompt:
A slender, silver darning-needle, appearing as a haughty young woman of about 18, with an elongated face implying disdain. Her eye is the needle's eye: dark and piercing. Her body is the needle.

Sharp features, cold grey eyes, and sleek silver hair pulled back severely. Her pinpoint is a sharp chin. Her skin is polished steel, cool-toned.

She wears sealing wax like a crimson brooch, mimicking a noble's crest on her upper body. A trailing thread forms the illusion of a luxurious, yet unraveling, gown.

The needle has fallen into a grimy gutter, amidst swirling debris — colorful scraps of discarded newsprint, brittle twigs, and translucent shavings — all swirling around her. Her face is turned up, expressing aristocratic suffering and disgust at the squalor.

A cobblestone street, littered with refuse, forms the backdrop. Overcast daylight filters through grimy buildings, casting long shadows and emphasizing the gloom of the alley.

A single ray of golden sunlight pierces through the clouds, spotlighting the needle, but reflecting weakly off a shard of broken glass nearby.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor illustration, soft bokeh background, centered storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Alphege, or The green monkey
jobs.prompt:
Fourteen-year-old Prince Alphege, handsome and graceful, with a concerned expression. His face is fair, with bright blue eyes and golden-brown hair. He wears a sapphire-blue velvet tunic trimmed with gold embroidery, and a jeweled ruby pendant.

The key scene occurs in a sunlit garden: Zayda, a beautiful young woman with long dark hair, sits beside her mother near a fountain, gazing in astonishment at a bright green monkey perched nearby. Tears stream down the monkey’s face. The mother gestures with a knowing expression.

Setting: A lush, blossoming garden with a marble fountain, jasmine archway, and myrtle tree. Golden sunlight filters through the leaves.

Lighting: Warm, diffused light emphasizing the emotion on their faces, creating a magical, storybook mood.

Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor illustration, soft bokeh background, centered storybook cover composition. A color palette of warm earth tones accented by sapphire blue and emerald green.

jobs.title: Blockhead Hans
