jobs.title: Straw, coal, and bean
jobs.prompt: A jolly, plump bean, age unknown, doubled over with laughter, tiny arms flailing. Round face, wide smiling eyes, pink lips, smooth green skin with a barely visible seam of fresh black thread running down its middle. Wearing a miniature patchwork waistcoat of autumn-colored leaves, a single acorn cap perched jauntily on its head. Key scene: the bean, overcome with mirth, bursts its seam on the riverbank. Setting: a sun-dappled brook, lush green grass, smooth grey stones worn by the flowing water. Atmosphere: playful, slightly absurd. Lighting: warm, diffuse sunlight filtering through the trees, accentuating the bean’s joyful tears. Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition highlighting the bean’s predicament and the idyllic setting, bright happy colors.

jobs.title: Strong Hans
jobs.prompt:
A prodigious boy named Hans, appearing 11 years old with a sturdy physique and determined expression, stands defiant. His youthful face has a determined jawline, bright blue eyes, and tousled blonde hair. His skin is fair, hinting at years spent mostly indoors. He wears a simple tunic of brown homespun fabric, cinched with a leather belt. His most prized possession is a crudely fashioned but strong wooden club. The pivotal scene shows Hans confronting a burly robber captain in a vast, dimly lit cavern with glinting swords hanging on the walls..

Hans firmly wields his club, challenging the captain about his parentage. Soft firelight illuminates the tense moment, casting long shadows and highlighting Hans's bravery.

Setting: Inside the robber's cavern, during the evening, with a fire burning, swords hanging on the walls, and a glimpse of a rough-hewn table.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. Warm earth tones with accents of fiery orange and golden yellow.

jobs.title: Sweet porridge
jobs.prompt: A wide-eyed, innocent girl, about 7, stands knee-deep in a river of sweet porridge. Rosy cheeks, bright blue eyes, and blonde braided hair frame her oval face, peach skin dusted with flour. She wears a simple homespun dress of brown linen, its sleeves rolled up, holding a wooden spoon aloft, mid-air. The magic pot, glazed earthenware, sits innocently at her feet, still bubbling. The quaint, timber-framed village is submerged behind her, roofs barely visible under the golden-brown overflow. Sunlight streams through the thick porridge, illuminating the rising tide. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition, warm amber and honey color palette with accents of blue.

jobs.title: The aged mother
jobs.prompt:
A frail, elderly woman with wrinkled skin and sorrowful eyes, hunched with grief, wearing a simple, dark woolen shawl. Her face is gaunt, framed by wisps of gray hair escaping her bonnet. She stands near the altar of a dimly lit, gothic church, the scene lit by ethereal, otherworldly light. Her eyes are wide with shock and dawning understanding as she gazes upon the spectral forms of her two young sons.

In front of her, transparent figures of her deceased relatives fill the pews, clad in faded, old-fashioned garments. They are humming softly, with solemn, pale faces. The architectural details of the church are visible in the background. Key light comes from the ghostly apparitions, casting long, soft shadows.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor illustration, soft bokeh background, centered storybook cover composition, muted earth tones with accents of spectral white and deep indigo.

jobs.title: The almond tree
jobs.prompt: Young Marjory, age 6, white skin, stands beneath the almond tree, her face streaked with tears but eyes now hopeful. She has long blonde hair, and wears a simple, dark blue cotton dress, its apron pockets bulging slightly. In her hands, she clutches a white linen handkerchief tied into a bundle. The almond tree is in full bloom, branches laden with pink blossoms. Above the tree, a swirling cloud of golden smoke coalesces into a vibrant bird with rainbow plumage. Shafts of sunlight break through the leaves, illuminating the girl and the magical transformation. Warm light filters down, creating a soft focus on the background where a quaint, half-timbered house stands. Hand-painted watercolor, Studio Ghibli-inspired style, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The beam
jobs.prompt: A young village bride, perhaps 19, slender build, caught mid-stride. Innocent, determined expression. Round face, bright intelligent blue eyes, long braided blonde hair escaping from beneath a floral headpiece, fair skin flushed with embarrassment. White linen wedding dress, subtle blue embroidery, voluminous skirt hiked up to her knees, revealing bare legs. She wades through a field unexpectedly transformed into a stream, bouquet of wildflowers clutched in her right hand. Setting: A vibrant field of blue flax, mid-day sun casting long shadows. A mocking enchanter visible in the far background. Key light from the left, warm fill light, creating a surreal and humiliating atmosphere. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The bittern and the hoopoe
jobs.prompt: A gaunt, weathered elderly shepherd, the Hoopoe, stands forlorn amidst a barren, windswept mountainscape. Deep wrinkles etch his face, framing sorrowful brown eyes. His once-vibrant brown hair is now thin and grey. He wears tattered woolen robes in muted earth tones, clutching a simple wooden staff. With desperate frustration, he gestures toward his emaciated cows, collapsed on the sandy ground around him. "Up, up, up," he cries, his face a mask of despair. The setting sun casts long, melancholic shadows across the desolate landscape. Key light from the setting sun illuminates his face, highlighting his anguish. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The blue light
jobs.prompt:
A fresh-faced young soldier, appearing 20, lean but strong, with a determined gaze. Round face, bright blue eyes sparkling mischievously; sandy blond hair, tousled and slightly overgrown, fair skin with a smudge of dirt on his cheek. Wearing a worn leather jerkin over a simple linen tunic, brown trousers, and scuffed boots; clutching a glowing blue, glass-blown oil lamp in his right hand, smoke curling from a clay pipe in his left.

Deep within the witch's dark, damp stone well; grinning as he defies her attempt to steal the blue light. Moss-covered stone walls, glistening with moisture, earth floor.

A single shaft of light from above illuminates the soldier and the lamp, casting long shadows and highlighting the magical blue glow, creating a sense of wonder and anticipation.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. Predominantly earthy browns and greens, contrasted with the vibrant blue of the magical light.

jobs.title: The boots of buffalo-leather
jobs.prompt:
A soldier, early 30s, strong build, weathered face, distinctive buffalo-leather boots, grinning mischievously.

Round face, hazel eyes sparkling with cunning, short-cropped dark hair, sun-tanned skin.

Worn leather jerkin, simple brown tunic, buffalo-leather riding boots, bottle of wine as a prop.

The soldier stands, one foot on the table, bottle raised high above his head, commanding the frozen robbers with open mouths and raised hands. Exuberance mixed with control.

Robber's stone house interior, long wooden table laden with half-eaten food, flickering firelight casting long shadows. Rough stone walls, simple wooden benches.

Warm light from the fire as a key light source, cooler moonlight filtering through a window, creating a dramatic contrast.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. Warm earth tones with accents of deep green and wine red.

jobs.title: The Bremen town musicians
jobs.prompt:
A weary donkey, about 10 years old, with a kind, expressive face, stands on his hind legs, front hooves on a brightly lit window sill, peering inside with hopeful eyes. Long, floppy ears, graying muzzle, and a sturdy build. A loyal hound dog with brown and white fur stands on the donkey's back, a ginger cat with wide, green eyes perches atop the dog, and a proud rooster with vibrant red comb and tail feathers balances on the cat's head.

The animals are stacked high, gazing into a cozy, warm kitchen scene filled with startled, cartoonish robbers feasting at a wooden table laden with food. The light from within casts long shadows.

The composition emphasizes their teamwork and determination as they perform their chaotic "music". Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, centered composition, warm earthy tones with accents of red and gold, storybook cover illustration.

jobs.title: The bright sun brings it to light
jobs.prompt: Young tailor, mid-twenties, gaunt physique, haunted eyes. Oval face, dark circles, matted brown hair, pale skin. Simple linen shirt, worn leather vest, dark trousers, bloodstains subtly visible. He sits at a wooden table, sunlight reflecting off a coffee saucer onto the wall above. A look of fear and recognition dawns on his face, the sunlight revealing his guilt. Interior of a modest home, morning light streaming through a window, dust motes dancing in the sunbeams. Golden hour lighting, warm and ominous, shadows stretching across the room, highlighting the man's face and the telltale reflections on the wall. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. Accent colors: deep red and gold.

jobs.title: The brother and sister
jobs.prompt:
A young maiden, perhaps 12, with braided blonde hair and a determined expression, sits weeping in the forest, her face streaked with tears. Her blue eyes are filled with sorrow. She wears a simple homespun dress of brown and gray, and a golden girdle shines around the neck of a small, white fawn with soulful eyes. The fawn nuzzles her cheek, comforting her.

They are beside a clear stream, sunlight dappling through the ancient trees. The air is thick with mist, creating an ethereal, dreamlike quality. Lush ferns and moss cover the forest floor.

Warm, golden light filters through the leaves, highlighting the maiden's tear-streaked face and the fawn's soft fur. A storybook cover composition, Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background.

jobs.title: The crumbs on the table
jobs.prompt:
Three scruffy, mischievous puppies, eight weeks old, tan and white fur; innocent wide eyes, floppy ears. Round faces, pleading expressions, short soft fur, pink noses. Wearing tiny, mismatched collars of woven straw and blue ribbon, awkwardly large. Puppies scramble on a rustic wooden table, scattering crumbs. The mistress, middle-aged, severe face, auburn hair pulled back in a tight bun, enters the room, raising a thick wooden stick. Kitchen interior, stone walls, shelves with simple crockery, open window showing a golden afternoon light filtering through apple trees. Warm, honeyed light catching the dust motes in the air. Soft, diffused sunlight highlights the puppies' fear and the woman's anger.
Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The crystal ball
jobs.prompt:
A valiant young man, around 18, lean but determined, with dirt-smudged tunic. Oval face, hopeful blue eyes, tousled brown hair framing his face, fair skin reddened by exertion. Wears practical leather boots and a simple brown tunic, a sheathed sword at his hip. He triumphantly holds aloft a glowing, fist-sized crystal ball.

The pivotal moment: having extinguished the flames, standing before a humble thatched-roof fisherman's hut, still smoking slightly. Towering waves, conjured by his whale brother, crash dramatically around the hut, a testament to the elemental struggle.

Seashore at dusk, dramatic storm clouds tinged orange by the setting sun, reflecting on the wet sand. Key light from the crystal ball itself, casting a soft, magical glow on the youth and the surrounding scene. Fill light is a cool, ocean-reflected blue.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, dramatic but hopeful storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The cunning little tailor
jobs.prompt:
A petite, youthful tailor with a mischievous grin, maybe 17, stands upside down in an ornate carriage. His legs, clad in striped wool stockings, stick out the window. Round face, bright blue eyes sparkling with cleverness, tousled brown hair escaping from under a simple cap. He wears a brown homespun tunic, patched but clean, over a cream-colored shirt. He's brandishing an imaginary vise, shouting at a pursuing bear. The princess, pale and frightened, peers out the carriage window behind him.

The cobblestone road leads toward a distant church with a tall steeple. Sunlight streams through the trees lining the road, creating dappled shadows. The bear is large and brown, with visible teeth and claws, but a comically startled expression.

Golden hour lighting, casting long shadows and a warm glow.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The death of the little hen
jobs.prompt: A distraught, tiny rooster, no older than a chick, teary-eyed with drooping comb. Round, pale face, red eyes, ruffled orange and brown feathers. Wearing a miniature black jacket buttoned at his chest. He's slumped on a fresh grave, tiny shovel cast aside. The grave belongs to a deceased hen. A humble burial mound of dark earth marked with a simple wooden cross, overgrown meadow of the nut-hill serving as the backdrop. The fatal, half-eaten nut lies nearby. Overcast afternoon, drizzling rain, grey weeping skies. Soft, diffused light filtering through the clouds, somber atmosphere. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The devil and his grandmother
jobs.prompt: A youthful, cunning soldier, about 25, lean build but strong, grinning confidently. His sharp face features bright, intelligent blue eyes, tousled brown hair, and a mischievous smirk. He wears a stylish Landsknecht-style outfit of fine green wool and brown leather, complemented by a feathered cap and a gleaming gold chain. The iconic moment shows him standing triumphantly before a bewildered Devil holding a contract, moments after correctly answering the riddle. They are in a cavernous, dimly lit hellscape dominated by volcanic rocks and rivers of lava. Key light comes from below, casting eerie shadows and highlighting the soldier's victorious expression; fill light from distant fires creates a warm, hellish glow. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The devil with the three golden hairs
jobs.prompt:
A youthful, handsome boy, no older than 17, with a determined set to his jaw, stands before a fiery hellscape. His face is fair-skinned, with a splash of freckles across the nose, bright green eyes, and windswept auburn hair. He wears peasant-style clothing—a tan, homespun tunic, brown breeches, and worn leather boots. In his hand, he bravely holds aloft a small, intricately carved wooden box.

He's negotiating with the Devil's Grandmother, a surprisingly kind-looking crone seated in an ornate, oversized armchair. The scene captures the moment before the Devil's arrival.

The entrance to Hell looms behind them: jagged rocks, rivers of lava, and flickering shadows. Key light emanates from the fiery depths, casting long, dramatic shadows. Warm, earthy tones dominate, with accents of fiery orange and deep crimson. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Devil's sooty brother
jobs.prompt:
Hans, the Devil's Sooty Brother, around 20, gaunt but strong, stands defiantly, covered in soot; face is angular, with piercing blue eyes gleaming through grime, stringy black hair wildly framing his face, skin caked in dirt. He wears ragged soldier's garb, torn brown woolen trousers and a tattered, dark red coat, clutching a crude lute.

The key scene: Hans confronts the greedy innkeeper in his dimly lit tavern, pointing a menacing finger, demanding the return of his stolen gold. The innkeeper cowers, eyes wide with fear.

Setting: A rustic, low-ceilinged tavern, late evening, lit by flickering candlelight, creating long, dramatic shadows. Smoke hangs heavy in the air.

Lighting: Key light from a nearby fireplace casts an orange glow on Hans, highlighting the soot and the dread in the Innkeeper's face, fill light provided by scattered candles that cast a warm glow on the scene.

Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Ditmarsch tale of wonders
jobs.prompt:
Four disheveled farmers, one sightless with milky eyes, another with ears stuffed with straw, the third mute with pursed lips, the last with gnarled legs supported by crutches. Coarse spun tunics in earth tones, patched trousers, weathered hats, and rustic stilts.
The blind man points, the mute man shouts silently, as the lame man triumphantly hoists a brown hare by its ears.
Vast, tilled farmland under a bright midday sun. Golden wheat field stretches to the horizon.
Warm, directional sunlight casting long shadows, creating depth.
Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, centered storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The dog and the sparrow
jobs.prompt: A furious, middle-aged carter with a ruddy face, wild eyes, and a gray-streaked beard, wearing a simple brown tunic, clutches a tiny sparrow in his large, calloused hand. His face is contorted with rage as the sparrow cranes its neck, chirping defiantly. The carter's wife, a stout woman in a blue dress and white bonnet, stands behind him, aghast, having just struck him in the head with a hatchet she wields in her trembling hands. The chaotic kitchen setting encompasses shattered furniture—broken chairs, a split table, and fragmented pottery—scattered across the stone floor. Light streams in through a cracked window, illuminating dust motes dancing in the air and casting long shadows. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The donkey
jobs.prompt:
A handsome 19-year-old prince with a strong build and kind eyes, disguised as a small, grey donkey with comically large, upright ears. His face is long and gentle, with intelligent brown eyes and a slightly worried expression. His donkey hair is short and bristly. He wears a miniature, ornate gold-embroidered blue velvet jacket and tiny lute strapped to his side.

In the grand hall of the King's palace, the donkey-prince plays the lute for the beautiful princess with long golden hair and a flowing gown. The king watches, amused, from his throne.

Warm, golden light streams through arched windows. The atmosphere is one of gentle humor and burgeoning affection, bathed in the glow of late afternoon sun. 

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The drummer
jobs.prompt:
A young drummer, age 16, lean but strong, with determined eyes and a mischievous grin. Round face, bright blue eyes, unruly brown hair escaping from beneath a worn leather cap; fair skin. He wears a faded red tunic, patched brown breeches, and sturdy boots, carrying a well-used wooden drum adorned with colorful ribbons slung across his chest.

He's riding atop a giant's shoulder, dwarfed by the immense size of the creature. The drummer beats a lively rhythm on his drum, his face alight with exhilaration despite the precarious situation. The second giant has a grumpy face, the skin is light brown, and is heading for the glass mountain.

Lush green forest stretches below, with towering trees and dappled sunlight. In the distance, the shimmering, impossibly tall glass mountain pierces the sky.

Overhead, billowing clouds suggest both adventure and unknown challenges. Key light from the setting sun paints the scene in warm golden hues, casting long shadows and creating a sense of anticipation. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The duration of life
jobs.prompt: A weary, graying farmer named Thomas, around 60, with a kind but tired face. His face is round, showing wrinkles earned from years of laughter and hardship, gentle blue eyes filled with wisdom, and a close-cropped salt-and-pepper beard. Dressed in a faded brown tweed coat, patched at the elbows, and carrying a burlap sack of grain on his back. He trudges wearily uphill on a cobblestone path. His expression is downcast, shoulders slumped under the weight. A quaint village nestled in a valley below, bathed in the warm, late afternoon sunlight. Golden hour. Key light from the setting sun, casting long shadows. Gentle fill light. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The ear of corn
jobs.prompt:
A young peasant woman, early 30s, strong build, weary expression. Round face, kind brown eyes, dark blonde hair pulled back in a simple braid, sun-kissed skin. Wearing a coarse homespun dress, brown and faded blue, practical apron, no shoes. She is angrily scrubbing mud off her little girl's frock using a handful of golden ears of corn, the child, 4 years old, watches her mother with wide, frightened eyes.

Vast, bountiful cornfield stretching to the horizon, the stalks impossibly tall and laden with heavy ears of corn from top to bottom. Midday, bright sunlight, clear blue sky. Divine light emanating from a figure of God, cloaked in white, looking down with sorrowful anger.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The elves
jobs.prompt: Two elfin men, appearing as playful young boys, maybe 8 years old, lithe and nimble. Round faces, wide-eyed with mischievous glee, golden hair tousled, fair skin. Dressed in exquisitely tailored miniature suits of emerald green velvet with ruby buttons, tiny leather shoes crafted with care. They are dancing joyfully in the shoemaker's workshop under soft candlelight, having just discovered the clothes and shoes left for them. The shoemaker's workbench cluttered with leather scraps is behind them. Warm, inviting light, casting long shadows, emphasizing their jubilant movement. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The fisherman and his wife
jobs.prompt:
A stout fisherman, age 50, weary but kind-faced, in simple brown homespun clothes. Round face, blue eyes downcast, short grey hair, tanned skin. He wears a simple fishing hat and carries a woven basket with a single silver fish inside.

He stands knee-deep in churning, dark grey sea. Despondent, shoulders slumped, he pleads with the magical flounder, its scaled body half-submerged, intelligent golden eyes gleaming.

The stormy sea reflects the growing darkness. Jagged rocks jut ominously along the shoreline. Above, roiling black clouds fill the sky, hinting at the insatiable desires consuming his wife.

Dramatic key light from the magical fish illuminating the fisherman's face. Dark, moody fill.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover illustration. Warm earth tones accented by the cool blues and greys of the tempestuous sea.

jobs.title: The flail from heaven
jobs.prompt:
A stout, middle-aged countryman with a weathered face and twinkling eyes, gazing upwards in awe and wonder. Round, ruddy face, straw-blonde hair peeking from under a simple cap, tanned skin. Dressed in earth-toned homespun—a brown tunic, patched trousers, and simple leather boots. He clutches a wooden flail in his right hand.

He is descending a rope made of oat chaff from the clouds, a hoe clutched in his left hand. Angels with luminous wings, rendered as soft blurs, are visible above, threshing oats.

The setting is a lush, rolling green field in the foreground, leading to a dark, mysterious hole in the earth. Above, puffy clouds give way to a golden, ethereal sky. The time is midday.

Soft, diffused light from above illuminates the man and the angelic realm. A warm, golden fill light creates a dreamlike atmosphere.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. Accent colors of celestial gold and angelic white.

jobs.title: The four skilful brothers
jobs.prompt:
Four young, handsome brothers, around 20 years old, with varied builds and distinct skills: the thief with nimble fingers, the astronomer with piercing eyes, the huntsman with a steady gaze, and the tailor with delicate hands. The astronomer has a lean face and a telescope, the thief has a mischievous grin.
The princess, fair-skinned with long golden hair, flowing silk gown, sea-green and gold, sits anxiously on a dark craggy rock, waves crashing around her.
The huntsman aims his rifle at a massive, menacing dragon mid-air, wings spread wide, about to attack their mended ship.
Sea spray and stormy clouds fill the background.
Harsh, dramatic lighting from an unseen source emphasizes the tension of the moment.
Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.
Warm earth tones contrasting with grey and blue of the storm.

jobs.title: The fox and the cat
jobs.prompt: A nimble, piebald cat with bright yellow eyes, mid-climb on a tall, ancient oak, looking down with concern. The fox, middle-aged with auburn fur and a smug expression, stands below, turning to face approaching hounds. He wears a small satchel around his shoulder. Over-the-shoulder medium shot, focused on the fox and cat. The hunter with longbow is blurry in background. Deep forest clearing, dappled sunlight, late afternoon. Golden light filters through the leaves of the tree, casting long shadows. The hounds are mid-leap to catch the fox. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, storybook cover composition, warm earth tones, greens, and browns, soft bokeh background.

jobs.title: The fox and the geese
jobs.prompt: A sly fox, mid-pounce, amber eyes glinting with anticipation, sharp teeth visible in a wide grin, bushy tail extended for balance. Plump white geese, young and old, gathered in a meadow, beaks open mid-cackle, wings flapping in panicked disarray. One brave goose, centered, neck stretched tall. Soft white feathers with touches of light brown on their heads. Golden meadow grass underfoot, dotted with wildflowers. Warm sunlight filtering through the trees at the edge of the meadow, dappling the scene in gold. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition, vibrant yet gentle.

jobs.title: The fox and the horse
jobs.prompt: A powerful old white horse, around 20 years old, muscular build but showing his age, intelligent eyes. His face is long and weathered with a kind, determined expression, hazel eyes, a long white mane flowing, pink skin. He wears a makeshift harness of rope. The key scene is the horse heroically dragging the roaring lion across a field, having been tricked by the fox. The setting is a golden wheat field near the peasant's wooden house at dawn. Light is warm and golden, side-lit, creating long shadows and highlighting the horse's strength. Style is a Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition, warm earth tones with gold and white highlights.

jobs.title: The frog king or Iron Henry
jobs.prompt: A beautiful 16-year-old princess with long golden hair and a worried expression, wearing a pale yellow silk gown, stands in a grand dining hall, pushing a golden plate towards a slimy green frog wearing a tiny golden crown. The king, with a stern face and royal robes, watches from his throne. Sunlight streams through arched windows, illuminating dust motes in the air, creating soft shadows. Fine tapestries adorn the walls. The scene captures the princess's conflicted emotions: disgust mixed with reluctant obedience. The lighting is warm, like golden hour, with a soft bokeh background, stylized as a Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, perfect for a book cover. The primary colors are gold, green, and yellow, with accents of royal purple and deep red.

jobs.title: The giant and the tailor
jobs.prompt:
A diminutive tailor, no older than 25, light build, perches precariously on a bending willow branch. Round face, wide, startled blue eyes, wind-blown brown hair, fair skin. Dressed in an oversized green wool coat, patched brown trousers, and a red waistcoat. He grasps the branch with white knuckles, eyes darting downwards in panic as the willow bends impossibly low, about to catapult him skyward.

The moment of launch – the willow branch strained to its breaking point, creating a slingshot effect. Setting: A murky marsh ringed with weeping willows under a twilight sky. Muted sunlight filters through the dense canopy, casting long shadows. The air is thick with mist, clinging to the water's surface, creating an eerie, suspenseful atmosphere.

Dramatic key light from the setting sun highlights the tailor's terrified face. Fill light is cool, reflecting off the marsh water. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The girl without hands
jobs.prompt: A young woman, around 20, slender but strong, with bound stumps where her hands once were. Her face is oval with high cheekbones, large, tearful brown eyes, and fair skin. Long, wavy auburn hair cascades down her back. She wears a simple brown woolen dress, travel-worn, with a green shawl. She kneels in prayer in a dark forest clearing, her infant son strapped securely to her back. Before her, a glowing angel in a snow-white robe gestures towards a small cottage adorned with a welcoming sign. Moonlight filters through the dense canopy, casting dappled shadows on the scene. The cottage windows glow with a warm, inviting light. Gnarled tree roots and mossy stones surround her. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor art with a soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The glass coffin
jobs.prompt: A youthful tailor apprentice, maybe 17, lean build, stands wide-eyed in a vast, stone hall. Square jaw, brown eyes reflecting awe, tousled brown hair, fair skin. He wears a simple homespun tunic, brown breeches, leather boots, and a tailor's goose hangs from his belt. He's reaching towards a life-sized glass coffin. Inside lies a beautiful princess who has just opened her eyes, a hopeful expression on her face. Wears a delicate white gown with silver embroidery and has long, flowing golden hair. The hall is lined with glass vases filled with swirling colored smoke. Eerie light emanates from the vessels, casting soft, diffused blue and purple shadows. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor style, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. Warm earth tones with accents of silver and gold.

jobs.title: The gnome
jobs.prompt: A youthful "Stupid Hans" (18), determined but kind, stands in a cavernous chamber. Round face, hazel eyes with a hint of mischief, tousled brown hair, fair skin. Dressed in practical forest green tunic and brown leather trousers, small hunting knife at his hip, holding a silver flute he found on the wall. He gazes upward, a mix of hope and uncertainty on his face, after sending the princesses to safety. The cavern is lit by an unseen light source from above, creating long shadows and dramatic contrast. Three ancient stone archways lead to deeper, darker chambers. Scattered bones and broken weapons litter the floor. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, warm earth tones with silver accents (flute, princess's golden stomacher on the floor). Soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The godfather
jobs.prompt: A wide-eyed peasant man, early 30s, thin build, wearing simple brown tunic and leggings, stands frozen in a doorway. Face is roundish, eyes wide with fear, light brown tousled hair, pale skin. He peeks through a keyhole into a dimly lit room. The godfather, a hulking figure, is scrambling into a large, ornate wooden bed, pulling a thick, red velvet blanket over himself. Two long, curved horns protrude comically from under the blanket. Its feathers are puffed, beak open in a menacing "Tuwhit, tuwhoo!". Below, townsfolk brandish pitchforks and torches—anxious expressions, lit by flickering firelight.

The barn setting is old, timber-framed, half-filled with hay. Flames lick at the edges of the wooden structure. Night sky peeks through gaps in the burning roof. Light flickers dramatically, casting long, dancing shadows. Golden hour transitioning to a fiery night scene.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. Earthy browns and golds dominate, with fiery orange accents.

jobs.title: The pack of ragamuffins
jobs.prompt:
A proud rooster, small and sturdy, about 2 years old, with bright, mischievous eyes; a plump hen, slightly smaller, looking nervous but determined, about 1 year old; a disgruntled duck, feathers ruffled, defeated but plotting revenge; plus a scheming pin and needle.

Rooster: Combative expression, fiery orange eyes, sleek red and green feathers. Hen: Wide brown eyes, ruffled brown and white feathers. Duck: Beady black eyes, muddy brown feathers. Pin & Needle: Gleaming silver bodies.

Rooster: Wears a tiny, ill-fitting coachman's hat made of a walnut shell. Hen: Securely seated in an oversized walnut shell carriage. Duck: Haphazardly harnessed to the front using twine and reeds. Pin & Needle: Tucked together inside the carriage.

The rooster cracks a stolen egg open on the hearth of an inn, the hen eagerly anticipating the treat, all while the pin stealthily sticks itself into the landlord's towel and the needle prepares to embed in his chair's cushion.

Inside a rustic, dimly lit inn kitchen at dawn. Stone hearth, wooden table, mismatched chairs.

Soft candlelight from a single flickering candle on the table, creating long shadows and a warm, inviting glow despite the mischievous scene unfolding.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

Golden hour lighting, warm and triumphant, soft glow around the peasant. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The three apprentices
jobs.prompt:
Three young apprentices, about 18, ragged but determined, medium build, standing defiant in the execution circle. The tallest has a worried face, brown tousled hair, hazel eyes, fair skin. He wears a patched tunic.

Key scene: Devil in disguise arriving in a fiery coach to stop the execution. He wears a crimson coat, lace collar. He holds a white handkerchief, points dramatically. His face is handsome/deceptive.

Setting: Grimy town square, gallows looming in background, innkeeper looking terrified. It is high noon. A sinister coach pulled by fiery-eyed horses races in. Dust swirls. A jeering crowd surrounds the scene.

Lighting: Harsh sunlight illuminates the coach and the Devil, casting long, dramatic shadows across the square. Soft backlighting emanates from the fiery horses, creating an otherworldly atmosphere.

Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. Palette of warm browns, grays, fiery reds, with accents of stark white.

jobs.title: The three army-surgeons
jobs.prompt:
Three young, weary army surgeons — about 25 years old, thin but wiry builds, travel-worn faces. One has a twitching, scabbed right hand; one's eyes eerily glow in the dark; and one's nose is uncontrollably drawn to the dirt. Faces are gaunt, with mismatched eyes and expressions of dismay. They wear mismatched, patched-up army coats of faded wool, stained breeches, and scuffed boots. The surgeon with the pig's heart has mud caked on his coat.

Dramatic scene of the surgeons confronting the innkeeper in his dimly lit tavern. The surgeon with the thief's hand reaches out to snatch the innkeeper's coin purse, his face a mask of conflicted compulsion. The innkeeper, a stout man with a ruddy face, raises his hands in protest, while the surgeon with cat's eyes stares wildly into the shadows.

Tavern setting, cluttered with wooden tables and mugs, under a low, beamed ceiling. The scene is lit by flickering candlelight, casting long, distorted shadows.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft focus background, storybook cover composition, warm earth tones with accents of gold (coins) and sickly green (surgeon's pallor).

jobs.title: The three black princesses
jobs.prompt:
A young fisherman, about 17, lean but strong, escaping a black castle. Angular face, determined blue eyes, shaggy brown hair, fair skin dirtied from travel. Wears a tattered fisherman's smock, ripped breeches, no shoes. He's leaping from a high window, one leg clearly broken, expression a mix of terror and regret.

The castle looms behind him, entirely black stone, gothic arches, strangely angled. Whisps of dark smoke rise as it begins to sink into the forest floor. Ancient gnarled trees surround the castle, clawing branches reaching. Deep twilight, the moon a sliver behind stormy clouds, casting an eerie blue light.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. Warm browns and grays dominate, accented by the blue moonlight and flecks of fiery orange from within the collapsing castle.

jobs.title: The three brothers
jobs.prompt:
Three brothers, early 20s, lean but strong builds, posed heroically. Eldest brother, square-jawed, determined eyes, dark hair; second brother, quick-witted smirk, light brown hair; youngest, intense focus, auburn hair. Blacksmith: leather apron, smudged face, powerful arms. Barber: striped shirt, clean-shaven, nimble fingers. Fencing-master: tunic, focused gaze, lightning-fast reflexes.

Fencing-master stands in a torrential downpour, broadsword blurring above his head, deflecting raindrops; brothers watch in awe. Setting: thatched-roof cottage in background, emerald green field. Golden afternoon light breaking through storm clouds, casting dramatic shadows.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background. Storybook cover composition, centered. Warm earth tones with emerald green and sky blue accents.

jobs.title: The three children of fortune
jobs.prompt:
A clever, resourceful young man, perhaps 20, with slightly mischievous eyes and a confident smirk. His hair is brown and tousled. He wears a simple tunic of tan linen, travel-worn but clean, and sturdy brown boots. He's standing in a grand, opulent palace chamber, gesturing gracefully with one hand towards a sleek black cat perched regally on a velvet cushion.

The cat, with intelligent green eyes, is mid-pounce, a captured mouse dangling from its jaws. Around them, chaos erupts: tiny mice scatter in panic, golden goblets topple, and richly dressed courtiers flee in comical terror with wide eyes and flailing arms.

The palace interior is richly detailed: red and gold tapestries, marble floors, ornate pillars. The scene is lit by warm, golden light streaming through arched windows, creating dramatic shadows and highlighting the cat as the focal point.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The three feathers
jobs.prompt: A youthful Simpleton, perhaps 17, round-faced and earnest, stands in wonder before a giant, benevolent toad. Her warty skin has a mossy, jade-like quality; she exudes warmth. Simpleton's hair is light brown, tousled from his journey underground. He wears simple homespun clothes, tunic and trousers in earth tones. The toad, adorned with lilypad-shaped jewels, gestures with a webbed hand toward an open treasure chest overflowing with shimmering carpets and rings. The underground cavern shimmers with bioluminescent fungi. Soft light emanates upwards from unseen tunnels, casting an ethereal glow on Simpleton's face. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. The color palette emphasizes warm greens and browns, accented with the jewel tones.

jobs.title: The three green twigs
jobs.prompt: A frail, elderly hermit with a long white beard, gentle face, and kind eyes, around 70 years old. Wrinkled face, light blue eyes filled with remorse, thin white hair, pale skin. Dressed in tattered brown monk's robes, clutching a gnarled, dead branch, worn wooden sandals. He kneels in a humble cave, illuminated by a flickering fire, three rough-looking robbers standing over him, softened expressions of shock and repentance on their faces. The cave is dimly lit, earthy tones, the fire casting long shadows. Golden hour lighting, warm glow from the fire contrasting with the dark corners of the cave, creating a sense of hope amidst despair. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The three languages
jobs.prompt:
A young count, appearing 20 years old, gentle face, dressed in layered forest-green wool robes, stands inside the dark stone tower. His face is uplifted and serene. Wavy auburn hair, fair skin, kind brown eyes. He is surrounded by a pack of large, spectral hounds. They are no longer threatening but nuzzling him gently.

The tower is filled with glittering gold coins overflowing from an ancient wooden chest at his feet. The only light filters in from a high window, casting a beam on the gold.

The young man understands the language of the dogs, and has freed them from their curse by retrieving the treasure. Soft, diffused lighting from above.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor with a soft bokeh background and storybook cover composition. Warm earth tones with emerald and gold accents.

jobs.title: The three little birds
jobs.prompt: A flaxen-haired Queen, mid-30s, sorrowful face, delicate bone structure, sits in a cold stone prison cell. Her dress is simple cream wool, torn at the hem, hands clasped in prayer. Through the barred window, a shaft of light illuminates dust motes dancing in the air. Outside, a tiny golden bird with a red star on its chest perches on the bars, singing mournfully. The light catches the tears on the Queen's face. Dim, candlelit interior, creating long shadows. The overall mood is somber yet hopeful. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, centered storybook cover composition, warm earth tones with gold and cream accents.

jobs.title: The three little men in the wood
jobs.prompt: A kind, fair-haired maiden, around 16, slender but strong, wearing a tattered paper dress. Her face is angelic with wide, blue eyes conveying both innocence and determination. Snowflakes cling to her golden braid and pale skin. She kneels in the snow, extending half a piece of hard bread to three tiny, bearded men. They're gnome-like, with warm, curious expressions. The most iconic moment: sharing her meager meal with the three little men in the snowy woods. The setting is a clearing blanketed in deep snow, sunlight glinting off the pristine surface near a tiny, snow-covered cottage with warmly lit windows, hinting at magic within. Key light from the left, creating long dancing shadows, soft golden fill. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. Warm earth tones with accents of gold and winter blues.

jobs.title: The three sluggards
jobs.prompt: Three adolescent princes, identical except for their expressions — bored, complacent, resigned; lounging in a royal bedchamber. Round faces, hazel eyes, light brown tousled hair, fair skin. Sumptuous velvet robes in deep reds, greens, and blues; gold embroidery detail on collars and cuffs. The youngest prince stands on a small wooden stool, a hangman's noose loosely around his neck, eyes half-closed; a gleaming silver knife dangles from his limp hand. Ornate four-poster bed with heavy brocade curtains; stone walls, tapestry hanging. Morning light streams through a tall arched window, illuminating dust motes dancing in the air. Golden hour, soft shadows. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The three snake-leaves
jobs.prompt:
A young king, appearing 20s, lean but strong build stands over his dead queen in a stone crypt.
His face is gaunt, shadowed with grief, hazel eyes wide with desperate hope. His dark hair is disheveled, pale skin reflects the dim light.
He wears a simple tunic of rough wool over his royal attire, the fabric stained with dirt and tears.

In his hand, he holds a vibrant green snake leaf. He is carefully placing it on the lips of the queen. Her gown of rich blue velvet is stained with the pallor of death.
Two other leaves lie on her closed eyelids.
A revived snake slithers away in the background.

Dim light filters through cracks in the vaulted ceiling. Stone walls are damp with moisture, four guttering candles on a nearby stone table.

Key light from above, warm fill light, a hopeful, desperate mood.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The three spinners
jobs.prompt:
A young, relieved but nervous blonde bride in her early twenties, round face, wide blue eyes, fair skin, stands at her wedding feast. She wears a simple but elegant gown of ivory linen, long flowing sleeves, delicate floral embroidery at the neckline, with a wildflower crown. With a hopeful yet anxious expression, she gestures warmly towards three peculiar-looking women seated at the banquet table: one with a broad, flat foot, another with a grotesquely large hanging lip, and the third with a massive, misshapen thumb.

The bridegroom, a handsome but bewildered prince in gold brocade, stares at the women with open disgust and shock. The wedding scene is set in a grand castle hall, tapestries hanging on the walls, long wooden tables laden with food, golden goblets, and flickering candles. Soft, warm, golden-hour light streams through arched windows, casting long shadows and highlighting the textures of the fabrics and stone. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The true bride
jobs.prompt:
A slender girl, around 16, with delicate features, stands frozen in awe. Her face is oval, with wide, expressive blue eyes reflecting both wonder and trepidation. Long, wavy golden hair cascades down her back, partially covering her simple, patched dress of roughspun brown fabric. The dress is cinched at the waist with a thin rope.

She stands at the entrance to a magnificent castle. The key scene depicts her stepmother falling down the stairs into the cellar.

The setting is the castle's grand hall, late afternoon. Warm sunlight streams through arched windows, illuminating dust motes dancing in the air. Walls are draped with rich red velvet.

Golden light pours in highlighting the scene, a secondary warm, candle-like light fills the cellar depth, implying something ominous lurking below.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, classic storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The turnip
jobs.prompt:
A young farmer, early 20s, thin but strong, with dirt smudged on his cheek. Oval face, hopeful blue eyes, and messy straw-colored hair. Wearing a simple linen tunic, patched brown trousers, and leather sandals, he proudly stands beside an enormous turnip.

The turnip, bigger than him, rests in a wooden cart pulled by two sturdy oxen with flower garlands. He is presenting a gift of this vegetable monstrosity to the King.

Setting: The royal courtyard of a medieval castle, midday. The sun shines on the cobblestones. In the background, there is the main gate, soldiers standing at attention.

Lighting: Warm sunlight casting long shadows; a touch of whimsical magic. The King stands at top of the steps, a red carpet running to the bottom of the steps.

Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The twelve apostles
jobs.prompt: A radiant young boy, no older than seven, angelic face, leading a weary, teenage Peter into a shimmering crystal cave. Peter, tall and gaunt with kind eyes, brown hair, and tanned skin, clutches his stomach in hunger, his face etched with exhaustion. He wears a homespun tunic of rough, earth-toned fabric, travel-worn and patched. The boy, bathed in golden light, gestures toward twelve ornate cradles lined up in the cavern. The cave walls glitter with veins of gold and silver. Light streams down from an unseen opening in the cavern ceiling. Soft, diffused light emanates from the cradles, illuminating the scene with gentle warmth. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor illustration, soft bokeh background, centered storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The twelve brothers
jobs.prompt: A teenage princess, fair-skinned with a worried expression, stands in a shadowy forest clearing. Her face is oval-shaped, with wide, earnest blue eyes. Lustrous golden hair cascades down her shoulders, accentuating the golden star emblazoned on her forehead. She wears a simple homespun dress, accented with a royal blue cloak. Twelve white lilies are clutched in her hands. Around her, eleven ravens take flight, their black wings contrasting against the dappled sunlight filtering through the dense canopy. A weathered, vine-covered cottage crumbles behind her, disappearing into the mist. Key light streams from above, illuminating the princess and the lilies, casting long, dramatic shadows. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The twelve huntsmen
jobs.prompt:
A slender, androgynous maiden, appearing as a handsome young huntsman, perhaps 17, with a determined air. Her face is oval, with wide, intelligent hazel eyes. Her dark auburn hair is neatly tucked under a hunter's cap, a few stray strands framing her face. She has fair skin with a dusting of freckles.

Dressed in a tailored forest-green huntsman's tunic of brushed wool, brown leather breeches, and high boots. A silver ring gleams on her finger; a hunting horn hangs at her hip.

The key moment: collapsed in a forest clearing, seemingly unconscious, as the King kneels beside her, removing her glove to reveal the tell-tale ring. His expression changes from concern to shock as he recognizes her. She appears pale but still beautiful.

Setting: sun-dappled clearing in a deep, ancient forest with towering trees and dappled shadows. This happens during a royal hunt with fallen leaves blanketing the ground.

Lighting: soft, diffused light filtering through the forest canopy, with a warm, golden glow on the King's face and a cooler, dappled light on the maiden.

Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The twelve idle servants
jobs.prompt:
Twelve young male servants, ranging in age from late teens to mid-20s, sprawled haphazardly on a grassy verge. Faces are round and expressive, with mismatched eye colors reflecting diverse personalities; hair is tousled and unkempt, in shades of brown, black and sandy blonde; skin tones vary from fair to tanned. Wardrobe: loose-fitting tunics and trousers of coarse linen, in faded earth tones—brown, tan, olive green—some torn or stained; several wear simple leather belts or carry small, useless tools.

Key Scene: Tenth servant sprawled on roadside, leg trapped under wheel of overturned wooden cart, wincing slightly, while midges swarm lazily around his face. Setting: rural lane near wheat field at midday, under a hazy sun. Atmospheric details: golden shafts of sunlight through dusty air, lazy insects, distant farmhouse. Lighting: soft, diffuse sunlight, with warm fill light illuminating the servants' faces, creating a hazy, dreamlike quality.

Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition, with a warm color palette dominated by golden yellows and muted greens.

jobs.title: The two brothers
jobs.prompt: Identical twin boys, age 6, fair skin, dressed in simple brown tunics, one with a smudge of soot on his cheek. Round faces, wide blue eyes filled with bittersweet emotion, light blonde tousled hair. Holding roasted golden bird, two bites taken out of it. Overgrown kitchen scene, stone hearth. The wife, middle-aged, stout, dressed simple brown dress. The woman is noticing that bird is missing pieces. Candlelight casting long shadows, firelight reflecting in children's eyes and off golden bird. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The two kings' children
jobs.prompt: A youthful, flaxen-haired prince, around 16, sits dejectedly amidst a vast, newly cleared forest, glass axe shattered at his feet. His face, smudged with dirt, is framed by choppy blonde locks; his blue eyes reflect despair. He wears a simple tunic of forest green linen, torn at the sleeves, and brown leather leggings. The youngest princess, a kind girl with auburn braids and gentle brown eyes, comforts him. She wears a rustic dress of woven beige fabric, sleeves rolled up, a knotted white handkerchief clutched in her hand. Around them, tiny earth-workers, gnomes with ruddy cheeks and brown tunics, scurry to gather wood. Golden sunlight streams laterally through the remaining trees, creating dappled shadows across the ground. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The two travellers
jobs.prompt: A young, slender tailor, no older than 20, with newly restored eyesight, stands beneath a gallows, his patched brown coat slightly askew. His face, framed by wavy auburn hair, is upturned with an awestruck expression, bright emerald eyes wide with wonder. He clutches a dew-soaked handkerchief in his hand. The gallows looms behind him, silhouetted against the pre-dawn sky, a crow perched atop each hanged man. Dewdrops glisten on the gallows wood. In the distance, the golden-domed capital city rises from the misty plain, its many towers catching the first light of dawn. Soft, cold color palette with hints of sunrise pink. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The ungrateful son
jobs.prompt: A gaunt man, early 40s, recoils in horror as a glistening, enormous toad leaps onto his face, its warts gleaming. Sunken eyes, unshaven, dirty fingernails. Coarse homespun tunic, stained with grease. Half-eaten roast chicken lies discarded on a wooden table, overturned clay mug spills water. Weathered cottage doorway, twilight casting long shadows. Light from within the cottage illuminates the scene. Ominous dark forest looms in the background. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. Golden hour lighting, accentuated shadows, warm and cool contrast highlighting the toad.

jobs.title: The valiant little tailor
jobs.prompt: A young, wiry tailor, no older than 20, with a confident smirk, stands on a felled oak tree branch; broad shoulders, determined posture. Round face, bright hazel eyes, neatly combed light-brown hair, fair skin. He wears a simple but well-made brown woolen tunic, a leather belt prominently displaying "Seven at one blow!" in bold letters, and sturdy boots. The giant stands below him, struggling to carry the massive trunk, a look of bewildered frustration on his face. Lush green forest surrounding them, dappled sunlight filtering through the leaves. Key light from above, warm and inviting. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, vibrant earth tones with accents of cherry red from the nearby cherry tree, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The water-nix
jobs.prompt: A distraught, thin young girl, age 9, and her brother, age 7, fleeing the water nix; ragged clothes, bare feet, terrified expressions. The girl, Gretel, has shoulder-length tangled brown hair and tear-streaked fair skin. The boy, Hans, wears tattered breeches and a matted blonde bowl cut. Gretel throws a large, ornate hand mirror behind them, creating a towering, shimmering, and impossible glassy mountain. The water nix, a grotesque woman with seaweed hair and jagged teeth, desperately tries to climb the mirror mountain. Setting: a dark, mossy forest at twilight, with the ominous well visible in the background. Key light from a full moon breaks through the trees. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, storybook cover composition, soft bokeh background. Accents of emerald green and sapphire blue.

jobs.title: The water of life
jobs.prompt: A youthful prince, no older than seventeen, lean but strong, a smudge of dirt on his cheek, determined expression. Round, kind face, bright blue eyes wide with urgency, tousled auburn hair, fair skin. Travel-worn tunic of forest green linen, simple brown leather belt, a silver cup clutched in one hand, a piece of his heel bloodied. He bursts through an iron gate just as it slams shut behind him, the castle looming in the background. Cobblestone courtyard, predawn twilight, mist swirling around the castle walls, ominous shadows. Dramatic backlighting from the castle interior, rim lighting on the prince, cool moonlight filtering through the mist. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The wedding of Mrs. Fox
jobs.prompt: A slender, elegant Mrs. Fox, appearing around 30 years old, stands dramatically in a lavish parlor. Her face is heart-shaped with cunning green eyes. Her auburn hair is styled in elegant waves. She has fair skin with a hint of blush. She wears a rich, crimson velvet gown with a long train, trimmed with black lace, and ornate gold jewelry. In a dramatic pose, she gestures dismissively toward the dust-covered corpse of Old Mr. Fox being swept out the window by Miss Cat, a fluffy tabby. A handsome, young fox with bright eyes and red stockings waits eagerly at the doorway. The parlor is richly decorated with dark wood furniture and features a leaded-glass window. It is late afternoon with golden sunlight streaming through the window, illuminating dust motes. The overall mood is mischievous and triumphant. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The white bride and the black one
jobs.prompt: A beautiful young woman named White Bride, appearing around 18, with long flowing pale blonde hair, bright blue eyes reflecting innocence and a fair porcelain skin tone. She wears a tattered grey gown, previously golden, her expression a mix of shock and betrayal as she's forcefully pushed from a horse-drawn carriage. The Black Bride, cloaked in a stolen golden dress, sneers triumphantly, her dark hair contrasting with her coal-black skin. Setting: A rickety wooden bridge spanning a murky, deep river at dusk, the sky tinged with ominous oranges and purples. Key light from the setting sun casts long shadows, accentuating the drama. Black carriage, strong horses. Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, centered storybook cover composition, warm earth tones contrasted with cool blues of the water, emphasize fear, trickery and hope.

jobs.title: The white snake
jobs.prompt: A handsome young traveler, no older than 18, with a kind but determined face. Almond-shaped face, warm brown eyes reflecting both courage and empathy, tousled dark brown hair, sun-kissed skin. He wears simple tan leather jerkin, brown tunic, and sturdy travel boots. Around his neck hangs a leather pouch. He kneels on a sandy shore, gently returning three shimmering silver fish to the turquoise sea. The gratitude in the fishes' eyes is palpable. Golden sunlight streams across the scene, highlighting the glistening scales and the rippling water. The background features a distant, majestic city with spires and towers. Soft, hand-painted watercolor, Studio Ghibli style, painterly soft bokeh background. A storybook cover composition, evoking kindness and adventure, with warm earth tones accented by shimmering turquoise and gold.

jobs.title: The wilful child
jobs.prompt: A pale, gaunt girl, about 10, with long, unruly blonde hair, in a simple white burial shroud. Her lifeless face with closed eyes, small upturned freckled nose. From a freshly covered grave, her slender arm reaches desperately upward, fingers straining towards the faint light. The muddy graveyard at twilight, looming tombstones casting long shadows. Overcast sky, hint of a waning moon breaking through the clouds. Cold, eerie light from above, casting stark shadows on her face and hand. Soft, warm fill light from an unseen source illuminates the freshly turned earth. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The willow-wren
jobs.prompt:
A tiny, brown, almost weightless willow-wren, the self-proclaimed king of the birds. Smooth, round face, gleaming black eyes, ruffled brown head feathers, pale yellow beak. Wearing a mock crown of woven grass, clutched askew on his head. Crouching inside a dark mouse hole, gazing upward with a triumphant sly expression. The moment he proclaims "I am King!" after winning the contest.

Setting: a grassy meadow at twilight. Long shadows cast by thickets of thorny bushes, illuminated by the warm golden light of the setting sun. Scattered wildflowers and tangled roots around the mouth of the hole.

Lighting: dramatic chiaroscuro, warm golden backlight accentuating his small form against the darkness, creating a sense of intrigue. 

Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor illustration, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The willow-wren and the bear
jobs.prompt: A stout, contrite brown bear, large-pawed and ashamed, kneels before a willow-wren's nest. Five fluffy, wide-eyed baby willow-wrens, no bigger than berries, peer down from their woven nest, beaks slightly agape. Their faces are stern, but softened by downy feathers. The nest, woven from twigs and moss, is nestled within the crook of an ancient oak. The surrounding forest is filled with dappled sunlight, highlighting the verdant leaves. A golden gnat hovers nearby, its stinger glinting mischievously. Key moment: The bear begs forgiveness, eyes downcast, embodying remorse. Warm morning light filters through the leaves, creating a peaceful yet triumphant atmosphere. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition, warm earth tones accented by the bright yellow of the gnat.

jobs.title: The wise servant
jobs.prompt:
A young boy named John, about 12 years old, slim build, tousled brown hair, mischievous grin

Round face, bright blue eyes sparkling with cunning, freckled cheeks, light skin tone

Worn brown tunic of coarse wool, patched at the elbows, simple leather belt, bare feet, holds a makeshift bird snare of woven grass

John chases a blackbird across a golden field under late afternoon sun, another blackbird perched on a nearby fencepost, the third flies overhead

Rolling hills dotted with wildflowers behind him, distant farmhouse with a smoking chimney in the background, a meandering dirt path, clear blue sky

Warm, diffused sunlight from the left, casting long shadows, fill light creates a cheerful, pastoral mood, golden hour

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition

jobs.title: The Wishing-Table, the Gold-Ass, and the Cudgel in the Sack
jobs.prompt:
A handsome young journeyman, no older than 18, with a kind face, pauses on his journey. He possesses strong, capable hands and a confident stance. His face is framed by tousled brown hair and bright, inquisitive blue eyes. He wears a practical but well-made woolen tunic in forest green, with leather bracers, and sturdy traveling boots. A simple satchel hangs at his side. The journeyman has just spoken the words, "Little table, spread thyself!"

The key moment: The small wooden table before him is instantly covered with a pristine white cloth, gleaming silverware, and steaming dishes piled high with roasts and stews. The setting : a cozy yet crowded roadside inn, the common room bustling with hungry travelers. Candlelight bathes the center of the room in a warm glow, with soft shadows dancing on the wainscoted walls.

Rendering style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The wolf and the fox
jobs.prompt:
A slender, russet-furred fox, small and quick, mid-leap towards freedom. Alert, clever face, amber eyes glinting with cunning. Bushy tail streaming behind. Wearing a simple, earth-toned tunic. The rotund grey wolf, trapped in a wooden cellar window, hindquarters protruding, helpless. An angry farmer, red-faced, wielding a thick wooden cudgel. The cellar is dimly lit by a single shaft of sunlight through a grimy window. Salty barrels of meat stacked haphazardly. Splintered wood and spilled brine underfoot. The fox escapes the cellar, leaving the overstuffed wolf to his fate. Early morning light, cool shadows, suspenseful mood.
Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The wolf and the man
jobs.prompt: Muscular grey wolf, mid-leap, teeth bared in a snarl, crimson blood splattering his fur near his muzzle and flanks. The wolf's face is contorted in a mix of rage and pain. A hunter, middle-aged, broad-shouldered, with a determined expression and weathered face, clad in forest-green wool tunic and brown leather jerkin, aims a flintlock rifle. He stands his ground in a dense forest of towering pines, dappled sunlight filtering through the canopy. Autumn leaves are scattered across the forest floor. Key light from the right highlighting the hunter; softer fill light from the left illuminating the wolf's snarling face. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition, warm earthy tones with crimson and forest green accents.

jobs.title: The wolf and the seven young kids
jobs.prompt: A mother goat, gentle face, around 40, with kind brown eyes, stands protectively over her seven young kids, each no older than seven years, various shades of brown and white fur. The kids huddle close to her, expressions of fear and anticipation on their small faces. They wear simple tunics in muted earth tones. The key scene: the wolf, mid-leap with a menacing snarl, bursting through the cottage door. His fur is dark grey and his eyes gleam with hunger. Key light comes starkly from the open doorway, highlighting the wolf. Fill light from the warm cottage. Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Conall Yellowclaw

jobs.title: Connla and the Fairy Maiden

Her face is ethereal, framed by long, flowing golden hair, pale skin, and eyes that shimmer with otherworldly light. jobs.title: Jack the Cunning Thief
jobs.prompt:

jobs.title: Jack The Giant-killer
jobs.prompt:

Brown, tousled hair flies back from his brow. He wears a simple tunic of coarse linen, earth-toned, patched breeches, and leather boots. In his hand, a pickaxe raised high, ready to strike.

Below him, the immense Giant Cormoran flounders in the pit, roaring in disbelief and pain. The scene: dawn on a craggy Cornish mountaintop. Wisps of fog cling to the ground. The giant's crude cave looms in the background.

A smug, round Johnny-cake, the size of a dinner plate, mid-leap, small arms flailing—golden brown crust, crumbly texture. Fox, sly expression, ginger fur, sharp teeth, crouches low beside a weathered wooden fence. Johnny-cake leans close to the fox, shouting, mouth agape."I've outrun everyone!"

Dusty country road setting—midday sun, wispy clouds, rural farmland in the distance. Warm sunlight bathes the scene highlighting the Johnny-cake's puffed-up pride and the fox's cunning. Greens and browns of the landscape, with a pop of golden yellow from the Johnny-cake.

jobs.title: Kate Crackernuts
jobs.prompt:
A determined Kate Crackernuts, age 16, strong and clever, clad in practical brown woolens, apron overflowing with nuts, kneels beside a royal four-poster bed. She offers a bite of a golden cooked bird to the pale, handsome prince, age 18, dark wavy hair, blue eyes now sparkling with returning health. He's propped up on pillows, reaching eagerly.

Dust motes dance in warm light streaming from a leaded-glass window overlooking castle grounds. The room is stone and wood, with tapestries hinting at grandeur. Key light from window, fill light from hearth.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: King O'Toole and His Goose
jobs.prompt:
A stout, elderly King O'Toole, ruddy-cheeked and white-bearded, stands in awe. His face is round and expressive, eyes wide with disbelief. He wears a deep green, homespun wool tunic, accented with Celtic knot embroidery in gold thread. A simple gold torc adorns his neck. The goose, renewed and radiant, white feathers gleaming, soars joyfully overhead, wings outstretched.

Saint Kavin, youthful and beardless with kind, light-blue eyes and short brown hair, stands beside the king, a hand raised in blessing. He's dressed in simple brown monk's robes.

The scene unfolds on the shore of a misty, sun-dappled lake, nestled amidst rolling green hills of ancient Ireland. Key light from the rising sun casts long shadows and illuminates the goose.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Lazy Jack
jobs.prompt:
Lazy Jack, a teenage boy, muscular build from farm work, grinning mischievously. Round face, hazel eyes sparkling with amusement, tousled brown hair, sun-kissed skin. Wears patched homespun breeches, a linen shirt. He's carrying a donkey on his shoulders, its legs comically sticking straight up.

The key moment: Jack is passing the window of a grand manor house, causing its deaf/mute inhabitant to burst into laughter. The young woman has a heart-shaped face, wide blue eyes filled with joyous tears, golden blonde hair cascading down her shoulders, fair skin. She wears a refined dress of emerald green velvet.

Setting: a sunny cobblestone street in a quaint village, midday, bright.

Lighting: warm, golden sunlight illuminating Jack and the laughing girl, soft shadows, high contrast.

Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Master Of All Masters
jobs.prompt:
A frightened young servant girl, about 17, with wide eyes and tousled brown hair framing a round face with rosy cheeks, fair skin, stands in a simple linen nightgown, clutching it at the neck; her eyes are fixed on the absurdly dressed "Master of All Masters," an elderly man with a comically oversized nightcap that is falling off his head.

He's leaping from his bed ("barnacle") in a panic, his striped pantaloon-like garments ("squibs and crackers") askew; the family cat ("white-faced simminy"), a small, fluffy white kitten, is dashing around his feet, its tail ablaze; behind them, the quaint cottage ("high topper mountain") is beginning to glow with ruddy light from a growing fire ("hot cockalorum").

The scene is set in a cozy, slightly cramped bedroom with exposed wooden beams; a bucket of water ("pondalorum") sits nearby. Soft, warm candlelight flickers across the room, casting long shadows.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition, warm earth tones with accents of fiery red and white.

jobs.title: Molly Whuppie
jobs.prompt:
Molly Whuppie, around 10 years old, small but bold, bright eyes hinting at cleverness. Round face, freckled cheeks, messy copper hair escaping her braid, fair skin. Wearing a simple homespun dress of brown wool, patched but clean, cinched with a woven belt. A stolen gold ring glints on her finger.

Iconic scene on the "Bridge of One Hair": Molly, laughing triumphantly, leaps across the chasm, ring held high. The frustrated giant thwarted on the opposite side, massive and enraged.

Setting: A rickety bridge constructed of a single log spans a deep ravine, mist swirling below. Late afternoon, dappled sunlight filtering through the dense forest. Mossy rocks and tangled roots line the ravine walls.

Lighting: Golden hour, sunlight accentuating Molly's victory and casting long shadows. Soft, diffused light creates a mystical atmosphere.
Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, creating a focus on Molly's form. Warm earth tones with accents of gold. Storybook cover composition, centered on Molly, with the giant looming menacingly behind her.

jobs.title: Morraha
jobs.prompt: A youthful Morraha, early 20s, stands defiant yet anxious on a windswept beach, facing the Slender Red Champion. Morraha has a strong build, dark hair, and determined eyes. The Champion, eternally youthful, has a mischievous glint, long red hair, and pale skin. Morraha wears simple homespun breeches and a tunic in muted earth tones. The Red Champion is adorned in vibrant green and red, with a golden torc around his neck. The pivotal moment: the Champion gestures dramatically after winning their card game, placing the geas on Morraha. The beach stretches behind them, with the Champion's small green currach pulled ashore. Dark clouds gather ominously overhead. Key light comes from the setting sun, casting long shadows and an eerie golden glow. Soft, Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor with gentle bokeh and a storybook cover layout.

jobs.title: Mouse And Mouser
jobs.prompt: A plump, brown house mouse stands on its hind legs, small paws clasped anxiously, beady eyes wide with terror. Her face is round, whiskers twitching, with a frightened expression. Warm, golden light from the hearth creates long shadows. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Mr. Fox
jobs.prompt:
Lady Mary, a curious young noblewoman, early twenties, slender build, approaching Mr. Fox's castle. Her face is delicate, hazel eyes wide with apprehension, strawberry blonde hair in loose curls. Wardrobe: a travel-stained, deep green velvet gown, long flowing sleeves, a brown leather belt with a small pouch.

Key scene: Mary hesitantly peers into the castle gateway where a chilling inscription is carved into the stone. Setting: the imposing stone gate of Mr. Fox's dark, isolated castle, surrounded by a murky moat and gnarled trees, overcast daylight.

Lighting: diffused light filtering through the clouds, creating a somber atmosphere. Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Mr. Miacca

Tommy, having been caught by Mr. Miacca, craftily offers to fetch Mrs. Miacca pudding from his mother, eyes wide with feigned innocence, gesturing back towards the village. Mr. and Mrs. Miacca's dark cottage doorway looms behind him. Tangled rose bushes climb the walls. Late afternoon sun casts long shadows across the dusty lane. Golden light catches the apple in his hand. Soft, diffused light illuminates Tommy's face. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Mr. Vinegar

The most iconic moment: In the foreground, Mr. Vinegar is mid-throw, having just flung his walking stick at a bright green parrot perched high in a gnarled oak tree. The parrot squawks with laughter.

The edge of a dark, tangled forest. Late afternoon, golden hour lighting filtering through the trees.

Warm, diffused key light from the setting sun, casting long shadows. Soft, warm fill light.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, centered composition.

jobs.title: Munachar and Manachar
jobs.prompt:
A frustrated Munachar, a wiry young man around 20 with sun-weathered skin, stands knee-deep in a rushing river, holding a large, leaky sieve. Scattered around him are bits of glistening red clay.

In the air above, a black crow caws, "Daub! Daub!" Munachar squints up at it, a glimmer of hope in his wide blue eyes. The riverbank is lush with ferns and moss-covered stones.

Late afternoon sunlight filters through the canopy, casting dappled shadows and highlighting the golden-brown water. A Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor illustration, with soft bokeh background and centered storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Nix Nought Nothing

The sky is turbulent, reflecting the chaos of the moment. Key light comes from the setting sun behind them, casting long shadows, while the wave is illuminated from within by the flask's magic. jobs.title: The Ass, The Table, And The Stick

jobs.title: The Black Horse
jobs.prompt:

jobs.title: The Cat And The Mouse

jobs.title: The Farmer of Liddesdale
jobs.prompt:
A weathered farmer of Liddesdale, mid-50s, muscular build evident under simple homespun clothes, looks on in dismay. The heart of the scene focuses on the overflowing bundle, ready to burst. The field of golden wheat stretching to the horizon.

jobs.title: The Fate of the Children of Lir
jobs.prompt: Fingula, a swan with a sorrowful young woman’s face, around 16, pale skin, framed by long tangled white feathers. Crystal blue eyes, long neck curved gracefully. jobs.title: The Field of Boliauns

jobs.title: The Fish And The Ring
jobs.prompt:
A radiant, young woman, around 18, with graceful bearing, stands in a grand castle hall. Her face is oval-shaped, with wide, intelligent hazel eyes and a hopeful expression. Her auburn hair is pulled back in a simple braid. She has fair skin with a hint of rose.

Key light from the windows illuminates the girl's face and the ring, creating a hopeful, almost miraculous mood, painted in a hand-painted, Studio Ghibli-inspired watercolor style, soft bokeh background, storybook illustration style.

jobs.title: The Golden Arm

jobs.title: The History Of Tom Thumb

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor illustration, soft bokeh, storybook cover. Predominantly warm earth tones with accents of blue (eyes) and silver.

jobs.title: The Horned Women

jobs.title: The Lad with the Goat-skin

Hand-painted watercolor illustration in a Studio Ghibli style; soft bokeh background; centered composition suitable for a storybook cover.

jobs.title: The Laidly Worm Of Spindleston Heugh

jobs.title: The Leeching of Kayn's Leg.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Legend of Knockgrafton.
