He wears a brand-new, well-tailored suit of earthy green tweed, accented by a perky yellow waistcoat and brown leather boots. He holds his old straw hat, still adorned with a foxglove sprig.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Magpie's Nest

Sunny afternoon light filters through the branches of a blossoming apple tree. A partially completed, mud-and-twig nest sits center stage with scattered feathers. A bokeh background of soft-focused green leaves and warm sunlight. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Master And His Pupil

A terrified young boy, about 13, thin build, pale skin, wide eyes. Round face, light brown tousled hair, sweat-drenched. Wearing a simple linen tunic, soaked and clinging to his body. He clutches the edge of an ancient wooden table, water up to his chin, eyes wide with panic.

The black magic book, open on the table beside him, glows faintly. A monstrous, fiery demon, Beelzebub, hulking and muscular, looms behind him, pouring a massive barrel of water over a potted geranium.

The scene is the master's study: stone walls, dark wood furniture. Water floods the room, swirling with magical energy.

Golden light from a high window illuminates the boy's face, while the demon is lit with hellish red light.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Old Woman And Her Pig

A kind-faced old woman, perhaps 70, round-bodied and spry, with a toothless grin. Her face is wrinkled with mirth, sparkling blue eyes peeking from beneath a white lace bonnet. Key scene: The old woman beams as the piglet, finally frightened, leaps over the mossy wooden stile. All the characters from the story are in a line leading to the pig.

Setting: A lush, green meadow bordering a farm at twilight, golden sunlight casting long shadows.

Lighting: Warm, golden hour light from the setting sun. Soft bokeh background.

Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Red Ettin
jobs.prompt:
A youthful, determined boy, perhaps 16, stands bravely before a grotesque Red Ettin. The Ettin has three menacing heads, each with cruel eyes and sharp teeth. The boy is wiry but resolute, with a mop of brown hair and a smattering of freckles across his nose. He wears simple homespun clothes, a brown tunic over tan breeches. In his hand, he holds a glowing, magical wand.

The scene: the interior of the Ettin's stone castle, a vast, shadowy kitchen. The Red Ettin looms, ready to pounce, its massive form filling the frame. One head sneers, preparing to ask its riddle. The boy's face is lit with fierce courage, as he prepares to answer.

Warm, flickering firelight dances on the stone walls. The overall mood is tense, but hopeful. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Ridere of Riddles.
jobs.prompt:
A handsome young man, the "Hero of the White Shield", around 20, with a strong build and determined eyes. Oval face, piercing blue eyes, wavy dark brown hair, fair skin. He wears a crimson tunic of fine wool, adorned with silver embroidery, over sturdy brown leather leggings, and a gleaming white shield emblazoned with a silver stag.
He stands triumphant, holding aloft the severed heads of three grotesque giants, grimacing in pain even in death. Gnarled, green skin, tusks, and matted black hair.
Setting: The stone steps leading to the Knight of Riddles' castle, late afternoon, a chilling wind. In the distance you can see a village.
Lighting: Dramatic key light from the setting sun, casting long shadows and highlighting the gore, with a cool, soft fill light from the overcast sky.
Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Rose-tree
jobs.prompt: A sorrowful, fair-skinned girl, around 6 years old, with cherry lips and long golden hair cascading down her back, kneels in a lush garden. Her sapphire eyes are filled with tears as she embraces a rose-tree covered in fragrant, blooming flowers. At the base of the tree, a simple wooden box is partially visible, hinting at a hidden secret. Soft, diffused sunlight filters through the leaves, creating dappled patterns of light and shadow. A Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. Warm earth tones dominate, with accents of rose pink and sky blue in the blossoms and sky.

jobs.title: The Russet Dog
jobs.prompt: A clever, russet-furred fox, mid-leap—lithe and cunning. Sharp face, intelligent amber eyes gleaming with mischief, black-tipped ears perked, a sly grin revealing pointed teeth. A plump Rhode Island Red hen, squawking and flapping its wings in alarm, mid-air, scattering feathers. The russet dog's jaws stretched wide, about to snatch the hen. A rustic farmyard: weathered wooden fence, scattered straw, a glimpse of a red barn in the background. Golden hour sunlight bathing the scene. Focus on the fox's triumphant, predatory energy. Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. Warm earth tones with splashes of red and gold.

jobs.title: The Sea-Maiden
jobs.prompt:
A handsome young man named "Son," around twenty, muscular build, with a brave expression. Face is square-jawed and tan, eyes are bright blue, hair is dark brown and neatly cut, skin is lightly freckled. He wears a simple but sturdy tunic of woven wool, dyed forest green, with brown leather breeches, and carries a massive, gleaming silver sword.

The scene depicts the moment Son confronts the giant Hi! Haw!! Hogaraich!!! in the grassy park -- sword raised high, ready to strike. The giant is hulking and monstrous, roaring fiercely.

Setting is set in a green glen, on the giant's land, during the late afternoon. Light filters through the trees, creating dappled patterns on the grass. Golden hour.

Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Shee an Gannon and the Gruagach Gaire
jobs.prompt:
A youthful, wiry Shee an Gannon, appearing no older than 18, battles a five-headed giant in a chaotic woodland clearing. Shee an Gannon's face is determined, eyes glinting with emerald fire; tousled dark hair frames a square jaw. He wears patched leather armor over a green tunic, a sheathed knife at his hip. The five-headed giant, massive and grotesque, roars in fury, limbs flailing. One head bites harmlessly at the hero's leg.

The enchanted forest setting features looming, ancient trees, apple blossoms scattered on the mossy ground. Mid-afternoon sunlight filters through golden leaves. The light catches the spray of dirt kicked up in the struggle, illuminating wild grasses.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, centered composition for a storybook cover, warm earth tones with vibrant greens and splashes of apple red.

jobs.title: The Shepherd of Myddvai
jobs.prompt: A handsome, heartbroken Welsh shepherd in his late 20s kneels at the edge of Lyn y Fan Fach, the Black Mountains looming behind him. He has kind, hazel eyes, a cleanly-shaven face, and dark brown hair. He wears a homespun wool tunic in earth tones and leather sandals. In the grey, pre-dawn light, he reaches out to his beautiful wife as she rises from the lake mists, returning home. She is pale and ethereal, with long, dark hair cascading down her back. Her blue eyes are filled with sorrow as she calls her magical herd of cows, oxen, and a bull from the lake, the spectral animals gathering around her. A faint plough furrow marks the mountainside. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Sprightly Tailor
jobs.prompt: A young, wiry tailor, about 25, with quick, darting eyes, mid-stitch on elaborate trews. Narrow face, focused expression, brown hair escaping his cap, fair skin. He wears a practical brown wool tunic, leather apron, spectacles perched on his nose, thimble glinting on his finger. He glances up in alarm at a colossal, spectral hand smashing through a stone wall. The tailor is silhouetted against the dark interior of a ruined church, moonlight streaming through broken windows, illuminating dust motes. Candlelight flickers on his workbench, casting long shadows. Stone walls, crumbling arches, overgrown with ivy. Cool blues and greens mix with warm candle glow, suggesting a haunted but hopeful atmosphere. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor style, soft bokeh background, optimized for storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Story of Deirdre
jobs.prompt: Sixteen-year-old Deirdre, fair-skinned with a blush, stands at the door of a cozy, hidden bothy. Her face is heart-shaped, with large, expressive emerald-green eyes, and long flowing auburn hair. She wears a hand-spun woolen dress in earthy browns and greens, a simple silver torc around her neck, and a look of both curiosity and apprehension. She's just opened the wooden door to a snow-dusted clearing revealing a weary, fur-clad hunter, his expression hopeful. The interior is lit by a warm hearth fire, casting shadows on the rough-hewn walls. Outside, snow-covered hills rise in the background under a dark, stormy sky. Soft, diffused light from the doorway illuminates Deirdre's face, creating a sense of wonder and trepidation. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Story of the McAndrew Family
jobs.prompt: A stout, bewildered-looking Con McAndrew, perhaps 25, with a round face, stands crestfallen in a field, hazel eyes wide with disbelief. His red hair is tousled. He wears a simple linen shirt, open at the neck, and brown wool breeches. He clutches a shattered, gilded keg. Six equally bewildered brothers surround him, gesturing wildly. From the broken keg, a startled hare leaps into the golden light of an Irish meadow at sunset. The rolling green hills of County Mayo stretch into a soft-focus distance. Key light from the low sun illuminates the foreground, casting long shadows. Storybook cover in a Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor style, warm earth tones with accents of gold and emerald green.

jobs.title: The Story Of The Three Bears
jobs.prompt:
A wrinkled, stout old woman with beady eyes, about 60, caught mid-air tumbling from a quaint bedroom window. She wears a tattered brown dress, patched shawl, and mismatched stockings. Her gray hair is disheveled, face contorted in a comical expression of shock and panic.

Three bears—Papa Bear (large and imposing), Mama Bear (matronly), and Baby Bear (small and cute)—stand inside the room, aghast. Papa Bear is scowling, Mama Bear looks surprised, Baby Bear points with a paw.

The bedroom has walls of warm wood, with three beds in different sizes. Light streams in through the window, illuminating dust motes. Outside, a lush yet wild forest can be seen, hinting at the unknown.

Overhead shot, vibrant and whimsical with golden hour lighting. A Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor illustration. Soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. dominant warm earth tones with forest green accents.

jobs.title: The Story Of The Three Little Pigs
jobs.prompt: A clever, stout young pig, about 8 years old, stands triumphantly over a large, bubbling cauldron—rosy cheeks, bright intelligent eyes, bristly blonde hair, and a determined expression. He's wearing blue overalls over a white shirt. The wolf, a comically large and singed figure, plunges headfirst into the pot, paws flailing. Inside the brick house's cozy kitchen, warm firelight dances on the walls, casting long shadows. The hearth is lined with colorful ceramic tiles. Steam rises from the cauldron. Golden light from the fire illuminates the pig's face. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Story-Teller at Fault
jobs.prompt: A weary, middle-aged Irish storyteller with a worried expression, fine lines etched around his bright blue eyes, and thinning auburn hair, wearing a simple brown tunic of rough wool, stands paralyzed with disbelief. He's just lost a dice game to a wily old beggar. The crucial moment: The beggar, cloaked in tattered greens and browns, grins mischievously, holding a wooden leg in one hand and a leather pouch overflowing with gold in the other. The storyteller's wife, in a teal dress and shawl looks passively at her husband. The game transpires on a mossy stone in a sun-dappled clearing of the storytellers garden, dew-kissed green grass and wildflowers surrounding them. The overall lighting has a golden hour glow, with warm highlights and soft shadows and a Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor style with soft bokeh.

jobs.title: The Strange Visitor
jobs.prompt:
A woman, perhaps 40, with a worried face—sitting at her spinning wheel in her simple cottage. She wears a practical linen dress in muted earth tones. Her hands are paused over the wheel, eyes wide with rising fear. Before her looms a bizarrely stacked figure: broad soles to small legs, thick knees to thin thighs, supporting huge hips, all leading up to an enormous menacing head. The creature’s face features huge, knowing eyes.

The scene is lit by a single sputtering candle on the table beside the woman, casting long, grotesque shadows that emphasize the creature's disjointed form. The cottage interior is cozy but cramped, with exposed wooden beams.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition with a warm, inviting color palette contrasted by the looming dark figure.

jobs.title: The Tail.
jobs.prompt: A weathered, middle-aged shepherd with a concerned face, ruddy cheeks, and kind blue eyes. His brown hair is disheveled from the wind and mist. He's clad in a waterlogged, thick wool plaid, the fabric clinging to his form, predominantly brown and grey. The iconic moment: he's bent over, back to the viewer, straining with all his might, hands gripping a sheep's tail. The sheep is half-submerged in a muddy peat bog, only its rear visible. Setting: A desolate, windswept, rolling hillside in the Scottish Highlands, shrouded in a thick, cold mist. Time of day: late afternoon. Muted lighting, the key light diffused by the fog, creating a somber mood. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Tale of Ivan
jobs.prompt: A youthful, beaming Ivan—early 20s, sturdy build, kind eyes—holds aloft a broken cake. His face, round and open, radiates pure, surprised delight. Short, neatly combed brown hair, fair skin with a warm blush. Donned in simple, earthy brown woolen tunic and trousers, patched but clean, cinched with a leather belt. The inside of the cake reveals a cascade of golden coins. This is the moment he discovers his master's reward after years of service, a realization dawning on his face that honesty has paid off. Quaint Welsh cottage interior with a stone hearth, late afternoon sun streaming through a window, casting long shadows. Golden hour lighting, warm and inviting. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Three Heads Of The Well
jobs.prompt:
Fifteen-year-old Princess, radiant with youthful beauty, knee-length golden gown of shimmering silk, silver comb in hand. Oval face, sapphire eyes reflecting kindness, long flowing blonde hair cascading down her shoulders, fair skin glowing softly. Gently cradling a golden head from the well, adorned with intricate royal details. The head sings sweetly. Beside her, the second and third golden heads emerge from the well, awaiting their turn.

Iconic moment: the Princess, with a compassionate smile, carefully combs the golden head, bestowing kindness. Lush meadow surrounding an ancient stone well in a sun-dappled clearing. Primrose bank nearby.

Golden hour lighting casting a warm, ethereal glow, soft shadows, creating a magical atmosphere.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, whimsical storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Three Sillies
jobs.prompt: A handsome young gentleman, early 20s, stands in a dimly lit cellar, holding a lit candle. He has a neatly trimmed beard and a bemused expression. His face is kind, with bright, intelligent eyes. He wears a tweed waistcoat and tan breeches. Before him sit a farmer, his wife, and their daughter, all weeping dramatically—mid-40s, round-faced, and dressed in simple country clothes. The daughter, rosy-cheeked and pretty, is particularly distraught. A stream of beer flows from an overturned jug across the damp stone floor. Above them, a rustic wooden mallet hangs precariously from a ceiling beam. Golden light from the candle illuminates their faces and the shadowed stone walls. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, title storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Vision of MacConglinney
jobs.prompt:
A young scholar, Anier MacConglinney, about 20, lean but wiry, with intelligent eyes and a mischievous glint, stands before King Cathal of Munster, a large, imposing man with a ruddy face contorted in hunger and frustration. Anier has a pointed, clean-shaven face, dark, shoulder-length hair, and fair skin. He wears a simple, cream-colored woolen tunic, a knotted wooden staff in his left hand. Anier holds a honey-soaked piece of roasted meat before the king's face but eats it himself. Cathal is bound tightly to a rough-hewn wooden chair with thick ropes.

A grand feast is laid out nearby—bacon, beef, and honey. The scene is set in a rustic, firelit hall, with shadows dancing on the stone walls. The lighting is warm and golden, emanating from a roaring hearth, casting long shadows.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Well Of The World's End
jobs.prompt: A kind, fair-skinned girl, about 16, with long wavy light brown hair, stands at the Well of the World's End; round-faced, with worried light blue eyes. She wears a simple homespun dress of faded blue linen, patched at the elbows, and carries a large, useless wicker sieve. The frog, large and warty with bulging golden eyes, floats in the well, its head just above the water line and it gestures helpfully. The girl stares at the frog with reluctant hope as it advises how to fix the sieve. Setting: a mossy clearing deep in a twilight forest surrounding a stone well. Key light from the setting sun filtering through the trees, creating dappled shadows and a golden glow. Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, ideal for a fairy tale cover illustration.

jobs.title: The Wooing of Olwen
jobs.prompt:
Fair Olwen, age 19, ethereal beauty, stands serene — luminous skin, graceful posture, unbound golden hair flowing past her shoulders, sapphire eyes sparkling with kindness. She wears a flame-colored silk gown, collar of ruddy gold adorned with emeralds and rubies. Kilhuch kneels before her, offering a bouquet of wood anemones. Four white trefoils spring up where Olwen treads.
Setting: The open plain outside Yspathaden Penkawr's vast, fair castle. It's a sun-drenched afternoon, soft breeze.
Lighting: Golden hour, warm light highlighting Olwen's radiant hair and gown, soft fill light creating a magical ambiance.
Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor illustration, soft bokeh background, classic storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Titty Mouse And Tatty Mouse
jobs.prompt: A distraught Tatty Mouse, an older mouse with kind, tearful eyes and a round face, graying whiskers, and brown fur, stands amidst the chaotic aftermath of the cottage collapse. She wears a simple blue cotton dress with a white apron, clutching a tiny spoon. Around her, a three-legged stool lies upended, a straw broom askew, and a broken wooden door. Outside, a massive walnut tree, now bare, leans against the ruined cottage under a gray sky. Scattered green leaves add to the somber scene. Soft, diffused light filters through the debris, emphasizing the tragedy. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Tom Tit Tot
jobs.prompt: A terrified young woman, barely twenty, with a petite build, stands in a stone chamber, tears streaming down her face. Her face is round, with wide, hazel eyes filled with desperation, and unruly brown hair escaping her simple braid. She wears a pale blue, peasant-style dress of rough linen, its simple design emphasizing her vulnerability. Before her, perched mischievously on the windowsill in the last rays of sunset, is Tom Tit Tot, a small, wiry imp with coal-black skin and a ridiculously long tail. He's grinning, eyes gleaming with wicked delight as he presents five neatly spun flax skeins, his pose radiating sly triumph. The dreary stone room holds only a spinning wheel and stool. The golden light casts long shadows, highlighting the room's oppressive atmosphere. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Whittington And His Cat
jobs.prompt: Young Dick Whittington, around 12 years old, thin and ragged but with hopeful eyes, presents his tabby cat to Captain, a stout, bearded sailor. Dick's face, smudged with soot, has a hopeful but anxious expression. He wears patched brown breeches and a tattered linen shirt. The ship's sunny, wood-paneled parlor serves as a backdrop. Mr. Fitzwarren, a portly merchant in a velvet robe, watches with amusement, while his kind daughter Alice offers Dick a comforting smile. Golden sunlight streams through a window, illuminating the scene with warmth. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: A Cure for Story-Telling
jobs.prompt: A stout, middle-aged muzhik, the porter, brow furrowed with concern, stands beside a long wooden bench, gesturing frantically at his wife. She's a plump woman, perhaps forty, with a sour expression, hands clasped tightly in her lap, clad in a simple homespun sarafan of ochre and brown.  A gaunt, shivering peasant, nearly skeletal, with a long, tangled grey beard sits opposite her, eyes wide with feigned innocence. He wears tattered, patched clothing in muted greys and browns. The interior of a rustic izba, dominated by a large brick oven, dimly lit. Soft candlelight flickers across the scene, casting long shadows. The muzhik, having just physically assaulted his wife, shouts in angry triumph as she cowers. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: A Story of Saint Nicholas
jobs.prompt: Young, fair-skinned Iván, perhaps 20, kneels reverently before a weathered icon of Saint Nicholas the Wonder-Worker. Iván has a round, earnest face, light brown hair neatly parted, and blue eyes filled with faith. He wears a simple linen shirt in an earthy tone, open at the collar, and a dark brown vest. A small oil lamp casts a warm glow on the icon, illuminating St. Nicholas’s kind face. The saint's halo gleams in the dim light. The scene takes place in Iván’s humble shop, filled with sacks of grain and shelves of simple goods. Soft golden light from a window bathes the scene, creating a serene and hopeful mood. Hand-painted Studio Ghibli-inspired watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: A Tale of the Dead
jobs.prompt:
A young, battle-hardened soldier with a wiry but strong physique, early 20s. Angular face, intense blue eyes narrowed in determination, short-cropped dark hair, weathered skin. Wears a worn green military coat over a simple linen shirt, carries a gleaming sabre. He's locked in a furious struggle, back-to-back, against a horrifying, skeletal sorcerer with glowing red eyes.

The soldier wields his sabre defensively, teeth gritted. They stand atop a massive pyre of aspen wood, flames licking upwards. Hordes of snakes, worms, jackdaws, and magpies burst forth from the sorcerer's burning body, frantic peasants swatting them back into the blaze.

Ancient graveyard setting under a twilight sky, wisps of smoke swirling upwards. Fiery orange light from the inferno illuminates the figures, casting long, dramatic shadows.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. The color palette is dominated by warm earth tones like brown, green, and orange, with sparks of crimson and gold from the fire and the wizard's eyes.

jobs.title: Alyósha Popóvich
jobs.prompt:
Young Alyosha Popovich, maybe 18, a strong knight, but with youthful features. Round face, bright blue eyes full of playful confidence, light brown hair in a windswept style, fair skin. Wearing chainmail armor over a red linen tunic, a sturdy wooden shield with a sunburst design, carrying a steel knife. Astride a chestnut warhorse, he triumphantly holds aloft the severed head of the dragon-like villain, Tugarin Zmeyevich.

Alyosha is in an open field after the battle, with a dark, gritty rain beginning to fall from black clouds above. In the distance, the towers of Kiev gleam faintly. A beam of sunlight pierces the clouds.

Alyosha is casual, almost playful, even after the battle, catching the head on his lance. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, a storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: At the Behest of the Pike
jobs.prompt: A youthful peasant, maybe 16, round-faced and rosy-cheeked, wearing a homespun linen shirt, patched breeches, and bast shoes, kneels at the edge of a misty well. Full, upturned mouth, wide blue eyes reflecting surprise, straw-colored hair askew. He cradles a clay jug, watching a glistening golden pike levitate before him. Water droplets sparkle like gems. The pike has intelligent, emerald eyes and a whimsical expression. The scene is set on a dewy Easter morning in a humble Russian village. Wooden houses with thatched roofs peek from behind blossoming cherry trees in the background. Soft, golden sunlight filters through the morning mist, creating a dreamy, ethereal quality. Soft bokeh background of storybook village. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Bába Yagá and Zamorýshek
jobs.prompt: A diminutive, but wiry, 18-year-old Zamorýshek, the youngest of forty-one brothers, with a determined expression. Round face, bright alert blue eyes, sandy blonde hair in a simple braid, fair skin with freckles; wearing his bride’s ornate floral headscarf and embroidered peasant dress over his own trousers. He leads his forty brothers, dressed in their wives' clothing. Gripping the edge of a magical woven bridge spanning the churning blue sea. Bába Yagá, furious, with hooked nose and iron teeth, stands on the shore behind them, wildly waving her fiery shield. A precarious escape from Bába Yagá’s island after tricking her. Glowing sunset lighting, casting long shadows, highlighting the desperation of their flight. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition, warm earth tones with blue accents.

jobs.title: Beer and Bread
jobs.prompt:
A kind-faced, older peasant man with a neatly trimmed grey beard, about 60, stands beside a stone well with wooden braces. His eyes sparkle with wisdom. Tan skin, wrinkled from years in the sun. He wears a simple, patched linen shirt in earth tones and dark brown trousers, sleeves rolled up. He gestures, smiling, as golden beer flows magically from the well into waiting wooden tubs. The poor man's small wooden house is dimly lit in the background.

Setting: Dusk in a rustic village; warm light emanating from the home contrasting with the cool evening air. Golden light shines up from the well, illuminating the man's face.
Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, emphasizing the magical beer, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: By Command of the Prince Daniel
jobs.prompt: A terrified young woman, barely a teenager, with long golden-blonde braided hair and tear-filled blue eyes, wearing a simple homespun white dress, kneels within a dark earthen passage. Her face is streaked with dirt and lit by an eerie orange glow from the Baba Yaga's oven above. She desperately pushes against the oven wall with her feet, preventing Baba Yaga from shoving her inside, her small hands braced against the rough clay. Around her, glowing embers and soot swirl in the confined space. The walls are damp earth. The scene suggests claustrophobia and impending doom. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition, warm earth tones with fiery orange accents.

jobs.title: Christ and Folk-songs
jobs.prompt: Young, bearded Jesus in simple white robes, mid-30s, stands rapt, eyes closed, gentle smile. Face is oval, with kind, expressive brown eyes, flowing dark brown hair, olive skin. He wears a seamless, unadorned white linen robe; bare feet. Jesus stands outside a humble thatched-roof cottage at golden hour; warm light streams from the open doorway where villagers joyfully sing. Christ's face is turned toward the doorway, an expression of serene joy. Gentle rolling hills in the background. Warm golden light bathes the scene, casting long shadows, fireflies. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, centered storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Christ and the Geese
jobs.prompt: Young St. Peter, acting as God for the day, early 30s, muscular build, frustrated expression. Round face, sky-blue eyes conveying annoyance, short dark curly hair, sun-kissed skin. Simple tan tunic of roughspun linen, holding a wooden shepherd's crook. The iconic moment when Peter is reluctantly watching over a flock of plump white geese. Sunny meadow outside a quaint Russian village, wooden fences, distant golden-domed church. Midday sun, fluffy clouds, warm ethereal light casting soft shadows, creating a peaceful yet ironic atmosphere. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, centered storybook cover composition. Warm earthy tones with accents of sky-blue and gold.

jobs.title: Chufíl-Fílyushka
jobs.prompt: A young boy, Chufíl-Fílyushka, around 7 years old, small and wiry, but with a mischievous glint in his eyes. Round face, rosy cheeks, bright blue eyes wide with cleverness, and tousled straw-blond hair. He wears a simple homespun tunic of brown linen, slightly oversized, with a red embroidered belt. He's in the act of shoving the Yagá-Búra's daughter into a large, brick oven, a look of determined focus on his face. The interior of Baba Yaga's hut: roughly hewn wooden walls, a blazing fire illuminating the scene. Evening light streaming through a small window. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. Warm earth tones with accents of fiery orange and reds from the oven.

jobs.title: Danílo the Unfortunate
jobs.prompt:
A youthful, handsome Danílo the Unfortunate, no older than 20, stands mesmerized by the ethereal Swan Maiden. She's radiant, with long, flowing, golden hair cascading down her back. Her face is gentle, with kind blue eyes and a hopeful expression. She wears a gown woven from white feathers, subtly translucent to hint at her magical nature. 

The key moment is their first meeting by the shore. The Swan Maiden has just emerged from the churning blue sea at midnight, summoned by Danílo, her form shimmering. He reaches out a hesitant hand towards her as she speaks.

Setting: a moonlit, rocky shoreline where a dark, ancient oak tree stands twisted against the stormy sky. The sea foams around the rocks, and mist swirls creating an otherworldly atmosphere. 

Lighting: soft, cool moonlight bathing the figures, with a warm, golden glow emanating from the Swan Maiden herself, highlighting her face and creating a magical ambiance.

Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Donotknow
jobs.prompt: A youthful, lithe Iván, the merchant's son, around 16 years old, with a curious gaze and a touch of sadness in his eyes. Face is round with fair skin, light-brown tousled hair. He wears simple linen trousers and a tunic, dyed in earthy browns and greens, and carries a worn leather-bound book. The key scene depicts Iván in the stable, gently stroking the scabby foal's muzzle, tears welling in the foal's large, expressive eyes. The stable is dimly lit, shafts of golden sunlight streaming through cracks in the wooden walls. Dust motes dance in the light. The atmosphere is heavy with unspoken worries, a subtle magical aura surrounds the foal. Soft, diffused light creates a warm, intimate mood. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Egóri the Brave and the Gipsy
jobs.prompt:
A wizened, gaunt faced Roma peasant, about 60 years old, gleefully clutching a golden stirrup to his chest like a treasure. His face is crinkled with cunning, deep set gray eyes sparkling with mischievous delight, and a wide, toothy grin that hints at his deceitful nature. He has a long, silvered moustache and scraggly beard, and his skin is weathered like old leather.

He's dressed in a nobleman's ornate blue coat, several sizes too large, with gold embroidery - clearly ill-fitting and comically out of place. Underneath, glimpses of his ragged, earthy brown peasant clothing peek through.

The key moment: the gipsy is mid-stride, exiting the courthouse, having just swindled the nobleman. He's glancing back over his shoulder with a triumphant, mocking expression, and the nobleman is visible behind him, aghast.

The setting is a rustic Russian village, outside a wooden courthouse with snow covered roofs, daytime, overcast sky.

The lighting is diffused daylight, casting soft shadows, with a slightly warm, cheerful glow.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Elijah the Prophet and St. Nicholas
jobs.prompt:
A wizened but strong peasant, mid-50s, with calloused hands, stands in a golden field, gazing upwards with gratitude. His face, framed by a neatly trimmed dark beard, is etched with the wisdom of experience and relief. He has kind, blue eyes. He wears a simple linen shirt, open at the collar, and patched brown trousers, the clothing of a humble farmer. In his hands, he holds a tall, lit candle, its flame casting dancing shadows on his face.

Behind him, St. Nicholas is in his traditional robes, with a radiant smile, watching as Elijah, cloaked in white and gold, his face partially obscured by his hood, looks down from the heavens with a softened expression.

The field glows during golden hour, the sun highlighting the abundant rye stalks.
A Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor with gentle brush strokes and a soft bokeh background, perfect for a storybook cover.

jobs.title: God’s Blessing Compasses all Things
jobs.prompt:
A youthful, earnest-looking Naúm, early 20s, missing his right hand, stands on a riverbank, his face etched with worry but also a glimmer of hope. He has a simple, honest face with kind brown eyes, short-cropped light brown hair, and fair skin weathered by sun and toil. He wears a patched brown linen shirt and trousers, typical peasant garb.

The key scene: Naúm overhears the devils' midnight meeting on the boat, clutching his bandaged wrist, shadowed by the looming figures. The devils are only vaguely seen, suggested by glowing eyes and sinister shapes.

Setting: A moonlit riverbank with tall grass and weeping willows. The boat is a small, overturned fishing boat on the muddy shore. The time is midnight, with an eerie mist hanging over the water.

Lighting: Soft moonlight filters through the trees, casting long shadows and highlighting Naúm's anxious face. The devils are lit with a sickly green glow, adding to the scene's ominous feel.

Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. The color palette is dominated by cool blues and greens, with warm earth tones accenting Naúm's clothing and face.

jobs.title: Ilyá Múromets and Svyatogór the Knight
jobs.prompt:
Young Ilyá Múromets, appearing no older than 19, athletic build, dressed as a humble traveler, watches with apprehension from the high branches of a stout grey oak. His face is round, eyes wide with fear, short-cropped light brown hair, fair skin flushed with anxiety. He wears homespun linen clothing in muted greens and browns, a simple leather belt cinching his tunic.

Below him, Svyatogór the knight, a colossal figure, relaxes beside a white linen tent adorned with geometric patterns. His discarded helmet and massive sword lay nearby. The knight is reclining, a checkered tablecloth spread before him.

Atmospheric details: golden sunlight filters through the ancient tree's leaves, casting dappled shadows on the grassy clearing. Gentle rolling hills fade into the distance.

Lighting: soft, warm key light from the setting sun, creating a sense of idyllic peace contrasted with Ilyá's internal turmoil.

Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition, accentuated by the rich reds and golds of Svyatogór's discarded helmet.

jobs.title: Iváshko and the Wise Woman
jobs.prompt: A small, frightened Iváshko, no older than seven, with a slight build and wide, expressive eyes. Round, pale face, sandy blonde hair neatly parted, innocent blue eyes filled with fear, fair skin. He wears a simple homespun white shirt, a now-frayed red sash tied around his waist, clutching a small, crudely carved wooden fish. Perched high in the branches of a massive oak tree, looking down in terror. Below, the Wise Woman, a grotesque figure with iron teeth, furiously gnawing at the tree trunk. Twisted, old oak forest, dappled sunlight filtering through dense foliage. Golden hour, soft directional light illuminating Iváshko, casting long, ominous shadows from the Wise Woman. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft, blurred background, framed for a classic storybook cover.

jobs.title: Márya Moryévna
jobs.prompt: A sorrowful Iván Tsarévich, appearing 20s with a strong build, kneels in a dimly lit, stone dungeon. His face, framed by tousled auburn hair, is etched with regret, his blue eyes glistening with tears.. He wears a simple tunic of coarse brown fabric torn at the shoulders, and a silver cross is barely visible at his neck. Koshchéy the Deathless, gaunt and skeletal, with wild, gray hair and piercing green eyes, looms behind him, flexing newly freed hands, a cruel smile on his face. Heavy iron chains lie broken on the damp floor. The setting emphasizes cold stone walls and a single barred window. Key light comes from the window, casting long shadows and highlighting Koshchey's menacing form. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition, earthy browns and grays with a flash of cold green.

jobs.title: Mark the Rich
jobs.prompt:
A young, kind-faced peasant boy, around 15 years old, sturdy build, framed in medium shot. Round face, bright blue eyes filled with concern, tousled brown hair, sun-kissed skin. He wears simple homespun fabrics, a linen shirt, and brown woolen trousers, clutching a sealed letter.

The key moment: The youth meets a beggar (Christ in disguise) on a dusty road, handing him the fateful letter, his brow furrowed with worry. The beggar's face is obscured, radiating soft light.

Setting: A sun-baked, golden wheat field under a vast, clear sky. Rolling hills in the distance. Time of day is midday; hot and still.

Lighting: Warm, golden light from the sun creates strong highlights and shadows, accentuating the boy's apprehensive expression. A divine glow emanates from the beggar's presence.

Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. Warm earth tones with accents of sky blue and a touch of ethereal gold.

jobs.title: Never-wash
jobs.prompt:
Youngest Tsarevna, age 18, with a kind face, stands beside the newly transformed soldier, age 20s, handsome and clean-shaven with a confident bearing. She has a round face, with warm brown eyes filled with hope, dark brown hair styled in a braid adorned with ribbons, and fair skin. She wears a gold and red brocade dress, a pearl necklace, and a hopeful expression. The soldier is clad in a blue and gold tunic.

They stand in a lavish throne room of the Tsar's palace, after the soldier's magical transformation. Golden sunlight streams through tall arched windows. The air is filled with motes of dust, and the atmosphere is joyful, hinting at their future together.

A Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor art style, soft bokeh background, illustrating a storybook cover composition. Warm earth tones with accents of gold and blue, capturing the magical, hopeful mood.

jobs.title: Nikíta the Tanner
jobs.prompt: Nikita the Tanner, a muscular man in his late 20s with calloused, scarred hands, stands defiantly. Broad Slavic face, determined blue eyes, and sweat-drenched, tousled light-brown hair. He wears a simple, tarred hempen tunic, its rough fabric clinging to his powerful frame. Gripping the handles of an enormous wooden plow behind a defeated dragon. The dragon has scales of dark, earthy greens and browns, panting, defeated. A vast, empty field stretches from Kyiv to the Caspian Sea under a midday sun. Midday sun, harsh shadows. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Prince Evstáfi
jobs.prompt:
Young Tsarévich Evstáfi, age 17, slender build, kneeling before his stern-faced father. Tearful expression, dark kind eyes, long dark brown hair framing a round face, fair skin. He wears a simple linen tunic, muted brown tones, symbolic gilded embroidery around the collar.

In his hands, he presents three chests: one of gleaming gold, one of polished silver, and one of rough-hewn wood. The golden and silver chests overflow with mud, toads and snakes. The wooden chest emits a warm glow and sprouts miniature fruit trees.

The royal court observes from a stone-paved courtyard. Tall castle spires loom in the distant background. It is midday, with dappled sunlight filtering through the clouds.

Key light from the left, creating long shadows. Fill light is warm, highlighting the Tsar’s angered expression and Evstáfi’s sorrow. Dramatic perspective, wide angle view.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Shemyák the Judge
jobs.prompt: A gaunt, middle-aged peasant named Shemyák, dressed in tattered brown homespun, his face a roadmap of wrinkles, one eye subtly crossed. Wisps of straw-colored hair peek from beneath a patched cap. He stands beneath a rickety wooden bridge, river rippling around the supports. Above him, a young man in simple village clothes leaps, arms outstretched, a look of terrified determination etched on his face. Shemyák holds aloft a heavy, cloth-wrapped stone, a cunning glint in his deceptively gentle blue eyes, brow furrowed in mock concern. Golden hour bathes the scene in warm, deceptive light. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition, warm earth tones contrasting with the bright blue river.

jobs.title: Sorrow
jobs.prompt: A gaunt peasant, about 40, with threadbare clothes and patched bast shoes, stands at the edge of a field, face weathered and lined with hardship. His wife, equally poor, clutches his arm—her homespun sarafán faded with wear. They gaze down into a dark, stone-lined pit brimming with glittering gold coins. The peasant's expression is a mixture of relief and lingering apprehension. Sorrow, a wispy, imp-like figure with mournful eyes, is trapped at the bottom of the pit. The immense stone, glistening with earthy moisture, looms beside the pit. The setting is a desolate, windswept field under a muted twilight sky. Key light angled low, casting long shadows, suggesting both the end of a long day and a turning point. The mood is bittersweet, the gold a symbol of hope tinged with past suffering in a Studio Ghibli-inspired, hand-painted watercolor style with soft bokeh.

jobs.title: The Animals in the Pit
jobs.prompt: Fair-skinned Vasilisa, 16, with a determined expression, long braided blonde hair, and blue eyes, clutches a glowing skull on a wooden staff. She wears a simple brown peasant dress and worn leather boots. The key scene depicts Vasilisa arriving home at night, the skull's eerie green light illuminating the path before her. Her stepmother's dark, dilapidated house looms in the background, devoid of light in its windows, hinting at the darkness within. The setting is a stark, snow-covered field outside the village. The lighting is primarily sourced from the skull, casting long, dramatic shadows, supplemented by a distant, cold moonlight. A Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor style with a soft bokeh background and a storybook cover composition, accentuating the magical realism of the moment.

jobs.title: The Animals’ Winter Quarters
jobs.prompt:
A large, muscular Ox, mid-adulthood, with kind eyes and a determined set to his mouth, stands protectively in the doorway of a small, snow-covered wooden izba. The Ox has short, brown fur and sturdy horns. Inside, a fluffy Ram with thick wool, a stout Pig with a muddy snout, a plump Goose with white feathers, and a proud Cock with bright red comb huddle together, looking fearful.

The Ox's face is weathered but gentle, his brown eyes reflecting the warm light from within the hut. The animals wear expressions of concern and anticipation.

The Ox wears a simple, homespun apron, stained with wood shavings. The Ram has a tiny, knitted scarf around his neck.

The key scene depicts the moment the Ox bravely faces the unseen threat outside, shielding his vulnerable companions.

The izba is nestled in a snow-laden forest clearing at dusk. Soft snowflakes fall, illuminated by the warm, inviting light spilling from the hut's windows.

Warm, golden light emanates from the interior of the izba, casting long shadows and highlighting the falling snow. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. Accent colors: red and gold.

jobs.title: The Bear, the Dog and the Cat
jobs.prompt: A scruffy, elderly dog with a graying muzzle lies exhausted in a winter forest, circa 1800s, medium build. One blue eye is open, looking hopeful; the other is clouded with age. Matted brown and gray fur. Wears a worn leather collar. The key scene: a large brown shaggy bear stands protectively over the dog, offering him a bloody chunk of meat torn from a deer carcass. Snow-dusted pine trees surround them in a clearing. Overhead, a sliver of a moon illuminates the figures with a soft, ethereal glow. Ground-level perspective, slightly upward angle. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. Warm browns and grays, accented by the red of the meat and the pale blue moonlight.

jobs.title: The Brother of Christ
jobs.prompt:
A kind-faced peasant boy, about 16, lean build, wearing a simple homespun shirt and trousers, kneels at the edge of a fiery pit. His face shows desperate effort and sorrow. He has kind brown eyes, a round face, and tousled brown hair. He wears a simple wooden cross. The boy strains to pull a rope made of woven grass. Below him, a hag-like woman with a contorted face and matted grey hair reaches up, snarling. Her skin is blistered and red.

The scene depicts the moment of the failed rescue from Hell. The pit glows with orange and red light, casting harsh shadows. Paradise is visible in the background as a faint, ethereal glow, a stark contrast to the hellscape. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. Warm earth tones mixed with fiery reds and oranges.

jobs.title: The Devil in the Dough-pan
jobs.prompt:
A mischievous, child-sized demon named Potánka, scowling with frustration, chubby cheeks, bright red skin, small horns poking from unruly black hair. Wide, ember-colored eyes glare from a round, expressive face. Wearing a simple, earth-toned peasant shirt, torn and covered in sticky dough.

Stuck inside a large, tan-colored dough ball, arms and legs flailing comically, desperately trying to claw his way out. Overwhelmed with distress, mouth open in a silent yell.

Muddy street in a small Russian village, late afternoon sun casting long shadows, cobblestones scattered. A group of curious pink pigs nudges the dough ball with their snouts.

Warm, golden afternoon light rakes across the scene, creating dramatic shadows. Soft fill light from the overcast sky illuminates Potánka's struggle. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor illustration, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Dream
jobs.prompt:
A wizened old man, late 70s, thin build, sits up on a wooden sleeping bench inside a peasant's hut. His face is etched with worry lines, deep-set blue eyes wide with bewilderment, and a long, gray beard. He wears a simple brown woolen robe. He's startled awake by his dream.

The scene depicts his nightmare: two glowing candles flicker before icons, casting strange light. Croaking frogs overrun the wooden table where he seeks water.

The interior of the rustic "izba" is dimly lit by candlelight, revealing rough-hewn wooden walls, floor strewn with newts. The family sleeps soundly unaware.

Golden candlelight streams from the icons. The overall mood is unsettling, dreamlike, and mysterious.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. Warm earth tones with accents of candle-lit gold and the unnatural green of the frogs.

jobs.title: The Dun Cow
jobs.prompt:
Young Márya Tsarévna, age 16, slender, stands on a windswept heath with her head bowed to the right hoof of the Dun Cow. Her face is delicate with wide, innocent blue eyes and long blonde hair in thick braids; fair skin, lightly freckled. She wears a drab, patched linen dress, earthy brown tones, but light shimmers of hidden gold suggest a magical secret. In the background, the cow is a large, gentle presence, its eyes soft.

The key moment is the silent communication between girl and animal, a plea for transformation as the heath stretches before them at sunset. Warm golden light bathes the scene, low light illuminates the faces, with long shadows creating a sense of mystery.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor illustration, soft bokeh background, centered storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Enchanted Tsarévich
jobs.prompt:
A beautiful young woman, perhaps 17, with long golden hair, stands weeping beside a lifeless, three-headed green snake in a murky pond. Her face is heart-shaped, with wide, sorrowful blue eyes and tear-streaked fair skin. She wears a simple, peasant-style dress of tan linen, cinched at the waist; around her neck, a single strand of amber beads. In her hands, she holds one of the snake's heads, about to kiss it desperately.

The setting is the snake's overgrown palace garden, now overgrown and neglected. It is late afternoon; rain is coming, and the light is diffused. Twisted trees surround an algae-covered pond. Lily pads float on the water.

Golden light filters through the turbulent sky, illuminating the maiden's tear-stained face as she throws herself on the beast. 

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor illustration, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Feast of the Dead
jobs.prompt: Three terrified young women, fair skin, big round eyes, escaping reanimated skeletons; one with long blonde hair, another with short brown hair, the third with curly dark hair partially obscuring her face. The blonde wears a red sarafan. The scene: bones, grinning, sit at a rough wooden table laden with bread and a bottle of vodka, reaching for the fleeing girls; terror, desperation. Dimly lit wooden loft, straw on the floor, moonlight streaming through cracks in the walls. Eerie, flickering candlelight casts long, dancing shadows. The bones drag the blonde girl across their knee, white bones against red fabric. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. The color palette: warm wood tones, bone white, accented by deep reds and chilling blues.

jobs.title: The Foundling Prince
jobs.prompt: A slender teenage Tsarévich, around 15, radiating intelligence and calm amidst confusion. Almond-shaped blue eyes, a determined gaze, light brown hair neatly framing a symmetrical face, fair skin with a hint of rosy blush. He is draped in a shimmering, intricately woven fishing net, the delicate fabric catching the light, revealing glimpses of his youthful physique. He confidently rides astride a sturdy, gray goat, one set of hooves resting on cobblestones within the palace courtyard and the other set planted on the dusty road outside. Twilight bathes the scene in soft, diffused light as the Tsar, adorned in regal purple and gold robes, witnesses the prince's arrival with astonishment. Warm, golden light emanates from the palace windows, casting long shadows, while the last rays of sunset paint the sky in hues of orange and lavender. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Journey to Jerusalem
jobs.prompt: A gaunt, elderly Archimandrite, perhaps 70 years old, with a long, flowing grey beard and piercing blue eyes filled with divine purpose. His face is weathered and lined, but holds a serene expression; hair thinning at the temples. He wears ornate, midnight-blue and gold robes of heavy brocade, embroidered with crosses, holding a silver censer. The key scene: the Archimandrite hovering slightly above the ancient stone courtyard of a Jerusalem monastery at dawn, a faint golden halo illuminating his figure. Warm light bathes ancient Jerusalem's walls in the background. Gentle incense smoke curls around him. Jerusalem stone buildings are arrayed behind him. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Language of the Birds
jobs.prompt:
A young boy, Vasíli, around 6 years old, with curious eyes, stands on a small wooden boat. He is slender, with a hopeful expression. His face is round, with fair skin and rosy cheeks, framed by tousled light brown hair. He wears a simple, homespun tunic of blue linen. A tiny nightingale with brown and cream plumage perches on his shoulder, gazing skyward.

The key moment is Vasíli’s departure: adrift on the open sea at night, exiled by his parents. The small boat drifts away from a distant shore with faint, flickering lights. The sea is dark and slightly choppy, reflecting the moonlight.

The setting is the open ocean at night, under a vast, star-filled sky, with a sliver of moon peeking through scattered clouds.

Moonlight bathes the scene in a cool, ethereal glow. Soft, warm light emanates from the distant shore, creating a stark contrast.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Legless Knight and the Blind Knight
jobs.prompt: A handsome, youthful Iván Tsarévich, maybe 20, strong build, sits astride a magnificent but exhausted magical horse. Face is determined, with bright blue eyes and a neatly trimmed blond beard; fair skin flushed with exertion. He wears a rich, embroidered blue kaftan with gold trim, high black boots, and holds the reins firmly. The key moment: After the wedding ceremony, Iván Tsarévich emerges from the church, hand-in-hand with Anna the Fair, while the horse is sweating and struggling under him. A Russian Orthodox church dominates the background; crowds of onlookers in colorful traditional clothing fill the square. Midday sun, slightly obscured by clouds, casts a dramatic light, creating long shadows and a sense of triumph tinged with unease. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Midnight Dance
jobs.prompt: A youthful, wiry nobleman, early 20s, disguised in simple traveler's clothes, follows twelve lithe princesses down a hidden staircase. The youngest princess, around 17, with long braided blonde hair and a worried expression, glances back, sensing his presence. She wears a gossamer gown of pale blue. The other princesses descend ahead, shimmering in jewel-toned silks of emerald, ruby and sapphire. The secret stone staircase spirals down into the earth, illuminated by flickering torchlight, leading to the Accursed Tsar's subterranean kingdom. Golden flowers line the passage, their blossoms emitting a faint, magical glow. The nobleman has just plucked a golden sprig. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition, warm earth tones with blue and gold accents, dramatic key light from the subterranean torches.

jobs.title: The Miraculous Hen
jobs.prompt: A boy of 8, hair the color of wheat, round-cheeked but weary, wearing a homespun tunic of faded blue linen, clutches his brother's hand in a dark forest. Large, innocent eyes look up in fear at a looming cook, who is crouched with a wicked-looking knife. The younger brother's skirt is overflowing with shimmering gold coins. They stand at the base of a colossal, moss-covered oak, ancient and gnarled. Sunlight filters weakly through the dense canopy. The scene evokes a sense of dread and impending doom. Dim light shines from above on the children. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition featuring warm earth tones with accents of cool blue and gold.

jobs.title: The Poor Widow
jobs.prompt:
A kind, elderly widow, about 70, with a slight build and weathered hands clasped in prayer. Her face is round, her eyes a gentle, hopeful blue, and her silver hair is pulled back in a simple bun. Her skin is fair and wrinkled, etched with years of hardship. She wears a patched homespun dress of brown and grey, with a simple white apron, and a wooden cross hangs around her neck.

She kneels in her humble, sparsely furnished cottage, gazing upwards with unwavering faith as a grey wolf stands at her doorway, bathed in ethereal light, clutching her small brown cow in its jaws.

The interior of the cottage is lit by a warm, flickering candlelight, with golden light streaming through a small window. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Potter
jobs.prompt:
A middle-aged potter with a kind, weathered face, twinkling blue eyes, and a neatly trimmed brown beard. Dressed in a simple homespun shirt and trousers, earthy brown tones, with a leather potter's apron. He sits triumphantly in a lavish, gold-trimmed carriage. A richly dressed Boyar, humiliated and barefoot, straining to pull the carriage. The potter is singing joyously, gesturing with clay-covered hands.

The setting is a bustling marketplace in front of the Tsar's opulent palace. The scene is bathed in the warm, golden light of late afternoon. The atmosphere is jovial and triumphant, with a hint of mischievousness.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition, accent colors of royal blue and gold.

jobs.title: The Priest with the Envious Eyes
jobs.prompt:
A stout, middle-aged priest with a round face, beady blue eyes filled with envious greed, and a neatly trimmed brown beard, stands nervously on a wooden scaffold. He wears a simple, patched brown cassock with a frayed rope belt. The hangman's noose is already around his neck. In the foreground, a wizened old man with twinkling eyes and a long grey beard raises a hand in accusation, pointing a bony finger.

Sunlight streams through the bars of the scaffold, casting long, dramatic shadows. Dust motes dance in the golden light. The priest’s face is contorted in a desperate denial.

The scene captures the moment the old man confronts the priest about the stolen wafers, with the threat of execution looming. This is the climax that forces the priest's confession.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. Warm earth tones dominate the palette, with highlights of gold from the promised reward.

jobs.title: The Princess to be Kissed at a Charge
jobs.prompt: A slender, youthful Vanyúshka, transformed, astride a fiery, otherworldly horse. Face is handsome, determined, with bright, intelligent eyes, windswept dark hair, and fair skin flushed with excitement. He wears a crimson, gold-trimmed kaftan over gleaming chainmail, brandishing a silver lance, a royal blue cloak billowing behind him. In a daring leap, he steals a kiss from Eléna Tsarévna, who sits on her ornate throne within the temple's twelve-columned hall. Golden sunlight streams through arched windows, illuminating dust motes and casting long shadows. The scene is filled with awe and anticipation. Hand-painted watercolor art, Studio Ghibli aesthetic, soft bokeh background, classic storybook cover.

jobs.title: The Princess who would not Smile
jobs.prompt:
A humble young workman, no older than 19, lies face-down in muddy city square, clad in simple homespun trousers and tunic, both stained with earth, eyes closed in a peaceful slumber. A tiny mouse tugs at his sleeve, a glossy black beetle polishes his worn leather boots, and a large, whiskered sheat-fish flaps its tail to ward off flies.

The Princess Without a Smile peers from an ornate palace window, her pale, oval face framed by long, flaxen braids. Her eyes, a startling shade of emerald green, are alight with amusement, a delicate smile gracing her lips for the first time. She wears a sapphire blue silk gown, embroidered with silver thread.

Warm sunlight bathes the scene, casting long shadows from the palace walls. Cobblestone streets reflect the golden light. The air is thick with the sounds of a bustling marketplace, hinting at the lively chaos beyond the central tableau.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Quarrelsome Wife
jobs.prompt:
A young peasant, early 20s, thin but wiry, wearing patched homespun clothes, looks terrified and overwhelmed. His face is round and pale, with wide, watery blue eyes and a trembling lower lip. His blond hair is disheveled. He's dirt-streaked but has a kind face. He's frantically dropping a woven basket. Inside it perches a shrieking, lanky, squinting woman with wild black hair and a fiery aura. She's contorted with rage, teeth bared, fists clenched, and wearing tattered red dress.

Setting: The mouth of a dark, earthen pit in a shadowy pine forest at twilight. Gnarled roots tangle around the pit's edge. Ominous, looming trees surround them. Patches of sickly green moss glow faintly.

Lighting: Moonlight filters weakly through the trees, illuminating the pit's edge and casting long, eerie shadows. The woman glows with a hellish, internal fire, her rage illuminating the peasant's face.

Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. Predominant earth tones with accents of fiery red and sickly green.

jobs.title: The Realm of Stone
jobs.prompt: A sturdy, young soldier, mid-20s, stands resolute amidst a kingdom petrified in stone. Square jaw, determined eyes, short-cropped dark hair, fair skin. He wears a slightly tattered military uniform of deep forest green fabric with brass buttons, a brown leather belt, and carries a musket. In his hands, he clutches a glowing book, his knuckles white. Around him, shadowy figures of monstrous executioners with axes and saws reach for the book, expressions of demonic rage on their faces. The grand palace of the underground city looms, filled with frozen statues of courtiers and soldiers. Eerie green light emanates from the book, casting sharp shadows across the stone figures. Candlelit atmosphere, emphasizing the soldier's inner strength. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. Warm browns, grays, and deep greens dominate, with accents of glowing green and brassy gold.

jobs.title: The Realms of Copper, Silver and Gold
jobs.prompt:
Young Ivashko, appearing about 17, with a sturdy build, climbs a rope ladder emerging from a dark hole in the earth. His face is determined, with wide blue eyes and a dusting of freckles. He has short, choppy brown hair and a slightly sun-kissed complexion. He wears a simple tunic of coarse woven brown fabric, cinched with a leather belt, and practical leather boots. Clutched in his arms is a radiant maiden from the golden realm. She has long, flowing golden hair and wears a shimmering gown of spun gold.

Below them, two frustrated older brothers look up, their faces twisted in envy. Above, a three-headed dragon observes from a rocky ledge. The scene is set inside the mouth of the cave that leads to the three realms. Earthy tones with golden light streaming upwards from the golden realm.

Golden hour lighting, Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Sea Tsar and Vasilísa the Wise
jobs.prompt:
A regal, middle-aged Tsar, broad-shouldered but drenched to his neck, eyes wide with fear in the churning grey sea. His ornate gold hunting coat clings heavily. Towering over him, a colossal golden eagle with intelligent eyes, one wing extended protectively. The eagle's feathers are intricately detailed, catching the light.

The Sea Tsar's face is lined with worry beneath his damp brown hair. Sea foam spatters his beard.

Turbulent waves crash around them, slate-blue water fading to a stormy horizon. Dark, ominous clouds swirl overhead, pierced by a few rays of light illuminating the Tsar's face.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. Warm, muted earth tones accented by the gleaming gold of the eagle and Tsar’s clothing, emphasizing the perilous moment.

jobs.title: The Singing-Tree and the Speaking-Bird
jobs.prompt:
A strikingly beautiful, 17-year-old Tsarevna with long braids, returning triumphant – round face, determined green eyes, fair skin. She wears a peasant dress of woven flax, earth-toned with russet embroidery, carrying an ornate wooden cage holding the Talking-Bird. In her other hand, she holds a sprig from the Singing-Tree, birds fluttering around her head.

She descends the rocky mountainside where her two revived brothers, young men with long blond hair, clad in tunics of forest green and brown, gaze up in awe. They stand amongst shattered stone remnants, now re-formed and verdant with new growth.

Late afternoon sun filters through ancient gnarled trees – dappled light, mossy stones, whispering wind. Gold light illuminates the water of life overflowing a waterlily.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor illustration, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Smith and the Devil
jobs.prompt: A sturdy, middle-aged smith kneels, his face etched with desperation, pleading with a young, handsome apprentice. The apprentice, a devil in disguise with subtly pointed ears and eyes gleaming with mischief, gestures towards a pile of bones in a milk-filled tub. The smith wears a soot-stained leather apron over a simple linen shirt, hammer hanging forgotten at his side. The scene is set inside a dimly lit smithy, the forge casting an orange glow on their faces. Sparks dance in the air. A single shaft of light illuminates the devil's face. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. Warm earth tones with orange and gold accents.

jobs.title: The Snake Princess
jobs.prompt:
A young Cossack, maybe 19, muscular build, startled expression, eyes wide with fear. Round face, light brown eyes, short dark hair, fair skin tone. Wearing a simple brown Cossack shirt, dark trousers, and tall black boots. A large serpent, scales shimmering emerald and gold, coils tightly around his neck.

He's frozen mid-stride in a clearing, pike discarded on the ground, a burning hayrick blazing fiercely behind him casting long shadows. The clearing is overgrown, tall grasses swaying slightly. 

Warm light from the fire illuminates the terror in the Cossack's face, while cool moonlight filters through the trees.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Soldier and Death
jobs.prompt: A young-ish, weathered soldier with a neatly trimmed beard and a mischievous glint in his blue eyes, seated at a card table in a grand, but dilapidated palace saloon. His face, lined from years of service, breaks into a grin as he rakes in a pile of gold coins. He has sandy blond hair. He wears a worn green military coat over a simple tan tunic, his trusty saber resting against the chair. The iconic moment: the soldier winning a card game against a motley crew of agitated devils, their grotesque faces contorted in frustration and anger. The palace interior is opulent but decaying, with shattered windows and peeling wallpaper and soft light filtering through the broken panes. Warm candle and lamplight casts long shadows, highlighting the devils' distress. Studio Ghibli soft hand-painted watercolor, bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Soldier and the Tsar in the Forest
jobs.prompt: A young, wiry soldier, mid-20s, stands guard over a sleeping Tsar in a rustic forest hut. The Tsar, older with a trimmed beard, lies sprawled on a hay-filled mattress in the attic, looking disheveled. The soldier has a weary but determined face, short-cropped hair, and weathered skin. He's clad in a simple, olive-green uniform, clutching a bloodied cutlass. Below them, in the main room, lie several headless robbers sprawled around an overturned table. The room is lit by a single flickering candle, casting long, eerie shadows. Outside, the dark forest presses against the hut, wind howling. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. Warm earthy tones with deep reds accentuating the danger.

jobs.title: The Sorry Drunkard
jobs.prompt:
A youthful Petrúsha, early 20s, lean build, stands resolute, gazing with concern at a weary, emaciated horse. His face is framed by a rounded jaw, kind brown eyes, and short, dark brown hair neatly combed. He wears a simple homespun shirt of coarse linen, dyed a pale ochre, and patched brown trousers, cinched with a simple rope belt. In his hands, he holds a tarnished copper cross. The key moment: Petrúsha has just completed the ritual, encircling the horse, and the transformation of horse to man begins.

Deep in a shadowy, overgrown forest clearing at twilight. Gnarled roots twist around the edges of the scene. Patches of spectral mist cling to the forest floor.

Directed light from an unseen source illuminates Petrúsha and the horse, casting long shadows. The fill light mimics the dim, cool tones of twilight, contrasting sharply with the warm, hopeful glow emanating from the transforming horse.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Story of Ilyá Múromets and the Nightingale Robber
jobs.prompt:
A heroic, broad-shouldered Ilyá Múromets, 30, with a determined gaze. Round, weathered face, brown eyes, thick auburn hair flowing from under his helmet, and sun-kissed skin. He wears gleaming chainmail, over a red linen tunic, and tall leather boots, a steel lance in hand. Astride his powerful warhorse, he drags the defeated Nightingale Robber, bound to his stirrup with steel chains. Key scene: riding victoriously out of the dark Bryánski forest, sun dappling through the ancient hazel trees. Golden hour lighting, with soft lens flare, accentuating Ilyá's resolve and the stark beauty of the Russian landscape.
Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Story of Tsar Angéy and how he Suffered for Pride
jobs.prompt:
Angéy, gaunt and ragged at around 40, stands inside his own opulent palace disguised as a beggar, face streaked with tears. Sunken eyes convey utter despair, dirty blonde hair matted. He wears tattered brown rags, shoulders slumped with exhaustion. A feast unfolds in the background where the Angel in Angéy's form teaches a lesson.

The setting is a lavish banquet hall, marble floors reflecting candlelight, ornate tapestries depicting scenes of royal glory. Golden goblets & platters overflow with food. Warm light emanates from candles, casting long shadows & highlighting Angéy’s misery.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background focuses attention on Angéy's emotional collapse amidst the splendor, storybook cover composition. Accent colors of royal blue and gold contrast with Angéy's subdued palette.

jobs.title: The Sun and how it was Made by Divine Will
jobs.prompt:
Fifteen thousand radiant, youthful angels, ageless and androgynous, adorning the Sun. Faces are serene, almond-shaped eyes reflecting divine light. Hair like spun gold, flowing and ethereal. Clothed in shimmering, celestial robes – fabrics of iridescent white and gold, textures that evoke both fire and dawn. The angels are carefully dressing the Sun in a Tsar-worthy crown and gown, each jewel radiating warmth.

Setting: A heavenly throne room, sunrise paints the scene in soft peaches and golds. Ethereal clouds swirl around the base of God's Throne. Golden light bathes everything, creating a holy, awestruck mood.

Lighting: Key light emanates from the Sun itself, casting luminous, golden rays. Fill light is a warm, gentle glow.

Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition, centered.

jobs.title: The Sun, The Moon and Crow Crowson
jobs.prompt:
A slender young woman, about 17, with long, braided hair, stands forlorn on her doorstep. Her face is delicate, her large blue eyes filled with apprehension. She wears a simple homespun linen dress, cinched at the waist with a woven belt. The dress is a pale, earthy yellow, dirtied by soot at the hem. As she hesitates, a huge, ebony crow with intelligent, piercing eyes extends a clawed hand towards her. The crow's feathers glint with an oily sheen. This is Crow Crowson claiming his bride. The humble cottage behind has a thatched roof and a warm, inviting glow spilling from its windows. Twilight descends. The sky is a swirling blend of deep blues and purples. Bare tree branches twist starkly against the fading light. Key light comes dramatically from the setting sun, with an ominous shadow cast by the approaching crow.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor with a soft bokeh background and storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Tale of Alexander of Macedon
jobs.prompt:
Young, determined Alexander of Macedon, early 20s, stands tall and proud, clad in gleaming silver and gold armor, a crimson cape billowing behind him. His face is strong, with a determined gaze, dark, intelligent eyes, a neatly trimmed dark beard, and fair skin. He wears a golden laurel wreath atop his neatly combed dark hair. Alexander raises his sword triumphantly towards the heavens.

Below him, trapped within a dark, rocky mountain pass, are shadowy figures of the Gog and Magog tribes, twisted and grotesque, with single eyes and monstrous limbs. The mountain pass is dark and foreboding, with jagged rocks and thorny bushes.

The sky above is a swirling mix of dusk colors, orange, purple, and deep blues, as the last rays of sunset illuminate Alexander's face and armor.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Tale of Iván Tsarévich, the Bird of Light, and the Grey Wolf
jobs.prompt: Young Iván Tsarévich, age 19, determined but anxious, fine-boned face, sky-blue eyes wide with apprehension, light brown hair escaping from under his simple cap, fair skin with a smudge of dirt. He wears homespun fabric, muted green tunic, brown leather belt, travel-worn brown boots. The moment he gets caught stealing the golden cage. Tsar Dolmát's opulent garden, stone walls, luminous golden cage radiating light, the Bird of Light fluttering inside. Watchmen swarm with spears and alarmed expressions. Key light from the mystical birdcage, casting long shadows. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. Warm earth tones with gold accents, reflecting both danger and magic.

jobs.title: The Tale of the Silver Saucer and the Crystal Apple
jobs.prompt:
Little Fool, about 16, petite build, stands beside a birch tree. Her face is heart-shaped, with wide, innocent blue eyes, long blonde braided hair, and fair skin. She wears a simple linen peasant dress, earthy brown with sky-blue embroidery, and bare feet. Her hands hold a silver saucer with a crystal apple resting on it.

The key scene is the Little Fool showing the Tsar the visions in the saucer. She gazes upward with wonder as the apple rolls, displaying miniature cities, sailing ships, and starry skies within the saucer. 

The setting is the Tsar's golden audience hall, sunlight streaming through arched windows with royal blue curtains.

Warm golden hour lighting illuminates Little Fool, with soft fill light revealing details in the saucer.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Thoughtless Word
jobs.prompt:
A humble young farmer, perhaps 19, with a worried but determined expression, lean physique, wearing simple homespun clothes, stands beside a beautiful young woman, mid-teens, with a delicate face, intelligent blue eyes, and long blonde hair. She has a small patch covering one eye. They clutch each other's hands tightly.

The key moment: they are stepping backward out of a shimmering, otherworldly lake as the devil's white stone palace crumbles behind them. The young woman's face shows a mixture of relief and lingering fear as she glances back.

Setting: the edge of a misty, dark blue lake surrounded by gnarled, ancient trees, late afternoon with the sun beginning to set casting long shadows. 

Lighting: soft, diffused golden light filtering through the trees, creating a warm, hopeful atmosphere contrasted against the ethereal glow emanating from the collapsing palace.

Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor illustration; soft bokeh effect in the background, a classic book cover composition.

jobs.title: The Tsarítsa Harpist
jobs.prompt:
Young Tsarítsa, disguised as a male wandering musician, lithe build, determined expression. Face is androgynous, framed by short, choppy brown hair, kind brown eyes, fair skin.
