jobs.prompt: A gaunt, middle-aged Marko the Rich, face contorted in pain, about to leap from a coffin. His body is wrapped in linen, half-soaked with steaming water. A poor moujik with a simple, weathered face and kind eyes, stands over the coffin, holding a metal pot. He wears a homespun shirt and bast shoes, determined but slightly nervous. Inside a dimly lit, ornate Russian Orthodox church at night. Moonlight streams through a high window, casting long shadows revealing scattered piles of gold coins and jewels on the floor. Robbers in dark clothes flee in terror. Hand-painted watercolor in a Studio Ghibli style with a soft bokeh background. Accent colors of gold and watery blues, warm earth tones overall, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Mizgir
jobs.prompt: A stout, elderly Spider, the Mizgir, with a kindly face and wise eyes, greying temples, and eight hairy arms. His round face is jovial, framed by a neatly groomed grey mustache. He wears a patched, forest-green waistcoat of woven silk, and spectacles perched on his nose. He stands triumphantly amidst a glittering, dew-kissed web strung between the gnarled roots of an ancient ash tree. He holds a tiny tankard, offering it with a wry smile to a swarm of bewildered gnats and flies entangled in his sticky trap. Warm sunlight filters through the ash leaves. Golden hour lighting, hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Norka
jobs.prompt:
A youthful Prince Ivan, appearing about 19, lean and determined, with a simpleton's naivete in his eyes, but clad in practical leather armor over homespun. Round, open face, sky-blue eyes fixed with resolve, light brown hair slightly tousled, fair skin dusted with dirt. He wears a worn leather jerkin, simple linen shirt, and sturdy trousers, his only adornment a silver cross.

He stands victorious over the slain Norka – a grotesque, vaguely reptilian beast whose severed head lies nearby on a rocky shore, the hero’s steel sword dripping with dark ichor.

Setting is the blue sea illuminated by a cold dawn, the sky tinged with pale pink and grey. The air is heavy with mist, obscuring the horizon.

Dramatic side lighting emphasizes the Prince's silhouette against the brightening sky, with a cool fill from the ocean reflecting upwards, creating a somber yet triumphant mood.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Priest With The Greedy Eyes
jobs.prompt:
A gaunt priest, mid-40s with a hooked nose, stands sweating, eyes wide with panic, framed by a chaotic scene. His thin, graying hair is plastered to his forehead. Wearing a blood-splattered white cassock, he clutches a gleaming sword, his hands trembling. Before him on a large wooden table lies the dismembered princess, a jumbled mess of limbs in a rusty, water-filled tub. The princess's severed head stares blankly upwards.

Dim, candlelit room in disarray, stone walls, shadows dancing. A single window shows the coming dawn.

The old man is behind the priest putting the princess in place, breathing life into her.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft focus background, storybook cover composition. Predominantly warm earth tones with crimson accents from the blood.

jobs.title: The Ride On The Gravestone
jobs.prompt:
A startled, middle-aged artisan with a round face and rosy cheeks, thinning brown hair, and slightly bloodshot eyes. Wearing a wine-stained linen tunic in shades of brown and tan, slightly askew, and leather boots. Clutching a half-empty wooden tankard, wide-eyed in terror, desperately gripping the cold, mossy gravestone beneath him, realizing it's not a horse.

In a dark, overgrown graveyard, ancient headstones jutting up at odd angles. A full moon casts an eerie, silvery light on the scene, highlighting the swirling mist clinging to the ground. Tombstones are cracked and covered in ivy. In the distance, a village rooster crows, signaling the break of dawn.

Key light from the moon above, cool and spectral and fill light from the graveyard, a ghostly green. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Shroud
jobs.prompt: A young woman, Lezhaka, around 17, with a slightly plump physique, stands frozen in terror. Round face, wide blue eyes filled with fear, disheveled blonde hair escaping her braid, pale skin flushed with a ghostly pallor. She wears a simple homespun linen dress, primarily in shades of brown and beige, clutched at the edges, her bare feet are muddy. The dramatic scene: Lezhaka, in the graveyard, frantically extends a white burial shroud towards a looming, spectral corpse. A weathered grey headstone visible behind the seated corpse adds depth to the scene. The setting: a desolate, overgrown graveyard, ancient, crooked tombstones casting long, eerie shadows, bathed in the cold light of a full moon. Lighting: stark moonlight as the key light, casting sharp shadows and accentuating the ghostly white shroud. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Smith And The Demon
jobs.prompt: A mischievous, youthful demon, appearing around 17, with subtly pointed ears and a sly grin. Sun-kissed skin, sharp face, golden eyes, tousled auburn hair. He wears a soot-stained leather apron over simple brown tunic, sleeves rolled up, holding red-hot tongs. Key scene: he dramatically throws the screaming, overweight, old lady into the fiery furnace of the smithy. Setting: dimly lit, cluttered interior of the blacksmith's workshop, glowing embers, tools scattered around. Golden light from the furnace illuminates the demon's face, casting long shadows. Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, dramatic storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Soldier And The Vampire
jobs.prompt: A young, battle-worn soldier, mid-twenties, lean but strong, stands defiant in a graveyard. Square jaw, determined eyes – dark brown, short-cropped blond hair, weathered skin. Wears a simple green military tunic, brown trousers tucked into worn leather boots, a silver cross necklace his only adornment. In his right hand, a gleaming sword deflects the snarling, grotesque vampire warlock. The warlock is a desiccated corpse in tattered black robes, eyes burning with malevolent red light. They are surrounded by gnarled gravestones under a full moon. The graveyard is filled with twisting shadows, with a single aspen fire ablaze nearby, casting an eerie orange glow. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition with a warm and chilling atmosphere.

jobs.title: The Soldier's Midnight Watch
jobs.prompt:
A young, weary soldier, no older than 25, strong build, with a determined expression. Face is roundish, with piercing blue eyes staring intently, short-cropped brown hair, fair skin dusted with grime. Wearing a tattered green military coat over simple linen shirt, dark brown trousers, tall worn leather boots, gripping a thick, rough-hewn aspen cudgel in his right hand.

Midnight in a rustic merchant's home: the soldier is backlit by moonlight streaming through a small window, as he stands defensively over the open coffin of the witch who has been beaten into submission. He watches the swarming black spirits fleeing the room, as the cock crows in the distance.

Strong directional moonlight, warm fill light from distant candle, producing a dramatic, high-contrast scene.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Three Copecks
jobs.prompt:
A kind-faced orphan boy, no older than 12, slender build, in worn peasant clothing. His face is heart-shaped, with bright, hopeful blue eyes and a smattering of freckles. His hair is light brown, tousled from work and wind. He wears a simple homespun shirt, patched trousers, and rough leather sandals. He's kneeling by a well, about to cast a copeck into the water with a worried but expectant expression.

The well sits amidst a grassy meadow dotted with wildflowers under a bright midday sunlight. In the distance, golden wheat fields stretch toward a quaint, thatched-roof village. White, fluffy clouds drift lazily in the sky. The light illuminates the water's surface, causing the tossed copecks to shine. A sense of innocent hopefulness mixes with humble poverty.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. Warm earth tones with accents of blue and gold.

jobs.title: The Treasure
jobs.prompt: A frail old man, perhaps 70s, with a deeply wrinkled face and wispy white hair, stands hunched over a freshly unearthed metal pot overflowing with gleaming gold ducats. His eyes are wide with disbelief and joy. The setting is a snow-covered graveyard. The ground is frozen and partially broken up. He wears tattered brown peasant clothing— homespun fabric, patched in places — and weathered leather boots. Around him, snow-laden bare trees suggest winter. Key light from above, perhaps a break in the overcast sky illuminating the treasure, with warm fill light reflecting off the gold. Soft, diffused shadows. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. Warm earth tones with gold accents.

jobs.title: The Two Corpses
jobs.prompt: A frightened young soldier, no older than twenty, athletic build, dressed in worn green military garb with tarnished brass buttons. Round face, wide blue eyes filled with terror, light brown hair disheveled, pale skin. He clutches a wooden rosary. The soldier cowers in the corner of a dimly lit Orthodox chapel. Two ghoulish corpses—one prone on a table, the other mid-stride—are locked in a fierce struggle. Tattered grey burial shrouds, decaying flesh, teeth bared in snarls. One corpse gestures aggressively. Dust swirls around them. Stone chapel interior, flickering candlelight, shadows dancing on the walls. Early morning light filters weakly through a stained-glass window. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition, warm earthy tones accented by the flickering yellows and reds of the candles and the ominous greens of decay.

jobs.title: The Two Friends
jobs.prompt: A young, fair-skinned bridegroom named Ivan, around 25, stocky build, stands at a grave. Round face, dark brown kind eyes, neatly trimmed dark hair, slight stubble. Wearing an ornate, brightly embroidered white linen wedding shirt, loose dark trousers, and traditional bast shoes. He holds a lit candle, its wax dripping, and a small wooden cup. The grave has opened, revealing his deceased friend, pale and gaunt, beckoning him inside with a skeletal hand. Overjoyed, yet wary, and melancholy. The cemetery is overgrown, ancient birch trees line the grounds beyond. Dusk falls, with an ethereal, cool blue light filtering through the branches. Soft candle light, with a strong key light from the open grave illuminating the two friends. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Warlock
jobs.prompt:
A young, determined peasant woman, about 20, with a strong build—round face, anxious blue eyes, thick braided blonde hair escaping her shawl, fair skin flushed with fear. She wears a homespun linen dress in muted browns and blues, a simple wooden cross hidden beneath her bodice. Key scene: the woman fearfully holds a silver cross aloft, warding off the reanimated corpse of her warlock father-in-law rising from his wooden coffin. The scene is in a dimly lit, rustic outer chamber of a peasant home at midnight, lit only by flickering candlelight casting long shadows. The air is thick with dust and the smell of graveclothes. The warlock's decaying form, clad in roughspun, reaches out with skeletal hands.
Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Water King And Vasilissa The Wise
jobs.prompt: A regal king, middle-aged, with a worried expression, kneels waist-deep in a turbulent, dark blue sea. His fine beard is soaked, and his ornate gold crown is slightly askew. He wears a heavy, waterlogged velvet robe of deep crimson with gold trim. Looming behind him is a colossal, photorealistic golden eagle with piercing yellow eyes, wings spread wide. The eagle's talons are outstretched, ready to snatch the king from the water. Above, a stormy sky with swirling grey clouds. Below, murky depths hint at unseen creatures. Key light from the upper right, creating stark shadows and highlights, emphasizing the king’s fear. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Water Snake
jobs.prompt: A heartbroken young woman, about 25, slender build, stands at the edge of a murky pond; tears stream down her pale face. Large, sorrowful blue eyes and long, tangled brown hair frame her oval face. She wears a simple, mud-stained linen dress in faded ochre tones. In her arms, she holds a young girl, about 3, while a boy of 5 clings to her side. She gestures sadly toward the water. Misty morning light filters through the weeping willow trees lining the pond. Sunbeams illuminate the pond, reflecting in the dark water. Her children transform into a wren and a nightingale mid-air. She morphs into a cuckoo. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Witch
jobs.prompt: A slender boy named Ivashko, around 8 years old, perched high among oak tree branches, gazing skyward with wide, hopeful eyes. His face is round, fair skin, light brown hair in a tousled bob, wearing a white linen shirt with a red woven belt. Below him, the Witch, a grotesque figure with a hooked nose and wild grey hair, is mid-gnaw on the tree trunk, revealing newly forged iron teeth. Her expression is one of furious determination, flecks of wood flying. She wears tattered brown robes. Above, a flock of white swans and grey geese descends toward Ivashko, wings spread wide. The background shows a twilight forest with soft-focus trees. Warm golden hour lighting illuminates Ivashko, contrasting against cool shadows engulfing the witch. Hand-painted watercolor in a Studio Ghibli style, soft bokeh, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Witch And The Sun's Sister
jobs.prompt: Prince Ivan, a slender young man of twelve, flees on horseback; panicked expression, wind-swept dark hair, fair skin. Round, frightened blue eyes, freckled face. Wears a simple linen tunic, brown leather leggings, and a travel-stained blue cloak. He glances back, terrified, at his monstrous sister, the Witch. She is a grotesque figure, sharp teeth bared in a snarl, wild tangled black hair. Wearing tattered black dress. She's halfway up a towering mountain of uprooted trees, clawing her way towards him. A deep, twilight-blue lake stretches between them. The Sun's Sister's golden, sunbeam-filled house is visible in the distance, high on a hill. Key light from the setting sun, casting long shadows and highlighting the witch's horrifying features. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: The Witch Girl
jobs.prompt: A young, brave Cossack, about 25, muscular build, alert and determined. Round face, piercing blue eyes, dark brown hair in a traditional forelock style, fair skin. Wears a practical, dark green Cossack coat of heavy wool, simple brown trousers tucked into black leather boots, a silver sabre at his hip. Action: In a darkened cottage, he's mid-swing, his sabre flashing as he lops off the arm of a witch reaching in through the window. Expression: Focused, righteous fury. The witch, pale and gaunt, arm severed, recoils in agony. Setting: Small, humble cottage interior at midnight, lit only by a sliver of moon. Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, dynamic storybook cover composition. Color palette: warm browns and greens, with a stark white for the witch and a flash of silver for the sabre.

jobs.title: Vasilissa The Fair
jobs.prompt: A slender, fair-skinned Vasilissa, around 16, stands trembling before Baba Yaga's gate. Her face is round, with wide, innocent blue eyes filled with fear, and long blonde hair hangs loose around her shoulders. She wears a homespun dress of muted browns and greens, cluthing a small, simple doll in her pocket. The gate is made of human bones, topped with glowing skulls. The Baba Yaga, a fearsome crone with a hooked nose, emerges from the dark forest, riding a mortar and pestle. The forest is dense and gnarled, with twisted branches reaching out like skeletal fingers. A full moon casts an eerie glow upon the scene, illuminating the skulls and adding to the nightmarish atmosphere. Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Vazuza And Volga
jobs.prompt: Two young river spirits, Vazuza, appearing as a slender, quick-witted girl of 16 with a mischievous grin, and Volga, a more mature, serene woman of 20, face to face. Vazuza has a heart-shaped face, lively blue eyes, and long, flowing golden hair; fair skin. Volga has an oval face, calm brown eyes, and thick, braided dark brown hair; olive skin. Vazuza wears a simple, light blue linen dress, barefoot, with a woven reed belt. Volga wears a heavier, dark blue woolen gown with long sleeves, adorned with river stones. The key moment: Volga gently embraces the fearful younger Vazuza at Zubtsof. Golden sunlight streams through the trees. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Wednesday
jobs.prompt:
A startled young peasant woman, around 20, slim build, wearing a simple white linen nightdress. Oval face, wide blue eyes filled with terror, long fair hair partially braided. She clutches two wooden buckets, water sloshing over the sides.

She's fleeing her rustic cottage, set against a dark, looming figure of Mother Wednesday. Wednesday appears as an aged woman with piercing eyes. She wears a roughspun white headscarf, her face a mask of fury. Her hands are outstretched, reaching for the fleeing woman.

The scene is a pre-dawn village, dark and still, with only a faint glow emanating from cottage windows. Overcast sky, shadows heavy in the yard.

Moonlight highlights Wednesday's face, casting long, distorted shadows from the buckets. A Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor style, soft bokeh focusing on emotion. Warm earth tones with pale blue accent for the early morning sky. Storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Woe
jobs.prompt:
A gaunt peasant, early 40s, weary face, stands triumphantly over a stone pit. Face lined with hardship, eyes gleaming with newfound hope, stubbled chin, weathered skin. Wearing tattered, earth-toned tunic and patched trousers, barefoot.

He's just sealed "Woe" inside the pit — a shadowy, vaguely humanoid form trapped below. The massive stone is freshly moved, revealing the dark opening.

Setting: A desolate, windswept plain at late afternoon. A simple wooden cart and borrowed oxen stand nearby, partially loaded with glittering gold coins overflowing from sacks. Ominous storm clouds gather on the horizon, mirroring the peasant's recent despair.

Lighting: Harsh, directional light from the setting sun rakes across the scene, casting long, dramatic shadows and highlighting the gold's luster. A sense of hard-won victory mixed with lingering unease.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: HOW AN OLD MAN LOST HIS WEN
jobs.prompt: A kind, elderly man, perhaps 70, with a newly smooth right cheek, beaming with joy. His face is round and jovial, with warm brown eyes sparkling with amusement, short, choppy grey hair, and sun-kissed tan skin. He wears a humble, patched kimono of indigo cotton over a cream-colored underlayer, secured with a simple brown obi; dancing slippers barely peek underneath. Overjoyed, he's mid-dance in a forest clearing after twilight, brandishing an empty sake cup. Torches ring the clearing, illuminating comical demons: ogre-sized, giant-eyed, long-nosed, wide-mouthed, all with horns, reveling. Backlit by the moon, soft golden torchlight casts long shadows. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: MOMOTARO, OR THE STORY OF THE SON OF A PEACH
jobs.prompt: A fifteen-year-old Momotaro, muscular but youthful, stands heroically, peach fuzz hair, determined brown eyes, healthy tan skin. Wears a traditional boy's kimono – sturdy cotton, navy blue with peach blossom accents, tied with a white sash, wooden sandals. Grips a wooden practice sword. He confronts a massive, halved peach–glowing from within–stepping out of it, a divine light illuminating his face. A humble peasant home in the background, soft light from within. Lush green riverbank setting, cherry blossom trees in full bloom. Golden hour lighting, warm and hopeful, emphasizing the magical realism. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: MY LORD BAG OF RICE
jobs.prompt: A 28-year-old Tawara Toda, the "My Lord Bag of Rice" warrior, stands firm on the Dragon King's palace balcony made of white marble. He has a strong physique and determined gaze, tan skin, and short black hair. Wearing traditional samurai armor with red lacquered plates, a flowing blue sash, and carrying a large, dark wooden bow taller than himself. The key action is Toda aiming his final arrow, saliva-tipped, at the monstrous centipede with fiery eyes rapidly approaching from Mikami mountain. Glowing lanterns illuminate its hundred feet. The background shows Lake Biwa under a starlit sky, reflecting the centipede's fiery approach, with the silhouetted mountain in the distance. Key light comes from the centipede's eyes, casting long shadows. Fill lighting is soft and cool, moonlit. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: THE ADVENTURES OF KINTARO, THE GOLDEN BOY
jobs.prompt:
A prodigious 8-year-old Kintaro, stocky build, beaming round face, helps forest animals. Black bowl-cut hair, warm tan skin, sparkling dark eyes.

Wearing a red-brocade sumo mawashi, a golden axe resting on his shoulder.

Iconic moment: Kintaro playfully wrestles a giant black bear, gripping its fur, both laughing heartily with open mouths. Towering trees of the Ashigara Mountains surround them. A monkey, deer, and hare cheer from the sidelines.

Setting: Lush green meadow dotted with wildflowers, beside a rushing river, late afternoon sun creating dappled sunlight.

Lighting: Golden hour, sunlight streams through the trees, accentuating the vibrant colors with a cheerful, energetic mood.

Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: THE BAMBOO-CUTTER AND THE MOON-CHILD
jobs.prompt:
A radiant, 9-year-old Princess Moonlight, small and graceful, with large, curious black eyes, ebony hair styled in a traditional Shimada, porcelain skin. She wears a layered silk kimono in pale blues and lavender, detailed with moonbeam embroidery.

The key scene: Princess Moonlight emerges from a glowing bamboo stalk, eyes wide at the sight of the elderly Bamboo-cutter, who kneels before her in wonder. He is a kind-faced old man dressed in simple, worn robes, his bamboo-cutting axe resting on the ground.

Setting: A sun-dappled bamboo grove as the light flares around the stalk, early-morning mist, dew-kissed leaves.

Lighting: Ethereal, shimmering light emanating from the bamboo, casting soft shadows and highlights on the princess and the bamboo cutter.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: THE FARMER AND THE BADGER
jobs.prompt:
A spry, leather-skinned farmer, 70s, wearing a worn straw hat and patched blue kimono, face etched with shock and grief. Eyes wide with horror, one hand clutching a porcelain bowl. The badger, mid-transformation, half-woman (wearing a tattered floral kimono), half-badger, snarling, claws extended.

The farmer's humble kitchen, dusk light filtering through paper windows. The table set with a tiny dinner tray, a single chopstick fallen to the tatami mat floor. In the background, a glimpse into a darkened pantry, revealing scattered bones.

Golden hour light casts long shadows, highlighting the farmer's despair and the badger's malevolence. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: THE GOBLIN OF ADACHIGAHARA
jobs.prompt: A weary, middle-aged Buddhist priest, face etched with fear, wide eyes, shaved head, tan skin, fleeing a dilapidated cottage. He wears a mud-stained brown robe, prayer beads swinging, clutching a wooden staff. Over his shoulder, he glances back at the cottage, expression a mix of terror and dawning comprehension. The Adachigahara plain stretches behind him, a full autumn moon casting long, eerie shadows. In the cottage doorway stands the hunched silhouette of the goblin, disguised as an old woman with long grey hair, kimono partially transformed, elongated clawed hands reaching out. A single lantern casts a sickly yellow light. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh, storybook cover, warm grays and browns, with a splash of crimson on the cottage door.

jobs.title: THE HAPPY HUNTER AND THE SKILLFUL FISHER
jobs.prompt: A handsome young man, Yama-sachi-hiko "The Happy Hunter", age 20, stands distraught on a rocky seashore. His face is oval, with large, expressive brown eyes filled with worry. His black hair is styled in a traditional chonmage. He wears a simple, light blue linen kimono with darker blue trim, and a white hakama. In his hands, he holds broken pieces of his sword, formed into crude hooks. The key moment is his offering the hooks to his angry brother, unseen but heavily implied. The setting is a rugged Japanese coastline at sunset. Sharp rocks meet the turquoise sea under a sky streaked with orange and pink. Key light comes from the setting sun, casting long shadows. The fill light is soft and warm, adding to the melancholic mood. Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: THE JELLY FISH AND THE MONKEY
jobs.prompt: A stout, wide-eyed monkey, perhaps seven years old, clings to the back of Kurage, the jelly fish. The monkey has a curious, innocent expression. His fur is light brown, face framed by fluffy cheeks. He wears a tiny blue kimono with a wave pattern. Kurage, resembling a tortoise with a translucent, wobbly shell, plods determinedly through shallow water. The key moment: Kurage is mid-sentence, earnestly inviting the monkey to the Dragon King's palace, while the monkey listens intently, perched precariously on Kurage's back. Setting: a sun-drenched, sandy beach of Monkey Island with a single, windswept pine tree. Gentle waves lap the shore. Lighting: golden sunlight from the right, creating long shadows and a warm atmosphere. Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: THE MIRROR OF MATSUYAMA A STORY OF OLD JAPAN
jobs.prompt: Seven-year-old Japanese girl, Michi, beaming with round face, dark eyes, and a neatly-cut bob with bangs, fair skin. She wears a silk kimono in vermillion and gold brocade, a wide scarlet "obi" sash. Michi clutches a porcelain doll in one hand and a lacquered cake box in the other. Her father, sun-bronzed with a kind smile, presents a square wooden box to her mother in their traditional home, a room with tatami mats and shoji screens. The mother, graceful with black hair pulled back, gazes at her reflection in a hand mirror — surprise and wonder on her face. Soft sunlight streams through a window. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition, warm earth tones with vermillion accents.

jobs.title: THE OGRE OF RASHOMON
jobs.prompt: A youthful samurai, Watanabe, mid-twenties, muscular build, determined expression. Strong jawline, piercing brown eyes, black hair in a topknot, tan skin. Battle-worn samurai armor over dark blue robes, katana gleaming at his side, helmet askew. In the dark Rashomon Gate at night, Watanabe slashes with his katana at an immense, hairy ogre arm, thicker than a tree trunk. The ogre's monstrous face is partially visible, enraged eyes blazing like lanterns, fangs bared. Heavy rain, wind howling, paper lanterns flicker. Moonlight breaks through storm clouds, illuminating the fight with cool light. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. Dominant tones: deep blues, grays, crimson blood, ochre gate wood.

jobs.title: THE QUARREL OF THE MONKEY AND THE CRAB
jobs.prompt: A small, distraught young crab beside his deceased father, the elder crab, shell broken and legs askew, lying still and covered in scattered, hard green persimmons. The aged crab has a kind, wrinkled face, long eyestalks, and lies at the base of a tall persimmon tree bursting with ripe, orange fruit high above, with missing fruit and discarded peels littering the ground. In the vibrant autumn afternoon, dappled sunlight filters through the branches, casting long shadows. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor illustration, soft bokeh background, centered book cover composition. Predominantly warm earth tones offset by the bright orange persimmons. The young crab has a determined expression filled with sorrow.

jobs.title: THE SAGACIOUS MONKEY AND THE BOAR
jobs.prompt:
A sagacious monkey, small and wiry, about 5 years old, with intelligent brown eyes and a worried expression. His face is round with peach fuzz, and his hair is a dark, tangled tuft. He wears a worn, patchwork kimono of browns and grays, clutching a small, embroidered pouch.

In the heart of a sun-drenched Japanese home, he rushes to the rescue as a wild boar bolts through an open doorway, carrying a baby swaddled in blue and white. The monkey's master and his wife are in shock.

Setting is a traditional Japanese home with tatami mats, open shoji screens, and morning sunlight streaming through, illuminating dust motes.

Key light comes from the doorway, with warm fill light creating a hopeful mood.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: THE “SHINANSHA,” OR THE SOUTH POINTING CARRIAGE
jobs.prompt:
Emperor Kotei, a wise, middle-aged Chinese ruler with a kind face, dark hair, and a neatly trimmed mustache, wearing golden silk robes with intricate dragon embroidery. He's smiling gently, eyes full of peace and fulfillment. Holding aloft a miniature shinansha chariot in one hand, the tiny figure pointing definitively south.

The scene captures the emperor ascending to heaven on a majestic, golden dragon. The dragon's scales shimmer in the radiant light. Below, the Empress and courtiers desperately clutch at the dragon's beard, their faces a mix of fear and longing.

Setting: A palace courtyard bathed in the fiery glow of sunset with the sky turning a brilliant shade of crimson and gold to welcome the celestial dragon.

Lighting: Divine golden light emanating from the dragon, casting long shadows and illuminating the emperor's serene expression.

Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: THE STONES OF FIVE COLORS AND THE EMPRESS JOKWA. AN OLD CHINESE STORY
jobs.prompt:
Giant Empress Jokwa, 20s, regal and strong, stands protectively. Her face is kind, with determined eyes and a serene expression. Dark hair pulled back in an elaborate style, adorned with jade ornaments; fair skin. She wears a flowing, ornate silk robe in shades of gold and earth tones, embroidered with dragons, a jade pendant around her neck.

The dramatic key scene: Jokwa uses five glowing, multi-colored stones to mend a massive crack in the sky above a ravaged landscape. Expressions of awe and hope on Jokwa's face.

Setting: A desolate, cracked plain in ancient China, post-flood. Broken architecture, dark storm clouds gathering. A sliver of golden sunlight pierces through the crack, illuminating Jokwa.

Dramatic lighting: Divine light emanating from the stones highlighting Jokwa, casting long shadows across the landscape. Warm, hopeful fill light.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: THE STORY OF PRINCE YAMATO TAKE
jobs.prompt: Sixteen-year-old Prince Yamato Take, disguised as a beautiful woman with flowing black hair and delicate features, stands in a dimly lit tent. He tricked Kumaso, one of the Kumaso Brothers, into thinking he was a beautiful woman. He wears an ornate silk kimono, richly patterned with flowering cherry blossoms, cinched with a wide obi. In his right hand, he brandishes a dagger, its blade glinting in the low light. Kumaso lies dying at his feet, a goblet spilled beside him. The tent is sparsely furnished, with woven mats and low tables. Light comes from a single flickering oil lamp. The background blurs with soft bokeh. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor with a storybook cover composition. Palette of warm golds, deep reds, and soft pinks.

jobs.title: THE STORY OF PRINCESS HASE. A STORY OF OLD JAPAN
jobs.prompt: Twelve-year-old Princess Hase, a slender girl with a kind face, is dressed in an elaborate silk kimono, cherry blossom patterns, mainly in shades of peach and gold. Her hair is long, black, and adorned with delicate floral hairpins. She kneels beside her much younger step-brother, both are surrounded by miniature samurai figures and toy weapons scattered on tatami mats. With concerned face she offers him a cup of sweet wine, gesturing towards the toys while telling him a story, her expression gentle and loving. Terute, the stepmother, stands behind them, a sinister smile barely concealed. The setting is a traditional Japanese room, shoji screens filtering soft, diffused daylight. A vase with cherry blossoms stands in the background. Key light streams in from the windows, illuminating Hase. The overall mood is one of impending tragedy, heightened by the warm, innocent interaction of the children. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: THE STORY OF THE MAN WHO DID NOT WISH TO DIE
jobs.prompt:
A youthful Sentaro, around 32, slender build, dressed in pale blue silk hakama and a cream-colored kimono, stands awestruck. His face is round, with kind brown eyes wide with surprise. Short, neatly combed dark hair frames his face, and his skin is a warm, light tan. He clutches a small, intricately folded paper crane in his right hand, gazing up at a luminous figure of Jofuku.

Jofuku, wreathed in swirling clouds of golden light, extends a hand in blessing. The key scene captures the moment of granting Sentaro's wish. The setting is the innermost shrine, its dark wood glowing with ethereal light. Soft golden light emanates from Jofuku, casting long shadows.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. Warm earth tones with pale blue and gold accents.

jobs.title: THE STORY OF THE OLD MAN WHO MADE WITHERED TREES TO FLOWER
jobs.prompt:
A kind elderly Japanese man, about 70, with a weathered face and gentle eyes; Shiro, a medium-sized white dog resembling a wolf cub, stands at his side. The man's face is lined with age and love, and Shiro is looking up at him trustingly.

The man has a wrinkled face, warm brown eyes filled with affection; short, gray hair peeks from under a straw hat; tan skin. He wears a simple brown kimono tied with a cream-colored obi. Shiro has thick white fur, pointed ears, and a bushy tail.

He is kneeling, petting Shiro, who is digging excitedly at the base of an ancient, gnarled yenoki tree, its roots exposed. They are in a lush green field, bathed in the light of late afternoon. Gold coins spill generously from the freshly dug earth, glinting in the sunlight.

Warm golden light streams through the branches of the yenoki tree, casting long shadows and highlighting the coins.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: THE STORY OF URASHIMA TARO, THE FISHER LAD
jobs.prompt:
A kind-faced, youthful Urashima Taro, age 20, kneels in his small wooden fishing boat, gazing in astonishment at a large, ancient sea turtle. He wears a simple indigo-dyed cotton fishing robe, tied with a brown hemp cord. His dark, wavy hair is windswept, framing a round face with warm, brown eyes wide with wonder. In the boat, a woven bamboo fishing basket rests beside a coil of rope.

The pivotal moment captures the turtle speaking to Urashima, head raised from the water. The turtle's shell is intricately patterned and weathered, barnacles clinging to its surface. The backdrop is a serene, early morning sea, with soft sunlight glinting on the gentle waves. Distant, hazy islands suggest the Japanese coastline.

Golden hour lighting, with warm sunlight illuminating Urashima’s face, and cooler blue tones reflecting off the water and sky.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: THE TONGUE-CUT SPARROW
jobs.prompt: A kind, elderly Japanese man with a wrinkled, smiling face, gentle eyes, and a neatly trimmed grey mustache, stands outside a miniature, ornate house nestled within a bamboo grove. He wears a simple, patched kimono in muted indigo. With outstretched hands, his face radiates joy as he greets Suzume-san, his beloved sparrow. The sparrow, depicted as a fairy with iridescent wings and a newly regrown tongue, bows gracefully. The house features delicate paper lanterns casting a warm glow. The bamboo grove is lush and green, detailed with soft beams of sunlight. Golden hour lighting, Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: THE WHITE HARE AND THE CROCODILES
jobs.prompt:
A small, shivering white hare, no more than a few months old, sits hunched and utterly naked, pink skin raw and exposed. Large, expressive eyes, brimming with tears, fill the center of a triangular face. Lacking fur, its ears appear oversized and awkwardly angled.

The hare is stranded mid-hop on the final crocodile's back, its hind legs still extended in its next bound towards the sandy shore of Inaba. Below, rows of menacing green crocodiles, with snouts agape, form a living bridge across the turquoise sea. The lead crocodile's eyes gleam with angered triumph.

Setting sun casts long shadows, with the island of Oki silhouetted in the distance. The sky fades from fiery orange to deep violet.

Golden hour, soft rim-light highlighting the wet scales of the crocodiles and the glistening skin of the hare.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Episode 000: Prolog
jobs.prompt:
A youthful Batara Guru, appearing about 18, athletic build, descends from the heavens, strands of hair escaping his elaborate updo. Face is determined, bronze skin, dark eyes reflecting both fear and resolve. He wears a ceremonial Bugis robe of woven silk, predominantly gold and crimson, adorned with intricate patterns, clutching a handful of vibrantly colored rice.

The iconic moment: Batara Guru's arrival on Earth, scattering the rice seeds that burst into instant vegetation and small animals. The expression on his face mixes awe and trepidation.

Setting is the primordial Earth, a desolate landscape transforming into lush greenery around him, baby reptiles emerging. The time of day is dawn, with soft light breaking through the clouds above. Rainbow stairs fade into the heavens.

Lighting is ethereal, with a soft, golden key light emanating from the sky above, contrasted by warmer, earth-toned fill light reflecting off the newly formed landscape.

Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, centered storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Episode 001: Batara Guru Raja Luwu Pertama
jobs.prompt:
A striking, young Batara Guru, appearing mid-twenties, athletic build, stands knee-deep in shimmering tropical water. His strong face, with kind eyes and a determined expression, is framed by a cascade of dark, wet hair. He wears simple, earth-toned woven trousers and a flowing white sash. Sun-kissed skin glistens in the dappled light.

The key moment: Batara Guru gazes tenderly at We Nyili' Timo as she is being protected by a golden barrier/raft, extending his hand towards her in genuine courtship.

Setting: The magical underwater palace of Pertiwi, glowing coral reefs and luminous architecture visible in the background. It is illuminated by shafts of brilliant sunlight piercing through the sea. The water is crystal clear, turquoise, with gentle ripples.

Lighting: Soft, ethereal light filtering from the surface creates a magical, dreamlike atmosphere. Golden hour filtering through the water.

Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

He wears ornate, woven silk robes in earth tones, accented with gold embroidery, and traditional Bugis jewelry. The ship cuts through a turquoise sea under a vibrant sunrise, the sky awash with warm orange and pink hues. Distant islands hint at Tompotikka. Golden light illuminates Batara Lattu, casting long shadows, while the ship's details glow. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, centered composition.

He wears a royal blue and gold silk sash over simple linen work clothes, partially obscuring his face. In the background, La Pangoriseng and La Temalureng watch.

The palace courtyard of Tompotikka, late afternoon sun casting long shadows, a blend of laborers and watchful soldiers amid half-finished repairs. The atmosphere is thick with unspoken tension and romantic expectation.

Warm, golden sidelight highlights Batara Lattu, soft fill light on We Datuk Sengeng -- Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.prompt:
Sawerigading, a muscular Bugis prince in his early twenties, stands on the deck of the Walen Renge, a newly built, majestic ship with brown and gold sails. He has striking Bugis features, dark hair swept back by the wind, and intense, sorrowful eyes. Sawerigading wears a simple brown linen shirt and a gold-embroidered sarong, clutching a woven belt, a gift from We Tenriabeng.

Setting: The port of Ale Luwu. It is dawn, the sky a mix of dark grey storm clouds and soft golden light breaking through.

Lighting: Divine light from above illuminates the ascending figures, casting long shadows. The ship is lit by a somber, diffused light; hints of golden light add a touch of hope.

Datu Patoto'e: strong jawline, deep-set brown eyes filled with resolve, neatly styled dark hair streaked with silver. Bronze skin, regal bearing. Datu Palinge': oval face, large, almond-shaped eyes reflecting concern, flowing dark hair interwoven with golden threads, pale skin radiating a soft glow.

Setting: The celestial palace of Langit, with swirling clouds and shimmering stars visible through arched doorways. The time is twilight. The atmosphere is heavy with unspoken fears.

Angular face, dark eyes, long black hair pulled back in a topknot, bronze skin. Adorned in flowing white silk pants, gold bracelets, and a red sash. Datu Patoto'e, framed in a palace window overlooking the training yard, watches with pride and concern. His face etched with worry. Regal purple robes, elaborate gold headdress.

jobs.prompt:
A youthful La Toge Langiq, around 17, stands tall and regal, a slender physique suggesting agility, with luminous eyes hinting at innate wisdom. He wears a flowing robe of shimmering gold silk, layered with celestial blue accents, intricate patterns of stars woven into the fabric. A jeweled kris hangs at his waist.

He gazes down from the clouds of Langit toward the green Earth, a determined but wistful expression on his face, bidding farewell to his home. The Kingdom of Langit hovers above, golden spires piercing the clouds, soft pastel hues bleeding in the sky.

Warm earth tones with accents of red and gold.
