jobs.prompt: A muscular, enraged Sangkuriang, age 25, with a wild, hateful expression, stands on the shore of a dark, inky lake. His face is angular, jaw clenched, eyes burning a furious red. His long, black hair is matted and wild. Wearing tattered brown pants and leather wristbands. He's kicking a massive, upturned wooden boat. The boat is mid-air, splintering into fragments of wood and black ink. Behind him, the newly formed Mount Tangkuban Perahu rises. The mountain's surface is covered not in trees, but in colossal, glowing Lontara script carvings. Nighttime, with a sickly moon illuminating the scene. Key light from the red glow in Sangkuriang's eyes, casting long shadows. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, dramatic storybook cover composition. Warm earth tones and fiery reds.

jobs.title: s01e03 bendungan air mata outline
jobs.prompt: A teenage Sangkuriang, muscular build, haunted eyes, stands on a misty forest path. Angular face, dark brown eyes filled with anguish, long messy black hair framing his face, tan skin. He wears torn deerskin clothing, brown and beige hues, a crude hunting knife at his hip. In his hand, he clutches the bloody collar of Tumang, his canine father. A shadowy, blind hermit (Adit) looms behind him, whispering. The Parahyangan forest, dense and ancient, surrounds them. Soft morning light filters through the trees, highlighting the scene with an eerie, golden glow. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: s01e04 abu dan besi full script
jobs.prompt: A nineteen-year-old Cinderella, soot-smudged and muscular, stands defiant atop a shattered throne. Face: angular, tear-streaked grime, eyes glacial with resolve. Hair: matted black, partially obscuring her hardened expression. Wardrobe: tattered grey rags, cinder-covered, clutching a heavy black iron axe. Key Scene: triumphant but desolate, surveying the ruins of the kingdom. Setting: the throne room, dawn light filtering through broken windows, casting long shadows. The dead prince lies unseen at her feet. Lighting: harsh light highlighting the ash and blood on Cinderella's hands and axe. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor style, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition, warm grays and blacks with a single crimson accent on the bloody axe.

jobs.title: s01e04 abu dan besi outline
jobs.prompt:
Cinderella, age 17, slender but strong, soot-stained face, haunted eyes. Face partially obscured by ash, long black hair matted with soot, pale skin smeared with grime. Wears tattered servant clothes, roughspun gray dress, ripped apron, and holds a gleaming iron axe.

Key scene: Cinderella standing amidst a burning palace hall, embers swirling around her, a shattered glass slipper under her bloodied bare foot. Her expression is a mixture of triumph and horror after slaying the prince. She didn't go to the ball.

Setting: Throne room engulfed in flames, broken pillars, dying torches flick

jobs.title: s01e05 ular di dalam nadi full script
jobs.prompt: A porcelain-skinned, adult BAWANG MERAH, early 20s, stands serenely in a rural village square; waist-length black hair, flawless oval face, vacant silvery eyes. She wears a simple, elegant off-white linen kebaya with delicate silver thread embroidery around the sleeves; a dull silver bracelet adorns her right wrist. Key scene: emotionless face turned towards a trembling BAWANG PUTIH who stands a short distance away, clutching a dagger behind her back. The edges of Bawang Merah's neck and face show subtle bulges moving just beneath the skin. Setting: a traditional Indonesian village courtyard at dawn, mist hangs low to the ground. Golden light filters through the palm trees; dark shadows add a sense of unease. Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, book cover composition.

jobs.title: s01e05 ular di dalam nadi outline
jobs.prompt: Bawang Merah, 17, porcelain doll-like, vacant expression, snakes visibly pulsing beneath her skin like veins. Oval face, large empty light brown eyes staring straight ahead, long waist-length black hair cascading down her back, pale skin. Dressed in a traditional red and gold kebaya, antique silver bracelet on her right wrist, intricate batik pattern. Key scene: Bawang Merah sits serenely on a stone bench in a lush garden, expressionless as colorful birds peck at her outstretched hand, snakes subtly moving under her translucent skin. Setting: Overgrown Javanese garden, golden hour, dappled sunlight filtering through tropical foliage, distant temple ruins. Key light from the right, soft warm fill, highlighting the snake-like patterns, creating a chilling, serene mood. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: s01e06 gema kehampaan full script
jobs.prompt: A young man, Adit, 20s, thin build, dressed in a dark academia style: black turtleneck, rumpled brown corduroy blazer, shattered Lontara Link glasses hanging off his face. His right hand is entirely black ink. He stands at a window overlooking his mother, Arini, a kind-faced woman in her 50s, watering white roses in a moonlit garden. The scene is from Adit's POV. He's smirking sinisterly at the viewer, knowing. Moonlight streams in, highlighting the ink spreading up his arm. In the foreground, on a desk, is a handwritten manuscript titled "AKSARA MURKA: SEBUAH EKSPERIMEN TENTANG KESUNYIAN ANAKKU" - partially obscured. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background focus on Adit's face and black-inked hand, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: s01e06 gema kehampaan outline
jobs.prompt:
A slender, androgynous Adit, age 17, "The Savior," stands before a swirling cerulean portal. Face is gaunt, expression determined with a hint of manic obsession; eyes glow with digital light. Long, dark hair is partially shaved, revealing glowing Lontara script beneath the skin. Wears a tattered grey hoodie over a futuristic black bodysuit. Adit holds the Stylus Keabadian, a glowing blue pen, aloft.

In the foreground, children with vacant eyes walk toward the portal, their bodies dissolving into streams of binary code and glowing Lontara characters swirling around them. The cavern entrance has the faint outline of a M. Escher-style door frame, warped and impossible.

The portal is a gateway to a blinding white digital utopia. Gigantic ink-stained hands reach down from a stormy sky, tearing at the portal. Harsh light erupts, casting long, distorted shadows.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, book cover composition.

jobs.title: Aryo Menak Sanoyo
jobs.prompt:
A handsome, youthful Ki Aryo Menak Sanoyo, no older than 20, muscular build, with a mischievous glint in his eyes. Oval face, dark brown eyes wide with surprise, neatly styled dark hair, light tan skin. Dressed in royal Majapahit garb - golden silk tunic, ornate belt with a kris, dark brown trousers. He is half-crouched behind a massive tree, clutching a shimmering, gossamer selendang (shawl) behind his back, a guilty yet intrigued expression on his face as he tosses a small pebble into a moonlit pond.

The Empang Sarasido reflects the full moon, surrounded by lush, dark green foliage. In the water, several ethereal, nude nymphs—the bidadari—are startled, their forms partially submerged. Key light from the full moon, creating a silvery, magical atmosphere, with warm, subtle fill light filtering through the trees.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Asal Mula Desa Tiron
jobs.prompt:
Pangeran Denowo, a wiry, determined Javanese warrior in his late 30s, disguised as a commoner, is kneeling before the beautiful Endang Palupi, a village demang's daughter in her late teens.

Endang has an oval face, kind brown eyes, and long, flowing black hair. She wears a simple blue kebaya and batik sarong. Pangeran Denowo, dressed in roughspun brown clothing, holds her hand, his face etched with both love and the burden of his true identity.

The key moment: Denowo reveals his princely origins to Endang, his expression a mix of vulnerability and hope as he seeks her understanding.

The setting is the lush, overgrown garden of the Kademangan Gedangan village, with bamboo fences and thatched roofs. Late afternoon sunlight filters through the trees, creating dappled shadows. The air is thick with humidity and the scent of jasmine.

Warm golden light bathes the scene, highlighting the emotional intimacy of the moment, with soft, diffused fill light.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. Celadon and indigo accents.

jobs.title: Asal Mula Nama Ngawi
jobs.prompt: A weary but determined Tumenggung Malang Negoro, age 40s, muscular physique visible beneath his traditional Javanese attire. His face is etched with concern, strong jawline, piercing brown eyes filled with worry, neatly-groomed black mustache and goatee, warm tan skin. He wears a dark brown batik udeng (headcloth) and a simple but elegant surjan (jacket), a golden keris (dagger) tucked into his waist sash. He holds open a crumpled letter revealing threatening text. Key moment: Tumenggung reading the ominous letter by dim candlelight. Set in his private study within the Kadipaten Tunggul palace. The room features intricately carved wooden furniture, stacks of ancient scrolls, and soft light filtering through a window overlooking a courtyard. Lighting: Warm, localized candlelight emanating from a ornate brass lamp on the desk, casting long shadows across the room, creating a sense of foreboding. Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition, earthy tones with accents of gold and deep red.

jobs.title: Asal Usul Aksara Jawa
jobs.prompt: Young wandering sage Ajisaka, about 25, lean but strong, handsome features, thoughtful expression. Long, dark hair in a simple topknot, piercing dark eyes, smooth tan skin. Wears simple brown woven robes, travel-worn, with a red sash. Key scene: Ajisaka kneels in anguish inside the Widodaren cave, finding the bodies of Dora and Sembodo. Bodies of Dora and Sembodo lie nearby, each facing different directions. The cave walls are rough and damp. Overcast daylight streams weakly into the cave entrance, illuminating dust motes in the air. Golden light from a mystical source highlights Ajisaka's face in grief. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Asal Usul Banyuwangi
jobs.prompt:
Young, pregnant Sri Tanjung, 20, stands resolute, jasmine flower in her long black hair, almond-shaped eyes glistening with unshed tears. Ivory skin, delicate features, full lips set in a determined line. She wears a traditional Javanese kemben of deep indigo batik, accented with a gold selendang sash, pregnancy subtly visible.

Key scene: Sri Tanjung faces her enraged husband, Patih Sidapeksa, holding a keris, his face contorted by rage and betrayal, tears streaming down her face as she pleads her innocence.

Setting: Interior of a traditional Javanese pendopo, intricately carved wooden pillars, dappled sunlight filtering through the open walls, casting long shadows on the stone floor. Offerings of fruit and flowers are visible.

Lighting: Soft, diffused light from the open pendopo, highlighting Sri Tanjung's face and the glint of the keris. Warm, golden hour tones, creating a tense, emotional atmosphere.

Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Asal Usul Desa Diponggo
jobs.prompt:
A young woman named Siti Zainab, around 20, slender, with determined eyes, stands on a beach in the moonlight. Her face is streaked with tears, but her jaw is firm. She has kind eyes. Long, dark hair is partially covered by a simple, earth-toned hijab. Worn, patched brown robes conceal her noble clothing. She's barefoot, clutching a small, wooden staff.

The key scene: Siti Zainab kneels on the sand, arms raised in prayer to the night sky. The vast, starlit sky dominates the scene, reflecting in her tearful gaze. Gentle waves lap at the shore. Scattered coconuts lie on the sand.

Setting: A remote, tropical beach on Bawean Island at night. Palm trees frame the scene. The atmosphere is serene and sorrowful.

Lighting: Soft moonlight illuminates Siti Zainab's face, creating a halo effect. Warm, gentle light from distant village homes reflects on the water.

Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Asal Usul Nama Desa Bendungan
jobs.prompt: A sturdy, middle-aged Ki Ronggo Sejati, weathered face, radiating wisdom and kindness. Kind, crinkled eyes, neatly tied back grey-streaked brown hair, tanned skin. Wears simple, earth-toned peasant clothing, rolled-up sleeves, a woven belt holding a small hand ax. He stands on a partially completed earthen dam, gesturing encouragingly towards villagers. They are working together, moving rocks, reinforcing the structure with timber. The sun sets dramatically behind the lush, terraced rice paddies, reflecting amber light on the water flowing through the new irrigation channels. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, warm earthy tones with accents of emerald green and sky blue on the horizon, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Asal Usul Nama Majapahit
jobs.prompt: Amidst a sun-drenched clearing, young Raden Wijaya, lithe and determined at 20, clad in humble brown linen garb, surveys his weary soldiers. A few spit out chewed fruit, their faces contorted in disgust — eyes wide and teary. Wiry hair plastered to their foreheads, sweat-soaked tunics cling to their backs. All around, towering maja trees laden with round, green fruit dominate the Tarik forest. Sunlight filters through the dense canopy, casting dappled shadows on the scene. Raden Wijaya holds a half-eaten fruit, his brow furrowed in thought, as he recognizes the overpowering bitterness. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. Golden hour lighting, warm earth tones contrasted by the vibrant green foliage and the soldiers' expressions.

jobs.title: Asal Usul Reog
jobs.prompt:
A wizened Ki Ageng Kutu, age 60, a strong but weary Javanese man with kind eyes, contemplates the kingdom's decay. His face is etched with concern, framed by long, grey-streaked black hair pulled back in a simple topknot, tan skin worn by the sun. He wears a simple, earth-toned Javanese surjan jacket of coarse woven cotton, a kris tucked into his waist sash.

He sits in deep thought within his padepokan, late evening. In the dance studio, silhouetted figures of Singo Barong (lion mask with peacock feathers) and Jathilan dancers are practicing Reog. The performance is Ki Ageng Kutu's psychological rebellion. His posture is a mix of sadness and resolve as he observes the dancers.

Setting: The rustic, dimly lit interior of the padepokan, stone walls, wooden beams, simple mats on the floor.

Lighting: Warm candlelight from a nearby oil lamp casts long shadows, creating a contemplative mood.
Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor illustration, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. Accent colors: deep red and gold.

jobs.title: Asal Usul Sedudo
jobs.prompt:
Ki Ageng Ngliman, appearing as a weathered man in his late 50s with a strong build, sits meditating at the base of a waterfall. His face is etched with deep lines of sorrow, yet his eyes are closed in peaceful contemplation. He has a neatly trimmed grey beard and long white hair pulled back into a simple topknot, skin tone is tanned and leathery.
He wears simple white robes of thick homespun cotton, a strand of prayer beads around his wrist. The waterfall of Sedudo cascades behind him, sunlight glinting off the water. Moss-covered stones and lush ferns surround him.
Ki Ageng Ngliman appears to be achieving enlightenment and inner peace despite his grief. The surrounding forest is dense and green, lit by dappled sunlight piercing through the canopy. Golden hour lighting with a warm, ethereal glow.
Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Asal Usul Surabaya
jobs.prompt:
A determined, handsome Wirabaya, age 20, pulls a princess away from the grasp of a royal guard. Wirabaya has a strong build, determined brown eyes, dark, messy hair, and tanned skin. He wears simple brown leather armor over a peasant tunic, a red sash around his waist, and carries a small dagger. The princess, age 18, with a delicate face, pleading dark eyes, and long black hair partially disheveled, wears a flowing magenta silk gown, torn at the hem, and a gold bracelet.

The key moment is the tug-of-war over the princess. Wirabaya is resolute; the princess looks torn but leans toward Wirabaya. The guard, Patih Wirasura, is muscular and menacing in ornate Singosari armor.

The setting is a muddy crossroads in Bubutan at dusk. Overcast sky, with a few rays of light piercing through the trees. Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Asal Usul Tradisi Nyadran di Desa Ketingan
jobs.prompt: A pregnant Dewi Sekar Dadu, 20, stands protectively in front of Syaikh Maulana Ishak, 30, a serene but determined expression on his face, dark hair and a modest Islamic robe. She has a round face, dark, worried eyes, and long dark hair, wearing a traditional Blambangan batik dress in earth tones with a green sash. They are cornered in a palace chamber, Bajul Sengara, the menacing, muscular royal advisor in ornate gold armor, advances with a raised sword, his face twisted with rage. The chamber is richly decorated with Javanese carvings. Harsh light streams through a window, casting long shadows. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Asal Usul Warga Nggolan Pantang Menikah dengan Warga Mirah
jobs.prompt:
A handsome, muscular Joko Lancur, appearing 19 years old, stands awkwardly in a bamboo-fenced garden. His face is flushed, dark eyes wide with bashful admiration, black hair slightly disheveled from chasing a rooster. He wears a simple woven shirt, brown trousers, and a gambler's sash. In his hands he holds an injured, muddy-brown rooster.

Siti Amirah, a beautiful young woman of 18 with an oval face and kind dark eyes, peeks from behind a batik cloth hanging on a line. Her dark hair is covered by a white kerudung. She wears a tan cotton dress. She smiles gently at Joko, holding a batik tool in her hand.

Sunlight filters through the lush trees, casting golden light on the scene with dappled shadows. The air is filled with the scent of blooming jasmine. A wooden Javanese house sits in the soft-focus background. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Bambang Widyaka
jobs.prompt:
A youthful Bambang Widyaka, 17, lean and determined, with kind eyes. Oval face, dark brown eyes filled with resolve, neatly tied back dark hair, tanned skin. Wears a simple brown homespun tunic, dark green sash, and sturdy leather sandals. Grips a small, unassuming wooden rooster toy.

Key scene: in a moment of frustrated inspiration, he slams the rooster doll to the ground, watching in amazement as it transforms into a magnificent crowing rooster.

Setting: dusty clearing outside a humble hermitage; dawn light filtering through a lush jungle. Mist hangs low to the ground, catching the first rays of sun. Ferns and creeping vines abound.

Lighting: golden dawn light casting long shadows, soft diffused fill light, creating a magical, hopeful mood.

Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor illustration, soft bokeh background, centered book cover composition. Warm earth tones with accents of gold and forest green.

jobs.title: Ceprotan
jobs.prompt: A youthful Sekartaji, appearing 17, slender with delicate features, sits wearily, holding her aching calf. Her face is oval, large dark eyes conveying exhaustion, long black hair loosely braided, fair skin lightly flushed. She wears a simple, travel-stained green kemben and batik skirt, a discarded selendang shawl pools beside her. The iconic moment: Sekartaji accidentally spills coconut water onto the ground on Monday Kliwon. Ki Godek, an elderly Javanese man with a kind face, kneels beside her, offering the halved coconut shell. A newly-built, rustic shelter of branches and leaves stands behind them. The setting is a clearing in a lush Javanese forest, late afternoon, dappled sunlight filtering through the leaves. Key light from the side illuminates Sekartaji's face. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Cerita Arya Bambang Situbondo
jobs.prompt: A wise, physically challenged but powerful Sunan Patok, early 40s, sits protectively in front of the heavily pregnant Dewi Manjasari, mid 20s, oval face, dark concerned eyes, long black hair partially unbound, pale skin tone. She wears a flowing green and gold maternity gown of fine silk, looking up at her protector with gratitude. Sunan Patok wears simple brown robes, carries a distinctive whip. Key scene: Sunan Patok, protecting Dewi Manjasari from the lecherous Prabu Sabrang Wetan. Forest setting, dappled sunlight filtering through the leaves, creating a sense of vulnerability. Golden hour lighting, warm and hopeful, with a soft, diffuse glow on Dewi Manjasari's face, highlighting her distress. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, centered composition for storybook cover art.

jobs.title: Cerita Sendang Air Manis
jobs.prompt:
Raden Ayu Mayangsari, a striking woman of 18, stands tall and proud amidst a tense standoff. Her face is oval-shaped, with bright, fiery eyes that convey both anger and resolve. Her long, black hair is intricately styled, cascading down her back. She has fair skin, high cheekbones. She wears a traditional Javanese kebaya of deep emerald green, adorned with intricate gold embroidery, cinched at the waist with a batik sash. A keris is tucked into the sash.

The most dramatic moment: Mayangsari defiantly rejects the marriage proposal from the Prince of Klungkung.

The scene is set in the bustling courtyard of Desa Agel. Traditional Javanese architecture surrounds them, with intricately carved wooden pillars and tiled roofs. The time of day is late afternoon, casting long shadows across the courtyard. The light emanates from the left, highlighting Mayangsari's face and creating a dramatic contrast. The warmth of the light enhances the golden hues of her jewelry.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Cerita Si Gemuk dan Si Kurus
jobs.prompt: A stout, middle-aged Bapak Gemuk, radiating peaceful resolve despite his fear, faces a colossal white tiger. His round face is stoic, eyes wide with apprehension, short grey hair slightly disheveled, and warm brown skin glistens with sweat. He wears simple brown Javanese robes of rough woven cotton, secured with a faded batik sash. Bapak Gemuk offers himself to the tiger in a moment of sacrifice, hands open in supplication. The scene is a misty mountain clearing high on Gunung Wilis, dappled sunlight pushing through dense jungle foliage. Key light comes from above, illuminating his face; soft, warm fill light creates depth; the mood is tense but hopeful. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover. Accent colors: deep forest green, muted gold.

jobs.title: Jaka Berek
jobs.prompt: A slender, determined Jaka Berek, age 16, stands before Adipati Jayengrana in the Surabaya Kadipaten. Jaka has a kind face, dark brown kind eyes filled with hope, and neatly braided dark hair. He has tan skin and a wiry build. He wears simple woven brown trousers and a cream-colored linen shirt, clutching a vibrantly patterned cinde Puspita. In the foreground, Jaka presents the selendang to Adipati Jayengrana whose expression shifts from stern skepticism to stunned recognition, seated on an ornate teakwood throne. Sawungsari and Sawungrana glare jealously from either side, adorned in elaborate batik and ceremonial krises. Late afternoon sunlight streams through the open pavilion, casting long shadows and illuminating dust motes. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. Accent colors: deep red, indigo.

jobs.title: Kayangan Api
jobs.prompt:
A wizened, yet strong Mbah Pandhe, around 60, with the muscular build of a blacksmith, stands centered, holding a newly forged kris. His face is deeply etched with lines of wisdom and exertion, determined eyes the color of molten steel, graying hair pulled back from his forehead, sun-weathered brown skin. He wears a simple woven brown sarong, bare-chested to show blacksmith's arms, adorned with forge soot.

The kris, gleaming with heat against the cool air, is the focal point. Mbah Pandhe has a focused look as he presents the blade, its intricate carvings reflecting the firelight.

The scene is his open-air forge at dusk, Kayangan Api flames dancing in the background. Sparks fly around the anvil. The background shows the split landscape of fire and water.

Warm light from the forge illuminates his face and the kris, contrasting with the cool twilight.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. Accent colors of fiery orange and cooling blue.

jobs.title: Ki Ageng Kalak
jobs.prompt:
A dignified, handsome Prawirayuda, 20, stands heartbroken, gazing at his beloved Sekararum. Sekararum, 19, beautiful with a slender build, stands beside him, equally despondent. Her tear-streaked face conveys immense sorrow.

Prawirayuda: strong jawline, dark expressive eyes filled with anguish, flowing dark brown hair, tan skin exuding Javanese nobility. Dressed in a simple yet elegant brown batik kemben and a maroon surjan, adorned with a kris tucked into his waistcloth.

Sekararum: oval face, long black hair cascading down her back, delicate eyebrows above her weeping eyes, fair skin. She wears a muted green kebaya and a brown batik sarong, a single jasmine flower tucked behind her ear, now wilting.

They stand before a stern Prabu Brawijaya seated on his ornate throne within the Majapahit palace. He gestures disapprovingly.

Setting: The opulent palace hall, indicated by intricate wood carvings and gold accents, bathed in the late afternoon light streaming through arched windows. The light emphasizes the deep shadows on the couple's faces.

Warm golden-hour light illuminates the scene, casting long shadows, highlighting the tension and heartbreak of the moment.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Ki Ageng Tarup
jobs.prompt:
Ki Ageng Tarub, a middle-aged Javanese scholar with a kind face, stands protectively before a young woman, Nawang Wulan, around 17, slender with long dark hair, startled and clutching a water jug. Her face is tilted up towards Ki Ageng, eyes wide with gratitude. She wears a simple batik kemben and sarong, primarily indigo and brown. Between them, a brightly colored serpent slithers away into the night.

Setting: The edge of a serene, moonlit telaga (lake) reflecting the full moon amidst a lush bamboo forest—the very source of life for the village.

Moonlight streams through the bamboo, casting dappled shadows. Warm light emanates from Ki Ageng's simple white robe, emphasizing his calm demeanor.

Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, capturing the magic of the moment; soft bokeh background, centered, full-body storybook cover composition; warm earth tones with indigo and green accents.

jobs.title: Kiai Pacet
jobs.prompt:
A muscular, middle-aged Kiai Pacet, stern but wise, with a neatly trimmed white beard and kind eyes. His strong, square face conveys both authority and compassion. He wears a flowing, earth-toned silat robe of roughspun cotton, cinched with a woven sash. In his right hand, he firmly grips a wooden staff.

The scene captures the dramatic moment inside the candlelit cave. Kiai Pacet has just transformed, mid-motion, from human to a majestic Javanese lion. His expression a mix of sorrow and fierce protection.

The mouth of the cave opens to a lush, moonlit Majapahit landscape. Soft, golden light from unseen candles flickers on the cave walls.

Kiai Pacet repels the attack of two shadowy figures representing the treacherous Kiai Kasanbesari and Pangeran Kalang.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition, warm earth tones with accents of deep indigo and gold.

jobs.title: Laskar Banci
jobs.prompt:
A troop of ten slender, androgynous "banci" warriors, appearing 18-20 years old, with determined expressions. Their faces are lightly powdered, with defined cheekbones, almond-shaped brown eyes, and long, dark hair styled in traditional Javanese updos, adorned with jasmine flowers. They wear loose, earth-toned peasant blouses, sarongs in muted greens and browns, and carry hidden krises beneath woven belts.

The scene captures them in a moonlit clearing near Balerejo village. In the background, silhouetted against the horizon, the Lawu mountain looms. They're practicing pencak silat and Tari Gambyong dance moves, blending martial arts stances with graceful hand gestures. Fireflies dot the air around them, adding a magical touch.

Dramatic side lighting from the moon casts long shadows, accentuating their movements. The overall mood is one of quiet determination and hidden strength.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Legenda Desa Grabahan
jobs.prompt:
A youthful Raden Ahmad, around 20, lean and muscular, with determined eyes and a strong jaw. His face is lightly tanned, framed by dark, sweaty hair pulled back from his forehead. He wears a coarse, mud-stained farmer's tunic of woven brown cloth, with a simple keris tucked into his belt.

The key scene depicts Raden Ahmad, with a resolute expression, extending a hand to help Raden Damar as they navigate through dense, uncharted wilderness. He is leading his small band of followers deeper into the forest, away from danger.

The setting is the dense, overgrown jungle east of Mount Lawu, at midday. Sunlight filters weakly through the thick canopy, casting dappled shadows. The air is humid and heavy, with the scent of damp earth and decaying leaves. Tangled vines and giant roots cover the forest floor.

Lighting is diffused sunlight filtering weakly through the canopy, accentuating the perilous atmosphere. Warm earth tones contrast with bright forest greens.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, composition centered for storybook cover.

jobs.title: Legenda Dewi Rengganis
jobs.prompt: A youthful Dewi Rengganis, appearing 17, lithe and graceful, with long black hair partially obscuring her face, expressive dark eyes conveying a mix of curiosity and apprehension, and supple tan skin. She wears a shimmering cinde wrapped at her waist, fabric resembling flowing silk in shades of emerald and gold, hinting at her magical abilities. Key scene: Dewi Rengganis stands waist-deep in the royal pool of Medayin, a serene but anxious expression on her face as Imam Suwangsa confronts her. Setting: A lush, overwatered royal garden in Medayin, filled with vibrant flowers, especially the seven-colored Seribu Manis, with classical Arabic arches visible in the background, late afternoon. Lighting: Soft, diffused light filters through the garden foliage, dappling the scene in warm and cool tones, with golden hour creating a magical atmosphere. Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Legenda Gunung Wukir
jobs.prompt: A youthful Ajisaka, appearing as a wise traveler in his early 20s, lean but strong, stands firm on the sandy beach, determination etched on his face. His face is angular, with sharp cheekbones and piercing brown eyes. He has long, flowing black hair, the color of night, cascading down his back, and warm tan skin. He wears traditional Tibetan clothing: a saffron robe of roughspun fabric, secured with a woven belt, and a intricately patterned white turban, partially unfurled. With a sweeping gesture, he extends the turban, its pattern vibrant with earthy reds and ochre, towards the monstrous Prabu Dewata Cengkar, who stumbles backward, wide-eyed with terror. The scene unfolds on the shore; jagged cliffs meet crashing waves under a twilight sky, dark clouds brewing overhead. Key light comes from a sliver of setting sun cutting through clouds. Soft, hand-painted watercolor in a Studio Ghibli style, soft bokeh background, framed as a storybook cover.

jobs.title: Legenda Kapong
jobs.prompt: A youthful, slender Rahmat, maybe 16, with sun-kissed skin and wide, hopeful eyes. His hair is neatly combed dark brown. He wears a simple, earthy-toned batik shirt, slightly dusty from travel, and brown trousers. He's animatedly grasping the hand of a kind-faced older man, Kepala Haris, in his 50s, dressed in clean, cream-colored traditional wear. The key moment: Rahmat expressing heartfelt gratitude after receiving permission to share the village's water source. The backdrop is a lush, verdant spring nestled within Kepala Haris's prosperous village. Ferns and flowering vines adorn the area around the spring. The sun filters through the trees creating dappled shadows. The lighting is warm and optimistic, like late afternoon. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh emphasizing the figures, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Legenda Kolam Segaran
jobs.prompt: A youthful Javanese princess, about 16, slender but regal, with a kind, intelligent expression. Oval face, dark almond-shaped eyes sparkling with warmth, long black hair flowing down her back, adorned with golden hairpins, light tan skin. She wears a batik kemben in rich earth tones and gold accents, a selendang draped gracefully over her shoulders, and golden bracelets. She presents a plate of golden bananas to visiting dignitaries with a welcoming smile. Setting: the Istana terapung (floating palace) on Kolam Segaran at sunset. The massive pool shimmers with golden light, reflecting the terracotta roof of the palace. Distant blue mountains form a backdrop. Warm, inviting light from the setting sun bathes the scene in a golden glow, highlighting the details of the palace and the princess's attire. Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Legenda Raden Panji Laras Raden Panji Liris
jobs.prompt:
Two lithe, almost identical twin princesses, Dyah Andanwangi and Dyah Andansari, around 18, determined expressions. Heart-shaped faces, dark kohl-lined eyes, determined gazes, long dark hair interwoven with gold ribbons, olive skin. Wardrobe: Practical but elegant warrior attire, long fitted tunics over comfortable pants in deep violet silk embroidered with golden sunbursts, minimal jewelry.

Key scene: The princesses, having magically fulfilled the impossible tasks, stride purposefully through a shallow river (Sungai Lamong), each carrying a massive stone urn and an enormous stone fan, determination in their eyes.

Setting: The muddy banks of the Sungai Lamong, viewed from a distance, with the town of Lamongan visible in the background; mid-morning light filtering through mist rising from the water.

Lighting: Soft, diffused sunlight, warm golden hues on the water and distant buildings.

Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Legenda Sarip Tambak Oso
jobs.prompt:
A determined Sarip Tambak Oso, a youthful Indonesian man around 20, lean but strong, with a shadow of stubble, gazes defiantly. His face is a classic Javanese oval, with intense dark eyes, a neatly trimmed mustache, and sun-kissed brown skin. He has short, neatly combed black hair. He wears a simple batik sarong wrapped around his waist, and a plain white peasant shirt, slightly torn at the sleeves, plus a silver Kris dagger tucked into his sarong.

The key moment: Sarip stands in a moonlit rice paddy at midnight, handing sacks of stolen rice to impoverished villagers, their faces etched with gratitude and relief.

The setting is Tambak Oso village, Sidoarjo, during the Dutch colonial era — traditional Javanese houses with thatched roofs are visible in the distance. Fireflies twinkle in the air.
The lighting is soft and cool, dominated by moonlight, with a warm, flickering lantern casting light on the villagers' faces.

Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. Warm earth tones with accents of indigo and silver.

jobs.title: Legenda Sendang Tawun
jobs.prompt:
A sturdy young man, Raden Lodrojoyo, around 20, kneels waist-deep in the moonlit Sendang Tawun lake. He has a kind face, dark, almond-shaped eyes gazing skyward, and a determined expression. His black hair is long and wet, clinging to his face. He wears a simple brown petani's (farmer's) outfit of thick woven cotton. Around his neck is a simple wooden bead necklace.

He looks up, hands clasped in prayer, as a beam of golden light erupts from the heavens, striking the water around him. The sendang magically rises upward in a whirlwind of swirling water and mist.

The time is midnight, the full moon obscured by fast-moving clouds. Ancient banyan trees surround the sendang, their roots glowing faintly. Fireflies dance in the air. A soft mist hangs over the water, illuminated by the divine light.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Legenda Sombher Bhaji
jobs.prompt: A Madurese woman, 20s, thin physique, weathered hands, filled with regret. Her face is gaunt, dark eyes welling with tears, tangled black hair framing a tired face, sun-darkened skin. Wearing a coarse brown woven kemben secured at her chest and waist, accented with faded indigo batik details. She kneels, placing a newborn baby boy, clean but unclothed, beneath an enormous, towering sugar palm tree, leaves rustling. Dawn light filters through the palm fronds, casting long shadows, highlighting her despair. A single shaft of light illuminates the infant. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition, warm earth tones with indigo and pale yellow accents.

jobs.title: Legenda Watu Ulo
jobs.prompt:
Princess Nagasari, 18, beautiful, determined, with long flowing black hair and dark expressive eyes, tan skin. Wardrobe of flowing silk batik dress, warm earth tones of ochre and sienna, with a contrasting green sash. Iconic accessory: a delicate golden hairpin shaped like a jasmine flower.

Key Scene: Princess Nagasari flees through a dense, moonlit jungle from the enraged dragon-form of Prince Nila Taksaka. She glances over her shoulder, fear mingling with resolve on her face.

Setting: The dark, overgrown Puger jungle near the sea. Twisted trees and thick vines form an ominous maze. Moonlight dapples the scene, casting long shadows. Crashing waves audible in the distance.

Lighting: Pale moonlight is the primary source, creating a high-contrast scene. The dragon-prince emits a faint magical green bioluminescence, adding an eerie glow.

Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Menak Koncar
jobs.prompt:
A strong, weary Mercuet, age 30s, broad-shouldered with a determined face, kneels, supporting himself on a rough wooden doorframe. His face is bruised, streaked with dirt and blood. Jinggosari, young and beautiful with long flowing black hair, supports her injured husband, her face etched with worry and fear, tears welling in her large brown eyes. She wears a simple batik kemben in muted earth tones, clinging to her pregnant form. Mercuet wears torn farmer's garb.

Inside the dimly lit bamboo hut, bundles are hastily packed. Outside, the approaching night casts long, ominous shadows. Key light comes from a single oil lamp inside the hut, casting warm light on Jinggosari and Mercuet's faces. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. Accents of indigo in the batik patterns.

jobs.title: Muntreng
jobs.prompt:
A slender girl named Muntreng, around 10 years old, with a worried expression. Her round face is framed by long, dark hair, and her eyes are wide and brown. She has fair skin and wears a simple, tattered dress of woven brown fabric, accented with a pale blue sash. In her hand, she carries a dull, rusty knife.

She stands at the edge of a dark, dense forest, looking up in apprehension at an ENORMOUS mushroom towering over her. The mushroom's cap is the size of a royal umbrella, a grand burgundy color, and its stem is thick like a coconut tree trunk.

Late afternoon sunlight filters weakly through the trees, creating long shadows and an eerie, golden glow. The forest air is misty, creating a dreamy, unsettling atmosphere.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Pemberontakan Arya Gledek
jobs.prompt: A youthful, muscular Arya Gledek, age 28, with a cruel smirk, leads his rebel army across a floral-decorated bridge. His face is square-jawed, with sharp, dark eyes; long, black hair pulled back in a warrior's braid; tanned skin. Gledek wears ornate but battle-worn bronze armor over a dark red tunic, a curved keris dagger prominently displayed at his hip. The bridge, spanning a deep ravine, is rigged to collapse beneath his weight. Kertonegoro's disguised soldiers are visible amongst the foliage on the ravine's sides. Setting: the border between Puger and Bondowoso, late afternoon, ominous clouds. Golden light catches the soldiers' faces. A Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor illustration, with soft bokeh background and a storybook cover composition, emphasizing action and impending doom. Warm earthy tones with crimson and bronze accents.

jobs.title: Perjalanan Sunan Giri
jobs.prompt: Eleven-year-old Jaka Samudra, earnest and bright-eyed, stands before Sunan Ampel. His face is thin, with kind brown eyes, neatly combed dark hair, and light brown skin. He wears a simple white cotton tunic and sarong, accented with a green batik pattern. Jaka Samudra respectfully offers a woven mat as a gift. Sunan Ampel, a wise man with a long white beard and gentle expression, accepts the offering within the bustling courtyard of Pesantren Ampeldenta. Sunlight streams through the intricately carved wooden pillars, casting dappled shadows across the scene filled with bustling students. The air is filled with the scent of incense and learning. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor with soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition, warm earthy tones with accents of green and white.

jobs.title: Prabu Angling Darma
jobs.prompt: Ageless Prabu Angling Darma, strong physique, clad in golden silk armor, detailed Javanese headdress, stands protectively before the terrified Dewi Hambarwati, her eyes wide with fear, dressed in a flowing batik gown. Prabu Angling Darma overhears a whispered conversation between two geckos on the palace wall, revealing a hidden plot against him; he bursts into laughter, much to his queen's confusion. The royal bedchamber of Malawapati Palace, opulent decorations with intricate wood carvings, soft candlelight casting long shadows, a stormy night visible through an open window. Soft, diffused light, warm golden hues mixing with cool blues from the storm outside, creating a sense of mystery. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, centered composition suitable for book cover.

jobs.title: Raden Bagus Assrah Pendiri Bondowoso
jobs.prompt: A young Raden Mas Astrotruno, barely a man, noble Javanese features, determined expression. Oval face, dark, intelligent eyes, neatly styled dark hair, light brown skin. Fine batik shirt in earth tones, a kris at his waist, simple princely adornments. He leads a white water buffalo named Melati through a dense, untamed jungle. The buffalo has distinctive, curved-down horns. Raden, with a determined look, gestures forward with his hand, leading his small band of four punakawan into the unknown. Thick jungle foliage, hints of distant mountains. Dawn light filters through the trees, creating dappled shadows and a hopeful, warm atmosphere. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Rara Kembang Sore
jobs.prompt:
A slender, graceful Rara Kembang Sore, appearing as Resi Winadi, about 30 years old, kneels serenely. Her face is heart-shaped with high cheekbones. Her eyes are deep brown, conveying wisdom, and her long black hair is partially pulled back in a simple bun, streaked with gray. She has fair skin. She wears a simple, flowing white robe of homespun fabric, accented with a wide sash of deep indigo. A small, intricately carved keris is tucked into her sash.

The scene depicts the moment Adipati Kalang is ordered to look up at her. He is kneeling awkwardly before her in a dirt clearing, finally recognizing Resi Winadi as the woman he failed to kill years ago. His expression is a mix of shock, anger, and shame.

The setting is a mountain clearing, Gunung Cilik, with lush ferns and moss-covered rocks. The time is late afternoon, with dappled sunlight filtering through trees. Key light comes from the left, highlighting Rara's face.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor with soft bokeh background, framed as a storybook cover.

jobs.title: Rebut Payung Aryo Blitar
jobs.prompt: A youthful, muscular Nila Suwama, age 30, battles a dozen shadowy Tar Tar warriors in a dense jungle clearing. Face determined, dark eyes focused, short black hair plastered to his forehead with sweat, brown skin glistening. He wears a simple brown Majapahit warrior tunic of rough woven fabric, accent color ochre, with a sarong tied at the waist, keris handle visible. He parries a blow with a bronze shield, deflecting a spear thrust as mud spatters around him. Jungle location: towering trees, thick vines, dappled sunlight piercing the canopy. Golden hour lighting, shafts of warm light contrast with deep shadows. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition with title text at top.

jobs.title: Ronggolawe
jobs.prompt: A courageous 20-year-old Ronggolawe, muscular and determined, with a strong jawline and piercing dark eyes, long black hair flowing in the wind, tan skin. He wears a crimson and gold Surjan jacket of woven silk, a Kris dagger at his waist, and sturdy leather boots, he sits astride Nilam Umbara, his loyal steed. The key scene is the battle in the shallows of Sungai Tambakberas; Ronggolawe, wounded but defiant, is being protected by Nilam Umbara. The horse's back is to the foreground, shielding Ronggolawe's body. Kebo Anabrang stands opposite, a keris in his hand, river water swirling around them. The setting is sunset at the shallow river, creating long shadows and dramatic lighting. Golden light reflects off the water. Soft bokeh background suggesting the Majapahit kingdom. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Sang Danding Anak Janda Miskin
jobs.prompt:
A boy named Sang Danding, around 10 years old, lean build, wearing a simple brown sarong, stands on a woven mat. His face is round, with bright, curious brown eyes and a mischievous grin, dark hair neatly combed. He is squatting over a brand new, colorful kasur (mattress) as golden coins spill out from underneath him with a loud "clink."

The setting is the interior of a modest, stilt house, with woven walls and a dirt floor. The room is sparsely furnished. Golden sunlight streams through cracks in the walls, illuminating the scene.

His mother, a thin woman with a kind face and tired eyes, wearing a simple batik dress, kneels beside him, her hands clasped in amazement.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, warm earthy tones with gold accents, centered composition for storybook cover.

jobs.title: Sekepel
jobs.prompt: A girl named Sekepel, the size of a human fist, stands defiantly before Yai Buto Ijo, a towering green ogre with sharp tusks and a menacing snarl. Sekepel has a determined face with bright, round eyes, neat dark hair, and light brown skin, wearing simple patchwork clothes. She stands in a farmyard, addressing the ogre. He's mid-roar, saliva flying, about to grab her. Weathered wooden fences surround abandoned animal pens; villagers flee in the distance. Mid-morning light casts long shadows, highlighting Sekepel’s bravery against the ogre's imposing figure. Warm light emphasizes the golden hay and earth tones of the farmyard, contrasting with Yai Buto Ijo's sickly green skin. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Tanjung Kodok
jobs.prompt:
A muscular, giant male frog with mottled green skin, bulging golden eyes, and a thick, powerful build, stands neck-deep in the swift-flowing Bengawan Solo river, circa 1400s Java. His face shows intense concentration and determination. He wears a simple loincloth of rough brown burlap. He strains against a massive teak log, pushing it downriver. The river is crowded with hundreds of similar giant frogs, forming orderly lines to control the logs.

Setting: The wide, muddy Bengawan Solo River, near a dense teak forest. Midday sun, humid air, dappled light filtering through the trees.

Lighting: Strong directional sunlight creating highlights on the frogs' wet skin and casting long shadows in the water.

Style: Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition. Warm earth tones and deep greens with a splash of golden light on the frog's eyes.

jobs.title: Tasbih Biji Pisang Pidak
jobs.prompt:
A youthful Sunan Bonang, around 25, with a serene expression, dressed in simple cream-colored robes of roughspun cotton, a green sash tied at his waist, holding aloft a shimmering tasbih made of golden banana seeds. His face is kind with gentle wrinkles around the eyes, dark kind eyes, with neatly combed dark brown hair and fair skin.

In the foreground, Bajilul, a muscular bandit with a shaved head, dark tattoos, and a sneering expression, recoils from a radiant burst of light emanating from the point of contact between the tasbih and his bare back. Sparks fly, illuminating his shocked face.

The backdrop depicts a dense, primordial Javanese forest near Tuban at midday. Sunlight filters through the thick canopy, dappling the ground with light. Ferns and vines intertwine around ancient trees.

Golden light highlights Sunan Bonang, creating a holy aura. The overall mood is one of divine intervention and the triumph of faith over brute force.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Terjadinya Gunung Batok
jobs.prompt:
A slender, youthful Rara Anteng, about 17, gazes anxiously towards the half-finished sea of sand. Her face is oval-shaped, with large, dark eyes filled with worry. Long, black hair cascades down her back, adorned with delicate jasmine flowers. Her skin is a light golden-brown color. She wears a flowing, earthy-toned batik dress, cinched at the waist with a woven belt, accentuating her grace.

The dramatic moment captures Rara Anteng tricking the pirate with the sound of pounding rice, a desperate act to halt his impossible task.

Setting: the slopes of an active, smoky Mount Bromo at pre-dawn. Under a dark blue, starlit sky, the sounds of other women pounding rice can be seen in the distance.

Lighting: cool moonlight from above, with warm flickering torchlight near Rara Anteng's face, casting long shadows and highlighting her fear and determination, soft bokeh background.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Terjadinya Telaga Ranu Grati
jobs.prompt: A frail but kind-looking Nyai Le, age 70, wrinkled face, sits inside a large, upturned wooden rice mortar (lesung). Her eyes are wide with fear but also trust. She wears a simple, patched brown woven skirt and a faded indigo shawl. Around her, the Ranu Klindungan village is being flooded—miniature houses are collapsing, and people are fleeing in panic, their faces contorted in terror. Dark storm clouds churn above, with lightning illuminating the chaos. In the distance, Kiai Syeh Begawan Nyampo (in human form), stands tall and sorrowful. The water swirling around the lesung reflects the fiery light. Soft golden light highlights Nyai Le’s face, creating a safe haven amidst the destruction. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Terjadinya Telaga Sarangan
jobs.prompt: A young Nyai Pasir, slender and graceful with a worried expression, dark kind eyes, and long black hair pulled back in a simple bun, stands in the doorway of her small bamboo hut. She wears a simple woven sarong in earth tones and a pale yellow blouse. In her hands, she holds a half-eaten boiled egg, its yolk a vibrant orange. Behind her, inside the dim, smoky hut, a small fire burns. Outside, Kiai Pasir, of similar age and build, already transformed into a massive, glistening, earth-toned serpent, bursts through their small garden, scattering plants and debris, his scales catching the morning light. The ground behind him is torn and deeply gouged. Dawn light filters through the trees, casting long shadows and an ominous golden glow. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Abo Mamongkuroit dan Tulap si Raksasa
jobs.prompt: Abo Mamongkuroit, a nimble young man with muscular legs, faces the ogre Tulap. Abo's face is determined, with bright, intelligent eyes. He has a kind face and wears a traditional woven loincloth with earth-toned patterns adorned with tribal beads. The ogre Tulap has mossy green skin, yellowed tusks, and wild black hair. They are competing in a leg wrestling match in a clearing near a bamboo forest in Borneo. Sunlight dapples through the trees, creating a warm, humid atmosphere. Abo strains, a victorious roar building while Tulap grits his teeth in surprised frustration. Golden hour lighting, Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor illustration, soft bokeh background, centered storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Asal Mula Bukit Catu
jobs.prompt: A kindly, wrinkled old rice farmer, age 70, male, lean physique. Round face, warm brown eyes squinting in the sunlight, short white hair, tanned skin. Wearing a woven bamboo hat, patched brown tunic, dark blue sarong, carrying a small trowel. He is carefully patting a large, perfectly round mound of fertile, dark soil, shaping it into a giant catu (rice container). Lush green rice paddies stretch to the horizon under a bright afternoon sun. Distant volcanoes on the horizon. Golden sunlight streaming across the rice fields, casting long shadows. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Asal Mula Kota Cianjur
jobs.prompt: Teenage boy, wise and determined, standing amidst a flooded village, water swirling around his waist. Oval face, determined brown eyes, short dark hair plastered to his forehead, tanned skin. Wearing simple homespun brown trousers and a torn white shirt, sleeves rolled up, holding a wooden staff for balance. He gazes towards the distant horizon, envisioning a new city. Muddy water reflects the stormy sky, ruined thatch-roofed huts barely visible. Heavy rainfall, dark storm clouds gathering overhead, flashes of lightning. Key light from a break in the clouds illuminates the boy's face, warm fill light accentuating his resolve. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Asal Mula Pamboang
jobs.prompt:
Three young indigenous men, strong and determined, united stance, holding hands, adorned with tribal face paint and ceremonial headdresses

Oval faces, dark expressive eyes reflecting hope, long black hair braided with colorful threads, warm brown skin tones

Woven grass tunics, earthy colors, beaded necklaces, carrying symbolic stone axes and bamboo staffs

Triumphantly overlooking a newly united territory, raising their hands in a gesture of peace and prosperity, expressions of unity and shared purpose

Lush tropical valley at sunset in Sulawesi, Indonesia, traditional thatched-roof village in the distance, vibrant flora and fauna, sense of a new beginning

Golden hour lighting, warm sidelight accentuating their faces, soft fill light creating a hopeful ambiance, gentle sun rays filtering through the trees

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition

jobs.title: Asal Mula Tanjung Menangis
jobs.prompt: A young boy named Binaut, age 10, thin and ragged, clutching a smoldering gold coin, face streaked with soot. Round face, wide desperate brown eyes, tangled black hair, tan skin. Simple torn burlap tunic, remnants of gold jewelry melted to his fingers. Weeping in agony as volcanic lava engulfs his legs, the smoking coin clutched in his hand. On a black sand beach littered with volcanic rock, dawn breaking over a turbulent grey sea. Harsh orange light from the flowing lava illuminating his tear-streaked face, soft blue fill light from the approaching sunrise. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Asal Mula Tapa, Tuladenggi, dan Pathungo
jobs.prompt: King Tilahunga, middle-aged man with a regal bearing, sits wearily on a mossy rock, repairing a broken fishing net, strong hands carefully weaving. Oval face, kind brown eyes, a neatly trimmed dark beard, sun-kissed skin. He wears simple, earth-toned robes of woven hemp, practical for travel, and a woven headwrap. Setting: A lush jungle clearing somewhere in Sulawesi; late afternoon with dappled sunlight filtering through the dense canopy, illuminating the king's focused expression. The air is humid, with a hint of woodsmoke from a small fire nearby. Golden hour lighting with a soft, warm glow. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Asal Mula Telaga Biru
jobs.prompt: Young woman Majojaru, early 20s, slender, heartbroken, luminous tears streaming down her face. Oval face, wide tearful brown eyes, long black hair cascading down her shoulders, fair skin. Flowing blue linen dress, simple gold ring on her finger, clutching a woven fishing net. Majojaru kneels at the edge of a newly formed, perfectly round lake, her tears magically filling it with crystal-clear blue water. Tropical forest backdrop, mid-morning sunlight filtering through the trees, mist rising from the lake's surface, vibrant butterflies fluttering around her. Soft golden hour light, gentle fill, ethereal mood. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Asal-usul Batang Aren
jobs.prompt: A youthful Princess Sedoro Putih, age 17, petite build, long black hair cascading down her shoulders, mournful expression. Oval face, dark brown eyes glistening with unshed tears, fair skin. She wears a flowing white gown of delicate silk, adorned with subtle floral embroidery; a single golden hairpin secures her hair. Gently kneeling beside a newly planted sugar palm sapling, placing her hand lovingly on its trunk; a serene, heartbreaking farewell. Verdant Javanese village clearing, midday sun filtering through leaves, casting dappled shadows. Warm, ethereal lighting, hints of golden hour glow, soft bokeh background. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Asal-usul Burung Cenderawasih
jobs.prompt:
Young Kweiya, a thin boy of 9, and his weary mother, dark hair streaked with gray, transformed into Lesser Birds-of-Paradise. Long faces, wide brown eyes reflecting hope and fear, tawny skin. Kweiya wears woven vine bracelets, his mother a tattered bark skirt. They clutch makeshift wings of spun tree fibers, dyed sunset orange and sienna.

Desperate, they leap from a moss-covered banyan tree toward the rising sun. Expressions hopeful as feathers sprout, bodies shimmer with nascent plumage. The primeval Papuan rainforest setting: tangled emerald jungle, mist-shrouded peaks in distance.

Golden hour lighting filters through the canopy, dappling the scene in amber, highlighting the birds' transformation. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, centered storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Asal-usul Nama Irian
jobs.prompt: Young boy Mananamakrdi, age 10, and girl Insoraki, age 8, Papuan children, peering at a Dutch trading ship; round faces, wide hopeful eyes, dark curly hair, cocoa skin. Mananamakrdi in woven grass vest, red beaded necklace; Insoraki in raffia skirt, colorful shell bracelets. Moment of discovery: Children decipher the word "Irian" painted on the ship's hull, their skin miraculously clearing of scales. Tropical beach setting with palm trees, golden sand, blue ocean; the VOC trading ship anchored offshore. Mid-morning sunlight casting long shadows, warm tropical breeze carrying the scent of salt and frangipani. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Asal-usul Nama Kali Gajah Wong
jobs.prompt:
Young boy, Ki Kerti Pejok, age 10, slim build, determined expression, clinging to the tusk of a massive, ornate elephant statue, Kyai Dwipangga. Ki Kerti has a round face, dark eyes wide with fear, and short, choppy black hair, tanned skin. He wears a simple, mud-stained brown homespun shirt and shorts. The statue is carved from dark wood, decorated with gold leaf. 

They are swept away in a raging river flood in Yogyakarta; the river churns violently around them, carrying debris. The riverbanks are lush green rice paddies beneath a stormy, grey sky. Torrents of rain obscure the background. 

Key light from the upper left reflects off the water. Overcast, somber mood.

Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Asal-usul Pohon Sagu dan Palem

Ominous, dramatic lighting with divine golden rays highlighting the dragon's glittering scales. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Terompah Sultan Gajadean
jobs.prompt: Sultan Gajadean, age 40s, regal bearing but face clouded with anger, thick mustache. Oval face, dark eyes glaring, black hair neatly styled, tanned skin. Silk robes, maroon and gold, ornate kris tucked into his belt, terompah sandals at his feet. He's commanding servants to seal a giant clay jar, overflowing with garbage and refuse, a cruel smile playing on his lips. The royal courtyard of a Javanese palace, midday sun, oppressive heat, dust motes dancing in the air. Strong directional light from the right, casting long shadows, warm fill light creating a sense of unease. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Timun Mas
jobs.prompt: Ten-year-old Timun Mas, small and agile, determined, long dark hair escaping her loose braid, round face, wide brown eyes filled with courage and fear. Her simple woven kemben and sarong are earth-toned with a golden sash. She is mid-sprint, glancing back, throwing a handful of salt over her shoulder with a look of desperate resolve as the salt transforms into a vast, churning sea behind her. Lush Javanese jungle, dense green foliage, glowing sunbeams filtering through the canopy, dappled light on the jungle floor. Key light from the front, warm fill light from the side, creating a dramatic, hopeful mood. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: To Dilaling
jobs.prompt: To Dilaling, a youthful Balanipa prince, strong physique, determined expression. Oval face, bright dark eyes, long black hair flowing in the wind, golden tan skin. Traditional Balanipa royal attire: woven silk shirt, sarong with intricate patterns, golden headdress, ceremonial dagger at his waist. In a dramatic battle scene, Dilaling stands victorious over the defeated King Lego. Lush Balanipa jungle clearing as the sun sets, casting long shadows. Warm golden light illuminates Dilaling's face, highlighting his bravery. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.

jobs.title: Wewe Wula dan Asal-Usul Suku Ni'i
jobs.prompt: A youthful Wewe Wula, revealed as a supernatural shapeshifter, slender and graceful. Oval face, wide trusting brown eyes, long black hair cascading down her shoulders, warm tan skin. She wears a hand-woven indigo sarong, adorned with delicate golden threads and tribal motifs, a single hibiscus tucked behind her ear. With a sorrowful yet accepting expression, she transforms into a giant fruit bat, wings partially unfurled. A humble village clearing in Nusa Tenggara Timur at twilight. The orange sun sets behind distant volcanic peaks, casting long shadows. Golden hour lighting, soft directional light illuminating her face, creating a mystical and gentle ambiance. Studio Ghibli-inspired hand-painted watercolor, soft bokeh background, storybook cover composition.
